samples.title: s000091_f459979d / metagpt-custom/gpt-5
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
left to right direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #34495E
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5
skinparam package {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam database {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam cloud {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}

package "LwM2M Blockchain Platform" as Platform {
    rectangle "External Applications\nusing LwM2M" as ExternalApps
    rectangle "Secure API\nAuthenticated HTTP endpoints" as SecureApi
    rectangle "LwM2M Server\nLeshan server component" as Lwm2mServer
    rectangle "LwM2M Client\nDevice 1" as Lwm2mClientOne
    rectangle "LwM2M Client\nDevice 2" as Lwm2mClientTwo
    rectangle "LwM2M Bootstrap Server" as BootstrapServer
    rectangle "Management Web UI" as ManagementUi
    cloud "Blockchain Network\nEthereum / Web3j" as BlockchainNetwork
    database "BootstrapStore\nSmart Contract" as BootstrapStore
}

ExternalApps <--> SecureApi : access LwM2M client data\nclient management
SecureApi --> Lwm2mServer : protected operations
ExternalApps --> ManagementUi : critical events

ManagementUi --> SecureApi : register LwM2M clients\nmanage users
ManagementUi --> BlockchainNetwork : access control\ncritical events

Lwm2mServer <--> Lwm2mClientOne : LwM2M secure connection
Lwm2mServer <--> Lwm2mClientTwo : LwM2M secure connection
Lwm2mClientTwo <--> BootstrapServer : LwM2M client bootstrapping

Lwm2mServer <--> BlockchainNetwork : external application\nreliable access control
BootstrapServer <--> BlockchainNetwork : bootstrapping\nreliable information

BlockchainNetwork --> BootstrapStore : getAllClients
BlockchainNetwork --> BootstrapStore : addClient
BlockchainNetwork --> BootstrapStore : getClient
SecureApi --> BlockchainNetwork : Web3j HTTP service
BootstrapServer --> SecureApi : LwM2M node JSON\nbootstrap data
@enduml

samples.title: Campus_Helper / metagpt-custom/claude-sonnet-4-6
samples.pred_source:
@startuml Campus_Helper_Platform_Architecture

skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA
skinparam componentStyle uml2
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam defaultFontSize 12

skinparam package {
  BorderColor #4A6FA5
  FontColor #2C3E50
  FontStyle bold
  BackgroundColor #EAF2FB
}

skinparam component {
  BorderColor #2980B9
  BackgroundColor #D6EAF8
  FontColor #1A252F
}

skinparam node {
  BorderColor #1E8449
  BackgroundColor #D5F5E3
  FontColor #1A252F
}

skinparam database {
  BorderColor #7D3C98
  BackgroundColor #E8DAEF
  FontColor #1A252F
}

skinparam cloud {
  BorderColor #E67E22
  BackgroundColor #FDEBD0
  FontColor #1A252F
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' EXTERNAL SYSTEMS  (S-003: node for OS; H-002: DBMS removed; H-003: out-of-scope node removed)
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
cloud "WeChat Platform / Runtime\n(WeChat 8.0+)" as WeChatRuntime
node "Android OS (5.0+)" as AndroidOS

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' PRESENTATION LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Presentation Layer" as PresentationLayer {
  component "WeChat Mini Program UI\n(User & Admin Interfaces)" as MiniProgramClient <<MiniProgramClient>>
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' BUSINESS LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Business Layer" as BusinessLayer {

  component "Input Validation\nSQL Injection Prevention\nBot / Malicious Behavior Detection\n(>=98% recognition rate)" as SecurityFilter <<SecurityFilter>>

  component "Permission Control\nRole Enforcement\n(Guest / User / Customer\n/ Seller / Admin)" as AuthorizationGuard <<AuthorizationGuard>>

  component "Account Management\nAuthentication\nRole Assignment" as UserService <<UserService>>

  component "Popularity-Sorted Listing\nCategory-Filtered Browse\nProduct Detail Display" as ProductBrowsingService <<ProductBrowsingService>>

  component "Order Lifecycle Management\n(Create / Modify Remark\n/ Confirm / Cancel)" as OrderService <<OrderService>>

  component "Personal Center\nFavorites Viewing\nOrder Record Viewing" as PersonalCenterService <<PersonalCenterService>>

  component "Favorite Relationship\nStore & Retrieve" as FavoritesService <<FavoritesService>>

  component "Product Overview / Detail\nSearch / Modify\nSingle & Batch Delete\n(Second-Confirmation Flow)" as AdminProductMgmt <<AdminProductManagementService>>

  component "All Orders View\nOrder Detail\nOrder Modification" as AdminOrderMgmt <<AdminOrderManagementService>>

  component "All Users View\nUser Detail\nUser Modification" as AdminUserMgmt <<AdminUserManagementService>>

}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' DATA LAYER  (H-001: AdminLogService moved here)
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Data Layer" as DataLayer {

  component "Data Review & Privacy Gate\n(Pre-write review enforcement\nper NFR-004 / DR-008)" as DataReviewGate <<DataReviewGate>>

  component "CRUD Abstraction\nPrivacy Protection\n(Sole Gateway to DB)" as DataAccessRepository <<DataAccessRepository>>

  component "Keyword / Publisher / Status\nName / Number Search\n(Response-Time SLA)" as SearchService <<SearchService>>

  component "Admin Operation Recording\nMulti-Condition Log Retrieval" as AdminLogService <<AdminLogService>>

  component "CPU / Memory / I/O / Connections\nQPS / Response Time / Error Codes\nDB Load / Slow Queries\nCache / Queue / Storage Metrics" as MonitoringService <<MonitoringAndObservabilityService>>

}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' DATA ENTITY LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Data Entity Layer" as DataEntityLayer {

  database "Database\n[User | Product | Tag/Category\n| Order | Favorite\n| AdminLog | FaultMonitoringData]\n(<=100K rows/table, <=100 GB total)" as Database

}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' EXTERNAL SYSTEM RELATIONSHIPS
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
MiniProgramClient ..> WeChatRuntime : <<depends on>>\nMini Program Runtime
MiniProgramClient ..> AndroidOS : <<runs on>>\nDevice OS

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' PRESENTATION → BUSINESS LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
MiniProgramClient --> SecurityFilter : all inbound requests\npass through security filter
SecurityFilter --> AuthorizationGuard : validated request\nforwarded for auth check
AuthorizationGuard --> UserService : authentication &\nregistration requests
AuthorizationGuard --> ProductBrowsingService : authorized browse\n& detail requests
AuthorizationGuard --> OrderService : authorized order\ncreate / modify / confirm / cancel
AuthorizationGuard --> PersonalCenterService : authorized personal\ncenter access
AuthorizationGuard --> AdminProductMgmt : admin product\noperations
AuthorizationGuard --> AdminOrderMgmt : admin order\noperations
AuthorizationGuard --> AdminUserMgmt : admin user\noperations

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' PERSONAL CENTER → SUPPORTING SERVICES
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
PersonalCenterService --> FavoritesService : favorites\nstore & retrieve
PersonalCenterService --> OrderService : order record\nretrieval

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' BUSINESS → SEARCH SERVICE  (D-001: correct invocation direction)
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
AdminProductMgmt --> SearchService : product search by\npublisher / name / status
AdminUserMgmt --> SearchService : user search by\nkey fields
ProductBrowsingService --> SearchService : keyword\nproduct search

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' ADMIN SERVICES → LOG SERVICE
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
AdminProductMgmt --> AdminLogService : log admin\nproduct operations
AdminOrderMgmt --> AdminLogService : log admin\norder operations
AdminUserMgmt --> AdminLogService : log admin\nuser operations

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' SECURITY EVENTS → LOG / MONITORING  (D-003)
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
SecurityFilter --> AdminLogService : log security events\n(injection / bot detection)
SecurityFilter --> MonitoringService : security event\nmetrics

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' ADMIN USER MGMT ↔ USER SERVICE  (D-004)
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
AdminUserMgmt --> UserService : shared user account\nlookup & logic

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' APPLICATION SERVICES → MONITORING  (M-003 / D-002)
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
OrderService --> MonitoringService : QPS / response time\n/ error codes
ProductBrowsingService --> MonitoringService : QPS / response time\n/ error codes
UserService --> MonitoringService : service-level\nmetrics
FavoritesService --> MonitoringService : service-level\nmetrics

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' BUSINESS → DATA LAYER  (write path via DataReviewGate)
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
ProductBrowsingService --> DataReviewGate : product / tag /\nfavorite queries
OrderService --> DataReviewGate : order lifecycle\nstate writes & updates
FavoritesService --> DataReviewGate : favorite\nread & write
UserService --> DataReviewGate : user account\npersistence
AdminProductMgmt --> DataReviewGate : product read /\nupdate / delete
AdminOrderMgmt --> DataReviewGate : order read\n& update
AdminUserMgmt --> DataReviewGate : user read\n& update
AdminLogService --> DataReviewGate : admin log\nwrite & retrieve
SearchService --> DataAccessRepository : search queries\nrouted via data layer

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' DATA REVIEW GATE → REPOSITORY  (M-004)
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
DataReviewGate --> DataAccessRepository : reviewed & sanitised\ndata forwarded

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' DATA LAYER → DATA ENTITY LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
DataAccessRepository --> Database : sole gateway —\nall CRUD persistence
MonitoringService --> Database : collect DB load /\nslow query / storage metrics

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' --- Configuration & Styles ---
skinparam topboxSelection true
skinparam Direction top to bottom
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false

' Define Styles based on original ClassDefs
<style>
    .ui {
        BackgroundColor #ccff90
        LineColor #33691e
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .display {
        BackgroundColor #fff3e0
        LineColor #e65100
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .business {
        BackgroundColor #b2dfdb
        LineColor #004d40
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .dataLogic {
        BackgroundColor #e1bee7
        LineColor #4a148c
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .storage {
        BackgroundColor #bbdefb
        LineColor #0d47a1
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .env {
        BackgroundColor #cfd8dc
        LineColor #37474f
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .crosscut {
        BackgroundColor #ffcdd2
        LineColor #b71c1c
        LineThickness 2
    }
</style>

' --- Layer 1: UI Layer ---
package "Mini-program UI" as UI_Layer <<ui>> {
    rectangle "Wxml" as WXML <<ui>>
    rectangle "Wxss" as WXSS <<ui>>
    rectangle "JavaScript" as JS <<ui>>
}

' --- Layer 2: Display Layer ---
package "Display Layer" as Display_Layer <<display>> {
    rectangle "Template Engine Rendering\n(pages)" as Render <<display>>
    rectangle "wx.request Interaction" as Interact <<display>>
    rectangle "POST Request" as ReqPost <<display>>
    rectangle "GET Request" as ReqGet <<display>>
}

' --- Layer 3: Business Layer ---
package "Business Layer" as Business_Layer <<business>> {
    package "Core Services" as Main_Services {
        rectangle "Help Goods Service" as Svc_Goods <<business>>
        rectangle "Order Mgmt Service" as Svc_Order <<business>>
        rectangle "Personal Center Service" as Svc_User <<business>>
        rectangle "Admin Mgmt Service" as Svc_Admin <<business>>
    }

    package "Functional Modules" as Modules {
        rectangle "Hot Items Module" as Mod_Hot <<business>>
        rectangle "Create Order Module" as Mod_CreateOrder <<business>>
        rectangle "Favorites Module" as Mod_Fav <<business>>
        rectangle "Modify User Info Module" as Mod_UserInfo <<business>>
        rectangle "Goods Category Module" as Mod_Cat <<business>>
        rectangle "Order Record Module" as Mod_OrderRec <<business>>
        rectangle "Platform Mgmt Module" as Mod_Platform <<business>>
        rectangle "......" as Mod_More <<business>>
    }
}

' --- Cross-Cutting Concerns ---
rectangle "Log Recording" as Logs <<crosscut>>
rectangle "Permission Control" as Auth <<crosscut>>

' --- Layer 4: Data Layer ---
package "Data Layer" as Data_Logic_Layer <<dataLogic>> {
    rectangle "Stored Procedures" as StoredProc <<dataLogic>>
    rectangle "Custom Functions" as CustomFunc <<dataLogic>>
    rectangle "Data Cache" as DataCache <<dataLogic>>
    rectangle "Data Backup" as Backup <<dataLogic>>
    rectangle "Data Recovery" as Recovery <<dataLogic>>
    rectangle "Read/Write Database" as RW_DB <<dataLogic>>
}

' --- Layer 5: Database ---
package "Database" as Database_Storage <<storage>> {
    database "MySQL" as MySQL_Main <<storage>>
}

' --- Layer 6: Runtime Environment ---
package "Runtime Environment" as Runtime_Env <<env>> {
    node "Tencent Cloud\nLightweight App Server" as Server <<env>>
    node "MySQL 106.55.224.139\n2 Cores 4GB" as ServerSpec <<env>>
}

' --- Relationships ---
UI_Layer --> Display_Layer
Display_Layer --> Business_Layer
Interact -- ReqPost
Interact -- ReqGet

Business_Layer --> Data_Logic_Layer
Data_Logic_Layer --> Database_Storage
Runtime_Env --> Database_Storage

' Cross Cutting Links (Dotted)
Business_Layer .. Logs
Business_Layer .. Auth
Data_Logic_Layer .. Logs
Data_Logic_Layer .. Auth
Display_Layer .. Logs

@enduml

completeness.reasoning: The diagram comprehensively captures all functional modules (product browsing, order management, personal center, admin management) and non-functional requirements (security filtering, authorization, data review, and observability) defined in the SRS.

faithfulness.reasoning: The architecture strictly adheres to the mandated four-layer division (Presentation, Business, Data, Data Entity) and abstains from introducing unsupported technical assumptions such as specific database engines or cloud providers.

architectural_rationality.reasoning: The component interactions are highly logical, establishing a clear pipeline from the Presentation Layer through Security/Auth filters to Business components, followed by Data Review gates and a unified Data Access Repository before reaching the Data Entity Layer.

traceability.reasoning: Component names and responsibilities clearly reflect the requirements. The diagram explicitly mentions specific metrics (e.g., '>=98% recognition rate', '<=100K rows/table') and references requirement IDs like NFR-004 and DR-008, though some traceability markers are confined to comments.

readability.reasoning: The diagram is visually well-organized with clear package boundaries, consistent styling, logically grouped components, and descriptive relationship labels that make the data flow easy to understand.

samples.title: asp / openhands/gpt-5
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title Requirements Review Checklist - Architecture View

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
left to right direction

' Users (represented as components with <<User>> stereotype)
component "Reviewer" <<User>> as Reviewer
component "Requirements Owner" <<User>> as Owner
component "Project Stakeholder" <<User>> as Stakeholder

' External Sources
artifact "Requirements Document\n(under review)" as ReqDoc
folder "Standards & Specifications\n(industry, product, business, documentation)" as Standards

' Main Artifact
package "Requirements Review Artifact\n(Markdown Checklist)" as Artifact {
  component "Objective & Basis Section" as ObjBasis
  component "Completeness Check" as CheckCompleteness
  component "Exception & Auxiliary Coverage Check" as CheckExceptions
  component "Understandability Check" as CheckUnderstandability
  component "Model Accuracy Check" as CheckModel
  component "Extension & Improvement Check" as CheckExtend
  component "Scoring (4x10 + total)" as Scoring
  artifact "Problem Report" as ProblemReport
  artifact "Score Record" as ScoreRecord
  artifact "Review Metadata\n(reviewer, date)" as ReviewMeta
}

' Relationships
Reviewer --> Artifact : fills checklist,\nrecords findings & scores
Artifact ..> ReqDoc : references
Artifact ..> Standards : considers

ObjBasis -down- CheckCompleteness
ObjBasis -down- CheckExceptions
ObjBasis -down- CheckUnderstandability
ObjBasis -down- CheckModel
ObjBasis -down- CheckExtend

CheckCompleteness --> ProblemReport
CheckExceptions --> ProblemReport
CheckUnderstandability --> ProblemReport
CheckModel --> ProblemReport
CheckExtend --> ProblemReport

CheckCompleteness --> Scoring
CheckExceptions --> Scoring
CheckUnderstandability --> Scoring
CheckModel --> Scoring
CheckExtend --> Scoring

Scoring --> ScoreRecord
Reviewer --> ReviewMeta : signs

ProblemReport --> Owner : delivers findings
ScoreRecord --> Owner
ProblemReport --> Stakeholder : share summary
ScoreRecord --> Stakeholder

' Constraints and Notes
note right of ObjBasis
C-001: Use review & verification methods
C-002: Consider standards/specifications
end note

note right of Scoring
C-003: Four dimensions (10 pts each)\nTotal out of 40
end note

note bottom of Artifact
C-004: Business requirements are out of scope for this artifact.
end note

' Data requirements mapping
note top of ProblemReport
Stores: issues, overall evaluation,\nimprovement suggestions (DR-003)
end note

note top of ScoreRecord
Stores: completeness, understandability,\nmodel accuracy, extension/improvement scores,\nand total (DR-004)
end note

note top of ReviewMeta
Stores: reviewer identity, review date (DR-005)
end note

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' --- Configuration ---
top to bottom direction
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam componentStyle uml2

' --- Styling ---
skinparam rectangle<<ClientLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #f9f
    BorderColor #333
}
skinparam rectangle<<NetworkLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #b2ebf2
    BorderColor #00838f
}
skinparam rectangle<<ServiceLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #c8e6c9
    BorderColor #2e7d32
}
skinparam database<<StorageLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #fff9c4
    BorderColor #fbc02d
}

' --- Layer 1: Frontend / Client Layer ---
rectangle "Client Layer" <<ClientLayer>> {
    component [Client Terminal] as Client
    component [Cloud DNS] as DNS
}

' --- Layer 2: Network / Gateway Layer ---
rectangle "Network / Gateway Layer" <<NetworkLayer>> {
    rectangle "Machine 01" {
        component [LVS - Linux Virtual Server] as LVS01
        component [Nginx] as Nginx01
    }
    rectangle "Machine 02" {
        component [LVS - Linux Virtual Server] as LVS02
        component [Nginx] as Nginx02_A
        component [Nginx] as Nginx02_B
    }
    rectangle "Machine 03" {
        component [LVS - Linux Virtual Server] as LVS03
        component [Nginx] as Nginx03
    }
}

' --- Layer 3: Service / Backend Layer ---
rectangle "Service / Backend Layer" <<ServiceLayer>> {
    component [Django Service Clusters] as Django
    component [Socializing Service] as Social
    component [User Information Service] as UserInfo
    component [Literature Service] as Literature
    component [Back-office Management] as BackOffice
}

' --- Layer 4: Storage / Database Layer ---
rectangle "Storage / Database Layer" <<StorageLayer>> {
    database "Redis Cache" as Redis
    database "Elasticsearch" as ES
    database "MySQL Database" as MySQL
}

' --- Connection Relationships ---
Client --> DNS
Client --> LVS01
Client --> LVS02
Client --> LVS03

LVS01 --> Nginx01
LVS02 --> Nginx02_A
LVS02 --> Nginx02_B
LVS03 --> Nginx03

Nginx01 --> Django
Nginx02_A --> Django
Nginx02_B --> Django
Nginx03 --> Django

Django --> Social
Django --> UserInfo
Django --> Literature
Django --> BackOffice

Social --> Redis
Social --> ES
Social --> MySQL

UserInfo --> Redis
UserInfo --> ES
UserInfo --> MySQL

Literature --> Redis
Literature --> ES
Literature --> MySQL

BackOffice --> Redis
BackOffice --> ES
BackOffice --> MySQL

@enduml

completeness.reasoning: The diagram captures all functional requirements (FR-001 to FR-010), non-functional requirements (NFR-001 to NFR-004), data requirements (DR-001 to DR-005), and constraints (C-001 to C-004). User classes and external dependencies are also explicitly modeled.

faithfulness.reasoning: There are no unsupported elements or hallucinated features. Every component, artifact, and actor in the diagram is directly traceable to the provided SRS document.

architectural_rationality.reasoning: The architecture correctly models a static document (Markdown Checklist) as a package containing logical sections (components) and generated data records (artifacts). samples.pred_source:
@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class

skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA
skinparam component {
  BackgroundColor #EEF2FF
  BorderColor #5B7FDE
  FontColor #1A1A2E
  ArrowColor #5B7FDE
}
skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor #EEF2FF
  BorderColor #5B7FDE
  FontColor #1A1A2E
}
skinparam database {
  BackgroundColor #FFF8E7
  BorderColor #E6A817
  FontColor #1A1A2E
}
skinparam cloud {
  BackgroundColor #E8F8F5
  BorderColor #27AE60
  FontColor #1A1A2E
}
skinparam actor {
  BackgroundColor #F9EBEA
  BorderColor #C0392B
  FontColor #1A1A2E
}
skinparam node {
  BackgroundColor #F4ECF7
  BorderColor #8E44AD
  FontColor #1A1A2E
}
skinparam arrow {
  Color #555555
  FontColor #333333
  FontSize 10
}
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam defaultFontSize 11

title LabHire System Architecture Diagram

actor "Student User" as Student
actor "Enterprise-Certified\nStudent User" as EntStudent
actor "Mentor User" as Mentor
actor "Administrator" as Admin

node "Client Tier" {
  rectangle "Web Browser\n(Chrome / Firefox / Edge)" as WebBrowser
  rectangle "Mobile Client\n(Android 7.0+ / iOS 8.0+\n/ WeChat Mini-Program 6.5.6+)" as MobileClient
}

node "Application Server Tier" {

  rectangle "API Gateway /\nAuth & Session Layer" as APIGateway {
    rectangle "Registration & Login\n(Email Verification Code)" as AuthModule
    rectangle "Permission &\nAccess Control" as PermModule
    rectangle "Rate Limiting &\nGraphical CAPTCHA" as RateLimit
  }

  rectangle "Core Business Services" as CoreServices {

    rectangle "Project Service" as ProjectService {
      rectangle "Project Publication\n& Management" as ProjMgmt
      rectangle "Project Application\n& Screening" as ProjApply
      rectangle "Project Favorites" as ProjFav
      rectangle "Mutual Evaluation" as MutualEval
    }

    rectangle "Recommendation Service" as RecService {
      rectangle "Collaborative Filtering\nEngine" as CollabFilter
      rectangle "Tag Matching\nEngine" as TagMatch
      rectangle "Cold-Start\nRule Engine" as ColdStart
    }

    rectangle "Search Service" as SearchService {
      rectangle "Project Search" as ProjSearch
      rectangle "Mentor Search\n& Favorites" as MentorSearch
    }

    rectangle "User Profile Service" as UserProfileService {
      rectangle "Student Personal\nInfo & Resume Upload" as StudentProfile
      rectangle "Mentor Personal\nInfo" as MentorProfile
      rectangle "Two-Way Selection\nMaterial View" as TwoWayView
    }

    rectangle "Certification Service" as CertService {
      rectangle "University Identity\nReview (Round 1)\n[72h SLA]" as UniReview
      rectangle "Enterprise Qualification\nReview (Round 2)" as EntReview
    }

    rectangle "Community Service" as CommunityService {
      rectangle "Post Publication\n& Management\n(≤400 words, HTML/Markdown)" as PostMgmt
      rectangle "Comment Management" as CommentMgmt
      rectangle "Post & Comment\nFavorites" as PostFav
      rectangle "Popularity Sorting\n(likes, views, comments,\ntime-decay)" as PopSort
    }

    rectangle "Administration Service" as AdminService {
      rectangle "Identity & Enterprise\nCertification Review" as AdminCertReview
      rectangle "Post & Comment\nContent Review" as AdminContentReview
      rectangle "User & Entity\nManagement" as AdminEntityMgmt
    }
  }

  rectangle "Cross-Cutting Services" as CrossCutting {
    rectangle "Notification &\nMessaging Service" as NotifService
    rectangle "Encrypted Chat\nService" as ChatService
    rectangle "Risk-Control &\nAudit Log Service" as RiskAudit
    rectangle "Review / Content\nGovernance Module\n(Sensitive Words, Ads,\nMalicious Detection)" as ContentGov
  }
}

node "Data Tier" {
  database "Primary Database\n(User Accounts, Projects,\nApplications, Evaluations,\nCertifications, Posts,\nComments, Favorites,\nReview Records,\nRelationship Model)" as PrimaryDB
  database "File Storage\n(Resume Files: PDF ≤10MB)" as FileStorage
  database "Popularity &\nBehavior Log Store\n(Likes, Views, Comments,\nTime-Decay Indicators,\nCTR Logs)" as BehaviorStore
  database "Risk-Control\nLog Store" as RiskLogStore
  database "Chat Message\nStore (Encrypted)" as ChatStore
}

cloud "External Services" as ExtServices {
  rectangle "Campus Email /\nEnterprise Email\nVerification Code Service" as EmailVerify
  rectangle "Email Push\nNotification Service" as EmailPush
  rectangle "In-Site Message\nBroker" as InSiteMsg
}

' Client to Gateway
WebBrowser --> APIGateway : HTTPS requests
MobileClient --> APIGateway : HTTPS requests

' Actors to Client
Student --> WebBrowser
Student --> MobileClient
EntStudent --> WebBrowser
EntStudent --> MobileClient
Mentor --> WebBrowser
Mentor --> MobileClient
Admin --> WebBrowser

' Gateway to Core Services
APIGateway --> ProjectService
APIGateway --> RecService
APIGateway --> SearchService
APIGateway --> UserProfileService
APIGateway --> CertService
APIGateway --> CommunityService
APIGateway --> AdminService

' Core Services to Cross-Cutting
ProjectService --> NotifService : triggers notifications
ProjectService --> ChatService : mentor-applicant chat
CertService --> NotifService : review feedback
CommunityService --> ContentGov : post/comment screening
AdminService --> ContentGov : manual review
AdminService --> RiskAudit : audit actions

' Recommendation feeds from behavior & profile
RecService --> BehaviorStore : read behavior & tags
RecService --> PrimaryDB : read project & user tags

' Cross-Cutting to Data
NotifService --> InSiteMsg : in-site messages
NotifService --> EmailPush : email push
ChatService --> ChatStore : store encrypted chat
RiskAudit --> RiskLogStore : write audit logs

' Core Services to Primary DB
ProjectService --> PrimaryDB
SearchService --> PrimaryDB
UserProfileService --> PrimaryDB
CertService --> PrimaryDB
CommunityService --> PrimaryDB
AdminService --> PrimaryDB
UserProfileService --> FileStorage : resume upload/download

' Core Services to Behavior Store
CommunityService --> BehaviorStore : like/view/comment events

' External Interfaces
AuthModule --> EmailVerify : send verification codes
CertService --> EmailVerify : enterprise email verification
NotifService --> EmailPush : push email notifications
NotifService --> InSiteMsg : push in-site messages

' Admin DB assignment note
PrimaryDB ..> AuthModule : Admin accounts\nassigned by DB

@enduml

samples.title: easylatex / openhands/qwen3-coder-480b-a35b-instruct
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam defaultFontName Monospaced
skinparam wrapWidth 200
skinparam maxMessageSize 200

title EasyLaTex System Architecture (Component View)

actor "User" as User

node "Browser (Web UI)\n- Registration/Login\n- Project & Version Views\n- Editor & Preview\n- Upload & Export\n- Collaboration" as Browser {
  component "Auth UI" as AuthUI
  component "Project/Version UI" as ProjectUI
  component "Editor & Preview UI" as EditorUI
  component "Upload UI" as UploadUI
  component "Collaboration UI" as CollabUI
}

cloud "Internet" as Internet

node "API Gateway / Web Server\n(HTTPS/REST)" as APIGW
node "Real-time Gateway\n(WebSocket)" as WSGW

node "Backend Services" as Backend {
  component "API Aggregator\n(Controller)" as APICtrl
  component "Auth Service" as AuthSvc
  component "User Profile Service" as UserSvc
  component "Project Service" as ProjSvc
  component "Group & Collaboration Service" as CollabSvc
  component "Version & VCS Service" as VersionSvc
  component "File Ingestion Service" as FileSvc
  component "Recognition Service\n(OCR/Deep Learning)" as OCRSvc
  component "LaTeX Generation Service" as LatexSvc
  component "Render Service\n(Preview)" as RenderSvc
  component "Export Service" as ExportSvc
  component "Comment Service" as CommentSvc
}

queue "Task Queue" as Queue
node "AI Model Runtime" as AIML {
  component "OCR / Formula / Table Models" as Models
}
node "LaTeX Engine" as TexEngine

database "Relational Database" as DB
storage "Object Storage (Uploads/Outputs)" as ObjStore
component "Email Service\n(Password Recovery)" as Email

' ——— Client → Edge ———
User --> Browser
Browser --> APIGW : HTTPS/REST
Browser --> WSGW : WebSocket

' ——— Edge → Backend ———
APIGW --> APICtrl
WSGW --> CollabSvc : events / updates

' ——— Controller fan-out ———
APICtrl --> AuthSvc
APICtrl --> UserSvc
APICtrl --> ProjSvc
APICtrl --> CollabSvc
APICtrl --> VersionSvc
APICtrl --> FileSvc
APICtrl --> OCRSvc
APICtrl --> LatexSvc
APICtrl --> RenderSvc
APICtrl --> ExportSvc
APICtrl --> CommentSvc

' ——— Persistence ———
AuthSvc --> DB : users, credentials
UserSvc --> DB
ProjSvc --> DB : projects
VersionSvc --> DB : versions, trees
CollabSvc --> DB : groups, permissions
CommentSvc --> DB : comments

' ——— Files & Artifacts ———
FileSvc --> ObjStore : uploads
ExportSvc --> ObjStore : PDFs, images, .tex
RenderSvc --> ObjStore : cached previews

' ——— Asynchronous processing ———
FileSvc --> Queue : preprocessing jobs
APICtrl --> Queue : recognition/render jobs
Queue --> OCRSvc
Queue --> LatexSvc
Queue --> RenderSvc

' ——— AI & Rendering pipeline ———
OCRSvc --> AIML
AIML --> Models
OCRSvc --> LatexSvc : recognized structures
LatexSvc --> TexEngine : compile
RenderSvc --> TexEngine : render
TexEngine --> ObjStore : preview/export outputs

' ——— Real-time updates ———
CollabSvc --> WSGW : collaboration updates
RenderSvc --> WSGW : live preview updates
WSGW --> Browser : push updates

' ——— Notifications ———
AuthSvc --> Email : password recovery

note right of FileSvc
Supports inputs: Handwritten, Image, PDF, CSV, Excel
Converts to LaTeX via OCR/Parsing
end note

note bottom of CollabSvc
Permission control: owner, collaborator
Real-time collaboration & comments
end note

note bottom of RenderSvc
Non-functional: <2s preview latency (target)
end note

legend right
  Interfaces: HTTPS/REST and WebSocket
  Storage: Relational DB for metadata; Object Storage for files/outputs
  Async: Task Queue decouples recognition and rendering
end legend

@enduml

completeness.reasoning: The architecture successfully encompasses all functional requirements (FR-001 to FR-015), providing specific services for authentication, project management, collaboration, file ingestion, OCR, LaTeX generation, versioning, comments, rendering, and exporting.

faithfulness.reasoning: The diagram strictly adheres to the stated constraints and external interface requirements, including the use of modern WebSockets (C-001), HTTPS/REST APIs (C-011), relational databases (C-008), and a dedicated LaTeX engine (C-010).

Real-time collaboration and previews are effectively handled by a dedicated WebSocket Gateway.

samples.title: POCD / mini-swe-agent/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title POCD - Persistent Object Consistency Detection System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam component {
  BackgroundColor #E6F3FF
  BorderColor #0066CC
  FontColor #000000
}
skinparam node {
  BackgroundColor #FFF0E6
  BorderColor #FF6600
  FontColor #000000
}
skinparam database {
  BackgroundColor #E6FFE6
  BorderColor #00CC00
  FontColor #000000
}

' === LAYERS ===
package "User Interface Layer" {
  component "Web Frontend" as UI {
    [User Interface]
    [Authentication Module]
    [File Upload/Download]
    [Configuration Interface]
    [Report Viewer]
    [Help System]
  }
}

package "Business Logic Layer" {
  component "Account Management Service" as AMS {
    [User Registration]
    [Authentication]
    [Session Management]
  }

  component "File Management Service" as FMS {
    [File Storage]
    [File Metadata]
    [File Processing Queue]
  }

  component "Detection Configuration Service" as DCS {
    [Rule Management]
    [Exception Configuration]
    [Configuration Persistence]
  }

  component "Class Diagram Parser" as CDP {
    [MDJ File Parser]
    [Class/Interface Extractor]
    [Relationship Analyzer]
    [JSON Converter]
  }

  component "Database Parser" as DBP {
    [JDBC Connector]
    [MySQL Parser]
    [Schema Extractor]
    [Relationship Detector]
    [JSON Converter]
  }

  component "Entity Matching Service" as EMS {
    [Attribute Matcher]
    [Entity Matcher]
    [Relationship Matcher]
    [Similarity Analyzer]
  }

  component "Inconsistency Detection Engine" as IDE {
    [Field Inconsistency Detector]
    [Type Inconsistency Detector]
    [Attribute/Column Mismatch Detector]
    [Class/Table Mismatch Detector]
    [Relationship Analyzer]
  }

  component "Repair Engine" as RE {
    [Repair Suggestion Generator]
    [Repair Order Planner]
    [Class Diagram Repair]
    [Database Repair]
  }

  component "Report Service" as RS {
    [Report Generator]
    [Export Module]
    [History Manager]
  }

  component "Help & Examples Service" as HES {
    [Help Documentation]
    [Case Repository]
    [Sample Files]
  }
}

package "Data Access Layer" {
  database "User Database" as UDB {
    [User Accounts]
    [Sessions]
    [Permissions]
  }

  database "File Storage" as FS {
    [Class Diagram Files]
    [Database Files]
    [Uploaded Files]
  }

  database "Configuration Database" as CDB {
    [Detection Rules]
    [Exception Rules]
    [System Settings]
  }

  database "Detection Results Database" as DRDB {
    [Parsing Results]
    [Matching Results]
    [Inconsistency Reports]
    [Repair Suggestions]
    [Historical Records]
  }

  database "Help Database" as HDB {
    [Help Documents]
    [Case Files]
    [Sample Data]
  }
}

' === EXTERNAL SYSTEMS ===
node "External MySQL Database" as EXT_DB {
  [Target Database]
  [Schema Information]
  [Connection via JDBC]
}

node "StarUML Tool" as STARUML {
  [MDJ File Export]
}

node "User Browser" as BROWSER {
  [Web Client]
  [SSL Connection]
}

' === CONNECTIONS ===
BROWSER --> UI : HTTPS/SSL
UI --> AMS : Authentication Requests
UI --> FMS : File Operations
UI --> DCS : Configuration Management
UI --> RS : Report Requests
UI --> HES : Help Requests

AMS --> UDB : User Data Access
FMS --> FS : File Storage
DCS --> CDB : Configuration Storage

CDP --> FS : Read MDJ Files
DBP --> EXT_DB : JDBC Connection
DBP --> FS : Read Database Files

CDP --> EMS : Parsed Class Data
DBP --> EMS : Parsed Database Data
EMS --> IDE : Matching Results
IDE --> RS : Detection Reports
RS --> DRDB : Store Results

IDE --> RE : Inconsistency Data
RE --> RS : Repair Suggestions
RE --> CDP : Class Diagram Updates
RE --> DBP : Database Updates

HES --> HDB : Content Access

' === DATA FLOW ===
STARUML --> FS : Upload MDJ Files
EXT_DB --> DBP : Schema Extraction

' === LAYER CONNECTIONS ===
UI -[hidden]d- AMS
AMS -[hidden]d- FMS
FMS -[hidden]d- DCS
DCS -[hidden]d- CDP
CDP -[hidden]d- DBP
DBP -[hidden]d- EMS
EMS -[hidden]d- IDE
IDE -[hidden]d- RE
RE -[hidden]d- RS
RS -[hidden]d- HES

note right of UI
  Frontend provides:
  - User authentication
  - File management
  - Configuration UI
  - Report viewing
  - Help access
end note

note left of IDE
  Core detection engine:
  - Field inconsistencies
  - Type mismatches
  - Attribute/column issues
  - Class/table mismatches
  - Relationship analysis
end note

@enduml

samples.title: s000020_3582f816 / direct/gpt-5
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
left to right direction

skinparam componentStyle rectangle

actor "Administrator" as admin
actor "MyEMS Component" as myems_client
actor "Third-Party Application" as thirdparty

node "Browser" as browser {
  component "MyEMS Admin SPA" as admin_spa {
    component "Admin Routing Config" as routing_cfg
    component "API Base Path Resolver\n{protocol}//{hostname}:{port}/api/" as basepath
    component "/user Route\nTitle: MENU.USERSETTING.USER\n(Lazy-loaded)" as user_route
    component "/contact Route\nTitle: MENU.SETTINGS.CONTACT\n(Lazy-loaded)" as contact_route
    component "Tariff Settings Module\n(optional)" as tariff_mod
    component "Category Settings Module\n(optional)" as category_mod

    component "Lazy-Loading Mechanism" as lazy_loader
    component "User Services/Controllers\n(lazy-loaded)" as user_services
    component "Login Services/Controllers\n(lazy-loaded)" as login_services
    component "UI Libraries\n(lazy-loaded)" as ui_libs
    component "Contact Modules\n(lazy-loaded)" as contact_modules
  }
}

node "Same-Origin Web Host" as webhost {
  node "Reverse Proxy (e.g., Nginx)\n(optional)" as proxy
}

node "Python Runtime Host" as runtime {
  component "MyEMS REST API Service\n(WSGI application)" as api
  database "MySQL Database\n(optional)" as mysql
}

' User interacts with Admin SPA
admin --> admin_spa : Uses (browser)

' Admin SPA internal structure and routing
routing_cfg --> user_route
routing_cfg --> contact_route
routing_cfg ..> tariff_mod : configured where applicable
routing_cfg ..> category_mod : configured where applicable
admin_spa --> basepath : compute API base path

' Lazy-loading dependencies
lazy_loader --> user_route
lazy_loader --> contact_route
user_route ..> user_services : lazy-load
user_route ..> login_services : lazy-load
user_route ..> ui_libs : lazy-load
contact_route ..> contact_modules : lazy-load

' Admin SPA to API via same-origin /api/
admin_spa --> proxy : HTTP/HTTPS to /api/
proxy --> api : Forward /api/ requests

' Alternative equivalent routing (without reverse proxy)
admin_spa ..> api : /api/ (equivalent routing)\n(dashed = optional path)

' External clients to API
myems_client --> api : RESTful API calls
thirdparty --> api : RESTful API calls

' API to Database (optional)
api --> mysql : DB connectivity (if enabled)

' Notes for key requirements and constraints
note right of basepath
- Computes API base path from current browser:
  {protocol}//{hostname}:{port}/api/
- Enforces suffix: /api/
- Same-origin access preferred (NFR-001)
end note

note right of user_route
- Path: /user
- Title key: MENU.USERSETTING.USER
- Declares route-specific dependencies
end note

note right of contact_route
- Path: /contact
- Title key: MENU.SETTINGS.CONTACT
- Declares route-specific dependencies
end note

note right of tariff_mod
- Settings workflow coverage (if configured)
end note

note right of category_mod
- Settings workflow coverage (if configured)
end note

note bottom of proxy
- Optional reverse proxy to avoid CORS
- Not the only valid routing mechanism
end note

note right of api
- Python runtime with required deps:
  REST framework, CORS, WSGI,
  spreadsheet/image handling,
  MySQL connector
- Supports development quick-run:
  Linux & Windows
- Supports Docker-based installation
- Provides RESTful interfaces for
  MyEMS components and third-party apps
end note

note right of mysql
- Provide compatible configuration
  when MySQL-backed features are enabled
end note

@enduml

top to bottom direction

skinparam defaultFontName "Microsoft YaHei"

    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF

}
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #9B4A4A
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam database {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #9B4A4A
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam node {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #9B4A4A
    BorderThickness 1
}

package "安全" as Security {
    rectangle "用户权限" as UserPermission
    rectangle "HTTPS" as HTTPS
    rectangle "API Access" as ApiAccess
}

package "硬件网关" as HardwareGateway {
    rectangle "数据采集" as GatewayDataCollection
    rectangle "设备控制" as DeviceControl
}

package "其它数据源" as OtherDataSources {
    rectangle "BMS" as SourceBMS
    rectangle "MES" as MES
    rectangle "ERP" as SourceERP
    rectangle "天气" as Weather
    rectangle "手工录入" as ManualInput
}

package "数据可视化" as DataVisualization {
    rectangle "Web UI" as WebUI
    rectangle "小程序" as MiniProgram
    rectangle "手机应用" as MobileApp
    rectangle "大屏" as BigScreen
    rectangle "BI" as BI
    rectangle "..." as VisualizationMore
}

package "第三方应用" as ThirdPartyApps {
    rectangle "BMS" as ThirdPartyBMS
    rectangle "ERP" as ThirdPartyERP
    rectangle "AR" as AR
    rectangle "..." as ThirdPartyMore
}

package "数据分析服务" as DataAnalysis {
    rectangle "API" as AnalysisAPI
    rectangle "Excel导出" as ExcelExport
    rectangle "高级报表引擎" as ReportEngine
    rectangle "FDD规则引擎" as FddRulesEngine
    rectangle "邮件/短信/微信" as NotificationChannels
    rectangle "..." as AnalysisMore
}

package "数据计算服务" as DataComputation {
    rectangle "数据清洗" as DataCleaning
    rectangle "数据规范化" as DataNormalization
    rectangle "计量表数据" as MeterData
    rectangle "空间数据" as SpaceData
    rectangle "租户数据" as TenantData
    rectangle "门店数据" as StoreData
    rectangle "车间数据" as WorkshopData
    rectangle "设备数据" as EquipmentData
    rectangle "组合设备数据" as CompositeEquipmentData
    rectangle "碳排放数据" as CarbonEmissionData
    rectangle "成本数据" as CostData
    rectangle "..." as ComputationMore
}

package "数据采集服务" as DataCollection {
    rectangle "Modbus" as Modbus
    rectangle "OPC UA" as OpcUa
    rectangle "BACnet" as Bacnet
    rectangle "EtherNet/IP" as EtherNetIp
    rectangle "S7" as S7
    rectangle "MQTT" as Mqtt
    rectangle "Kafka" as Kafka
    rectangle "..." as CollectionMore
}

package "容器化服务器集群" as ContainerCluster {
    database "数据库集群" as DatabaseCluster
    node "Web Server" as WebServer
    rectangle "MQTT Broker" as MqttBroker
    rectangle "Kafka Broker" as KafkaBroker
    rectangle "..." as ClusterMore
    node "裸金属服务器" as BareMetalServer
    node "虚拟机" as VirtualMachine
    node "Docker Engine" as DockerEngine
    node "本地Kubernetes集群" as LocalKubernetes
    node "云端Kubernetes集群" as CloudKubernetes
}

Security ..> DataAnalysis : protects
HardwareGateway --> DataCollection
OtherDataSources --> DataCollection
DataCollection --> DataComputation
DataComputation --> DataAnalysis
DataAnalysis --> DataVisualization
DataAnalysis --> ThirdPartyApps
ContainerCluster ..> DataCollection : hosts
ContainerCluster ..> DataComputation : hosts
ContainerCluster ..> DataAnalysis : hosts
ApiAccess --> AnalysisAPI
Mqtt ..> MqttBroker : pub/sub
Kafka ..> KafkaBroker : stream
DataComputation --> DatabaseCluster
WebServer ..> WebUI : serves
@enduml

samples.title: eivas / direct/qwen3-coder-480b-a35b-instruct
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class

title EIVAS System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle

package "EIVAS Web Application" {
  [Frontend Pages] as frontend
  [Backend Services] as backend
  [Database] as database
  [Algorithm Module] as algorithm
  [Map Service] as mapservice
}

frontend -down-> backend : HTTP Requests
backend -down-> database : Data Storage/Retrieval
backend -right-> algorithm : Analysis Requests
algorithm -down-> backend : Analysis Results
backend -right-> mapservice : Geospatial Data

note right of frontend
  User Interfaces:
  - Epidemiological reporting form
  - Case management list
  - Map display interface
  - Association information display
  - Graph relationship display
  - Statistical charts
end note

note right of backend
  Core Functions:
  - Epidemiological reporting
  - Case management
  - Individual case analysis
  - Overall analysis
  - Outbreak overview
end note

note right of database
  Data Objects:
  - Basic case information
  - Disease-related information
  - Itinerary trajectory
  - Imported-case information
  - Associated case entries
  - Analytical chart data
end note

note right of algorithm
  Capabilities:
  - Regional flow maps
  - Case clustering graphs
  - Risk calculations
  - Clustering algorithms
end note

note right of mapservice
  Visualization:
  - Location display
  - Itinerary paths
  - Geographic context
  - Address confirmation
end note

rectangle "Epidemiological\nForm Filler" as filler
rectangle "Epidemiological\nAnalyst" as analyst

filler -up-> frontend : Data Entry
analyst -up-> frontend : Analysis & Review

note top of filler
  Responsibilities:
  - Accurate/convenient info entry
  - Questionnaire/interview data collection
end note

note top of analyst
  Responsibilities:
  - Outbreak statistics access
  - Case associations analysis
  - Infection source inference
end note

cloud "Web Browser" as browser
frontend -up-> browser : HTML/CSS/JS

note bottom of database
  Assumptions:
  - Persistent storage
  - Data integrity
  - Privacy compliance
end note

note bottom of algorithm
  Dependencies:
  - Case investigation data
  - Threshold parameters
  - Analysis rules
end note

@enduml

  [Cloud Storage] as cloud_storage

api_gateway --> blog_service
api_gateway --> model_service

samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' --- Configuration & Styles ---
skinparam topboxSelection true
skinparam Direction top to bottom
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false

' Define Styles based on original ClassDefs
<style>
    .client {
        BackgroundColor #e1f5fe
        LineColor #01579b
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .service {
        BackgroundColor #e8f5e9
        LineColor #2e7d32
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .db {
        BackgroundColor #fff9c4
        LineColor #fbc02d
        LineThickness 2
    }
</style>

' --- Client Layer ---
package "Browser / Client Layer" as Browser_Layer {
    rectangle "Frontend Interface\n(Bootstrap-Vue)" as FE_Interface <<client>>
}

' --- Server Layer ---
package "Server Layer\n(Spring Boot)" as Server_Layer {
    
    package "Core Modules" as Core_Modules {
        ' Layout is TB within the package
        rectangle "Account Management Module" as AccountMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Q&A Community Module" as QAMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Blog Sharing Module" as BlogMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Model Management Module" as ModelMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Dataset Management Module" as DatasetMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Following Management Module" as FollowMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Admin Module" as AdminMod <<service>>
    }
}

' --- Database Layer ---
package "Database Layer\n(MySQL)" as Database_Layer {
    database "User Data" as UserDB <<db>>
    database "Q&A Community Data" as QADB <<db>>
    database "Blog Data" as BlogDB <<db>>
    database "Model Data" as ModelDB <<db>>
    database "Dataset Data" as DatasetDB <<db>>
    database "Following Data" as FollowDB <<db>>
}

' --- Relationships ---
FE_Interface --> Core_Modules
Core_Modules --> Database_Layer

@enduml

samples.title: deepcode / direct/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #FEFEFE
skinparam classBackgroundColor #FEFEFE
skinparam classBorderColor #000000
skinparam arrowColor #000000

title DeepCode System Architecture

package "External Users & Services" {
  [Web Browser (HTML5)] as Browser
  [AI Service (LLM)] as AI
  [SMTP Server] as SMTP
  [CDN] as CDN
}

package "Frontend Layer (Vue 3)" {
  [Vue Application] as VueApp
  [Axios Client] as Axios
}

package "Presentation Layer" {
  [Nginx Reverse Proxy] as Nginx
}

package "Proxy Layer (Spring Boot)" {
  [API Gateway / Controller] as Gateway
  [Authentication Filter] as AuthFilter
  [Interceptor] as Interceptor
}

package "Business Layer (Spring Boot Modules)" {
  [User Module] as UserModule
  [Problem Module] as ProblemModule
  [Solution Module] as SolutionModule
  [Forum Module] as ForumModule
  [AI Integration Module] as AIModule
  [Judging Orchestrator] as JudgeOrchestrator
  [Email Service] as EmailService
}

package "Access Layer" {
  [MyBatis-Plus] as MyBatis
  [Redis Client] as RedisClient
  [MinIO Client] as MinIOClient
  [LangChain4j Client] as LangChainClient
  [HTTP Judge Client] as JudgeClient
}

package "Data Storage" {
  database "MySQL" as MySQL {
    folder "User Tables" as UserTables
    folder "Problem Tables" as ProblemTables
    folder "Solution Tables" as SolutionTables
    folder "Forum Tables" as ForumTables
    folder "AI Cache Tables" as AITables
  }
  database "Redis (Cache)" as Redis
  database "MinIO (Object Storage)" as MinIO {
    folder "Test Cases"
    folder "Images"
    folder "Other Files"
  }
}

package "Judging Subsystem" {
  [JudgeHost (Scheduler)] as JudgeHost
  [JudgeCore (Sandbox)] as JudgeCore
  [Docker Container] as DockerContainer
}

package "Infrastructure & Ops" {
  [Prometheus] as Prometheus
  [Grafana] as Grafana
  [Alert Manager] as AlertManager
  [Kubernetes] as K8S
  [GitLab CI/CD] as CICD
}

' External connections
Browser --> CDN : Static Resources (CSS, JS, Images)
Browser --> Nginx : HTTPS Requests
AI --> LangChainClient : LLM API Calls
SMTP --> EmailService : Send Email

' Frontend to Presentation
VueApp --> Axios
Axios --> Nginx : RESTful API Calls

' Presentation to Proxy
Nginx --> Gateway : Route Requests

' Proxy to Business
Gateway --> AuthFilter : Request
AuthFilter --> Interceptor : Permission Check
Interceptor --> UserModule : Auth/User Requests
Interceptor --> ProblemModule : Problem Requests
Interceptor --> SolutionModule : Solution Requests
Interceptor --> ForumModule : Forum Requests
Interceptor --> AIModule : AI Requests
Interceptor --> JudgeOrchestrator : Submission Requests
Interceptor --> EmailService : Email Requests

' Business Internal
UserModule --> ProblemModule : User Context
ProblemModule --> SolutionModule : Problem Context
ForumModule --> AIModule : @AI Requests
JudgeOrchestrator --> JudgeClient : Submit Code

' Business to Access
UserModule --> MyBatis
ProblemModule --> MyBatis
SolutionModule --> MyBatis
ForumModule --> MyBatis
AIModule --> MyBatis
UserModule --> RedisClient : Session/Cache
ProblemModule --> RedisClient : Cache
SolutionModule --> RedisClient : Cache
ForumModule --> RedisClient : Cache
ProblemModule --> MinIOClient : Test Case Files
ForumModule --> MinIOClient : Image Uploads
UserModule --> MinIOClient : Avatar Uploads
AIModule --> LangChainClient : AI Prompts
JudgeOrchestrator --> JudgeClient : HTTP Call

' Access to Storage
MyBatis --> MySQL : CRUD Operations
RedisClient --> Redis : Get/Set Cache
MinIOClient --> MinIO : Store/Retrieve Objects
LangChainClient --> AI : External Call
JudgeClient --> JudgeHost : HTTP Request

' Judging Subsystem
JudgeHost --> JudgeCore : Execute Task
JudgeCore --> DockerContainer : Isolated Execution
DockerContainer --> MinIO : Fetch Test Cases

' Monitoring & Ops
Prometheus --> MySQL : Metrics
Prometheus --> Redis : Metrics
Prometheus --> Nginx : Metrics
Prometheus --> K8S : Infrastructure Metrics
Prometheus --> Grafana : Data Source
Grafana --> AlertManager : Trigger Alerts
CICD --> K8S : Deploy Containers

' Data Storage Internal Structure (Optional detail)
UserTables ..[hidden].. ProblemTables
ProblemTables ..[hidden].. SolutionTables
SolutionTables ..[hidden].. ForumTables
ForumTables ..[hidden].. AITables

note right of VueApp
  Technologies:
  Vue 3, TypeScript, Vuex,
  vue-router, Ant Design Vue,
  CodeMirror, wangEditor,
  ECharts, Webpack, ESLint
end note

note left of Gateway
  Technologies:
  Spring Boot 3.1.2, JDK 21,
  Lombok, Swagger, JWT,
  WebFlux, Thread Pools
end note

note bottom of JudgeCore
  Security: seccomp, resource
  limits (CPU, memory, output)
  in Docker container
end note

note top of K8S
  Deployment: GitLab CI/CD,
  Docker, Private Registry,
  Auto-scaling, Rollback
end note

@enduml

samples.title: s000058_3ebb884d / metagpt-custom/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml

!define RECTANGLE rectangle
!define COMPONENT component

' Core System Components
COMPONENT "Stage Lister" as stage_lister
COMPONENT "Connector Manager" as connector_manager
COMPONENT "Deployment Metrics Collector" as deploy_metrics
COMPONENT "PR Metrics Collector" as pr_metrics
COMPONENT "Event Router" as event_router

' Manual Operations (outside automation scope)
RECTANGLE "Manual Operations" as manual_ops {
    COMPONENT "SNS Subscription Manager" as sns_manager
    note right of sns_manager
        Manual configuration
        (FR-004, NFR-002)
    end note
}

' Event Processing
COMPONENT "Event Filter" as event_filter
note bottom of event_filter
    Filtering criteria
    (DR-003)
end note

' Metrics Output
RECTANGLE "Metrics Output" as metrics_output {
    COMPONENT "Failed Runs" as failed_runs
    COMPONENT "Passed Runs" as passed_runs
    COMPONENT "Avg Time to Merge" as avg_merge_time
}

' Configuration Storage
database "Connector Definitions" as connector_defs
database "Environment Values" as env_values

' External Systems
cloud "AWS Services" as aws_services
cloud "GitHub" as github
cloud "CMS BigMAC" as cms_bigmac
cloud "Appian" as appian

' AWS Components
COMPONENT "AWS CLI" as aws_cli
COMPONENT "AWS EventBridge" as eventbridge
cloud "SNS Topic" as sns_topic

' GitHub Components
COMPONENT "Actions API" as actions_api
COMPONENT "Pull Requests API" as pr_api

' Prerequisite Note
note "Onboarding Required\n(NFR-001, C-002)" as onboarding_note
onboarding_note ..> stage_lister : "prerequisite"

' Core Dependencies
stage_lister --> aws_cli : "queries stages"
connector_manager --> connector_defs : "reads definitions"
connector_manager --> env_values : "uses (cluster, service)"
connector_manager --> cms_bigmac : "configures connectors"
connector_manager --> aws_cli : "restarts connectors"

' Event Flow
eventbridge --> event_filter : "sends events"
event_filter --> event_router : "filtered events"
event_router --> sns_topic : "publishes alerts"

' Metrics Collection
deploy_metrics --> actions_api : "queries deployments"
pr_metrics --> pr_api : "queries pull requests"
deploy_metrics --> metrics_output : "produces"
pr_metrics --> metrics_output : "produces"

' Manual Management
sns_manager --> sns_topic : "manages subscriptions"

' External Data Flow
appian --> cms_bigmac : "triggers data changes"

' System Relationships
aws_cli -[hidden]d-> aws_services : "part of"
eventbridge -[hidden]d-> aws_services : "part of"
sns_topic -[hidden]d-> aws_services : "part of"
actions_api -[hidden]d-> github : "part of"
pr_api -[hidden]d-> github : "part of"

@enduml

samples.title: easylatex / openhands/claude-sonnet-4-6
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title EasyLaTex System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam defaultFontName Monospace
skinparam dpi 150

' Actors and client
actor "User" as User
package "Client (Browser)" as Client {
  [Web UI] as WebUI
  [WebSocket Client] as WSClient
}

' API and Gateway
package "API Layer" {
  [API Gateway / REST] as APIGW
  [Auth Service] as Auth
  [WebSocket Server] as WSS
}

' Application services
package "Application Services" {
  [User Service] as UserSvc
  [Project Service] as ProjSvc
  [Group/Collaboration Service] as CollabSvc
  [Version Service] as VersionSvc
  [File Service] as FileSvc
  [Rendering Service] as RenderSvc
  [Export Service] as ExportSvc
}

' Processing pipeline
package "Recognition & Generation" {
  [Recognition Service\n(OCR/Deep Learning)] as RecogSvc
  [LaTeX Generation Service] as LatexGen
}

' Data & Infrastructure
package "Data & Infrastructure" {
  database "Relational Database" as DB
  rectangle "Object Storage" as Store
  rectangle "Message Queue" as MQ
  rectangle "Cache" as Cache
  rectangle "LaTeX Engine" as TexEngine
}

' Client interactions
User --> WebUI
WebUI --> APIGW : HTTP/REST\nregister/login/projects/files
WSClient <--> WSS : WebSocket\npreview & collaboration

' Auth & gateway
APIGW --> Auth : AuthN/AuthZ
Auth --> DB

' API routing to services
APIGW --> UserSvc
APIGW --> ProjSvc
APIGW --> CollabSvc
APIGW --> VersionSvc
APIGW --> FileSvc
APIGW --> RenderSvc
APIGW --> ExportSvc

' Collaboration notifications
VersionSvc --> WSS : version updates
CollabSvc --> WSS : collaboration events
RenderSvc --> WSS : preview updates

' File handling and recognition
FileSvc --> Store : upload/download
APIGW --> MQ : enqueue recognition
MQ --> RecogSvc
RecogSvc --> Store : read inputs
RecogSvc --> LatexGen : recognized structures
LatexGen --> VersionSvc : LaTeX content

' Rendering and export
RenderSvc --> TexEngine : compile preview
RenderSvc --> Store : preview artifacts
ExportSvc --> TexEngine : compile PDF
ExportSvc --> Store : exported files

' Persistence
UserSvc --> DB
ProjSvc --> DB
CollabSvc --> DB
VersionSvc --> DB
FileSvc --> DB
RenderSvc --> DB
ExportSvc --> DB

' Caching
APIGW --> Cache
Auth --> Cache

@enduml

completeness.reasoning: The architecture comprehensively covers all functional requirements from the SRS, including user and project management, real-time collaboration (WebSockets), file handling, AI-based recognition, LaTeX generation, real-time rendering, version control, and export functionalities.

While Object Storage is a reasonable interpretation of 'file storage', MQ and Cache are architectural inferences to satisfy performance and scalability NFRs rather than explicit constraints.

architectural_rationality.reasoning: The architecture is well thought out. samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title EMBC ESS Architecture Diagram

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor<<layer>> LightGray
  BorderColor<<layer>> Black
}

actor "Browser User\n(Role-based)" as User
actor "Developer" as Dev
actor "DB Administrator" as DBA

rectangle "Web Browser" {
  rectangle "Angular ClientApp" {
    component "Role-based Router\n(Landing & Route Guards)" as Router
    component "Auth / Session Handler\n(Login, Logout, Session-Expired)" as Auth
    component "HTTP Interceptor\n(Watchdog Timer, 401 Handler)" as Interceptor
    component "NgRx Store\n(Client-side State / Cache)" as NgRx
    component "Controlled-List Loader\n(App Initialization)" as CLLoader
    component "Evacuee Service Wrapper" as EvacSvc
    component "Incident-Task Service Wrapper" as IncidentSvc
    component "Organization Service Wrapper" as OrgSvc
    component "Referral Service Wrapper" as ReferralSvc
    component "Registration Service Wrapper\n(incl. PDF Collection)" as RegSvc
    component "Notification Service\n(Queue & Notifier)" as NotifSvc
    component "Redirect Guard" as RedirectGuard
    component "Module Diagnostic\n(Double-load Alert)" as ModDiag
  }
}

rectangle ".NET Core WebAPI Server" {
  component "API Controllers" as Controllers
  component "Domain Services" as DomainSvc
  component "Development API Bypass\n(Dev Env Only)" as DevBypass
  rectangle "Data Access Layer" {
    component "Entity Framework / DbContext" as EF
  }
}

database "MS SQL Database" as MSSQL {
  component "Persistent Database Entities" as DBEntities
  component "Repository SQL Scripts\n(Data Maintenance)" as SQLScripts
}

cloud "SiteMinder\n(Auth / Access Control)" as SiteMinder

User --> Router : navigates
User --> Auth : login / logout
Router --> Auth : route guard checks
Auth --> Interceptor : session control
Interceptor --> Controllers : HTTP requests (via Proxy in Dev)
EvacSvc --> Interceptor
IncidentSvc --> Interceptor
OrgSvc --> Interceptor
ReferralSvc --> Interceptor
RegSvc --> Interceptor
CLLoader --> NgRx : loads controlled-list data
EvacSvc --> NgRx : reads/writes shared state
IncidentSvc --> NgRx : reads/writes shared state
NotifSvc --> NgRx : queues notifications
Router --> RedirectGuard : external URL routing
Controllers --> DomainSvc : business logic
DomainSvc --> EF : data access
EF --> DBEntities : ORM mapping
DBA --> SQLScripts : executes scripts
SQLScripts --> MSSQL : data maintenance
SiteMinder --> Auth : authentication context
Dev --> DevBypass : role-paired tokens (dev only)
DevBypass --> Controllers : dev access

note right of NgRx
  Single immutable state,
  actions, reducers (NgRx pattern)
end note

note right of SQLScripts
  Requires DB backup before execution.
  Uses target-filter variables
  and transaction structure.
end note

note bottom of DevBypass
  Backend-only, enabled
  in designated dev environments only.
end note

@enduml

@startuml
title DeepCode Layered Architecture

actor User
package Frontend {
  [UI Views] as UI
  [Axios API Client] as APIClient
}
User --> UI
UI --> APIClient

package Backend {
  package Presentation_Layer {
    [REST Controllers] as RestControllers
    [JWT Authentication Filter] as JwtFilter
  }
  package Proxy_Layer {
    [Interceptors / Rate Limiter] as Interceptors
    [LangChain4j Client] as LangChainClient
    [Judge HTTP Client] as JudgeHttpClient
    [SMTP Client] as SmtpClient
  }
  package Business_Layer {
    [User Service] as UserService
    [Problem Service] as ProblemService
    [Solution Service] as SolutionService
    [Forum Service] as ForumService
    [AI Assistance Service] as AIService
    [Submission/Judging Orchestrator] as Orchestrator
  }
  package Access_Layer {
    [MyBatis-Plus Repositories] as Repos
    [Redis Cache Access] as RedisAccess
    [Object Storage Adapter (MinIO SDK)] as MinIOAccess
  }
}

APIClient --> RestControllers : REST/JSON
RestControllers --> JwtFilter
JwtFilter --> Interceptors
Interceptors --> UserService
Interceptors --> ProblemService
Interceptors --> SolutionService
Interceptors --> ForumService
AIService --> LangChainClient
Orchestrator --> JudgeHttpClient

UserService --> Repos
ProblemService --> Repos
SolutionService --> Repos
ForumService --> Repos
UserService --> RedisAccess
ProblemService --> RedisAccess
SolutionService --> RedisAccess
ForumService --> RedisAccess
ProblemService --> MinIOAccess
SolutionService --> MinIOAccess

database MySQL_5_7 as MySQL
queue Redis_7_4 as Redis
cloud MinIO_Object_Storage as MinIO
cloud External_LLM_Provider as LLM
node Judging_Service as Judge {
  [JudgeHost] as JudgeHost
  [JudgeCore] as JudgeCore
}
component SMTP_Server as SMTP

Repos --> MySQL
RedisAccess --> Redis
MinIOAccess --> MinIO
LangChainClient --> LLM
JudgeHttpClient --> Judge
SmtpClient --> SMTP

note right of LLM
AI problem recommendation, analysis, code explanations
end note

note right of Judge
Executes submissions, enforces resource limits, returns results
end note

@startuml
title Kangrand System Architecture - Component/Deployment Diagram

' Define Nodes for Deployment Context
node "File System" {
  database "Work Files" as workfiles
  database "Config Files" as configfiles
  database "Result Files" as resultfiles
}

' Interface Layer
package "Interface Layer" {
  component "CommandLineParser" as cli
}

' Core Solver Layer
package "Core Solver Layer" {
  component "ECDLPSolver" as solver
  component "InputFileHandler" as inputhandler
  component "WorkFileInspector" as inspector
}

' Persistence Layer
package "Persistence Layer" {
  component "WorkFileManager" as wfm
  component "OfflineMerger" as merger
  component "ResultFileHandler" as resultfh
  component "BackupManager" as backupmgr
}

' Distribution Layer
package "Distribution Layer" {
  component "DistributedServer" as server
  component "DistributedClient" as client
}

' Execution Context (includes GPU support)
package "Execution Context" {
  component "ExecutionContext" as execcontext
}

' Dependencies and Interfaces
cli --> inputhandler : <<provides input file>>
cli --> solver : <<configures>>
cli --> wfm : <<controls>>
cli --> server : <<configures>>
cli --> client : <<configures>>

solver --> inputhandler : <<reads input>>
solver --> wfm : <<saves progress>>
solver --> workfiles : <<resumes from>>
solver --> execcontext : <<executes on>>

inputhandler --> workfiles : <<reads>>
inspector --> workfiles : <<inspects>>

wfm --> workfiles : <<reads/writes>>
wfm --> merger : <<provides data>>
merger --> workfiles : <<reads for merge>>
backupmgr --> workfiles : <<manages backups>>

server --> wfm : <<generates data>>
server --> workfiles : <<writes results>>
server --> configfiles : <<reads config>>

client --> server : <<connects via network>>
client --> execcontext : <<utilizes when enabled>>

resultfh --> resultfiles : <<writes>>
resultfh <-- merger : <<receives merged data>>

@enduml

@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
left to right direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #5A7FA3
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5
skinparam package {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam database {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}

package "Kangrand Distributed Pollard Kangaroo" as Kangrand {
    package "Distributed Search Group A" as SearchGroupA {
        rectangle "Server\n-wsplit" as ServerA
        rectangle "Client A1" as ClientA1
        rectangle "Client A2" as ClientA2
        rectangle "Client A3" as ClientA3
        database "Kangaroo file A1" as KangarooFileA1
        database "Kangaroo file A2" as KangarooFileA2
        database "Kangaroo file A3" as KangarooFileA3
        database "Work files\nHashTable A" as WorkFilesA
        database "Result.txt A" as ResultA
    }

    package "Distributed Search Group B" as SearchGroupB {
        rectangle "Server\n-wsplit" as ServerB
        rectangle "Client B1" as ClientB1
        rectangle "Client B2" as ClientB2
        rectangle "Client B3" as ClientB3
        database "Kangaroo file B1" as KangarooFileB1
        database "Kangaroo file B2" as KangarooFileB2
        database "Kangaroo file B3" as KangarooFileB3
        database "Work files\nHashTable B" as WorkFilesB
        database "Result.txt B" as ResultB
    }

    rectangle "Merger" as Merger
    database "Master WorkFile\nHashTable" as MasterWorkFile
}

ServerA --> ClientA1 : distribute range work
ServerA --> ClientA2 : distribute range work
ServerA --> ClientA3 : distribute range work
ClientA1 --> KangarooFileA1 : save kangaroo state
ClientA2 --> KangarooFileA2 : save kangaroo state
ClientA3 --> KangarooFileA3 : save kangaroo state
ServerA --> WorkFilesA : wsplit backups\nreset hash table
ServerA --> ResultA : solved key output

ServerB --> ClientB1 : distribute range work
ServerB --> ClientB2 : distribute range work
ServerB --> ClientB3 : distribute range work
ClientB1 --> KangarooFileB1 : save kangaroo state
ClientB2 --> KangarooFileB2 : save kangaroo state
ClientB3 --> KangarooFileB3 : save kangaroo state
ServerB --> WorkFilesB : wsplit backups\nreset hash table
ServerB --> ResultB : solved key output

ServerA .. ServerB : parallel distributed search
WorkFilesA --> Merger : merge work files
WorkFilesB --> Merger : merge work files
ResultA --> Merger : collision result
ResultB --> Merger : collision result
Merger --> MasterWorkFile : master work file\nmerged hash table
@enduml

@startuml
'title Model Evolution Version Management Visualization Tool - System Architecture
left to right direction
skinparam componentStyle rectangle

package "Users" {
  rectangle "Learner\n<<role>>" as Learner
  rectangle "Contributor\n<<role>>" as Contributor
  rectangle "Administrator\n<<role>>" as Admin
}

component "Web Browser" as Browser

package "Front End (Web UI)" as FE {
  component "Account UI" as FE_Account
  component "Model Search & View UI" as FE_SearchView
  component "Contribution & Editor UI" as FE_Editor
  component "Evolution Graph UI" as FE_Evolution
  component "Admin/User Management UI" as FE_Admin
  component "Navigation UI" as FE_Nav
}

package "Back End (Web/API Server)" as BE {
  component "API Gateway / Router" as BE_API
  component "Auth Service\n(2FA + OAuth2)" as BE_Auth
  component "User & Role Service" as BE_User
  component "Permission Application Service" as BE_PermApp
  component "Model Service\n(Upload/Modify/Delete/Profile)" as BE_Model
  component "Source Edit Service\n(PyTorch Online Edit)" as BE_Edit
  component "Search Service" as BE_Search
  component "Evolution Service\n(Define/Edit/Delete Relationships)" as BE_Evo
  component "Dataset & Training Service" as BE_DataTrain
  component "Visualization Service\n(Topology Builders)" as BE_Vis
  component "Authorization Middleware\n(Access/Privilege Control)" as BE_Authorize
  component "Crypto Module\n(TLS, AES/DES at rest)" as BE_Crypto
}

package "Algorithm Support" as AS {
  component "Model Analyzer\n(ONNX/PyTorch parsing)" as AS_Analyzer
  component "Evolution Differ\n(Structure changes)" as AS_Differ
  component "Metric Calculator\n(Perf metrics)" as AS_Metrics
  component "Python Libraries" as AS_PyLib
}

package "Databases" as DB {
  database "Neo4j\n(Evolution Graphs)" as Neo4j
  database "MySQL\n(Users, Attributes, Datasets,\nTrained Models, Permissions)" as MySQL
}

' User interactions
Learner --> Browser : use
Contributor --> Browser : use
Admin --> Browser : use

Browser --> FE_Nav : HTTPS/TLS
Browser --> FE_Account : HTTPS/TLS
Browser --> FE_SearchView : HTTPS/TLS
Browser --> FE_Editor : HTTPS/TLS
Browser --> FE_Evolution : HTTPS/TLS
Browser --> FE_Admin : HTTPS/TLS

' Frontend to backend via API
FE_Account --> BE_API : REST
FE_SearchView --> BE_API : REST
FE_Editor --> BE_API : REST
FE_Evolution --> BE_API : REST
FE_Admin --> BE_API : REST
FE_Nav --> BE_API : REST

' Backend routing
BE_API --> BE_Authorize
BE_API --> BE_Auth
BE_API --> BE_User
BE_API --> BE_PermApp
BE_API --> BE_Model
BE_API --> BE_Edit
BE_API --> BE_Search
BE_API --> BE_Evo
BE_API --> BE_DataTrain
BE_API --> BE_Vis

' DB interactions
BE_User --> MySQL
BE_PermApp --> MySQL
BE_Model --> MySQL
BE_Edit --> MySQL
BE_Search --> MySQL
BE_DataTrain --> MySQL
BE_Evo --> Neo4j
BE_Vis --> Neo4j

' Algorithm support
BE_Model --> AS_Analyzer
BE_Evo --> AS_Differ
BE_DataTrain --> AS_Metrics
AS_Analyzer --> AS_PyLib
AS_Differ --> AS_PyLib
AS_Metrics --> AS_PyLib

' Security and policies
BE_Authorize ..> BE_User : policies
BE_Authorize ..> BE_Model
BE_Authorize ..> BE_Evo
BE_Authorize ..> BE_DataTrain
BE_Crypto .. MySQL
BE_Crypto .. Neo4j

note top of FE
- B/S architecture
- Max 10 navigation interfaces
end note

note right of BE_Auth
- Two-factor authentication
- OAuth 2.0 or similar
end note

note bottom of DB
- Data encrypted at rest (AES/DES)
- Comply with data security policy
end note

note right of BE_Authorize

end note

note bottom of BE
Supported communication interfaces: HTTP, HTTPS, TCP/IP, FTP, SMTP, UDP
end note

@enduml

        database "MySQL" as mysql
        database "Redis" as redis
        database "MinIO" as minio
    }
}

cloud "External Systems" {
    component "JudgeHost" as judgeHost
    component "JudgeCore" as judgeCore

samples.pred_source:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam componentStyle rectangle

title LabHire System Architecture (Components, Services, Data, and External Integrations)

actor "Student" as Student
actor "Enterprise-Certified\nStudent" as EntStudent
actor "Mentor" as Mentor
actor "Administrator" as Admin

package "Client Layer" {
  component "Student/Mentor Web & Mobile UI" as UI_SM
  component "Admin Console (Web)" as UI_Admin
}

Student --> UI_SM
EntStudent --> UI_SM
Mentor --> UI_SM
Admin --> UI_Admin

package "API Edge" {
  component "API Gateway + Edge Security\n(Rate-limit, CAPTCHA, IP/Behavior Limits)" as APIGW
  note right of APIGW
    - Aggregates APIs for web/mobile
    - Enforces rate limiting, CAPTCHA (NFR-005)
    - Protocol unspecified by SRS
  end note
}

UI_SM --> APIGW
UI_Admin --> APIGW

package "Application Services" {
  component "Auth & IAM Service" as Auth
  component "Verification Code Service" as VCode
  component "Access Control\n(RBAC/Scope Enforcement)" as AccessCtrl

  component "Profile & Resume Service" as Profile
  component "Project Service" as ProjectSvc
  component "Application Service\n(Project Applications)" as AppSvc
  component "Mutual Evaluation Service" as EvalSvc

  component "Search Service" as SearchSvc
  component "Recommendation Service" as RecoSvc
  component "Favorites Service\n(Projects, Mentors, Posts)" as FavSvc

  component "Community Service\n(Posts & Comments)" as CommunitySvc
  component "Popularity Ranking Service" as PopularSvc

  component "Review & Certification Service\n(University Identity, Enterprise Cert)" as ReviewSvc

  component "Notification Service\n(In-site Messages + Email Push)" as NotifSvc
  component "Chat Service\n(Encrypted Mentor–Applicant Chat)" as ChatSvc

  component "Admin Management Service\n(User & Content Governance)" as AdminMgmt
  component "Risk Control & Audit Service\n(Logs, Alerts, Anomaly Detection)" as RiskSvc
}

APIGW --> Auth
APIGW --> Profile
APIGW --> ProjectSvc
APIGW --> AppSvc
APIGW --> EvalSvc
APIGW --> SearchSvc
APIGW --> RecoSvc
APIGW --> FavSvc
APIGW --> CommunitySvc
APIGW --> PopularSvc
APIGW --> ReviewSvc
APIGW --> NotifSvc
APIGW --> ChatSvc
APIGW --> AdminMgmt
APIGW --> RiskSvc
APIGW --> AccessCtrl

Auth --> VCode
Auth --> AccessCtrl
AdminMgmt --> AccessCtrl

ProjectSvc --> AppSvc
ProjectSvc --> EvalSvc
AppSvc --> NotifSvc
CommunitySvc --> PopularSvc
FavSvc --> NotifSvc
ReviewSvc --> NotifSvc
ChatSvc --> NotifSvc
RiskSvc --> NotifSvc

note right of Auth
  - Campus email registration/login (FR-010)
  - Admin login via DB-assigned accounts (FR-021, C-004)
end note

note right of VCode
  - Sends verification codes to university & enterprise emails (AD-001, FR-010, FR-012)
end note

note top of ProjectSvc
  - Publish/manage projects (FR-003, FR-005)
  - View details (FR-002), search (FR-004)
end note

note right of AppSvc
  - Student applies to projects; mentor screens (FR-009)
end note

note right of EvalSvc
  - Teacher–student mutual evaluations after completion (FR-008)
end note

note right of RecoSvc
  - Collaborative filtering, tag matching, cold-start rules (FR-001, AD-004)
end note

note right of Profile
  - Personal info & resume upload with permissions (FR-011, FR-013, FR-015)
end note

note right of CommunitySvc
  - Posts, comments, favorites, modification/deletion
  - Referral posts by enterprise-certified students only (FR-016..FR-019, FR-017, C-007)
end note

note right of PopularSvc
  - Popularity = likes, comments, views, time decay (FR-020)
end note

note right of ReviewSvc
  - Auto field validation + manual review within 72h (FR-022)
  - Enterprise qualification review (FR-023)
end note

note right of NotifSvc
  - In-site messages & email push for favorites, replies, applications, review feedback (FR-007, AD-003)
end note

note right of ChatSvc
  - Mentor–applicant chat in project management
  - Chat content must be encrypted (FR-005, NFR-004)
end note

note right of RiskSvc
  - Risk-control logs, behavior audit, alerts (NFR-006)
  - Abnormal behavior detection & limits (NFR-005)
end note

package "Data Layer (Products Unspecified by SRS)" {
  database "Core DB\n(Users, Projects, Applications,\nFavorites, Posts, Comments,\nEvaluations, Certifications,\nNotifications, Review Records)" as CoreDB
  cloud "Cache (Key-Value)\nSessions, Verification Codes,\nRate Limits" as Cache
  database "Search Index" as SearchIndex
  folder "Object Storage\n(Resume Files ≤ 10MB)" as ResumeStore
  queue "Event Bus / Message Queue" as MQ
  folder "Audit Log Store\n(Risk-Control Logs)" as AuditStore
}

Auth --> CoreDB
Auth --> Cache
VCode --> Cache
Profile --> CoreDB
Profile --> ResumeStore
ProjectSvc --> CoreDB
AppSvc --> CoreDB
EvalSvc --> CoreDB
FavSvc --> CoreDB
CommunitySvc --> CoreDB
PopularSvc --> CoreDB
SearchSvc --> SearchIndex
SearchSvc --> CoreDB
RecoSvc --> CoreDB
RecoSvc --> Cache
ReviewSvc --> CoreDB
NotifSvc --> CoreDB
ChatSvc --> CoreDB
RiskSvc --> AuditStore
RiskSvc --> CoreDB

APIGW --> Cache
NotifSvc --> MQ
CommunitySvc --> MQ
AppSvc --> MQ
PopularSvc --> MQ

package "External Integrations" {
  cloud "Email Service Provider\n(Verification Codes & Email Push)" as EmailSvc
  cloud "SMS Provider (Optional)" as SMS
}

VCode --> EmailSvc
NotifSvc --> EmailSvc
VCode --> SMS

note bottom
  System scope limited to university research internship information and community referral posts.
  Excludes social enterprise recruitment and headhunting ads (C-001).
  Database products, API protocols, and encryption algorithms are not specified by the SRS (AD-005).
end note

legend right
  Actors: Student, Enterprise-Certified Student, Mentor, Administrator
  Client Layer: Web/Mobile UI for students & mentors, Admin Console
  API Edge: API Gateway + Edge Security (rate limiting, CAPTCHA)
  Services: Auth/IAM, Profile/Resume, Project, Application, Evaluation,
            Search, Recommendation, Favorites, Community, Popularity,
            Review & Certification, Notification, Chat, Admin Management, Risk Control
  Data: Core DB, Cache, Search Index, Resume Object Storage, Event Bus, Audit Logs
  External: Email Service Provider, optional SMS Provider
endlegend
@enduml
