samples.title: prompthub / metagpt-custom/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml

package "Presentation Layer" {
    component "User Interface Component" as UI
    cloud "Client Web Browsers" as Browser
}

package "Application Layer" {
    component "User Management Service" as UserService
    component "Artwork Management Service" as ArtworkService
    component "Content Interaction Service" as ContentService
    component "Administration Service" as AdminService
    component "Notification Service" as NotificationService
    component "Query & Sorting Component" as QuerySorting
}

package "Algorithm Layer" {
    component "Recommendation Engine" as Recommender
    component "Browsing History Component" as BrowsingHistory
}

package "Data Layer" {
    database "User & Relationship Data" as UserDB
    database "Artwork & Review Data" as ArtworkDB
    database "Content & History Data" as ContentDB
    database "System Logs" as LogDB
}

' Key Dependencies
UI --> UserService : "authenticate users\nmanage profiles"
UI --> ArtworkService : "display/upload/search\nartworks"
UI --> ContentService : "favorites/comments\nfollow relationships"
UI --> AdminService : "access admin functions"
UI --> Recommender : "request recommendations"
UI --> QuerySorting : "submit queries\napply filters"

UserService --> UserDB : "store/retrieve\nuser & relationship data"
ArtworkService --> ArtworkDB : "persist/retrieve\nartwork & review data"
ContentService --> ContentDB : "store/retrieve\nfavorites/comments/history"
AdminService --> ArtworkDB : "access review queue\nupdate review status"
AdminService --> ContentDB : "view/delete\ncomments & replies"
Recommender --> ArtworkDB : "access artwork data\nfor recommendations"
Recommender --> ContentDB : "access user signals\n& history"
BrowsingHistory --> ContentDB : "record/retrieve\nbrowsing history"
QuerySorting --> ArtworkDB : "query & filter\nartwork data"
NotificationService --> UserService : "send verification\n& alerts"

' Internal Application Dependencies
ArtworkService --> QuerySorting : "delegate queries"
ContentService --> BrowsingHistory : "record user activity"
ContentService --> NotificationService : "trigger event notifications"
UserService --> NotificationService : "trigger account notifications"
AdminService --> ContentService : "manage content moderation"
Recommender --> BrowsingHistory : "utilize history data"

' External Access
Browser --> UI : "access web app"

' Logging Dependencies
UserService --> LogDB : "log user actions"
ArtworkService --> LogDB : "log artwork operations"
ContentService --> LogDB : "log content interactions"
AdminService --> LogDB : "log admin activities"
Recommender --> LogDB : "log recommendation events"

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' Configuration for layout and styling
skinparam linetype ortho
top to bottom direction

' Define Colors and Styles
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor<<frontend>> #e1f5fe
    BorderColor<<frontend>> #01579b
    
    BackgroundColor<<service>> #fff9c4
    BorderColor<<service>> #fbc02d
    
    BackgroundColor<<framework>> #ede7f6
    BorderColor<<framework>> #512da8
    
    BackgroundColor<<algo>> #f1f8e9
    BorderColor<<algo>> #558b2f
    
    BackgroundColor<<infra>> #e8eaf6
    BorderColor<<infra>> #3f51b5
    BorderStyle<<infra>> dashed
}

skinparam database {
    BackgroundColor #f3e5f5
    BorderColor #7b1fa2
}

' =========================
' Frontend Layer
' =========================
rectangle "Frontend / Client Layer" as Frontend <<frontend>> {
    rectangle "User System" as UserSys <<frontend>> {
        node "User Login" as UL
        node "View Home Page" as VHP
        node "Follow Others" as FO
        node "Browse History" as BH
    }

    rectangle "Admin System" as AdminSys <<frontend>> {
        node "Admin Login" as AL
        node "View User List" as VUL
        node "View Works List" as VWL
        node "Audit / Review Works" as ARW
    }

    rectangle "Display System" as DisplaySys <<frontend>> {
        node "Upload Works" as UW
        node "Query Works" as QW
        node "View Works" as VW
        node "Query Upload Progress" as QU
    }

    rectangle "Collection System" as CollectionSys <<frontend>> {
        node "Add Collection" as AC
        node "Collection Category" as CC
        node "Query Collection" as QC
        node "Edit Collection" as EC
    }

    rectangle "Comment System" as CommentSys <<frontend>> {
        node "Comment on Works" as CW
        node "Delete Comment" as DC
        node "Reply to Comment" as RC
        node "Delete Reply" as DR
    }

    rectangle "Notification System" as NotifySys <<frontend>> {
        node "Comment Notification" as CN
        node "Reply Notification" as RN
        node "Audit Notification" as AN
        node "Private Message - TBD" as PM
    }

    rectangle "Recommendation System" as RecommendSys <<frontend>> {
        node "Hot Recommendations" as HR
        node "Personalized Recommendations" as PR
        node "Close Recommendations" as OR
    }
}

' =========================
' Service / Backend Layer
' =========================
rectangle "Service / Backend Layer" as ServiceLayer <<service>> {
    
    rectangle "Backend Framework: Django" as Django <<framework>>

    rectangle "Business Services" as CoreServices <<service>> {
        node "Account Service" as AccountSvc
        node "Authentication Service" as AuthSvc
        node "Resource Service" as ResourceSvc
        node "Works Service" as WorksSvc
        node "Audit Service" as AuditSvc
        node "Notification Service" as NotifySvc
    }

    rectangle "Recommendation Algorithms" as RecommendAlgo <<algo>> {
        node "Content Heat / Popularity Based" as Algo1
        node "User Collection / History Based" as Algo2
        node "Social Relation Based" as Algo3
    }

    database "SQLite Database" as DB
}

' =========================
' Deployment Layer
' =========================
rectangle "Infrastructure" as Deployment <<infra>> {
    node "Docker Deployment" as Docker
}

' =========================
' Relationships
' =========================
Frontend --> CoreServices
CoreServices --> RecommendAlgo
RecommendAlgo --> Django
RecommendAlgo --> DB
ServiceLayer ..> Docker : "deploys to"

@enduml

title PromptHub - Layered Architecture Diagram

  component "Web Browser (Chrome/Safari/Firefox)" as browser
}

rectangle "Front-End Layer" {
  component "Vue.js / jQuery SPA" as frontend

  component "Upload and Review Pages" as upload_ui
  component "User Profile Favorites Follow Pages" as profile_ui
  component "Admin Panel" as admin_ui
  component "Notification Center UI" as notif_ui
}

rectangle "Back-End Layer (Django)" {
  component "User and Auth Service" as user_svc
  component "Artwork Service" as artwork_svc
  component "Review Service" as review_svc
  component "Comment and Reply Service" as comment_svc
  component "Favorites Service" as fav_svc
  component "Follow and Relationship Service" as follow_svc
  component "Notification Service" as notif_svc
  component "Recommendation API" as rec_api

  component "Recommendation Engine (PyTorch/TensorFlow)" as rec_engine

}

rectangle "Data Persistence Layer" {
  database "SQLite Database" as sqlite
  database "File Storage (AI Artwork Images)" as file_storage
  database "Log Store" as log_store
}

rectangle "Infrastructure Layer" {
  component "Docker Container Runtime" as docker
  component "Email Alert Service" as email_alert
  component "Disaster Recovery Backup" as backup
}

visitor --> browser
user --> browser
admin --> browser

browser --> frontend

frontend --> browse_ui
frontend --> upload_ui
frontend --> profile_ui
frontend --> admin_ui
frontend --> notif_ui

browse_ui --> artwork_svc
browse_ui --> search_svc
browse_ui --> rec_api
upload_ui --> artwork_svc
upload_ui --> review_svc
profile_ui --> user_svc
profile_ui --> fav_svc
profile_ui --> follow_svc
admin_ui --> review_svc
admin_ui --> user_svc
admin_ui --> comment_svc
notif_ui --> notif_svc

artwork_svc --> notif_svc
review_svc --> notif_svc
comment_svc --> notif_svc

samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' Configuration for layout and styling
skinparam linetype ortho
top to bottom direction

' Define Colors and Styles
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor<<frontend>> #e1f5fe
    BorderColor<<frontend>> #01579b
    
    BackgroundColor<<service>> #fff9c4
    BorderColor<<service>> #fbc02d
    
    BackgroundColor<<framework>> #ede7f6
    BorderColor<<framework>> #512da8
    
    BackgroundColor<<algo>> #f1f8e9
    BorderColor<<algo>> #558b2f
    
    BackgroundColor<<infra>> #e8eaf6
    BorderColor<<infra>> #3f51b5
    BorderStyle<<infra>> dashed
}

skinparam database {
    BackgroundColor #f3e5f5
    BorderColor #7b1fa2
}

' =========================
' Frontend Layer
' =========================
rectangle "Frontend / Client Layer" as Frontend <<frontend>> {
    rectangle "User System" as UserSys <<frontend>> {
        node "User Login" as UL
        node "View Home Page" as VHP
        node "Follow Others" as FO
        node "Browse History" as BH
    }

    rectangle "Admin System" as AdminSys <<frontend>> {
        node "Admin Login" as AL
        node "View User List" as VUL
        node "View Works List" as VWL
        node "Audit / Review Works" as ARW
    }

    rectangle "Display System" as DisplaySys <<frontend>> {
        node "Upload Works" as UW
        node "Query Works" as QW
        node "View Works" as VW
        node "Query Upload Progress" as QU
    }

    rectangle "Collection System" as CollectionSys <<frontend>> {
        node "Add Collection" as AC
        node "Collection Category" as CC
        node "Query Collection" as QC
        node "Edit Collection" as EC
    }

    rectangle "Comment System" as CommentSys <<frontend>> {
        node "Comment on Works" as CW
        node "Delete Comment" as DC
        node "Reply to Comment" as RC
        node "Delete Reply" as DR
    }

    rectangle "Notification System" as NotifySys <<frontend>> {
        node "Comment Notification" as CN
        node "Reply Notification" as RN
        node "Audit Notification" as AN
        node "Private Message - TBD" as PM
    }

    rectangle "Recommendation System" as RecommendSys <<frontend>> {
        node "Hot Recommendations" as HR
        node "Personalized Recommendations" as PR
        node "Close Recommendations" as OR
    }
}

' =========================
' Service / Backend Layer
' =========================
rectangle "Service / Backend Layer" as ServiceLayer <<service>> {
    
    rectangle "Backend Framework: Django" as Django <<framework>>

    rectangle "Business Services" as CoreServices <<service>> {
        node "Account Service" as AccountSvc
        node "Authentication Service" as AuthSvc
        node "Resource Service" as ResourceSvc
        node "Works Service" as WorksSvc
        node "Audit Service" as AuditSvc
        node "Notification Service" as NotifySvc
    }

    rectangle "Recommendation Algorithms" as RecommendAlgo <<algo>> {
        node "Content Heat / Popularity Based" as Algo1
        node "User Collection / History Based" as Algo2
        node "Social Relation Based" as Algo3
    }

    database "SQLite Database" as DB
}

' =========================
' Deployment Layer
' =========================
rectangle "Infrastructure" as Deployment <<infra>> {
    node "Docker Deployment" as Docker
}

' =========================
' Relationships
' =========================
Frontend --> CoreServices
CoreServices --> RecommendAlgo
RecommendAlgo --> Django
RecommendAlgo --> DB
ServiceLayer ..> Docker : "deploys to"

@enduml

samples.pred_source:
@startuml Song_Mood_Storage_Retrieval_Architecture

skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam componentStyle uml2
skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA
skinparam packageBackgroundColor #EEF2FF
skinparam packageBorderColor #4A5568
skinparam packageFontStyle bold
skinparam packageFontSize 13
skinparam componentBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam componentBorderColor #2D3748
skinparam componentFontSize 11
skinparam nodeBackgroundColor #F0FFF4
skinparam nodeBorderColor #276749
skinparam nodeFontSize 12
skinparam databaseBackgroundColor #FFFBEB
skinparam databaseBorderColor #B7791F
skinparam cloudBackgroundColor #EBF8FF
skinparam cloudBorderColor #2B6CB0
skinparam interfaceBackgroundColor #E9D8FD
skinparam interfaceBorderColor #553C9A
skinparam arrowColor #4A5568
skinparam arrowFontSize 10

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
'  USER / BROWSER ACTOR
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
actor "User\n(Browser Client)" as User

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
'  EXTERNAL SYSTEMS
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
component "Genius API\n(External Song Search Service)" as GeniusAPI

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
'  CONTAINERIZED APPLICATION STACK
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
node "Containerized Application Stack\n(Docker / Multi-Container Environment)" as DockerEnv {

  ' ── Presentation Layer ──────────────────────
  package "Presentation Layer" as PresentationLayer {
    component "ReactFrontend\n(Browser-Rendered SPA)" as ReactFrontend
  }

  ' ── Application / API Layer ─────────────────
  package "Application / API Layer" as AppLayer {
    component "FastAPIBackend\n(Orchestration & Lookup Logic)" as FastAPIBackend
  }

  ' ── Storage Layer ────────────────────────────
  package "Storage Layer" as StorageLayer {
    database "ElasticsearchService\n(Song Records & Mood Associations)" as ElasticsearchService
  }

  ' ── Auxiliary Inspection Layer ───────────────
  package "Auxiliary Inspection Layer" as AuxLayer {
    component "KibanaService\n(Data Inspection UI for Operators)" as KibanaService
  }

}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
'  INTERFACES
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
interface "API-001\nFrontend-to-Backend API" as API001
interface "API-002\nBackend-to-Elasticsearch API" as API002
interface "API-003\nBackend-to-GeniusAPI Interface" as API003
interface "API-004\nKibana-to-Elasticsearch API" as API004

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
'  DEPENDENCIES / ARROWS
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────

' User → Presentation
User                --> ReactFrontend           : accesses via\nbrowser

' Presentation → Application
ReactFrontend       --> API001
API001              --> FastAPIBackend           : Song lookup\nrequests

' Application → Storage
FastAPIBackend      --> API002
API002              --> ElasticsearchService     : query & write\nsong-mood records

' Application → External
FastAPIBackend      --> API003
API003              --> GeniusAPI                : fetch songs\nnot in ES

' Auxiliary → Storage
KibanaService       --> API004
API004              --> ElasticsearchService     : inspect stored\nsong & mood data

@enduml

title Squatm3gator System Architecture

package "External Systems" {
  [Web Browser] as Browser
  [GoDaddy API] as GoDaddy
  database "Redis" as Redis {
    component "Job Channel" as JobChannel
    component "Reporting Channel" as ReportChannel
  }
}

node "squatm3gator API Server" {
  component "Web Server" as WebServer {
    interface "HTTP API" as HTTP
    interface "WebSocket" as WS
  }

  component "Session Manager" as SessionManager

  component "Request Handler" as RequestHandler {
    component "Attack Parser" as AttackParser
    component "Job Creator" as JobCreator
    component "Error Handler" as ErrorHandler
  }

  component "Background Consumer" as Consumer {
    component "Job Processor" as JobProcessor
    component "Result Router" as ResultRouter
  }

  component "squatm3 Engine Wrapper" as Squatm3Wrapper
}

Browser --> HTTP : "1. GET / (FR-001)"
Browser --> HTTP : "2. API Requests (FR-003, FR-004, FR-006)"
Browser <--> WS : "3. Async Updates (FR-005)"

HTTP --> SessionManager : "Session Creation/Validation (FR-001, DR-001)"
HTTP --> RequestHandler : "Route Requests"

RequestHandler --> AttackParser : "Parse attack codes/flags (FR-003, DR-003, DR-004)"
AttackParser --> JobCreator : "Construct options"
JobCreator --> SessionManager : "Get session key as Job ID (DR-001)"
JobCreator --> JobChannel : "4. Publish Job (FR-004)"
RequestHandler --> ErrorHandler : "Handle errors (FR-007, FR-008)"

Consumer --> JobChannel : "5. Listen for Jobs (FR-002)"
Consumer --> JobProcessor : "Process Job"
JobProcessor --> Squatm3Wrapper : "6. Execute domain generation (C-004)"
Squatm3Wrapper --> GoDaddy : "7. Optional availability check (DR-005, DR-006)"
Squatm3Wrapper --> ReportChannel : "8. Send results (DR-002)"

Consumer --> ResultRouter : "9. Route messages"
ResultRouter --> ReportChannel : "Listen for reports"
ResultRouter --> SessionManager : "Validate session/job match (NFR-002)"
ResultRouter --> WS : "10. Emit to session (FR-005)"

note right of Consumer
  Started as background thread
  on service startup (FR-002)
end note

note right of Squatm3Wrapper
  Invokes squatm3 CLI engine
  with constructed options (C-004)
end note

@enduml

rectangle "Web UI\nindex.html" as WebUi
rectangle "HTTP API\nSession and attack requests" as Api
rectangle "Socket.io\nWebSocket result channel" as SocketIo
queue "Redis\nCommand and reporting queues" as Redis
rectangle "Workers\nCommand consumers" as Workers
rectangle "Squatm3\nDomain generation engine" as Squatm3
cloud "GoDaddy API\nDomain availability" as GoDaddyApi

WebUi --> Api : HTTP requests\ncreate session and queue job
Api --> WebUi : rendered page\nplain-text errors
WebUi <--> SocketIo : progress and results\nsession socket

Api --> Redis : enqueue job\nsession key / job UUID
SocketIo <--> Redis : read reporting queue\nWORKER#JOB#MESSAGE
Redis <--> Workers : command jobs\nworker reports

Workers --> Squatm3 : attack options\nhomoglyph / flip / add / replace
Squatm3 --> Workers : generated domains
Workers --> GoDaddyApi : optional availability check\nsso-key auth
GoDaddyApi --> Workers : availability result
@enduml

rectangle "User" as User
cloud "S3" as S3
rectangle "Cognito" as Cognito
rectangle "API Gateway" as ApiGateway

package "Live Score Pipeline" as LiveScorePipeline {
    rectangle "live_score\nLambda" as LiveScoreLambda
    database "DynamoDB\nLive Scores" as LiveScoreDynamo
    database "Elasticsearch" as LiveScoreSearch
    node "EC2" as LiveScoreEC2 {
        queue "Kafka" as Kafka
        rectangle "M4" as M4
        rectangle "foot app" as FootApp
    }
}

package "Standing Service" as StandingService {
    rectangle "standing\nLambda" as StandingLambda
    database "DynamoDB\nStandings" as StandingDynamo
    database "Elasticsearch" as StandingSearch
}

package "Recommendation Service" as RecommendationService {
    rectangle "recommendation\nLambda" as RecommendationLambda
    rectangle "Lex" as Lex
}

package "Fixtures Service" as FixturesService {
    rectangle "fixtures\nLambda" as FixturesLambda
    queue "SQS" as Sqs
}

package "Notification Service" as NotificationService {
    queue "SQS" as NotificationSqs
    rectangle "SNS" as Sns
}

package "Prediction Service" as PredictionService {
    rectangle "prediction\nLambda" as PredictionLambda
    rectangle "SageMaker" as SageMaker
    database "DynamoDB\nPredictions" as PredictionDynamo
    database "Elasticsearch" as PredictionSearch
}

User --> S3 : load web app
User --> Cognito : sign in
User --> ApiGateway : API request
ApiGateway ..> Cognito : authorize token

ApiGateway --> LiveScoreLambda : live_score
ApiGateway --> StandingLambda : standing
ApiGateway --> RecommendationLambda : recommendation
ApiGateway --> FixturesLambda : fixtures
ApiGateway --> PredictionLambda : prediction

LiveScoreLambda --> LiveScoreDynamo
LiveScoreLambda --> LiveScoreSearch
FootApp --> M4
M4 --> Kafka
Kafka --> LiveScoreLambda : stream events

StandingLambda --> StandingDynamo
StandingLambda --> StandingSearch

RecommendationLambda --> Lex
RecommendationLambda --> LiveScoreSearch
RecommendationLambda --> StandingSearch

FixturesLambda --> Sqs
Sqs --> NotificationSqs
NotificationSqs --> Sns
Sns --> User : SMS reminder

PredictionLambda --> SageMaker
PredictionLambda --> PredictionDynamo
PredictionLambda --> PredictionSearch
SageMaker --> PredictionDynamo
@enduml

samples.title: AI-DrivenTextAdventureGame / metagpt-custom/claude-sonnet-4-6
samples.pred_source:
@startuml AI_TextAdventure_Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA
skinparam PackageBackgroundColor #F0F4FF
skinparam PackageBorderColor #5566AA
skinparam PackageFontStyle bold
skinparam ComponentBackgroundColor #DDEEFF
skinparam ComponentBorderColor #3355AA
skinparam DatabaseBackgroundColor #FFF8DD
skinparam DatabaseBorderColor #AA8800
skinparam CloudBackgroundColor #FDE8FF
skinparam CloudBorderColor #884499

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' EXTERNAL SYSTEMS
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
cloud "External Systems" {
  [External LLM Provider] as LLMProvider
  [AIGC Media Generation Service] as AIGCMedia
  [Email / SMTP Service] as SMTPService
  [Cloud / Self-Hosted Data Center] as CloudInfra
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' LAYER 1 — CLIENT / PRESENTATION
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Client / Presentation Layer" {
  [NuxtFrontend\n(Vue.js + Nuxt.js SSR)] as NuxtFrontend
  [LocalSaveStore\n(Client-Side Offline\nGame Save Fallback)] as LocalSaveStore
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' LAYER 2 — APPLICATION / BACKEND SERVICES
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Application / Backend Service Layer  (Go · Iris Framework)" {
  [AuthService\n(Registration · Login · Session\nPassword Recovery · Email Verify)] as AuthService
  [UserProfileService\n(Profile · Avatar · History)] as UserProfileService
  [GameService\n(New Game · Saves · Choices\nShare to Community)] as GameService
  [CommunityService\n(Posts · Comments · Replies\nSearch · Recommendations)] as CommunityService
  [AdminService\n(User Governance · Post Review\nBan · Reports)] as AdminService
  [FavoritesService\n(Folders · Add · View · Remove)] as FavoritesService
  [NotificationService\n(Create · Read · Delete\nUnread Count)] as NotificationService
  [AchievementService\n(Earn Currency · Buy Items\nHealth Packs · Resurrection\nCheck Achievements)] as AchievementService
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' LAYER 3 — AI / MODEL INTEGRATION
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "AI / Model Integration Layer" {
  [LLMAdapter\n(Prompt Construction · LLM Call\nPlot & Event · AIGC Media Request\nImage & Audio · Media-State Assoc.)] as LLMAdapter
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' LAYER 4 — DATA ACCESS
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Data Access Layer" {
  [GormRepository\n(ORM CRUD — Users · Posts · Saves\nNotifs · Favorites · Achievements\nCurrency · Items · Logs)] as GormRepository
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' LAYER 5 — PERSISTENCE
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Persistence Layer" {
  database "MySQLDatabase\n(All Structured App Data)" as MySQLDatabase
  database "VerificationCodeStore\n(Temp Email Codes\nPassword Recovery)" as VerificationCodeStore
  database "ObjectStorage\n(AIGC Images · Audio\nPost Screenshots)" as ObjectStorage
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' LAYER 6 — INFRASTRUCTURE / OPERATIONS
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Infrastructure / Operations Layer" {
  [ContainerOrchestrator\n(Kubernetes · Docker Images\nAuto-Scaling · Health Probing\nRolling Updates)] as ContainerOrchestrator
}

' ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
' ARROWS — Client to Backend Services
' ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
NuxtFrontend --> AuthService          : HTTPS requests
NuxtFrontend --> GameService          : HTTPS requests
NuxtFrontend --> CommunityService     : HTTPS requests
NuxtFrontend --> UserProfileService   : HTTPS requests
NuxtFrontend --> FavoritesService     : HTTPS requests
NuxtFrontend --> NotificationService  : HTTPS requests
NuxtFrontend --> AchievementService   : HTTPS requests
NuxtFrontend --> AdminService         : HTTPS requests

' ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
' ARROWS — Offline save fallback
' ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
NuxtFrontend --> LocalSaveStore : write local save\n(cloud unavailable)
LocalSaveStore ..> GameService  : sync when cloud\nrestored

' ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
' ARROWS — Backend Service inter-dependencies
' ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
AuthService --> SMTPService           : dispatch verification email
AuthService --> VerificationCodeStore : store / validate temp codes
AuthService --> GormRepository        : account CRUD

GameService --> LLMAdapter            : player choice → plot generation
GameService --> GormRepository        : save CRUD · share · integrity
GameService --> AchievementService    : trigger achievement / currency check
GameService --> CommunityService      : share save → create post

CommunityService --> NotificationService : comment / reply / review events
CommunityService --> UserProfileService  : record browsing history
CommunityService --> AdminService        : submit user reports
CommunityService --> GormRepository      : post / comment CRUD

AdminService --> NotificationService  : review outcome notifications
AdminService --> GormRepository       : governance · ban · review records

FavoritesService --> GormRepository   : favorites CRUD
NotificationService --> GormRepository : notification CRUD

UserProfileService --> GormRepository : profile CRUD
UserProfileService --> AuthService    : sensitive op logging trigger

AchievementService --> GormRepository : achievements · currency · items CRUD

' ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
' ARROWS — AI / Model Integration
' ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
LLMAdapter --> LLMProvider    : outbound LLM API call\n(plot / events)
LLMAdapter --> AIGCMedia      : request images\n& sound effects
LLMAdapter --> ObjectStorage  : store AIGC media assets

' ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
' ARROWS — Media upload from community/game
' ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
CommunityService --> ObjectStorage : store post screenshots

' ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
' ARROWS — Data Access → Persistence
' ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
GormRepository --> MySQLDatabase : SQL queries & mutations

' ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
' ARROWS — Infrastructure (containment/management)
' ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
AuthService           ..> ContainerOrchestrator : managed by
UserProfileService    ..> ContainerOrchestrator : managed by
GameService           ..> ContainerOrchestrator : managed by
CommunityService      ..> ContainerOrchestrator : managed by
AdminService          ..> ContainerOrchestrator : managed by
FavoritesService      ..> ContainerOrchestrator : managed by
NotificationService   ..> ContainerOrchestrator : managed by
AchievementService    ..> ContainerOrchestrator : managed by
LLMAdapter            ..> ContainerOrchestrator : managed by
GormRepository        ..> ContainerOrchestrator : managed by

ContainerOrchestrator --> CloudInfra : runs on underlying\ncompute / network / storage

@enduml

samples.title: AI-DrivenTextAdventureGame / openhands/gpt-5
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title AI-Driven Text Adventure Game & Community - Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam wrapWidth 200
skinparam maxMessageSize 200

actor "Guest" as guest
actor "Registered User / Player" as user
actor "Community Administrator" as admin

node "Client Devices" as client {
  component "Web App\n(Vue.js + Nuxt.js)" as web
}

node "Kubernetes Cluster\n(Dockerized Services)" as cluster {

  component "API Gateway / Router\n(Iris)" as gateway

  package "User System" as userpkg {
    component "Auth Service" as auth
    component "Profile Service" as profile
  }

  package "Game System" as gamepkg {
    component "Game Service\n(background, choices, progression)" as game
    component "Save Management" as save
    component "LLM Adapter" as llm_adapter
  }

  package "Community System" as communitypkg {
    component "Post Service" as post
    component "Comment & Reply Service" as comment
    component "Favorites Service" as favorites
    component "Search & Recommendation Service" as search
  }

  package "Administration System" as adminpkg {
    component "Review & Moderation Service" as review
    component "User Governance Service" as governance
  }

  package "Notification System" as notifpkg {
    component "Notification Service" as notif
  }

  database "MySQL\n(via Gorm)" as mysql
}

cloud "LLM Provider" as llm

guest --> web
user --> web
admin --> web

web --> gateway : HTTPS

gateway --> auth
gateway --> profile
gateway --> game
gateway --> save
gateway --> post
gateway --> comment
gateway --> favorites
gateway --> search
gateway --> review
gateway --> governance
gateway --> notif

auth --> mysql
profile --> mysql
game --> mysql
save --> mysql
post --> mysql
comment --> mysql
favorites --> mysql
search --> mysql
review --> mysql
governance --> mysql
notif --> mysql

game --> llm_adapter
llm_adapter --> llm

post --> notif : "create/update events"
comment --> notif : "comment/reply events"
review --> notif : "review status events"

game --> post : "share save as post"

profile --> notif : "notification settings"

@enduml

samples.title: modelevolution / direct/claude-sonnet-4-6
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class

skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam defaultFontSize 12

skinparam component {
  BackgroundColor #DDEEFF
  BorderColor #336699
  FontColor #000000
}

skinparam database {
  BackgroundColor #FFF0CC
  BorderColor #CC8800
}

skinparam node {
  BackgroundColor #E8F5E9
  BorderColor #2E7D32
}

skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor #F3E5F5
  BorderColor #6A1B9A
}

skinparam cloud {
  BackgroundColor #FCE4EC
  BorderColor #880E4F
}

title Model Evolution Version Management Visualization Tool\nSystem Architecture Diagram

actor Learner as LRN
actor "Model Contributor" as CNT
actor Administrator as ADM

node "Client Layer\n(Browser)" {
  component [Firefox / Chrome / 360 Browser\n(Responsive Web UI)] as BROWSER

  rectangle "UI Modules" {
    component [Account Management UI\n(Register / Login / Logout\nPassword / Permission Apply)] as UI_ACCOUNT
    component [Model Search & Viewing UI\n(Search / Basic Info / Evolution Graph\nEvolution Detail Topology)] as UI_SEARCH
    component [Model Contribution & Edit UI\n(ONNX Upload / PyTorch Upload\nOnline Editor / Profile Edit\nModel Delete)] as UI_CONTRIB
    component [Evolution Relationship Edit UI\n(Add / Delete / Modify Relationships\nLayer Reuse Edit)] as UI_EVOL
    component [User Management UI\n(Manage Users / Delete Users\nPermission Review)] as UI_ADMIN
  }
}

LRN --> BROWSER
CNT --> BROWSER
ADM --> BROWSER

BROWSER --> UI_ACCOUNT
BROWSER --> UI_SEARCH
BROWSER --> UI_CONTRIB
BROWSER --> UI_EVOL
BROWSER --> UI_ADMIN

node "Back-End Layer" {
  rectangle "API Gateway / Security Layer" {
    component [OAuth 2.0 / Two-Factor Auth\nTLS Encryption (PCI DSS)\nAccess Control & Privilege Control\nSpoofing / Tamper Protection] as SEC
  }

  rectangle "Business Service Modules" {
    component [Account Service\n(Register / Login / Logout\nPassword Modify / Permission Apply)] as SVC_ACCOUNT
    component [Model Service\n(Upload ONNX / Upload PyTorch\nOnline Edit / Profile Modify\nModel Delete / Search / View)] as SVC_MODEL
    component [Evolution Service\n(Add / Delete / Modify\nEvolution Relationships\nLayer Reuse Relationships\nDataset & Trained Model Records)] as SVC_EVOL
    component [Visualization Service\n(Topology Graph Generation\nEvolution Detail Graphs\nPerformance Metrics Display)] as SVC_VIZ
    component [User Management Service\n(Manage Users / Delete Users\nPermission Review)] as SVC_USER
  }

  rectangle "Algorithm Support Module" {
    component [Model Parser\n(ONNX / PyTorch Structure Analysis)] as ALG_PARSE
    component [Graph Layout Engine\n(Evolution Topology Computation)] as ALG_GRAPH
    component [Performance Analyzer\n(Execution Time / Accuracy Metrics)] as ALG_PERF
    component [Encryption Module\n(AES / DES Symmetric Encryption\nModel Data Encryption)] as ALG_ENC
  }
}

UI_ACCOUNT --> SEC
UI_SEARCH --> SEC
UI_CONTRIB --> SEC
UI_EVOL --> SEC
UI_ADMIN --> SEC

SEC --> SVC_ACCOUNT
SEC --> SVC_MODEL
SEC --> SVC_EVOL
SEC --> SVC_VIZ
SEC --> SVC_USER

SVC_MODEL --> ALG_PARSE
SVC_EVOL --> ALG_GRAPH
SVC_MODEL --> ALG_PERF
SVC_MODEL --> ALG_ENC
SVC_EVOL --> ALG_ENC

SVC_VIZ --> ALG_GRAPH

node "Data Layer" {
  database "MySQL\n(Relational Data)\n- Users & Roles\n- Permissions & Applications\n- Model Basic Attributes\n- Performance Metrics\n- Dataset Info\n- Trained Model Records" as MYSQL

  database "Neo4j\n(Graph Data)\n- Model Evolution Relationships\n- Evolution Method / Details\n- Operator / Layer Connections\n- Computational Layer Reuse\n- Topology Graph Data" as NEO4J

  database "File / Object Storage\n- ONNX Files (Encrypted)\n- PyTorch Source Code\n- Model Files (AES/DES Encrypted)" as FILESTORAGE
}

SVC_ACCOUNT --> MYSQL
SVC_USER --> MYSQL
SVC_MODEL --> MYSQL
SVC_MODEL --> FILESTORAGE
SVC_EVOL --> NEO4J
SVC_EVOL --> MYSQL
SVC_VIZ --> NEO4J
SVC_VIZ --> MYSQL
ALG_PERF --> MYSQL
ALG_ENC --> FILESTORAGE

cloud "External Interfaces & Protocols" {
  component [Python Libraries\n(Algorithm / ML Support)] as EXT_PYTHON
  component [Browser Console\n(Debug / Monitoring)] as EXT_CONSOLE
  component [Communication Protocols\nHTTP / HTTPS / TCP / IP\nFTP / SMTP / UDP] as EXT_PROTO
}

SVC_MODEL --> EXT_PYTHON
ALG_PARSE --> EXT_PYTHON
ALG_PERF --> EXT_PYTHON
BROWSER --> EXT_CONSOLE
BROWSER --> EXT_PROTO
EXT_PROTO --> SEC

rectangle "Cross-Cutting Concerns" {
  component [Concurrency & Load Manager\n(50 concurrent users\n10 modify req/s / 50 query req/s)] as NFR_CONC
  component [Availability & Failover\n(7x24 uptime / <30h downtime/yr\nFailover <0.5h / MTBF>=4000h)] as NFR_AVAIL
  component [Logging & Maintainability\n(Fault location / MTTR<=0.5h\nCode consistency / HTML+CSS separation)] as NFR_MAINT
  component [Privacy & Compliance\n(Privacy Policy / User Consent\nOpen-Source License Compliance\nPCI DSS / Local Regulations)] as NFR_PRIV
}

SEC --> NFR_CONC
NFR_CONC --> NFR_AVAIL
NFR_AVAIL --> NFR_MAINT
NFR_MAINT --> NFR_PRIV

note right of SEC
  NFR-010: OAuth 2.0 / Two-Factor Auth
  NFR-011: TLS Encryption (PCI DSS)
  NFR-012: AES/DES Model Encryption
  NFR-013: Block unauthenticated modifications
  NFR-014: Block non-admin approved model delete/modify
  NFR-015: Spoofing detection
  NFR-016: Tamper protection
end note

note right of MYSQL
  DR-001: Users & Roles (Learner/Contributor/Admin)
  DR-002: Permission-change applications
  DR-006: Model basic attributes
  DR-007: Performance metrics
  DR-008: Dataset name & type
  DR-009: Trained model records
end note

note right of NEO4J
  DR-010: Evolution relationships
  DR-011: Evolution method/details
  (operator add/delete, param adjust,
   connection modes, layer reuse)
end note

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' Directional setting (Top to Down)
top to bottom direction

' Styling for different layers
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor<<Frontend>> #e1f5fe
    BorderColor<<Frontend>> #01579b
    
    BackgroundColor<<Presentation>> #f3e5f5
    BorderColor<<Presentation>> #4a148c
    
    BackgroundColor<<Backend>> #fff3e0
    BorderColor<<Backend>> #e65100
}

skinparam database {
    BackgroundColor<<Storage>> #e8f5e9
    BorderColor<<Storage>> #1b5e20
}

samples.title: mytorch / openhands/qwen3-coder-480b-a35b-instruct
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title MyTorch System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false

actor "Deep Learning Beginner" as U1
actor "Developer / Team Member" as U2
actor "Stakeholder" as U3

package "Visual Front End" as FE {
  component "Main Interface" as FE_Main
  component "Configuration Interface" as FE_Config
  component "Training Interface" as FE_Train
  component "Inference Interface" as FE_Infer
  component "Guidance & Help" as FE_Help
  component "Monitoring & Visualization" as FE_Monitor
}

package "System Back End" as BE {
  component "API Gateway" as BE_API
  component "Model Management Service" as BE_Model
  component "Data Loading Service" as BE_Data
  component "Training Service" as BE_Training
  component "Inference Service" as BE_Inference
  component "GPU API Layer\n(Auto-detect, Resource Mgmt, Compat)" as BE_GPU
  component "Logging & Metrics" as BE_Log
  component "Fault Handling & Recovery" as BE_Fault
  component "Backup & Restore" as BE_Backup
  component "Security & Privacy Controls" as BE_Sec
}

package "MyTorch / NNE Framework" as Core {
  component "Core Tensors & Autograd" as Core_Tensor
  component "Optimizers" as Core_Opt
  component "Loss Functions" as Core_Loss
  component "Weight Initialization\n(He/Xavier/Lecun)" as Core_Init
  component "Classic Models\n(ResNet/VGG/Transformer)" as Core_Zoo
}

database "SQLite Local Database" as DB
collections "Preset Datasets" as DS
node "GPU Device(s)" as GPU

U1 --> FE_Main
U1 --> FE_Config
U1 --> FE_Train
U1 --> FE_Infer
U2 --> FE_Main
U2 --> FE_Config
U2 --> FE_Train
U2 --> FE_Infer
U3 --> FE_Main

FE_Main --> BE_API
FE_Config --> BE_API
FE_Train --> BE_API
FE_Infer --> BE_API
FE_Monitor --> BE_API
FE_Help --> BE_API

BE_API --> BE_Model
BE_API --> BE_Data
BE_API --> BE_Training
BE_API --> BE_Inference
BE_API --> BE_Log

BE_Model --> Core_Zoo : create/configure models
BE_Training --> Core_Tensor : train
BE_Training --> Core_Opt
BE_Training --> Core_Loss
BE_Training --> Core_Init
BE_Training --> Core_Zoo
BE_Inference --> Core_Tensor : forward()
BE_Inference --> Core_Zoo

BE_Data --> DS : load/preprocess/split
BE_Training --> BE_GPU : matrix ops
BE_Inference --> BE_GPU : matrix ops
BE_GPU --> GPU : utilization

BE_Log --> DB : training/inference logs
BE_Model --> DB : models/metadata
BE_Data --> DB : dataset refs
BE_Backup --> DB : backup/recover
BE_Fault --> BE_Training : manage exceptions
BE_Fault --> BE_Inference : manage exceptions
BE_Log --> FE_Monitor : metrics/status
BE_Sec ..> BE_API
BE_Sec ..> DB

@enduml

samples.title: s000068_a8b7a94e / direct/gpt-5
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title cFS Bundle - Architecture Overview (Reviewed Subset)

skinparam componentStyle rectangle

actor "Developer/Build User" as Dev
actor "Functional Tester" as Tester
actor "Telemetry Operator" as Operator
actor "CI Maintainer" as Maintainer

rectangle "nasa/cFS Repository" as Repo

node "Developer/Test Host" as Host {
  component "Build Env\n(make prep/install)\nuses Makefile.sample & sample_defs" as BuildEnv
  component "Build Artifacts\n(debug/release)" as BuildArtifacts
  component "cmdUtil\n(host-side command tool)" as CmdUtil

  node "Runtime: core-cpu1 (cFS Target)" as Core {
    component "cFS Target Process\n(core-cpu1)" as Target
  }

  component "Telemetry Viewer/Logger" as TelemetrySink
}

cloud "GitHub Actions" as GHA {
  node "Runner: ubuntu-18.04" as R1804
  node "Runner: ubuntu-latest" as Rlatest

  package "cFS Bundle Workflows" as BundleWF {
    component "Build & Install\n(debug/release matrix)" as WFBuild
    component "Run + Functional Test\n(core-cpu1 + cmdUtil)\n15-min timeout" as WFFunc
    component "Format Check\n(on push, pull_request, workflow_call)" as WFFormat
    component "Changelog Generation\n(manual trigger)" as WFChangelog
  }

  package "Reusable Workflows" as ReuseWF {
    component "Format Check (reusable)" as RWFFormat
    component "Static Analysis / CodeQL (reusable)" as RWFCodeQL
    component "Duplicate-check (reusable)" as RWFDuplicate
  }

  component "Changelog Artifact" as Artifact
}

package "cFS Submodule Repos" as Submodules

package "Related Tools/Libraries (documented)" as Tools {
  component "SIL"
  component "ECI"
  component "cFS_IO_LIB"
  component "cFS_LIB"
  component "CCDD"
  component "Perfutils-java"
  component "gen_sch_tbl"
}

' Repository and build relationships
Repo -down- BuildEnv : source checkout\n(with submodules)
Dev --> BuildEnv : copy assets &\nrun make
BuildEnv --> BuildArtifacts : make prep/install
BuildArtifacts --> Target : install & run
Repo .. Tools : documented interfaces

' Functional testing and telemetry flows
Tester --> CmdUtil : invoke during tests
CmdUtil --> Target : command packets\n(--pktid, --cmdcode, --endian,\n--uint32, ...)
Operator --> TelemetrySink : configure/observe telemetry
Target --> TelemetrySink : telemetry stream

note on link
Operator enters IP (e.g., 127.0.0.1)
end note

note bottom of Target
Accepts host commands and produces telemetry
end note

' CI relationships and runners
Repo --> BundleWF : workflow definitions
Maintainer --> WFChangelog : manual dispatch
BundleWF ..> ReuseWF : workflow_call reuse

WFBuild --> R1804
WFFunc --> R1804
WFFormat --> R1804
WFChangelog --> Rlatest
RWFDuplicate --> Rlatest
RWFFormat --> R1804
RWFCodeQL --> Rlatest

WFChangelog --> Artifact : upload artifact

Submodules ..> ReuseWF : workflow_call reuse

' Notes on workflows and constraints
note right of WFBuild
- Uses Git submodules checkout
- Uses Makefile.sample and sample_defs
- Produces debug/release builds
end note

note right of WFFunc
- Executes core-cpu1 and ../host/cmdUtil
- Functional-test timeout ceiling: 15 minutes
end note

note right of WFFormat
- Runs on push, pull_request, workflow_call
end note

note right of R1804
Used by build, run, functional-test,\nand format-checker jobs
end note

note right of Rlatest
Used by changelog and duplicate-check jobs
end note

note as N1
Changelog categories:
- Closed issues
- Breaking changes
- Implemented enhancements
- Fixed bugs
- Deprecated
- Removed
- Security fixes
end note
Artifact .. N1

note as N2
Some reviewed build/test workflows are labeled "deprecated";
revalidate against active workflows before adoption
end note
Repo .. N2
@enduml

@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class

skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA

  BackgroundColor #E8F4FD

}

  BorderColor #7B1FA2

}

  BorderColor #388E3C

}

  BackgroundColor #FFF3E0
  BorderColor #E65100
  FontColor #1A1A2E
}
skinparam arrow {
  Color #37474F
  FontColor #37474F
}
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam defaultFontSize 11
skinparam linetype ortho

title Tengine Lite — System Architecture Diagram

node "User / Developer Environment" as UserEnv {
  component "C API Integrator\n(Native Application)" as CAPIUser
  component "C++ API User\n(C++ Application)" as CppAPIUser
  component "Python API User\n(Python Application)" as PyAPIUser
  component "Example User\n(Classification, Detection,\nSegmentation, Pose, OCR, etc.)" as ExampleUser
  component "Tool User\n(Model Conversion)" as ToolUser
}

node "Tengine Lite Core Library" as TengineCore {

  package "API Surface Layer" as APILayer {
    component "C API\n(Original Tengine-Compatible)" as CAPI
    component "C++ API\nDocumentation Entry Point" as CppAPI
    component "Python API\nDocumentation Entry Point" as PyAPI
  }

  package "Core Modules" as CoreModules {

    component "Scheduler Module\n- Schedule & Execute NNIR\n- Computation Graph Management\n- Hardware Resource Scheduling\n- Model Serializer Coordination" as Scheduler

    component "Operator Module\n- NN Operator Registration\n- NN Operator Initialization" as OperatorModule

    component "Serializer Module\n- Binary tmfile Decoding\n- Serialized Model Parameter Output" as Serializer

    component "Device Module\n- NN Operators Backend\n- Hardware Abstraction" as DeviceModule
  }

  package "Example Applications" as ExampleApps {
    component "Classification\n(MobileNet v1)" as ExClassify
    component "Object Detection\n(SSD, YoloV3, YoloV4-tiny,\nYoloV5s, NanoDet, EfficientDet,\nRetinaFace)" as ExDetect
    component "Segmentation\n(Yolact, U-Net)" as ExSegment
    component "Pose Estimation\n(OpenPose, HRNet)" as ExPose
    component "Landmark Detection\n(Facial Landmark)" as ExLandmark
    component "Character Recognition\n(CRNN Chinese OCR)" as ExOCR
  }
}

node "Model Conversion Tooling" as ConversionTools {
  component "Linux Pre-compiled\nConversion Tool\n[Linux Only]" as LinuxTool
  node "Web Browser\n(WebAssembly Support Required)" as Browser {
    component "Online Converter\n(WebAssembly-based)\n[Local Browser Execution,\nNo Data Uploaded]" as WasmConverter
  }
}

node "Build System" as BuildSystem {
  component "CMake-based\nCross-platform Build\n[C-001 / NFR-001]" as CMakeBuild
}

database "Local Asset Store\n(Project Root Folder)" as LocalAssets {
  component "Model Files\n(.tmfile binary / other formats)" as ModelFiles
  component "Image Files\n(Input for Examples)" as ImageFiles
  component "Converted Model Artifacts" as ConvertedModels
}

' --- User to API connections ---
CAPIUser --> CAPI : uses (C API)
CppAPIUser --> CppAPI : consults (C++ API docs)
PyAPIUser --> PyAPI : consults (Python API docs)
ExampleUser --> ExClassify : runs
ExampleUser --> ExDetect : runs
ExampleUser --> ExSegment : runs
ExampleUser --> ExPose : runs
ExampleUser --> ExLandmark : runs
ExampleUser --> ExOCR : runs
ToolUser --> LinuxTool : uses (Linux)
ToolUser --> WasmConverter : uses (Browser)

' --- API to Core ---
CAPI --> Scheduler : dispatches inference requests
CppAPI --> Scheduler : dispatches inference requests
PyAPI --> Scheduler : dispatches inference requests

' --- Examples to API ---
ExClassify --> CAPI : invokes via C API (FR-002)
ExDetect --> CAPI : invokes via C API
ExSegment --> CAPI : invokes via C API
ExPose --> CAPI : invokes via C API
ExLandmark --> CAPI : invokes via C API
ExOCR --> CAPI : invokes via C API

' --- Core module interactions ---
Scheduler --> OperatorModule : registers & initializes operators
Scheduler --> Serializer : decodes tmfile model data
Scheduler --> DeviceModule : dispatches to backend

' --- Serializer data flow ---
Serializer --> ModelFiles : reads binary tmfile input
Serializer ..> Scheduler : returns serialized model parameters

' --- Example asset dependencies ---
ExClassify --> LocalAssets : loads local images & models (C-004)
ExDetect --> LocalAssets : loads local images & models
ExSegment --> LocalAssets : loads local images & models
ExPose --> LocalAssets : loads local images & models
ExLandmark --> LocalAssets : loads local images & models
ExOCR --> LocalAssets : loads local images & models

' --- Conversion tool data flow ---
LinuxTool --> ModelFiles : reads model input
LinuxTool --> ConvertedModels : writes converted artifact (C-002)
WasmConverter --> ModelFiles : reads model input (local in browser)
WasmConverter --> ConvertedModels : writes converted artifact (C-003)

' --- Build system ---
CMakeBuild --> TengineCore : builds (cross-platform, NFR-001)
CMakeBuild --> ExampleApps : builds
CMakeBuild --> ConversionTools : builds

note bottom of Serializer
  FR-006, DR-003, DR-004:
  Decodes binary tmfile format
  into serialized model parameters
end note

note bottom of WasmConverter
  NFR-003, FR-008, C-003:
  Executes entirely in browser.
  No private data uploaded.
end note

note right of CMakeBuild
  C-001, NFR-001:
  CMake-based build for
  cross-platform support
end note

note right of OperatorModule
  FR-009:
  Registers & initializes
  NN Operators
end note

@enduml

@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class

RECTANGLE "User" as user

package "Frontend System" {
    RECTANGLE "Main Interface" as mainUI
    RECTANGLE "Configuration Interface" as configUI
    RECTANGLE "Training Interface" as trainUI
    RECTANGLE "Inference Interface" as inferUI
}

package "Backend System" {
    RECTANGLE "Model Configuration Service" as modelConfigService
    RECTANGLE "Data Loading Service" as dataLoadingService
    RECTANGLE "Model Training Service" as modelTrainService
    RECTANGLE "Model Inference Service" as modelInferService
    RECTANGLE "Framework Extension Service" as frameworkExtService
    RECTANGLE "Database Persistence Service" as dbPersistService
}

package "MyTorch/NNE Framework" {
    RECTANGLE "GPU Acceleration Module" as gpuModule
    RECTANGLE "Weight Initialization Module" as weightInitModule
    RECTANGLE "Classic Models Module" as classicModelsModule
    RECTANGLE "Preset Datasets Module" as presetDatasetsModule
}

package "Local Storage" {
    RECTANGLE "SQLite Database" as sqliteDB
}

user --> mainUI : interacts with
user --> configUI : configures models
user --> trainUI : trains models
user --> inferUI : performs inference

mainUI --> modelConfigService : requests model config
configUI --> modelConfigService : sends configuration
trainUI --> modelTrainService : starts/stops training
inferUI --> modelInferService : requests inference

modelConfigService --> frameworkExtService : extends framework
modelConfigService --> dbPersistService : saves config

dataLoadingService --> presetDatasetsModule : loads datasets
dataLoadingService --> dbPersistService : persists data logs

modelTrainService --> gpuModule : accelerates training
modelTrainService --> weightInitModule : initializes weights
modelTrainService --> classicModelsModule : uses models
modelTrainService --> dbPersistService : saves models & logs

modelInferService --> gpuModule : accelerates inference
modelInferService --> classicModelsModule : loads models
modelInferService --> dbPersistService : logs inference

dbPersistService --> sqliteDB : reads/writes data
dbPersistService --> sqliteDB : backups/recovery

note right of frameworkExtService
  Includes GPU APIs,
  weight init methods,
  classic models,
  and preset datasets
end note

note right of sqliteDB
  Stores models,
  datasets,
  training logs,
  inference logs,
  and user history
end note

note top of gpuModule
  Provides GPU-accelerated
  matrix operations and
  computation capabilities
end note

note bottom of modelTrainService
  Handles training execution,
  evaluation, saving,
  and manual termination
end note

note bottom of modelInferService
  Manages model loading,
  forward execution,
  and result returning
end note

@enduml

    [Authentication] as auth_service #lightsalmon

samples.title: AI-DrivenTextAdventureGame / direct/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
title AI-Driven Text Adventure Game and Community Platform - System Architecture

package "Client Layer" {
  [Web Browser / Client App] as Client
  [Vue.js / Nuxt.js Frontend] as Frontend
  Client --> Frontend : HTTP/HTTPS, WebSocket
}

package "API Gateway / Load Balancer" {
  [API Gateway] as Gateway
  [Load Balancer] as LB
  Frontend --> Gateway : Routes API Requests
  Gateway --> LB : Distributes Traffic
}

package "Application Service Layer" {
  package "User Service" {
    [User Authentication Service] as AuthService
    [User Profile Service] as ProfileService
    [User Management Service] as UserMgmtService
  }

  package "Game Service" {
    [Game Session Service] as GameSessionService
    [Game State Service] as GameStateService
    [Save Management Service] as SaveService
    [Game Logic Orchestrator] as GameOrchestrator
  }

  package "Community Service" {
    [Post Service] as PostService
    [Comment & Reply Service] as CommentService
    [Search & Recommendation Service] as SearchService
    [Favorites Service] as FavoritesService
  }

  package "Administration Service" {
    [Admin Review Service] as ReviewService
    [Admin Governance Service] as GovernanceService
    [Report & Feedback Service] as ReportService
  }

  package "Notification Service" {
    [Notification Engine] as NotificationEngine
    [Notification Delivery Service] as NotificationDelivery
  }

  package "AI Integration Service" {
    [LLM Orchestration Service] as LLMService
    [AIGC Content Service] as AIGCService
  }

  Gateway --> AuthService
  Gateway --> ProfileService
  Gateway --> GameSessionService
  Gateway --> PostService
  Gateway --> ReviewService
  Gateway --> NotificationEngine
  Gateway --> LLMService

  GameSessionService --> GameOrchestrator
  GameOrchestrator --> GameStateService
  GameOrchestrator --> SaveService
  GameOrchestrator --> LLMService
  GameOrchestrator --> AIGCService

  PostService --> ReviewService
  PostService --> FavoritesService
  PostService --> SearchService
  CommentService --> PostService
  CommentService --> NotificationEngine
  ReviewService --> NotificationEngine
  FavoritesService --> NotificationEngine

  GovernanceService --> UserMgmtService
  ReportService --> GovernanceService
  UserMgmtService --> AuthService
  UserMgmtService --> ProfileService

  NotificationEngine --> NotificationDelivery
  NotificationDelivery --> Client : Push / Poll
}

package "External Service Layer" {
  [Large Language Model API] as LLM_API
  [AIGC Media Service] as AIGC_API
  [Email Service] as EmailService
  [File Storage Service] as StorageService

  LLMService --> LLM_API : API Calls
  AIGCService --> AIGC_API : API Calls
  AuthService --> EmailService : Sends Verification
  ProfileService --> StorageService : Avatar Uploads
  PostService --> StorageService : Screenshot Uploads
  AIGCService --> StorageService : Generated Media
}

package "Data Access Layer" {
  [GORM ORM] as GORM
  [Data Access Objects] as DAOs
  DAOs --> GORM
}

package "Data Storage Layer" {
  database "MySQL Database" as MySQL {
    folder "User Schema" {
      [users]
      [profiles]
      [administrators]
    }
    folder "Game Schema" {
      [game_saves]
      [game_states]
      [background_info]
      [achievements]
      [currency_items]
    }
    folder "Community Schema" {
      [posts]
      [post_reviews]
      [comments]
      [replies]
      [favorites]
    }
    folder "Notification Schema" {
      [notifications]
      [notification_settings]
    }
    folder "Admin Schema" {
      [reports]
      [feedback]
      [account_bans]
    }
    folder "System Schema" {
      [audit_logs]
      [system_events]
    }
  }

  GORM --> MySQL
}

package "Infrastructure & Operations" {
  [Docker Container Runtime] as Docker
  [Kubernetes Orchestration] as K8s
  [Monitoring & Logging] as Monitoring
  [Security & Vulnerability Mgmt] as Security

  component "All Services" as Services
  Services --> Docker
  Docker --> K8s
  Monitoring --> Services
  Security --> Services
  Security --> MySQL
}

note right of Client
  **User Classes:**
  - Guest
  - Registered User / Player
  - Community Administrator
  - Game Content Consumer
  - Community Interaction User
end note

note left of MySQL
  **Key Data Objects:**
  - User Accounts & Profiles
  - Game Saves & States
  - Posts, Comments, Replies
  - Favorites & Notifications
  - Admin Records & Logs
end note

note bottom of LLM_API
  **Core Dependency:**
  Dynamic plot generation,
  random events, decision effects,
  and content consistency.
end note

@enduml

  [Audit/Logging Service] as LogSvc
}

package "Data Access Layer" as DAL {
  database "Metadata DB\n(users, files, parsing, configs,\nmatching, detections, repairs, history, logs)" as MetaDB
  folder "Object Storage\n(uploaded MDJ, SQL scripts,\nexported reports)" as ObjStore
}

package "External/Target Systems" as EXT {
  cloud "StarUML MDJ Files\n(user-provided)" as MDJFiles
  database "Target MySQL Database\n(user-provided)" as TargetDB
  [JDBC Connector] as JDBC
}

' User and UI
User --> Browser
Browser --> API : HTTPS/SSL

' Auth and RBAC
API --> Auth : authenticate/authorize
Auth --> MetaDB : users, roles, sessions

' File management
API --> FileSvc
FileSvc --> ObjStore : upload/download
FileSvc --> MetaDB : metadata

' Config and exceptions
API --> ConfigSvc
ConfigSvc --> MetaDB : rules & exceptions

' History and reports
API --> HistorySvc
HistorySvc --> MetaDB

' Logging
API --> LogSvc
Worker --> LogSvc
LogSvc --> MetaDB : operation logs

' Orchestration and async processing
API --> Orchestrator : submit detection/repair
Orchestrator --> TaskQueue : enqueue jobs
Worker --> TaskQueue : poll jobs
Worker --> Orchestrator : status updates

' Parsing
Worker --> MDJParser
Worker --> DBParser
MDJParser --> Jackson : normalize to JSON
DBParser --> JDBC
JDBC --> TargetDB : read schema via JDBC
DBParser --> Jackson : normalize to JSON
MDJParser --> MetaDB : store parsing results
DBParser --> MetaDB : store parsing results

' Matching and detection
Worker --> Matcher
Matcher --> MetaDB : read parsing, write matches
Worker --> Detector
Detector --> MetaDB : read matches, write inconsistencies

' Reporting
Worker --> ReportSvc
ReportSvc --> ObjStore : write report files
ReportSvc --> MetaDB : report index

' Repairs
Worker --> RepairPlanner
RepairPlanner --> MetaDB : selected items & order
RepairPlanner --> CDRepair
RepairPlanner --> DBRepair
CDRepair --> ObjStore : update class diagram artifacts
DBRepair --> JDBC
JDBC --> TargetDB : apply schema changes

' UI consumption of results
API --> Browser : results, progress, report links

' External inputs (files) served via API
API --> ObjStore : serve help/cases downloads

note right of API
- SSL encryption for sensitive data
- Open API for integration
end note

note bottom of Worker
Asynchronous processing keeps UI responsive
end note

@enduml

samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' --- Configuration & Styles ---
skinparam topboxSelection true
skinparam Direction top to bottom
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false

' Define Styles based on original ClassDefs
<style>
    .client {
        BackgroundColor #e1f5fe
        LineColor #01579b
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .service {
        BackgroundColor #e8f5e9
        LineColor #2e7d32
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .db {
        BackgroundColor #fff9c4
        LineColor #fbc02d
        LineThickness 2
    }
</style>

' --- Client Layer ---
package "Browser / Client Layer" as Browser_Layer {
    rectangle "Frontend Interface\n(Bootstrap-Vue)" as FE_Interface <<client>>
}

' --- Server Layer ---
package "Server Layer\n(Spring Boot)" as Server_Layer {
    
    package "Core Modules" as Core_Modules {
        ' Layout is TB within the package
        rectangle "Account Management Module" as AccountMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Q&A Community Module" as QAMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Blog Sharing Module" as BlogMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Model Management Module" as ModelMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Dataset Management Module" as DatasetMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Following Management Module" as FollowMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Admin Module" as AdminMod <<service>>
    }
}

' --- Database Layer ---
package "Database Layer\n(MySQL)" as Database_Layer {
    database "User Data" as UserDB <<db>>
    database "Q&A Community Data" as QADB <<db>>
    database "Blog Data" as BlogDB <<db>>
    database "Model Data" as ModelDB <<db>>
    database "Dataset Data" as DatasetDB <<db>>
    database "Following Data" as FollowDB <<db>>
}

' --- Relationships ---
FE_Interface --> Core_Modules
Core_Modules --> Database_Layer

@enduml

All technology choices align with the constraints.

samples.title: s000036_b0b48363 / metagpt-custom/qwen3-coder-480b-a35b-instruct
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
' Deployment nodes representing physical or logical deployment units
node "Server Environment" {
    node "Node.js Runtime" {
        package "Server Layer" {
            component "ExpressServer"
            component "LoggingRouter"
            component "StatusEndpoint"
            component "SocketIOServer"
            component "JSONBodyParser"
            component "StaticFileServer"
            component "ClientConnectionManager"
            component "ErrorMessageHandler"
        }
    }
}

node "Browser Environment" {
    package "Browser Client Layer" {
        component "BrowserClient"
        component "SchemaValidator"
        component "WindowManager"
        component "VisualizerDispatcher"
        component "VisualizerModules"
    }
}

cloud "External Systems" {
    component "LoggingProducerClients"
    component "WebBrowser"
}

' Dependencies and interfaces
ExpressServer --> LoggingRouter : routes /logger requests
ExpressServer --> StatusEndpoint : handles /logger/status
LoggingRouter --> JSONBodyParser : parses JSON body
LoggingRouter --> ErrorMessageHandler : wraps invalid messages
ErrorMessageHandler --> SocketIOServer : forwards valid logs
BrowserClient --> SocketIOServer : connects via Socket.IO
SchemaValidator <-- BrowserClient : validates log objects
SchemaValidator --> ErrorMessageHandler : passes invalid objects

WebBrowser --> StaticFileServer : loads client UI

@enduml

@startuml
!define RECTANGLE rectangle
!define DATABASE database
!define QUEUE queue
!define COMPONENT component

title Squatm3gator System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle

' Actors
actor "Web User" as WebUser
actor "Client Application" as ClientApp
actor "Operator" as Operator

' Main Components
RECTANGLE "Web UI\n(index.html)" as WebUI
RECTANGLE "HTTP API Server" as APIServer
QUEUE "Redis Message Queue" as RedisMQ
RECTANGLE "Background Consumer Thread" as ConsumerThread
RECTANGLE "Domain Generation Engine\n(squatm3 subprocess)" as SquatM3Engine
RECTANGLE "WebSocket Channel" as WebSocketChannel
RECTANGLE "GoDaddy API Integration" as GoDaddyAPI

' Data Stores
DATABASE "Session Store" as SessionStore
DATABASE "Configuration Store" as ConfigStore

' Relationships
WebUser --> WebUI : accesses
ClientApp --> APIServer : consumes
Operator --> ConfigStore : configures

WebUI --> APIServer : submits requests
APIServer --> SessionStore : manages sessions
APIServer --> RedisMQ : publishes jobs
APIServer --> WebSocketChannel : emits updates
APIServer --> ConfigStore : reads config

ConsumerThread --> RedisMQ : listens for jobs
ConsumerThread --> SquatM3Engine : executes
ConsumerThread --> RedisMQ : reports results
ConsumerThread --> WebSocketChannel : forwards updates

RedisMQ --> ConsumerThread : delivers jobs
RedisMQ --> APIServer : delivers reports

WebSocketChannel --> WebUser : real-time updates
WebSocketChannel --> ClientApp : async updates

SquatM3Engine --> GoDaddyAPI : optional checks
GoDaddyAPI --> SquatM3Engine : availability data

note right of APIServer
  - Handles HTTP requests
  - Manages sessions
  - Publishes jobs to Redis
  - Emits WebSocket updates
end note

note right of ConsumerThread
  - Listens to Redis jobs
  - Executes squatm3 engine
  - Reports results via Redis
  - Forwards to WebSocket
end note

note right of SquatM3Engine
  - Generates domain variants
  - Supports multiple attack types
  - Optional GoDaddy integration
end note

note bottom of RedisMQ
  Job Queue & Reporting Channel
end note

note top of GoDaddyAPI
  Optional domain availability checks
  Using configured credentials
end note

@enduml

@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
left to right direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #34495E
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5

    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam database {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam queue {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam cloud {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}

rectangle "Web UI\nindex.html" as WebUi
rectangle "HTTP API\nSession and attack requests" as Api
rectangle "Socket.io\nWebSocket result channel" as SocketIo
queue "Redis\nCommand and reporting queues" as Redis
rectangle "Workers\nCommand consumers" as Workers
rectangle "Squatm3\nDomain generation engine" as Squatm3
cloud "GoDaddy API\nDomain availability" as GoDaddyApi

WebUi --> Api : HTTP requests\ncreate session and queue job
Api --> WebUi : rendered page\nplain-text errors
WebUi <--> SocketIo : progress and results\nsession socket

Api --> Redis : enqueue job\nsession key / job UUID
SocketIo <--> Redis : read reporting queue\nWORKER#JOB#MESSAGE
Redis <--> Workers : command jobs\nworker reports

Workers --> Squatm3 : attack options\nhomoglyph / flip / add / replace
Squatm3 --> Workers : generated domains
Workers --> GoDaddyApi : optional availability check\nsso-key auth
GoDaddyApi --> Workers : availability result
@enduml

samples.pred_source:
@startuml
Title AI-Driven Text Adventure Game & Community - System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
left to right direction

actor "Guest / Player / Admin" as EndUser

node "Web Browser" as Browser {
  component "Nuxt.js UI\n(SSR + SPA)" as Frontend
}

cloud "LLM Provider\n(Large Language Model)" as LLM

node "Kubernetes Cluster\n(Dockerized Services)" as K8s {
  component "API Gateway / Router\n(Go Iris)" as APIGW

  package "Backend Services (Go + Iris + Gorm)" as Backend {
    component "Auth & User Service\n(registration, login, logout,\npassword recovery, profiles)" as AuthSvc
    component "Community Service\n(posts, comments, replies,\nsearch, recommendations)" as CommunitySvc
    component "Favorites Service" as FavoritesSvc
    component "Notification Service\n(create/view/delete, unread counts)" as NotifySvc
    component "Admin Service\n(review, moderation,\nban/restore, reports)" as AdminSvc
    component "Game Service\n(LLM orchestration,\nsaves, background, choices,\nshare to community)" as GameSvc
  }
}

database "MySQL\n(Relational DB via Gorm)" as MySQL

' Client interactions
EndUser --> Browser
Browser --> Frontend

' Frontend to backend
Frontend --> APIGW : HTTPS/JSON APIs

' API gateway routes to services
APIGW --> AuthSvc
APIGW --> CommunitySvc
APIGW --> FavoritesSvc
APIGW --> NotifySvc
APIGW --> AdminSvc
APIGW --> GameSvc

' Data persistence
AuthSvc --> MySQL
CommunitySvc --> MySQL
FavoritesSvc --> MySQL
NotifySvc --> MySQL
AdminSvc --> MySQL
GameSvc --> MySQL

' External model invocation
GameSvc --> LLM : generate plots/events\nupdate game state

' Notification flow (polling via API)
Frontend ..> NotifySvc : fetch notifications

' Save sharing to community
GameSvc ..> CommunitySvc : publish save-sharing posts

note top of Backend
- Modular components per SRS functional areas
- Access control enforced in API gateway and services
- Sensitive data encrypted in transit & at rest
end note

note right of MySQL
Core tables (logical):
- users, profiles, admins
- posts, post_reviews
- comments, replies
- favorites, notifications
- game_saves, backgrounds
- game_state, choices
- achievements, items
end note

note bottom of LLM
Non-functional constraints:
- Text generation <= 20s
- Game/UX actions <= 3s
- >= 100 concurrent users
end note

@enduml

samples.title: mytorch / metagpt-custom/qwen3-coder-480b-a35b-instruct

@startuml
title MyTorch System Architecture - Component/Deployment Diagram

' Presentation Layer
node PresentationLayer {
    component "Frontend UI" as frontendUI
}

' Application Layer
node ApplicationLayer {
    component "Main Interface" as mainInterface
    component "Configuration Interface" as configInterface
    component "Training Interface" as trainingInterface
    component "Inference Interface" as inferenceInterface
    component "Backend Service" as backendService
}

' Framework Layer
node FrameworkLayer {
    component "MyTorch Framework" as myTorchFramework
    component "Data Loader" as dataLoader
    component "Trainer" as trainer
    component "Inferencer" as inferencer
    component "Weight Initializer" as weightInitializer
    component "Classic Models Repository" as classicModelsRepo
    component "Preset Datasets" as presetDatasets
    component "GPU Accelerator" as gpuAccelerator
}

' Data Layer
node DataLayer {
    database "SQLite Database" as sqliteDB
}

' External Systems
cloud "GPU Hardware/API" as gpuHardware

' Dependencies
frontendUI --> mainInterface : User Interaction
mainInterface --> configInterface : Configure Models
mainInterface --> trainingInterface : Start Training
mainInterface --> inferenceInterface : Run Inference

configInterface --> backendService : Configuration Requests
trainingInterface --> backendService : Training Orchestration
inferenceInterface --> backendService : Inference Orchestration

backendService --> myTorchFramework : Execute Operations
backendService --> sqliteDB : Persist Results

myTorchFramework --> dataLoader : Load Data
myTorchFramework --> trainer : Initiate Training
myTorchFramework --> inferencer : Initiate Inference
myTorchFramework --> weightInitializer : Initialize Weights
myTorchFramework --> classicModelsRepo : Access Models
myTorchFramework --> presetDatasets : Access Datasets

trainer --> dataLoader : Load Training Data
inferencer --> dataLoader : Load Inference Data

trainer --> gpuAccelerator : Use GPU for Training
inferencer --> gpuAccelerator : Use GPU for Inference

gpuAccelerator --> gpuHardware : Access GPU Resources

trainer --> sqliteDB : Save Model Weights
inferencer --> sqliteDB : Save Inference Results

@enduml

samples.title: prompthub / direct/gpt-5
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title PromptHub System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam wrapWidth 200
skinparam maxMessageSize 200

actor Visitor
actor "Registered User" as RegUser
actor Administrator as Admin
actor "AI Artwork Creator" as Creator
actor "AI Artwork Viewer / Newcomer" as Viewer
actor "Developers / Ops" as DevOps

rectangle "Client" as Client {
  component "Web Browser" as Browser
  component "Front-end UI\n(Vue/jQuery, HTML/CSS/JS)" as FE <<JavaScript>>
  Browser -- FE : runs
}

node "Server (Ubuntu 22.04)\nDocker 20.10.17" as Server {
  component "Firewall & CORS\n(WAF rules, CORS policy)" as WAF <<Security>>

  node "Container: Django Backend" as BE {
     component "API Gateway & Auth\n(HTTPS, AuthN/AuthZ, Input Validation)" as API <<Django>>
     component "User & Account Service\n(registration, login, logout, password, profile)" as UserSvc <<Django>>
     component "Social Graph Service\n(follow/unfollow, fans, follows)" as SocialSvc <<Django>>
     component "Artwork & Review Service\n(upload/edit/delete, review workflow)" as ArtSvc <<Django>>
     component "Search & Filter Service\n(keywords, tags, sorting, filtering)" as SearchSvc <<Django>>
     component "Favorite Service\n(favorites, categories, visibility)" as FavSvc <<Django>>
     component "Comment Service" as CommentSvc <<Django>>
     component "Reply Service" as ReplySvc <<Django>>
     component "History Service\n(browsing history)" as HistorySvc <<Django>>
     component "Notification Service\n(unread/read, count)" as NotifSvc <<Django>>
     component "Recommendation Gateway\n(popular, personalized, preference toggle)" as RecGateway <<Django>>
     component "Admin Management API\n(users, artworks, comments, replies)" as AdminAPI <<Django>>
     component "Rate Limiter & Concurrency Control" as RateLimit <<Security>>
     component "Django ORM / Data Access" as ORM <<Django>>
     component "Logging & Audit\n(log files, error localization)" as Logging <<Observability>>

     API -- RateLimit
     API --> UserSvc
     API --> SocialSvc
     API --> ArtSvc
     API --> SearchSvc
     API --> FavSvc
     API --> CommentSvc
     API --> ReplySvc
     API --> HistorySvc
     API --> NotifSvc
     API --> RecGateway
     API --> AdminAPI

     UserSvc --> ORM
     SocialSvc --> ORM
     ArtSvc --> ORM
     SearchSvc --> ORM
     FavSvc --> ORM
     CommentSvc --> ORM
     ReplySvc --> ORM
     HistorySvc --> ORM
     NotifSvc --> ORM
     AdminAPI --> ORM
     RecGateway --> ORM : read signals & prefs

     API ..> Logging
     UserSvc ..> Logging
     ArtSvc ..> Logging
  }

  node "Container: Algorithm Engine" as Algo {
     component "Recommendation Engine\n(PyTorch/TensorFlow)\n(personalized ranking)" as Recommender <<Python>>
  }

  node "Container: SQLite" as DB {
     database "SQLite DB\n(users, artworks, reviews,\nfavorites, comments, replies,\nfollows, history, notifications,\npreferences, logs)" as SQLite
  }

  storage "Persistent Volume: Data & Logs" as Volume

  component "Healthcheck & Auto-Restart\n(Docker restart policy)" as Health <<Reliability>>
  component "Disk Usage Monitor\n(< 80% capacity)" as DiskMon <<Reliability>>
}

cloud "SMTP / Email Service" as SMTP
cloud "Offsite Backup Storage" as Backup

' Actors use the client browser
Visitor --> Browser
RegUser --> Browser
Admin --> Browser
Creator --> Browser
Viewer --> Browser

' Front-end communicates securely with server
FE -down-> WAF : HTTPS requests
WAF -down-> API : HTTPS (REST/Web API)\nCORS enforced

' Backend internal communications
RecGateway -down-> Recommender : Internal API (protocol TBD)
ORM -down-> SQLite : SQL (SQLite)

' Emails: verification codes and alerts
UserSvc -right-> SMTP : Email verification codes
Health -right-> SMTP : Error alerts
DiskMon -right-> SMTP : Capacity alerts
SMTP -down-> DevOps : Alert emails

' Persistence and backups
Logging -down-> Volume
SQLite -down-> Volume
Volume -down-> Backup : Scheduled offsite backups

' Notes for NFRs and constraints
note top of WAF
- Secure HTTP (HTTPS)
- Firewall and CORS enabled
- Prevent illegal links, XSS, SQL injection
end note

note right of API
- AuthN/AuthZ for user & admin
- Server-side data revalidation
- End-to-end encryption for sensitive data
- Core service response <= 0.5s
end note

note right of SQLite
- SQLite adopted due to runtime constraints
- Future migration to MySQL (design TBD)
end note

note bottom of ArtSvc
- Image display target <= 0.5s
- Streaming allowed when applicable
end note

note right of NotifSvc
- Adds unread notifications on comments, replies, review updates
- Mark as read and delete supported
end note

note right of AdminAPI
- Review uploaded artworks (approve/reject)
- View/manage users, artworks, comments, replies
end note

note right of Recommender
- Personalized recommendations
- Uses signals: history, favorites, follows, etc.
- Respects user preference switch
end note

note right of RateLimit
- Limits simultaneous access volume
end note

note right of Health
- Auto-restart containers after errors
- Target mean time to single point failure > 720 hours
end note

note right of DiskMon
- Alert when disk usage >= 80%
end note

note bottom of Volume
- Logs backed up and stored
- Supports fault localization
end note

note bottom of Browser
- Requires network connectivity
end note
@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' Configuration for layout and styling
skinparam linetype ortho
top to bottom direction

' Define Colors and Styles
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor<<frontend>> #e1f5fe
    BorderColor<<frontend>> #01579b
    
    BackgroundColor<<service>> #fff9c4
    BorderColor<<service>> #fbc02d
    
    BackgroundColor<<framework>> #ede7f6
    BorderColor<<framework>> #512da8
    
    BackgroundColor<<algo>> #f1f8e9
    BorderColor<<algo>> #558b2f
    
    BackgroundColor<<infra>> #e8eaf6
    BorderColor<<infra>> #3f51b5
    BorderStyle<<infra>> dashed
}

skinparam database {
    BackgroundColor #f3e5f5
    BorderColor #7b1fa2
}

' =========================
' Frontend Layer
' =========================
rectangle "Frontend / Client Layer" as Frontend <<frontend>> {
    rectangle "User System" as UserSys <<frontend>> {
        node "User Login" as UL
        node "View Home Page" as VHP
        node "Follow Others" as FO
        node "Browse History" as BH
    }

    rectangle "Admin System" as AdminSys <<frontend>> {
        node "Admin Login" as AL
        node "View User List" as VUL
        node "View Works List" as VWL
        node "Audit / Review Works" as ARW
    }

    rectangle "Display System" as DisplaySys <<frontend>> {
        node "Upload Works" as UW
        node "Query Works" as QW
        node "View Works" as VW
        node "Query Upload Progress" as QU
    }

    rectangle "Collection System" as CollectionSys <<frontend>> {
        node "Add Collection" as AC
        node "Collection Category" as CC
        node "Query Collection" as QC
        node "Edit Collection" as EC
    }

    rectangle "Comment System" as CommentSys <<frontend>> {
        node "Comment on Works" as CW
        node "Delete Comment" as DC
        node "Reply to Comment" as RC
        node "Delete Reply" as DR
    }

    rectangle "Notification System" as NotifySys <<frontend>> {
        node "Comment Notification" as CN
        node "Reply Notification" as RN
        node "Audit Notification" as AN
        node "Private Message - TBD" as PM
    }

    rectangle "Recommendation System" as RecommendSys <<frontend>> {
        node "Hot Recommendations" as HR
        node "Personalized Recommendations" as PR
        node "Close Recommendations" as OR
    }
}

' =========================
' Service / Backend Layer
' =========================
rectangle "Service / Backend Layer" as ServiceLayer <<service>> {
    
    rectangle "Backend Framework: Django" as Django <<framework>>

    rectangle "Business Services" as CoreServices <<service>> {
        node "Account Service" as AccountSvc
        node "Authentication Service" as AuthSvc
        node "Resource Service" as ResourceSvc
        node "Works Service" as WorksSvc
        node "Audit Service" as AuditSvc
        node "Notification Service" as NotifySvc
    }

    rectangle "Recommendation Algorithms" as RecommendAlgo <<algo>> {
        node "Content Heat / Popularity Based" as Algo1
        node "User Collection / History Based" as Algo2
        node "Social Relation Based" as Algo3
    }

    database "SQLite Database" as DB
}

' =========================
' Deployment Layer
' =========================
rectangle "Infrastructure" as Deployment <<infra>> {
    node "Docker Deployment" as Docker
}

' =========================
' Relationships
' =========================
Frontend --> CoreServices
CoreServices --> RecommendAlgo
RecommendAlgo --> Django
RecommendAlgo --> DB
ServiceLayer ..> Docker : "deploys to"

@enduml
