samples.title: Indoor_Fitness_App / direct/gpt-5
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam wrapWidth 220
skinparam maxMessageSize 200

title Indoor Fitness App - System Architecture

node "Mobile Device\n(Android >=8.0 / iOS >=11)\nHW: Octa-core 2.45 GHz, 4GB RAM, 32GB ROM+" as Mobile {
  [Main UI] as UI_Main
  [Exercise UI] as UI_Exercise
  [History UI] as UI_History
  [Personal/Preferences UI] as UI_Personal
  [Casting Operations UI] as UI_Casting

  component "Camera Capture" as CamCap
  component "Pose Estimation Engine\n(Skeleton Extraction)" as PoseEst
  component "Posture Evaluation & Scoring\n(Stick Diagram, Similarity)" as Eval
  component "Training Session Monitor\n(Start/End, Completion Degree)" as SessionMon

  component "Casting Server (Android)\n(Control Channel)" as CastServer
  component "Device Discovery & Connection" as Discovery
  component "Video Streamer\n(Exercise Interface)" as Streamer

  component "Auth & Permissions Client" as AuthClient
  component "App-Server API Client" as ApiClient

  CamCap --> PoseEst : video frames (>=30 fps)
  PoseEst --> Eval : skeleton data
  Eval --> UI_Exercise : scores, stick diagram, remaining time
  CamCap --> UI_Exercise : user movement
  UI_Exercise --> Streamer : render frames
  Eval --> SessionMon : evaluation & state data
  SessionMon --> UI_Exercise : completion status
  UI_Main --> ApiClient
  UI_History --> ApiClient
  UI_Personal --> ApiClient
  UI_Casting --> Discovery
  AuthClient --> ApiClient
}

cloud "Internet" as Internet
cloud "Same LAN (Wi‑Fi)\nC-002: Same LAN required" as LAN

node "Server-side Processing\n(HW: CPU >= Pentium 900M, Rec. P4 1.2G; RAM >=256MB)" as Server {
  [App-Server API\n(protocol TBD)] as APIGW
  [Auth & RBAC Service] as AuthSvc
  [Plan Management Service] as PlanSvc
  [Plan Recommendation Service] as RecSvc
  [Materials Processor] as MaterialSvc
  [Report/Poster Generation Service] as ReportSvc
  [Data Access Layer\n(SQL Injection Protection)] as DAL

  database "User/Profile/Preferences DB" as DBUser
  database "Training Plans DB" as DBPlan
  database "History & Records DB" as DBHist
  database "Evaluation Data Store" as DBEval
  folder "Standard Videos & Standard Movements\nRepository" as StdRepo

  APIGW --> AuthSvc
  APIGW --> PlanSvc
  APIGW --> RecSvc
  APIGW --> ReportSvc
  ReportSvc --> MaterialSvc

  AuthSvc --> DAL
  PlanSvc --> DAL
  RecSvc --> DAL
  ReportSvc --> DAL
  MaterialSvc --> DAL

  DAL --> DBUser
  DAL --> DBPlan
  DAL --> DBHist
  DAL --> DBEval
  PlanSvc --> StdRepo
  RecSvc --> StdRepo
}

node "Casting Target Android Device\n(Receiver)" as Target {
  [Discovery Listener] as DiscClient
  [Casting Client] as CastClient
  [Command Handler] as CmdHandler
  [Display Surface] as Display

  CastClient --> Display
  CmdHandler --> CastClient
}

' Network connectivity
ApiClient --> Internet
Internet --> APIGW : App-Server API calls\n(auth, plans, recommendations, reports)
Streamer -- LAN : video stream
CastServer -- LAN : control commands
Discovery -- LAN
DiscClient -- LAN
CastClient -- LAN
CmdHandler -- LAN

LAN .. Target
LAN .. Mobile
Internet .. Server
Internet .. Mobile

' Data exchanges via API
Eval --> ApiClient : skeleton, scores, evaluation
SessionMon --> ApiClient : training results, completion
ApiClient --> Internet : upload materials, request report/poster

' Security and permissions flow
AuthClient --> ApiClient : login/registration, tokens
APIGW --> AuthSvc : identity verification, roles (Admin/User)

' Notes for NFRs and constraints
note right of PoseEst
NFR-004: Model runtime >= 20 fps
NFR-002: Pose recognition accuracy > 95% (normal)
NFR-003: Occlusion robustness (visible parts >= 90%)
end note

note right of Eval
NFR-005: Posture evaluation accuracy > 95% (ideal pose)
NFR-006: Error-tolerant evaluation >= 95% (quantified in tests)
NFR-007: Reduce body-shape/proportion impact
end note

note bottom of RecSvc
NFR-008: Recommendation latency <= 1 s
Uses training results and real-time state
end note

note bottom of ReportSvc
NFR-009: Report generation <= 3 s
Charts + textual explanations
end note

note bottom of Streamer
NFR-010: Casting video latency <= 100 ms
FR-015: Real-time exercise interface casting
end note

note bottom of CastServer
NFR-011: Command response <= 50 ms
FR-014: Device discovery & connection in same LAN
end note

note right of DAL
NFR-013: SQL injection protection
- Validate types/formats
- Filter special symbols
- Bind variables
- Use prepared statements
end note

note left of Mobile
NFR-012: Data leakage protection on client
- Clipboard/drag-drop/screenshot controls
- Memory theft mitigation
C-001: Camera recording >= 30 fps
OS: Android 8+/iOS 11+
end note

note right of Server
NFR-012: Data leakage protection on server
- Secure material collection/processing
- Protect personal health data
end note

note right of StdRepo
DR-001: Standard videos & standard movements
Used for plan creation and posture comparison
end note

note right of DBPlan
DR-005: User/system plans, next set/rest, completion degree
end note

note right of DBHist
DR-007: Exercise history and monthly overview
end note

note right of DBUser
DR-002: Personal info, health profile, goals, preferences
FR-013: Permissions (Admin/User)
end note

note right of DBEval
DR-004: Skeleton data, scores, professional evaluations, stick diagrams
end note

note bottom of Target
FR-015: Display real-time exercise interface
end note

legend left
System Architecture Highlights
- Mobile executes camera, pose estimation, evaluation, and casting source
- Server provides auth, recommendation, plan mgmt, and report/poster generation
- Same-LAN casting to Android target with strict latency
- Modular services with secure data access
endlegend
@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' --- Configuration & Styles ---
skinparam ranksep 50
skinparam nodesep 40
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
left to right direction

' Styling for different layers
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor<<client>> #e1f5fe
    BorderColor<<client>> #01579b
    
    BackgroundColor<<native>> #bbdefb
    BorderColor<<native>> #0d47a1
    
    BackgroundColor<<react>> #c8e6c9
    BorderColor<<react>> #1b5e20
    
    BackgroundColor<<bridge>> #00acc1
    BorderColor<<bridge>> #006064
    FontColor<<bridge>> white
    
    BackgroundColor<<infra>> #f5f5f5
    BorderColor<<infra>> #212121
    BorderStyle<<infra>> dashed
}

' --- Diagram Definitions ---

' Layer 1: Client Layer
package "Client / Platforms" as ClientLayer <<client>> {
    rectangle "Mobile Device" as Mobile <<client>>
    rectangle "Desktop PC" as Desktop <<client>>
    rectangle "Web Browser" as Web <<client>>
    rectangle "Android OS" as Android <<client>>
    rectangle "iOS / Apple" as iOS <<client>>
    rectangle "Smart Watch / Wearables" as IoT <<client>>
}

' Layer 2: Native Module Layer
package "Native Modules" as NativeLayer <<native>> {
    rectangle "Camera Call" as Camera <<native>>
    rectangle "Model Loading / TensorFlow" as ModelLoad <<native>>
    rectangle "Linear Algebra Library" as LinearAlgebra <<native>>
    rectangle "Voice Library Call" as Voice <<native>>
    rectangle "GPU Computing" as GPU <<native>>
    rectangle "Screen Recording" as ScreenRec <<native>>
    rectangle "Socket Communication" as Socket <<native>>
    rectangle "Data Processing" as DataProc <<native>>
    rectangle "Permission Requests" as Permissions <<native>>
}

' Layer 3: Cross-Platform Framework Layer
package "React Native Framework" as RNLayer <<react>> {
    rectangle "Native Module Bridge" as NativeBridge <<bridge>>
    rectangle "Data Caching" as DataCaching <<react>>
    rectangle "Server Access" as ServerAccess <<react>>
    rectangle "Redux State Management" as Redux <<react>>
    rectangle "Interface Packaging" as APIPkg <<react>>
    rectangle "Data Interception" as DataIntercept <<react>>
    rectangle "End-to-End Communication" as P2P <<react>>
}

' Sidebar: Infrastructure
package "Infrastructure & Support" as InfraLayer <<infra>> {
    rectangle "Data Exchange" as DataExchange <<infra>>
    rectangle "Performance Optimization" as Performance <<infra>>
    rectangle "Stability Construction" as Stability <<infra>>
}

' --- Relationships ---

ClientLayer --> NativeLayer
NativeLayer <--> NativeBridge

' Directing bridge to RN components
NativeBridge --- DataCaching
NativeBridge --- ServerAccess
NativeBridge --- Redux
NativeBridge --- APIPkg
NativeBridge --- DataIntercept
NativeBridge --- P2P

' Infrastructure interaction (dashed as per original)
NativeLayer ..> InfraLayer
RNLayer ..> InfraLayer

@enduml

samples.title: TextAnnotationSystem / metagpt-custom/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml

' Infrastructure Layer
node "Infrastructure Layer" as infra {
  component Nginx
  component "Spring Gateway & Security" as spring_gateway
}

' Presentation Layer
package "Presentation Layer" as presentation {
  component "Vue Frontend" as vue_frontend
}

' Application/Service Layer
package "Application/Service Layer" as application {
  component "User Management Service" as user_service
  component "Role Management Service" as role_service
  component "Document Management Service" as doc_service
  component "Annotation Service" as annotation_service
  component "Mining Service" as mining_service
  component "Statistics Service" as stats_service
  component "Export Service" as export_service
  component "Preset/Model Management Service" as preset_service
  component "File Conversion Service" as conversion_service
  component "Model Integration Service" as model_service
  component "Message Queue Client" as mq_client
}

' Data Access Layer
package "Data Access Layer" as data_access {
  component "MyBatis Data Mapper" as mybatis
  component "Object Storage Client" as object_storage_client
  component "Cache Client" as cache_client
}

' External Systems
cloud "Tencent Cloud" as tencent_cloud
database MySQL
database Minio
database Redis
queue RabbitMQ
cloud "GPT API" as gpt_api
cloud "BERT Model" as bert_model

' Internal Dependencies
annotation_service --> mining_service : provides annotated data
user_service --> role_service : manages roles
preset_service --> model_service : provides model configs
doc_service --> conversion_service : requests conversion
conversion_service --> mq_client : queues async tasks

' Presentation to Service Layer
vue_frontend --> spring_gateway : HTTP requests
spring_gateway --> user_service : routes auth requests
spring_gateway --> role_service : routes role requests
spring_gateway --> doc_service : routes document requests
spring_gateway --> annotation_service : routes annotation requests
spring_gateway --> mining_service : routes mining requests
spring_gateway --> stats_service : routes statistics requests
spring_gateway --> export_service : routes export requests
spring_gateway --> preset_service : routes model requests

' Service to Data Access Layer
user_service --> mybatis : persists user data
role_service --> mybatis : persists role data
doc_service --> mybatis : persists document metadata
annotation_service --> mybatis : persists annotations
mining_service --> mybatis : persists mining results
stats_service --> mybatis : queries statistics
export_service --> mybatis : queries export data
preset_service --> mybatis : persists model configs

doc_service --> object_storage_client : stores/retrieves documents
annotation_service --> object_storage_client : stores annotation files
mining_service --> object_storage_client : stores mining results
export_service --> object_storage_client : retrieves export data

user_service --> cache_client : caches user sessions
role_service --> cache_client : caches role permissions
preset_service --> cache_client : caches model configs
model_service --> cache_client : caches model responses

' Service to External Integration
model_service --> gpt_api : API calls
model_service --> bert_model : model inference
conversion_service --> RabbitMQ : publishes tasks

' Data Access to External Systems
mybatis --> MySQL : SQL operations
object_storage_client --> Minio : object storage
cache_client --> Redis : cache operations

' Infrastructure Connections
Nginx --> spring_gateway : proxies requests

tencent_cloud -[#blue,dashed]-> infra : hosts
tencent_cloud -[#blue,dashed]-> presentation : hosts
tencent_cloud -[#blue,dashed]-> application : hosts
tencent_cloud -[#blue,dashed]-> data_access : hosts

title AwesomeMusic - Layered Architecture

package "Client Layer" #E8F4FD {
  [Web Browser] as Browser
}

package "Gateway Layer" #FFF3CD {
  [Nginx Reverse Proxy] as Nginx
}

package "Web Frontend Layer" #D4EDDA {
  [Frontend Application] as Frontend
}

package "Web Backend Layer" #D1ECF1 {
  [Account Service] as AccountSvc
  [Score Service] as ScoreSvc
  [Generation Task Service] as GenTaskSvc
  [Model Service] as ModelSvc
  [Recommendation Service] as RecommendSvc
  [Scheduling Coordinator] as Scheduler
}

package "Message Queue Layer" #F8D7DA {
  [RabbitMQ Task Queue] as MQ
}

package "Algorithm Service Layer" #E2D9F3 {
  [Online Generation Service] as GenSvc
  [Offline Training Service] as TrainSvc
  [Classification Service] as ClassifySvc
  [Recommendation Engine] as RecommendEngine
}

package "Data and Storage Layer" #FFF8E1 {
  database "Relational DB" as RDBMS
  database "Hadoop HDFS" as HDFS
  [etcd Service Registry] as ETCD
}

package "Scheduled Tasks" #F0F0F0 {
  [Cron Scheduler Daily 02:00] as Cron
}

Browser --> Nginx : HTTPS
Nginx --> Frontend : HTTP
Nginx --> AccountSvc : HTTP API
Nginx --> ScoreSvc : HTTP API
Nginx --> GenTaskSvc : HTTP API
Nginx --> ModelSvc : HTTP API
Nginx --> RecommendSvc : HTTP API

AccountSvc --> RDBMS : user data
ScoreSvc --> RDBMS : score metadata
ScoreSvc --> HDFS : score files
GenTaskSvc --> MQ : enqueue generation tasks
ModelSvc --> RDBMS : model favorites
RecommendSvc --> RDBMS : recommendation data
Scheduler --> MQ : enqueue scheduled tasks
Scheduler --> RDBMS : log task status

MQ --> GenSvc : generation tasks
MQ --> TrainSvc : training tasks
MQ --> ClassifySvc : classification tasks
MQ --> RecommendEngine : recommendation tasks

GenSvc --> HDFS : midi and abc files
GenSvc --> RDBMS : update task status
TrainSvc --> HDFS : GPT-2 model params
TrainSvc --> RDBMS : update model metadata
ClassifySvc --> HDFS : score files
ClassifySvc --> RDBMS : score labels
RecommendEngine --> RDBMS : favorites and follows

GenSvc --> ETCD : service discovery
TrainSvc --> ETCD : service discovery

samples.title: s000008_a5828142 / metagpt-custom/claude-sonnet-4-6
samples.pred_source:
@startuml BunnyCode_Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA
skinparam package {
  BackgroundColor #F0F4FF
  BorderColor #5566AA
  FontColor #222244
  FontStyle bold
}
skinparam database {
  BackgroundColor #FFF8E8
  BorderColor #AA8833
}
skinparam component {
  BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BorderColor #7788BB
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' PRESENTATION LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Presentation Layer" as PL {
  component "Vue Frontend Application\n(Workspace Editor /\nPlayback View / Battle View)" as VueFE
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' API GATEWAY / REVERSE PROXY LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "API Gateway / Reverse Proxy Layer" as AGPL {
  component "Nginx Reverse Proxy\n(HTTP & WebSocket Termination\n/ Static Asset Serving)" as Nginx
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' APPLICATION LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Application Layer" as AL {
  component "Express REST API Server\n(Auth / Project / Execution /\nPlayback / File Endpoints)" as ExpressAPI
  component "JWT Authentication Middleware\n(Token Validation / User Resolution)" as JWTMiddleware
  component "Code Execution Service\n(Submission Coordinator)" as CodeExecSvc
  component "Coding-Process Recorder\n(Event Capture & Playback Query)" as CodingRecorder
  component "Project & Version Manager\n(Project / Version / File CRUD)" as ProjVersionMgr
  component "File Upload & Distribution Manager\n(Upload / Metadata Persistence /\nCDN URL Generation)" as FileDistMgr
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' REAL-TIME COMMUNICATION LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Real-Time Communication Layer\n(Socket.IO — co-located within App Process)" as RTCL {
  component "Workspace Socket Handler\n(Auth / Editing State / Disconnect)" as WorkspaceSock
  component "Battle Socket Handler\n(Invitation / Sync / Judge / Outcome)" as BattleSock
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' EXECUTION LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Execution Layer" as EL {
  component "Docker Sandbox\n(Isolated Container Runtime\nCompile & Execute)" as DockerSandbox
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' CACHING LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Caching Layer" as CCL {
  database "Redis\n(Socket Mappings / Battle State /\nTTL Invitations / Concurrency Control)" as RedisDB
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' RELATIONAL DATA LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Relational Data Layer" as RDL {
  database "MySQL Database\n(Users / Projects / Versions /\nBattle Records / Problem Data)" as MySQLDB
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' TIME-SERIES DATA LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Time-Series Data Layer" as TSDL {
  database "InfluxDB\n(Coding-Process Events /\nTime-Range Queryable)" as InfluxDB
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' OBJECT STORAGE & DISTRIBUTION LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Object Storage & Distribution Layer" as OSDL {
  component "S3-Compatible Object Storage\n(Code Files / Battle Results /\nUser Files / Archives)" as S3Storage
  component "CDN Distribution Service\n(CloudFront-Style / Distributable URLs)" as CDN
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' DEPLOYMENT / INFRASTRUCTURE LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Deployment / Infrastructure Layer" as DIL {
  component "Automated Deployment Scripts\n(Service Config & Wiring)" as DeployScripts
}

' ═════════════════════════════════════════════
' DEPENDENCY ARROWS
' ═════════════════════════════════════════════

' --- Presentation -> Gateway ---
VueFE --> Nginx : REST API calls (HTTPS)
VueFE --> Nginx : Socket.IO events (WebSocket)

' --- CDN -> Presentation (M-001: asset delivery to browser) ---
CDN --> VueFE : static asset delivery

' --- Gateway -> Application / Real-Time ---
Nginx --> ExpressAPI : HTTP proxy (REST)
Nginx --> ExpressAPI : WebSocket upgrade (Socket.IO)

' --- Application Layer internals ---
ExpressAPI --> JWTMiddleware     : gates protected REST routes
ExpressAPI --> CodeExecSvc       : code submission requests
ExpressAPI --> CodingRecorder    : playback queries / writes
ExpressAPI --> ProjVersionMgr    : project / version ops
ExpressAPI --> FileDistMgr       : file upload / URL ops

' --- JWT Middleware -> Socket handlers (M-002: socket auth) ---
JWTMiddleware --> WorkspaceSock : validates socket connection auth
JWTMiddleware --> BattleSock    : validates socket connection auth

' --- Application -> Execution ---
CodeExecSvc --> DockerSandbox : delegate compile & run

' --- Application -> Time-Series ---
CodingRecorder --> InfluxDB : event writes & playback queries

' --- CodingRecorder -> Relational (M-003: project/version context) ---
CodingRecorder --> MySQLDB : resolve / validate project & version context

' --- Application -> Relational ---
ProjVersionMgr --> MySQLDB : project / version / file CRUD
ExpressAPI     --> MySQLDB : user auth reads / writes

' --- Application -> Object Storage ---
FileDistMgr --> S3Storage : upload files & archives
FileDistMgr --> CDN       : generate distributable URLs

' --- FileDistMgr -> MySQL (DE-004: file metadata persistence) ---
FileDistMgr --> MySQLDB : persist file metadata for URL retrieval

' --- Real-Time -> Caching ---
WorkspaceSock --> RedisDB : readiness-gated socket/version\nmappings & conditional cache writes
BattleSock    --> RedisDB : invitation TTL / battle state\nwatched concurrency control

' --- Real-Time -> Relational ---
BattleSock --> MySQLDB : battle record & outcome writes
BattleSock --> MySQLDB : problem / answer data reads (DE-002)

' --- WorkspaceSock -> ProjVersionMgr for authorization (M-005) ---
WorkspaceSock --> ProjVersionMgr : project authorization lookup

' --- BattleSock -> FileDistMgr for battle result uploads (M-004) ---
BattleSock --> FileDistMgr : battle result file upload

' --- S3 -> CDN ---
S3Storage --> CDN : origin for static assets & archives

' --- Deployment -> All Services ---
DeployScripts ..> Nginx         : configures
DeployScripts ..> ExpressAPI    : configures
DeployScripts ..> VueFE         : configures
DeployScripts ..> RedisDB       : configures
DeployScripts ..> MySQLDB       : configures
DeployScripts ..> InfluxDB      : configures
DeployScripts ..> DockerSandbox : configures
DeployScripts ..> S3Storage     : configures
DeployScripts ..> CDN           : configures

@enduml

completeness.reasoning: The diagram represents all major components specified in the SRS, including the Vue frontend, Nginx proxy, Node.js/Express backend (decomposed into logical services like ProjVersionMgr and CodeExecSvc), Socket.IO handlers, Docker sandbox, and all specified data stores (MySQL, InfluxDB, Redis, S3/CDN). It also captures the key interactions between these components, resulting in a comprehensive view of the system.

faithfulness.reasoning: The architecture diagram is highly faithful to the requirements, accurately depicting component responsibilities and interactions without contradiction. For example, the separation of code execution into a Docker sandbox (NFR-005, C-009), the use of Redis for real-time state and concurrency control (NFR-001, C-006), and the use of InfluxDB for time-series data (C-004) are all correctly represented as described in the SRS.

architectural_rationality.reasoning: The architecture demonstrates sound design principles, particularly in its clear separation of concerns through layering (e.g., Application, Caching, Execution). It directly addresses key quality attributes with explicit mechanisms, such as the 'JWTMiddleware' for security (NFR-003), and specific annotations on connections like 'watched concurrency control' for reliability (NFR-001). All architectural choices are well-justified by the requirements.

traceability.reasoning: Traceability is excellent. Components and interactions are labeled with terms taken directly from the SRS. Annotations on connections explicitly reference the requirements they fulfill (e.g., the Redis connection note on 'watched concurrency control' maps directly to NFR-001 and C-006). All architecturally significant requirements, including all NFRs and Constraints, are clearly mapped to architectural elements.

readability.reasoning: The diagram is exceptionally clear and well-organized. The use of packages to group components into logical layers, combined with consistent styling and clear labeling of both components and their relationships, makes the complex system easy to comprehend. The level of detail is appropriate for a system architecture diagram, avoiding clutter while retaining essential information.

@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #FEFEFE
skinparam component {
  BackgroundColor #E6F3FF
  BorderColor #0066CC
  FontColor #003366
}
skinparam node {
  BackgroundColor #FFF0E6
  BorderColor #CC6600
  FontColor #663300
}
skinparam database {
  BackgroundColor #E6FFE6
  BorderColor #009900
  FontColor #006600
}
skinparam interface {
  BackgroundColor #F0E6FF
  BorderColor #6600CC
  FontColor #330066
}
skinparam queue {
  BackgroundColor #FFFFE6
  BorderColor #CCCC00
  FontColor #666600
}
skinparam cloud {
  BackgroundColor #E6F9FF
  BorderColor #00B3B3
  FontColor #006666
}

title Prediction Cards System Architecture

cloud "External Systems" {
  component "Aeternity Blockchain" as blockchain
  database "External Price Provider" as price_provider
  database "Prediction Media Storage" as media_storage
  node "Aeternity Wallet" as wallet
}

node "User Frontend" as frontend {
  interface "Wallet-Connected Frontend Application" as ui
  component "Frontend Context/Provider" as context
  component "Aeternity SDK Integration" as sdk
}

node "Backend Services" as services {
  component "Prediction-Processing Service" as processing_service
  component "Oracle Service" as oracle_service
}

node "On-Chain Component" as onchain {
  component "PredictionCards Smart Contract" as contract
  database "Contract State (Predictions, NFTs)" as contract_state
}

node "Local Test Environment" as test_env {
  component "Local Contract Integration-Test Stack" as test_stack
  component "CORS/Proxy Configuration" as cors_proxy
  database "Test Aeternity Node" as test_node
}

' Connections
ui --> context : "provides prediction operations"
context --> sdk : "uses"
sdk --> wallet : "wallet-mediated calls"
sdk --> contract : "submits transactions/queries\nvia AENS name"
contract --> contract_state : "manages"
contract --> blockchain : "deployed on"
processing_service --> contract : "initiates oracle queries\ncompletes result processing"
oracle_service --> contract : "reads queries\nsubmits responses"
oracle_service --> price_provider : "obtains price data"
oracle_service --> blockchain : "registers/maintains oracle"
ui --> media_storage : "loads outcome NFT media"
test_stack --> cors_proxy : "configured with"
test_stack --> test_node : "connects to"
test_stack --> contract : "tests integration"

' External interfaces
wallet --> blockchain : "connects to"
price_provider -[hidden]--> blockchain
media_storage -[hidden]--> blockchain

' Notes
note top of contract
  Located via AENS name
  Maintains prediction lifecycle,
  outcome NFT state, funds, rewards
end note

note right of oracle_service
  Quarkus-based
  Scheduled periodic execution
  Maintains oracle registration/validity
end note

note left of processing_service
  Scheduled service
  Drives closed predictions
  through outcome workflow
end note

note bottom of test_env
  Local development & testing
  Browser-compatible CORS support
  (GET, POST, OPTIONS methods,
  configured headers)
end note

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
top to bottom direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #111111
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5
skinparam rectangle {
    BorderColor #777777
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam package {
    BorderColor #D45D5D
    BorderThickness 1
}

rectangle "process-prediction-\nservice" as PredictionProcess #BDCCD9
rectangle "oracle-service" as OracleService #FFF1C9

package "aeternity blockchain" as Blockchain #F8CCCC {
    rectangle "PredictionCards\nSmart Contract" as PredictionContract #D8EFD5
}

rectangle "User" as User #FFFFFF
rectangle "Frontend" as Frontend #FFFFFF
rectangle "IPFS" as IPFS #D8E8FA

User --> Frontend

PredictionProcess --> PredictionContract : poll for predictions with state "CLOSED"\ncall function "ask_for_winning_option"\ncall function "process_oracle_response" if oracle has responded

OracleService --> PredictionContract : poll for oracle queries\nget price from coingecko API\ndetermine outcome\nrespond to query with outcome (higher/lower)

Frontend --> PredictionContract : create prediction\ndeposit / rent NFT\nwithdraw / claim rewards
PredictionContract --> Frontend : get data\nvia dry-runs

Frontend --> IPFS : load GIFs of NFTs
@enduml

samples.title: s000353_eb501ff3 / metagpt-custom/gpt-5
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
left to right direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #555555
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5
skinparam package {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam database {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}

rectangle "Turing User" as TuringUser
rectangle "Router Clients" as RouterClients
rectangle "Router Endpoints" as RouterEndpoints

package "Turing System" as TuringSystem {
    rectangle "Turing UI\nWeb interface to configure Routers" as TuringUi
    rectangle "Turing API Server\nHTTP REST API to configure Routers" as TuringApiServer
    database "Database\nPersistent storage for Router objects" as RouterDatabase
}

rectangle "Secret Store" as SecretStore
rectangle "Authorization Service" as AuthorizationService

package "Kubernetes Cluster" as KubernetesCluster {
    rectangle "Knative Controller" as KnativeController
    rectangle "Istio" as Istio
}

rectangle "Experimentation Service" as ExperimentationService
rectangle "Machine Learning Platform\nMLP API Server" as MlpApiServer
rectangle "Monitoring and Alerting Service" as MonitoringService

TuringUser --> TuringUi : use
TuringUi --> TuringApiServer : make HTTP calls
TuringApiServer --> RouterDatabase : save and retrieve routers

RouterClients --> RouterEndpoints : requests from router clients
TuringApiServer --> RouterEndpoints : create endpoints\nfor accessing routers

TuringApiServer --> SecretStore : save and retrieve\ncredentials
TuringApiServer --> AuthorizationService : check user\npermissions
TuringApiServer --> KubernetesCluster : deploy router\nworkloads
TuringApiServer --> ExperimentationService : retrieve experiments\nconfigured for routers
TuringApiServer --> MlpApiServer : retrieve projects and\nenvironments for routers
TuringApiServer --> MonitoringService : configure alerts based\non router metrics

KubernetesCluster --> KnativeController : manage router services
KubernetesCluster --> Istio : expose router traffic
Istio --> RouterEndpoints : route client traffic
MonitoringService --> KubernetesCluster : retrieve router metrics
@enduml

samples.pred_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam defaultFontName Arial

title ReTool System Architecture

' Deployment nodes
node "Client (Web Browser)\nVue.js SPA" as client

node "Local Computer\n(Frontend/Backend Services)" as local {
  [API Gateway] as gateway <<gateway>>
  package "Microservices" {
    [User Management Service] as userSvc
    [Project Management Service] as projSvc
    [Requirements Management Service] as reqSvc
  }
}

node "Algorithm Server\n(High-Performance)" as algoNode {
  [Algorithm Service\n(NLP • PyTorch • Word2vec)] as algoSvc
}

database "MongoDB" as db

' Connections
client --> gateway : Web UI requests
gateway --> userSvc
gateway --> projSvc
gateway --> reqSvc

reqSvc --> algoSvc : Analysis jobs\n(itemization, structuring,\ncommon, conflict, association)

userSvc --> db : CRUD
projSvc --> db : CRUD
reqSvc --> db : CRUD

' Notes for key constraints and assumptions
note right of gateway
- Enforces access control
- Routes to microservices
- Must operate on local computer (C-006)
end note

note right of algoSvc
Runs on separate server due to performance (C-007, AD-003)
end note

note bottom of db
MongoDB for create, read, update, delete (AD-004, C-014)
end note

note top of client
Front-end/back-end separation (C-002)
end note

@enduml

samples.title: retool / direct/claude-sonnet-4-6
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class

skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA
skinparam node {
  BackgroundColor #DDEEFF
  BorderColor #336699
  FontSize 13
}
skinparam component {
  BackgroundColor #FFFACD
  BorderColor #B8860B
  FontSize 12
}
skinparam database {
  BackgroundColor #E8F5E9
  BorderColor #2E7D32
  FontSize 12
}
skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor #F3E5F5
  BorderColor #6A1B9A
  FontSize 12
}
skinparam cloud {
  BackgroundColor #FFF3E0
  BorderColor #E65100
}
skinparam arrow {
  Color #444444
  FontSize 11
}

title ReTool System Architecture

actor "System User\n(Register / Login)" as SysUser
actor "Project Manager" as PM
actor "Project Leader" as PL
actor "Ordinary Member" as OM
actor "System Administrator" as SA

node "Client Machine\n(Windows 10 x64, Chrome 81+, i7-6700HQ, ≥8 GB)" {
  component "Vue.js\nWeb Frontend" as VueFE {
    component "User Auth UI\n(Register/Login/Logout\nPassword/Profile)" as AuthUI
    component "User Mgmt UI\n(User List / Add / Delete\nReset PW / Role)" as UserMgmtUI
    component "Project List UI\n(Create/Delete/View\nProject Info)" as ProjListUI
    component "Member Mgmt UI\n(Add/Delete/Modify\nProject Roles)" as MemberUI
    component "Baseline Mgmt UI\n(Create/View Baselines)" as BaselineUI
    component "Requirements Mgmt UI\n(Req Tree / Create / Import\nModify / Delete / Move\nTrace View)" as ReqUI
    component "Requirement Analysis UI\n(Structuring / Common Req\nConflict / Association)" as AnalysisUI
  }
}

node "Local Server\n(EC2 t2.xlarge recommended, Amazon Linux 2)" {

  component "API Gateway" as Gateway {
    component "Request Routing" as Routing
    component "Access Control\n& Rate Limiting" as AccessCtrl
    component "Security Filter\n(Input Validation\nInjection Prevention)" as SecFilter
  }

  component "User Management Service\n(Flask Microservice)" as UserSvc {
    component "Registration & Login\nLogout" as AuthSvc
    component "Password Mgmt\n(Modify / Reset)" as PwdSvc
    component "User CRUD\n(Add / Delete / List)" as UserCRUD
    component "Role & Permission\nManagement" as RoleSvc
    component "Personal Info\nService" as ProfileSvc
  }

  component "Project Management Service\n(Flask Microservice)" as ProjSvc {
    component "Project CRUD\n(Create/Delete\nModify/View/List)" as ProjCRUD
    component "Member Management\n(Add/Delete/Modify\nView Members)" as MemberSvc
    component "Project Role\nManagement" as ProjRoleSvc
    component "Baseline Node\nService\n(Create/View/Archive)" as BaselineSvc
  }

  component "Requirements Management Service\n(Flask Microservice)" as ReqSvc {
    component "Req Item CRUD\n(Create/Modify\nDelete/View/Move)" as ReqCRUD
    component "Req Item Tree\nManagement" as ReqTree
    component "Word Document\nImport Handler" as WordImport
    component "Forward Tracing\nService\n(Code/TestCase/Person)" as TraceSvc
    component "Req Analysis\nOrchestrator" as ReqAnalOrch
  }

  component "Log & Monitoring\nService" as LogSvc {
    component "Persistent Log\nStorage" as LogStore
    component "Security Event\nRecorder" as SecEventRec
  }
}

node "Algorithm Server\n(High-Performance Server, Amazon Linux 2)" {
  component "Algorithm Service\n(Flask Microservice)" as AlgoSvc {
    component "Requirement Itemization\n(NLP + Heuristic Rules)" as ItemizeSvc
    component "Requirement Structuring\n(NLP + Heuristic Rules)" as StructSvc
    component "Common Req Identification\n(Word2vec Model)" as CommonReqSvc
    component "Conflict Detection\n(NLP + Heuristic Rules)" as ConflictSvc
    component "Association Analysis\n(NLP + Heuristic Rules)" as AssocSvc
  }
  component "ML Models\n(PyTorch / Word2vec)" as MLModels
}

database "MongoDB\n(Local Server)" as MongoDB {
  component "Users Collection\n(Account/Role/Permission\nProfile/Privacy)" as UserDB
  component "Projects Collection\n(Project Info/State\nMembers/Roles)" as ProjDB
  component "Requirements Collection\n(Req Items/Tree/Hierarchy\nStructuring/Tracing)" as ReqDB
  component "Baseline Collection\n(Nodes/Archived Reqs)" as BaselineDB
  component "Analysis Results Collection\n(Common/Conflict\nAssociation)" as AnalysisDB
  component "Log Collection\n(Persistent Logs)" as LogDB
}

cloud "External Network / Internet" as Internet

' ---- User to Frontend ----
SysUser --> VueFE
PM --> VueFE
PL --> VueFE
OM --> VueFE
SA --> VueFE

' ---- Frontend to Gateway ----
VueFE --> Gateway : "HTTPS Requests\n(Network)"

' ---- Gateway to Services ----
Gateway --> UserSvc : "Route /users"
Gateway --> ProjSvc : "Route /projects"
Gateway --> ReqSvc : "Route /requirements"
Gateway --> LogSvc : "Route /logs"

' ---- Requirements Service to Algorithm Service ----
ReqSvc --> AlgoSvc : "Algorithm Requests\n(Network / Internet)"

' ---- Algorithm Service to ML Models ----
AlgoSvc --> MLModels : "Model Inference"

' ---- Services to MongoDB ----
UserSvc --> UserDB : "CRUD"
ProjSvc --> ProjDB : "CRUD"
ProjSvc --> BaselineDB : "CRUD"
ReqSvc --> ReqDB : "CRUD"
ReqSvc --> AnalysisDB : "CRUD"
LogSvc --> LogDB : "Persist Logs"

' ---- Frontend UI Groupings ----
AuthUI ..> UserSvc
UserMgmtUI ..> UserSvc
ProjListUI ..> ProjSvc
MemberUI ..> ProjSvc
BaselineUI ..> ProjSvc
ReqUI ..> ReqSvc
AnalysisUI ..> ReqSvc

' ---- Algorithm internal ----
ItemizeSvc --> MLModels
CommonReqSvc --> MLModels
StructSvc --> MLModels

@startuml
' DeepCode System Architecture (Component View)

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam defaultTextAlignment center

title DeepCode Architecture

rectangle "External Users" as Users {
  cloud "Web Browser\n(HTML5)" as Browser
}

cloud "CDN" as CDN

node "Perimeter: Nginx Reverse Proxy\n(HTTPS)" as Nginx

package "DeepCode Backend (Spring Boot 3)" as Backend {
  package "Presentation Layer" as Presentation {
    component "REST Controllers\n(Swagger-enabled)" as RestControllers
    component "Swagger UI" as Swagger
  }
  package "Proxy Layer" as Proxy {
    component "Auth Filter\n(JWT / OAuth2)" as AuthFilter
    component "Global Filters &\nInterceptors" as Interceptors
  }
  package "Business Layer" as Business {
    component "User Service" as UserService
    component "Problem Service" as ProblemService
    component "Solution Service" as SolutionService
    component "Forum Service" as ForumService
    component "AI Assistant Service\n(LangChain4j Client)" as AIService
    component "Judging Client\n(HTTP)" as JudgingClient
  }
  package "Access Layer" as Access {
    component "MyBatis-Plus\nRepositories" as Repos
    component "Redis Cache\nClient" as RedisClient
    component "MinIO Client\n(Object Storage)" as MinioClient
    component "SMTP Mailer" as SmtpClient
  }
}

database "MySQL 5.7.44" as MySQL
rectangle "Redis 7.4.6" as Redis
folder "MinIO\n(Object Storage)" as MinIO
cloud "LLM Service\n(External Provider)" as LLM
node "Judging Service" as Judge {
  component "JudgeHost\n(Queue & Scheduler)" as JudgeHost
  component "JudgeCore\n(Sandboxed Runner)" as JudgeCore
}

package "Observability" as Observability {
  component "Prometheus" as Prometheus
  component "Grafana" as Grafana
  component "Alerting\n(PagerDuty / DingTalk)" as Alerting
}

' Frontend relations
Browser -down-> CDN : static assets\n(JS/CSS/images)
Browser -down-> Nginx : HTTPS REST calls
Nginx -down-> AuthFilter
AuthFilter -down-> Interceptors
Interceptors -down-> RestControllers

' API docs access
Browser -right-> Swagger : API docs (dev/test)

' Controller to services
RestControllers -down-> UserService
RestControllers -down-> ProblemService
RestControllers -down-> SolutionService
RestControllers -down-> ForumService
RestControllers -down-> AIService
RestControllers -down-> JudgingClient

' Business to access layer
UserService -down-> Repos
ProblemService -down-> Repos
SolutionService -down-> Repos
ForumService -down-> Repos
UserService -down-> RedisClient
ProblemService -down-> RedisClient
SolutionService -down-> RedisClient
ForumService -down-> RedisClient
SolutionService -down-> MinioClient : upload images/files
ProblemService -down-> MinioClient : test cases metadata
UserService -down-> SmtpClient : emails / notifications

' Data stores
Repos -down-> MySQL
RedisClient -down-> Redis
MinioClient -down-> MinIO

' External integrations
AIService -right-> LLM : recommend / analyze / explain
JudgingClient -right-> JudgeHost : submit code for judging
JudgeHost -down-> JudgeCore : compile & execute
JudgeCore -right-> MinIO : fetch test case files

' Observability
Backend -right-> Prometheus : application / JVM metrics
MySQL -right-> Prometheus : DB metrics
Redis -right-> Prometheus : cache metrics
Prometheus -down-> Grafana : dashboards
Prometheus -right-> Alerting : threshold alerts

' Security & communication constraints
note top of Nginx
- Enforces HTTPS for external traffic
- Routes to backend over intranet
end note

note right of AuthFilter
- Validates JWT/OAuth2 tokens
- Permission checks in filters
end note

note right of JudgeCore
- Docker-based isolation
- Resource limits & seccomp
end note

samples.title: asp / mini-swe-agent/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
!define LAYERED
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam component {
  BackgroundColor #E6F3FF
  BorderColor #0066CC
  FontColor #000000
}
skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BorderColor #333333
}
skinparam arrow {
  Color #333333
  Thickness 2
}

title Software Requirements Review System Architecture

package "User Layer" {
  [Reviewer] as REVIEWER
  [Requirements Owner] as OWNER
  [Project Stakeholder] as STAKEHOLDER
}

package "Application Layer" {
  [Review Management] as REVIEW_MGMT
  [Checklist Engine] as CHECKLIST_ENGINE
  [Scoring System] as SCORING_SYS
  [Problem Reporting] as PROBLEM_REPORT
  [Report Generation] as REPORT_GEN
}

package "Data Layer" {
  database "Review Artifacts" as REVIEW_DB {
    [Review Purpose Data]
    [Checklist Items]
    [Problem Reports]
    [Score Records]
    [Review Metadata]
  }

  [Standards Repository] as STANDARDS_REPO
  [Requirements Documents] as REQ_DOCS
}

package "External Systems" {
  [Industry Standards] as INDUSTRY_STD
  [Product Specifications] as PRODUCT_SPEC
  [Business Rules] as BUSINESS_RULES
  [Documentation Norms] as DOC_NORMS
}

'' User Layer to Application Layer connections
REVIEWER --> REVIEW_MGMT : initiates review
REVIEWER --> CHECKLIST_ENGINE : uses checklist
REVIEWER --> SCORING_SYS : enters scores
REVIEWER --> PROBLEM_REPORT : reports issues
OWNER --> REPORT_GEN : receives findings
STAKEHOLDER --> REPORT_GEN : views results

'' Application Layer internal connections
REVIEW_MGMT --> CHECKLIST_ENGINE : manages
CHECKLIST_ENGINE --> SCORING_SYS : provides basis
CHECKLIST_ENGINE --> PROBLEM_REPORT : triggers
PROBLEM_REPORT --> REPORT_GEN : feeds data
SCORING_SYS --> REPORT_GEN : provides scores

'' Application Layer to Data Layer connections
REVIEW_MGMT --> REVIEW_DB : stores/retrieves
CHECKLIST_ENGINE --> REVIEW_DB : accesses items
SCORING_SYS --> REVIEW_DB : stores scores
PROBLEM_REPORT --> REVIEW_DB : stores reports
REPORT_GEN --> REVIEW_DB : retrieves data

CHECKLIST_ENGINE --> STANDARDS_REPO : references
CHECKLIST_ENGINE --> REQ_DOCS : reviews

'' Data Layer to External Systems connections
STANDARDS_REPO --> INDUSTRY_STD : incorporates
STANDARDS_REPO --> PRODUCT_SPEC : incorporates
STANDARDS_REPO --> BUSINESS_RULES : incorporates
STANDARDS_REPO --> DOC_NORMS : incorporates

'' External dependencies
REQ_DOCS ..> INDUSTRY_STD : must conform to
REQ_DOCS ..> PRODUCT_SPEC : must align with
REQ_DOCS ..> BUSINESS_RULES : must follow
REQ_DOCS ..> DOC_NORMS : must adhere to

note right of REVIEW_MGMT
  Manages review lifecycle:
  - Define objectives
  - Set review basis
  - Coordinate review process
end note

note right of CHECKLIST_ENGINE
  Core review functionality:
  - Completeness checks
  - Understandability checks
  - Model accuracy checks
  - Extension/improvement checks
end note

note right of SCORING_SYS
  Scoring functionality:
  - 4 dimensions x 10 points each
  - Total score out of 40
  - Quantitative assessment
end note

note right of PROBLEM_REPORT
  Problem tracking:
  - Requirement issues
  - Improvement suggestions
  - Overall evaluation
end note

@enduml

@startuml
' --- Configuration ---
top to bottom direction
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam componentStyle uml2

' --- Styling ---
skinparam rectangle<<ClientLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #f9f
    BorderColor #333
}
skinparam rectangle<<NetworkLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #b2ebf2
    BorderColor #00838f
}
skinparam rectangle<<ServiceLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #c8e6c9
    BorderColor #2e7d32
}
skinparam database<<StorageLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #fff9c4
    BorderColor #fbc02d
}

' --- Layer 1: Frontend / Client Layer ---
rectangle "Client Layer" <<ClientLayer>> {
    component [Client Terminal] as Client
    component [Cloud DNS] as DNS
}

' --- Layer 2: Network / Gateway Layer ---
rectangle "Network / Gateway Layer" <<NetworkLayer>> {
    rectangle "Machine 01" {
        component [LVS - Linux Virtual Server] as LVS01
        component [Nginx] as Nginx01
    }
    rectangle "Machine 02" {
        component [LVS - Linux Virtual Server] as LVS02
        component [Nginx] as Nginx02_A
        component [Nginx] as Nginx02_B
    }
    rectangle "Machine 03" {
        component [LVS - Linux Virtual Server] as LVS03
        component [Nginx] as Nginx03
    }
}

' --- Layer 3: Service / Backend Layer ---
rectangle "Service / Backend Layer" <<ServiceLayer>> {
    component [Django Service Clusters] as Django
    component [Socializing Service] as Social
    component [User Information Service] as UserInfo
    component [Literature Service] as Literature
    component [Back-office Management] as BackOffice
}

' --- Layer 4: Storage / Database Layer ---
rectangle "Storage / Database Layer" <<StorageLayer>> {
    database "Redis Cache" as Redis
    database "Elasticsearch" as ES
    database "MySQL Database" as MySQL
}

' --- Connection Relationships ---
Client --> DNS
Client --> LVS01
Client --> LVS02
Client --> LVS03

LVS01 --> Nginx01
LVS02 --> Nginx02_A
LVS02 --> Nginx02_B
LVS03 --> Nginx03

Nginx01 --> Django
Nginx02_A --> Django
Nginx02_B --> Django
Nginx03 --> Django

Django --> Social
Django --> UserInfo
Django --> Literature
Django --> BackOffice

Social --> Redis
Social --> ES
Social --> MySQL

UserInfo --> Redis
UserInfo --> ES
UserInfo --> MySQL

Literature --> Redis
Literature --> ES
Literature --> MySQL

BackOffice --> Redis
BackOffice --> ES
BackOffice --> MySQL

@enduml

  ' Rank 0 process (spawning rank)
  node "MPI Process (Rank 0)" as Rank0 {
    component "Python Application" as App0

    package "torc_py Runtime (Rank 0)" as Torc0 {
      component "Python API\n- submit, wait, map, as_completed\n- start/init/launch/shutdown\n- spmd, enable/disable_stealing\n- worker_id/num_workers\n- node_id/num_nodes, gettime" as API0 <<Python API>>
      component "Task Scheduler & Dispatcher" as Sched0 <<Scheduler>>
      component "Map Engine" as Map0
      component "Future Store\n(Task Descriptors)" as Future0
      component "Callback Manager" as CB0
      component "Worker Thread Pool" as Pool0 <<ThreadPool>>
      component "Worker Queues" as Queues0 <<Queue>>
      component "Stealing Manager" as Steal0
      component "SPMD Manager" as SPMD0
      component "SPMD Function Execution" as SpmdFunc0
      component "MPI Adapter (mpi4py)" as MPI0 <<MPI>>
      component "Env Config Manager" as Env0 <<Config>>
      component "Timing Service" as Time0
    }

    ' Internal wiring on Rank 0
    App0 --> API0 : calls APIs\n(submit/wait/map/.../spmd)
    API0 --> Sched0 : submit tasks
    API0 --> Map0 : parallel map
    API0 --> SPMD0 : spmd(f)
    API0 --> Env0 : read runtime config
    API0 --> Time0 : gettime()

    Map0 --> Sched0 : enqueue map tasks

    Sched0 --> Queues0 : enqueue
    Pool0 --> Queues0 : pull tasks
    Pool0 --> Future0 : set results
    Future0 --> CB0 : on completion
    CB0 --> App0 : invoke callback\n(on spawning rank)

    ' Stealing and MPI on Rank 0
    Pool0 --> Steal0 : idle notifications
    Steal0 --> MPI0 : steal requests/responses

    ' SPMD path and application-level MPI compatibility
    SPMD0 --> MPI0 : coordinate SPMD launch
    MPI0 --> SpmdFunc0 : run SPMD function
    SpmdFunc0 ..> MPI0 : application-level MPI calls
  }

  ' Other ranks (workers and SPMD participants)
  node "MPI Process (Rank 1..N-1)" as RankN {
    package "torc_py Runtime (Other Ranks)" as TorcN {
      component "Task Scheduler & Dispatcher" as SchedN <<Scheduler>>
      component "Worker Thread Pool" as PoolN <<ThreadPool>>
      component "Worker Queues" as QueuesN <<Queue>>
      component "Future Store\n(Task Descriptors)" as FutureN
      component "Stealing Manager" as StealN
      component "SPMD Manager" as SPMDN
      component "SPMD Function Execution" as SpmdFuncN
      component "MPI Adapter (mpi4py)" as MPIN <<MPI>>
    }

    ' Internal wiring on other ranks
    SchedN --> QueuesN : enqueue
    PoolN --> QueuesN : pull tasks
    PoolN --> FutureN : set results

    PoolN --> StealN : idle notifications
    StealN --> MPIN : steal requests/responses

    SPMDN --> MPIN : participate in SPMD
    MPIN --> SpmdFuncN : run SPMD function
    SpmdFuncN ..> MPIN : application-level MPI calls
  }

  ' Inter-process communication
  MPI0 <--> MPIN : internal MPI messages\n(task dispatch, results, control)

  ' Cross-rank flows (illustrative)
  MPI0 --> SchedN : dispatch remote tasks
  FutureN --> MPIN : return results
  MPIN --> MPI0 : deliver results to spawning rank
}

' Runtime configuration via environment variables
artifact "TORC_WORKERS" as EV_WORKERS
artifact "TORC_STEALING" as EV_STEAL
artifact "TORC_SERVER_YIELDTIME\nTORC_WORKER_YIELDTIME" as EV_YIELD

EV_WORKERS --> Env0 : workers per process
EV_STEAL --> Env0 : enable/disable stealing
EV_YIELD --> Env0 : idle-yield timing

' Example data flows (image preprocessing)
folder "Image Dataset Files" as Images
database "HDF5 Output File" as HDF5

App0 ..> Images : read images\n(map-style preprocessing)
App0 ..> HDF5 : write processed data

' Optional dependencies for examples
package "Optional Example Dependencies" as Opt {
  component "numpy" as Numpy
  component "cma" as Cma
  component "h5py" as H5py
  component "pillow" as Pillow
}

App0 ..> Numpy : numerical examples
App0 ..> Cma : optimization example
App0 ..> H5py : HDF5 writing
App0 ..> Pillow : image IO

@enduml

rectangle "MPI" as MpiRuntime

        rectangle "Task Queue" as TaskQueue1

    }
}

package "Compute node" as ComputeNode2 {

}

package "Task Queue (in detail)" as TaskQueueDetail {

    rectangle "Level 3" as Level3

    rectangle "A2" as TaskA2

    rectangle "B2" as TaskB2
}

MpiRuntime <--> MpiProcess1 : MPI communication

WorkerThread1 --> TaskQueue1 : pulls tasks
ServerThread1 --> TaskQueue1 : handles task requests
WorkerThread2 --> TaskQueue2 : pulls tasks
ServerThread2 --> TaskQueue2 : handles task requests
TaskQueue1 ..> TaskQueueDetail : expanded view
TaskQueue2 ..> TaskQueueDetail : same queue structure
Level0 --> TaskA1
TaskA1 --> TaskA2
TaskA2 --> TaskA3
Level1 --> TaskB1
TaskB1 --> TaskB2
Level0 -[hidden]down-> Level1
Level1 -[hidden]down-> Level2
Level2 -[hidden]down-> Level3
Level3 -[hidden]down-> Level4
Level4 -[hidden]down-> Level5
Level5 ..> MoreLevels : more levels

samples.pred_source:
@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class

skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor<<external>> LightYellow
  BackgroundColor<<internal>> LightBlue
  BackgroundColor<<middleware>> LightGreen
  BackgroundColor<<k8s>> LightCoral
  BackgroundColor<<runtime>> LavenderBlush
  BorderColor Black
  FontSize 12
}

skinparam arrow {
  Color Black
  FontSize 11
}

skinparam package {
  BackgroundColor WhiteSmoke
  BorderColor DarkGray
  FontSize 13
  FontStyle Bold
}

title Turing System Architecture

package "API Clients / External Users" {
  actor "API Client\n(Routers & Ensemblers)" as APIClient <<external>>
  actor "Platform Operator\n(K8s Deployments)" as PlatformOps <<external>>
  actor "Ensembler User\n(PyFuncEnsembler)" as EnsemblerUser <<external>>
}

package "Turing API Service" {

  package "HTTP Middleware Layer" <<middleware>> {
    rectangle "Authorization\nMiddleware\n(when auth config enabled)" as AuthMiddleware <<middleware>>
    rectangle "OpenAPI Request\nValidation Middleware\n(when validation config enabled)\nOpenAPI 3.0.3" as ValidationMiddleware <<middleware>>
  }

  package "HTTP API Handlers (OpenAPI 3.0.3)" {
    rectangle "Router API Handler\nGET /projects/{project_id}/routers" as RouterHandler <<internal>>
    rectangle "Ensembler API Handler\nGET/POST/PUT/DELETE\n/projects/{project_id}/ensemblers/{ensembler_id}" as EnsemblerHandler <<internal>>
  }

  package "Service Layer" {
    rectangle "Router Service\n(project-scoped resource mgmt)" as RouterService <<internal>>
    rectangle "Ensembler Service\n(create/retrieve/update/delete)\nReturns JSON: Ensembler, EnsemblerId" as EnsemblerService <<internal>>
  }

  package "Cluster Management" {
    rectangle "Router Deployment Manager\n(create/update/delete\nrouter deployments)" as DeploymentManager <<internal>>
    rectangle "Jaeger Tracing Client\n(request tracing,\nsampling-based)" as JaegerClient <<internal>>
  }

}

package "PyFuncEnsembler Runtime" <<runtime>> {
  rectangle "PyFuncEnsembler\nWebservice\n(user-defined ensembler\nruntime, port 8080 default)" as PyFuncService <<runtime>>
  rectangle "Docker Image Builder\n(local image build\nfrom MLflow artifacts)" as DockerBuilder <<runtime>>
}

package "Kubernetes Cluster" <<k8s>> {
  rectangle "Turing Router\nDeployment\n(containerPort: 8080 default,\noverridden via ports.containerPort)" as RouterDeployment <<k8s>>
  rectangle "Kubernetes API\n(create/update/delete\ndeployment resources)" as K8sAPI <<k8s>>
}

package "External Systems" {
  rectangle "MLflow Model Registry\n(model artifact source\nfor PyFuncEnsembler builds)" as MLflow <<external>>
  rectangle "Jaeger Tracing Backend\n(distributed tracing)" as Jaeger <<external>>
}

' API Client flows
APIClient --> AuthMiddleware : "HTTP requests\n(JSON payloads)"
AuthMiddleware --> ValidationMiddleware : "authorized requests"
ValidationMiddleware --> RouterHandler : "validated requests\n(routers)"
ValidationMiddleware --> EnsemblerHandler : "validated requests\n(ensemblers)"

' Platform Operator flows
PlatformOps --> AuthMiddleware : "HTTP requests\n(router deployment ops)"

' Ensembler User flows
EnsemblerUser --> PyFuncService : "HTTP requests\n(ensembler webservice)"

' Handler to Service layer
RouterHandler --> RouterService : "list routers by project_id"
EnsemblerHandler --> EnsemblerService : "CRUD ops\n(project_id, ensembler_id)"

' Service to Cluster Management
RouterService --> DeploymentManager : "deployment lifecycle ops"
EnsemblerService --> EnsemblerService : "returns Ensembler JSON (200/201)\nor EnsemblerId JSON (200 delete)\nor errors (400/404/500)"

' Deployment Manager to K8s
DeploymentManager --> K8sAPI : "create/update/delete\nrouter deployments"
K8sAPI --> RouterDeployment : "manages lifecycle"

' PyFuncEnsembler build flow
DockerBuilder --> MLflow : "download model\nartifacts"
DockerBuilder --> PyFuncService : "builds Docker image\nfor ensembler webservice"

' Turing Router uses PyFuncEnsembler
RouterDeployment --> PyFuncService : "routes requests to\nensembler webservice"

' Jaeger tracing
JaegerClient --> Jaeger : "send traces\n(sampling-based)"
RouterHandler --> JaegerClient : "trace requests"
EnsemblerHandler --> JaegerClient : "trace requests"

note right of AuthMiddleware
  Mounted only when
  authorization configuration
  is enabled (NFR-001)
end note

note right of ValidationMiddleware
  Mounted only when
  OpenAPI validation
  configuration is enabled
  (NFR-001, C-001)
end note

note right of RouterDeployment
  Default port: 8080
  Override via ports.containerPort
  (NFR-003, C-004)
end note

note right of DockerBuilder
  Requires MLflow artifacts
  before local image build
  (C-003)
end note

note bottom of JaegerClient
  Tracing enabled/disabled by
  tracer state or sampling config
  (NFR-002)
end note

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
left to right direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #555555
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5
skinparam package {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam database {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}

rectangle "Turing User" as TuringUser
rectangle "Router Clients" as RouterClients
rectangle "Router Endpoints" as RouterEndpoints

package "Turing System" as TuringSystem {
    rectangle "Turing UI\nWeb interface to configure Routers" as TuringUi
    rectangle "Turing API Server\nHTTP REST API to configure Routers" as TuringApiServer
    database "Database\nPersistent storage for Router objects" as RouterDatabase
}

rectangle "Secret Store" as SecretStore
rectangle "Authorization Service" as AuthorizationService

package "Kubernetes Cluster" as KubernetesCluster {
    rectangle "Knative Controller" as KnativeController
    rectangle "Istio" as Istio
}

rectangle "Experimentation Service" as ExperimentationService
rectangle "Machine Learning Platform\nMLP API Server" as MlpApiServer
rectangle "Monitoring and Alerting Service" as MonitoringService

TuringUser --> TuringUi : use
TuringUi --> TuringApiServer : make HTTP calls
TuringApiServer --> RouterDatabase : save and retrieve routers

RouterClients --> RouterEndpoints : requests from router clients
TuringApiServer --> RouterEndpoints : create endpoints\nfor accessing routers

TuringApiServer --> SecretStore : save and retrieve\ncredentials
TuringApiServer --> AuthorizationService : check user\npermissions
TuringApiServer --> KubernetesCluster : deploy router\nworkloads
TuringApiServer --> ExperimentationService : retrieve experiments\nconfigured for routers
TuringApiServer --> MlpApiServer : retrieve projects and\nenvironments for routers
TuringApiServer --> MonitoringService : configure alerts based\non router metrics

KubernetesCluster --> KnativeController : manage router services
KubernetesCluster --> Istio : expose router traffic
Istio --> RouterEndpoints : route client traffic
MonitoringService --> KubernetesCluster : retrieve router metrics
@enduml

@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class

title Campus Helper Platform - System Architecture

' Presentation Layer
package "Presentation Layer" {
    RECTANGLE "WeChat Mini Program Client" as client
}

' Business Layer
package "Business Layer" {
    RECTANGLE "Product Browsing Service" as productService
    RECTANGLE "Order Management Service" as orderService
    RECTANGLE "User Management Service" as userService
    RECTANGLE "Admin Management Service" as adminService
    RECTANGLE "Authentication & Authorization" as authModule
    RECTANGLE "Input Validation & Security" as securityModule
}

' Data Layer
package "Data Layer" {
    RECTANGLE "Database Interface" as dbInterface
    RECTANGLE "Data Access Objects" as daoLayer
}

' Data Entity Layer (Database)
package "Data Entity Layer" {
    RECTANGLE "Users Table" as usersDB
    RECTANGLE "Products Table" as productsDB
    RECTANGLE "Orders Table" as ordersDB
    RECTANGLE "Favorites Table" as favoritesDB
    RECTANGLE "Tags/Categories Table" as tagsDB
    RECTANGLE "Admin Logs Table" as logsDB
    RECTANGLE "Monitoring Metrics Storage" as metricsDB
}

' Relationships
client --> productService : uses
client --> orderService : uses
client --> userService : uses
client --> adminService : uses

productService --> dbInterface : queries
orderService --> dbInterface : reads/writes
userService --> dbInterface : reads/writes
adminService --> dbInterface : reads/writes

authModule --> userService : validates
securityModule --> productService : filters
securityModule --> orderService : filters
securityModule --> adminService : filters

dbInterface --> daoLayer : interacts
daoLayer --> usersDB : manages
daoLayer --> productsDB : manages
daoLayer --> ordersDB : manages
daoLayer --> favoritesDB : manages
daoLayer --> tagsDB : manages
daoLayer --> logsDB : manages
daoLayer --> metricsDB : stores

note right of client
  WeChat Mini Program Runtime
  Requires WeChat 8.0+
  Android 5.0+, 4GB+ RAM
end note

note top of adminService
  Admin functions require
  authenticated administrator
end note

note bottom of securityModule
  Input validation
  SQL injection prevention
  Malicious behavior detection
end note

note right of metricsDB
  Performance monitoring
  Error tracking
  Resource usage metrics
end note

samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' --- Configuration & Styles ---
skinparam topboxSelection true
skinparam Direction top to bottom
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false

' Define Styles based on original ClassDefs
<style>
    .ui {
        BackgroundColor #ccff90
        LineColor #33691e
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .display {
        BackgroundColor #fff3e0
        LineColor #e65100
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .business {
        BackgroundColor #b2dfdb
        LineColor #004d40
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .dataLogic {
        BackgroundColor #e1bee7
        LineColor #4a148c
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .storage {
        BackgroundColor #bbdefb
        LineColor #0d47a1
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .env {
        BackgroundColor #cfd8dc
        LineColor #37474f
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .crosscut {
        BackgroundColor #ffcdd2
        LineColor #b71c1c
        LineThickness 2
    }
</style>

' --- Layer 1: UI Layer ---
package "Mini-program UI" as UI_Layer <<ui>> {
    rectangle "Wxml" as WXML <<ui>>
    rectangle "Wxss" as WXSS <<ui>>
    rectangle "JavaScript" as JS <<ui>>
}

' --- Layer 2: Display Layer ---
package "Display Layer" as Display_Layer <<display>> {
    rectangle "Template Engine Rendering\n(pages)" as Render <<display>>
    rectangle "wx.request Interaction" as Interact <<display>>
    rectangle "POST Request" as ReqPost <<display>>
    rectangle "GET Request" as ReqGet <<display>>
}

' --- Layer 3: Business Layer ---
package "Business Layer" as Business_Layer <<business>> {
    package "Core Services" as Main_Services {
        rectangle "Help Goods Service" as Svc_Goods <<business>>
        rectangle "Order Mgmt Service" as Svc_Order <<business>>
        rectangle "Personal Center Service" as Svc_User <<business>>
        rectangle "Admin Mgmt Service" as Svc_Admin <<business>>
    }

    package "Functional Modules" as Modules {
        rectangle "Hot Items Module" as Mod_Hot <<business>>
        rectangle "Create Order Module" as Mod_CreateOrder <<business>>
        rectangle "Favorites Module" as Mod_Fav <<business>>
        rectangle "Modify User Info Module" as Mod_UserInfo <<business>>
        rectangle "Goods Category Module" as Mod_Cat <<business>>
        rectangle "Order Record Module" as Mod_OrderRec <<business>>
        rectangle "Platform Mgmt Module" as Mod_Platform <<business>>
        rectangle "......" as Mod_More <<business>>
    }
}

' --- Cross-Cutting Concerns ---
rectangle "Log Recording" as Logs <<crosscut>>
rectangle "Permission Control" as Auth <<crosscut>>

' --- Layer 4: Data Layer ---
package "Data Layer" as Data_Logic_Layer <<dataLogic>> {
    rectangle "Stored Procedures" as StoredProc <<dataLogic>>
    rectangle "Custom Functions" as CustomFunc <<dataLogic>>
    rectangle "Data Cache" as DataCache <<dataLogic>>
    rectangle "Data Backup" as Backup <<dataLogic>>
    rectangle "Data Recovery" as Recovery <<dataLogic>>
    rectangle "Read/Write Database" as RW_DB <<dataLogic>>
}

' --- Layer 5: Database ---
package "Database" as Database_Storage <<storage>> {
    database "MySQL" as MySQL_Main <<storage>>
}

' --- Layer 6: Runtime Environment ---
package "Runtime Environment" as Runtime_Env <<env>> {
    node "Tencent Cloud\nLightweight App Server" as Server <<env>>
    node "MySQL 106.55.224.139\n2 Cores 4GB" as ServerSpec <<env>>
}

' --- Relationships ---
UI_Layer --> Display_Layer
Display_Layer --> Business_Layer
Interact -- ReqPost
Interact -- ReqGet

Business_Layer --> Data_Logic_Layer
Data_Logic_Layer --> Database_Storage
Runtime_Env --> Database_Storage

' Cross Cutting Links (Dotted)
Business_Layer .. Logs
Business_Layer .. Auth
Data_Logic_Layer .. Logs
Data_Logic_Layer .. Auth
Display_Layer .. Logs

@enduml

@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class
!define DATABASE rectangle
!define COMPONENT component
!define INTERFACE interface

skinparam componentStyle rectangle

title MyTorch System Architecture

' User layer
actor "Deep Learning Beginner" as User

' Presentation layer
package "Frontend" {
    COMPONENT "Main Interface" as MainUI
    COMPONENT "Configuration Interface" as ConfigUI
    COMPONENT "Training Interface" as TrainUI
    COMPONENT "Inference Interface" as InferUI
}

' Application layer
package "Backend" {
    COMPONENT "Model Management" as ModelMgr
    COMPONENT "Training Engine" as TrainEngine
    COMPONENT "Inference Engine" as InferEngine
    COMPONENT "Data Loader" as DataLoader
    COMPONENT "Framework Extension" as FrameworkExt
}

' Framework layer
package "MyTorch/NNE Framework" {
    COMPONENT "Neural Network Components" as NNComponents
    COMPONENT "Loss Functions" as LossFunc
    COMPONENT "Optimizers" as Optimizers
    COMPONENT "Weight Initialization" as WeightInit
    COMPONENT "GPU Acceleration" as GPUAccel
}

' Data layer
package "Persistence" {
    DATABASE "SQLite Database" as Database
}

' External systems
package "External Resources" {
    rectangle "Preset Datasets" as Datasets
    rectangle "GPU Hardware" as GPU
}

' Connections
User --> MainUI
User --> ConfigUI
User --> TrainUI
User --> InferUI

MainUI --> ConfigUI
ConfigUI --> TrainUI
TrainUI --> InferUI

MainUI --> ModelMgr
ConfigUI --> ModelMgr
TrainUI --> TrainEngine
InferUI --> InferEngine

ModelMgr --> NNComponents
ModelMgr --> FrameworkExt
TrainEngine --> DataLoader
TrainEngine --> LossFunc
TrainEngine --> Optimizers
TrainEngine --> GPUAccel
InferEngine --> NNComponents
InferEngine --> GPUAccel
DataLoader --> Datasets

FrameworkExt --> WeightInit
FrameworkExt --> GPUAccel

NNComponents --> Database
LossFunc --> Database
Optimizers --> Database
TrainEngine --> Database
InferEngine --> Database
DataLoader --> Database

GPUAccel --> GPU

note right of Database
  Stores:
  - Models
  - Datasets
  - Training Logs
  - Inference Logs
end note

note right of GPUAccel
  Provides GPU
  acceleration for
  training and inference
end note

note bottom of FrameworkExt
  Extends base NNE
  framework with:
  - Weight initialization
  - Classic models
  - Preset datasets
end note

samples.title: AwesomeMusic / direct/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #FEFEFE
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam defaultFontSize 10
title AwesomeMusic System Architecture

rectangle "External User" as user #white

rectangle "Load Balancer\n(Nginx 1.19.8)" as lb #lightblue

package "Web Frontend" {
    rectangle "User Interface\n(HTML/CSS/JS, Bootstrap)" as ui #lightgreen
    note right of ui
        Registration/Login
        Homepage (Recommendations/Hot Charts)
        Search & List
        Song Detail
        Song Generation
        Personal Center
    end note
}

package "Web Backend" {
    rectangle "API Gateway\n(Golang, Gin)" as gateway #orange
    rectangle "User Service" as usersvc #orange
    rectangle "Score Service" as scoresvc #orange
    rectangle "Model Service" as modelsvc #orange
    rectangle "Recommendation Service" as recsvc #orange
    rectangle "Hot Chart Service" as hotchartsvc #orange
    rectangle "Task Service" as tasksvc #orange
}

package "Algorithm Service" {
    rectangle "Model Training Service" as training #pink
    rectangle "Score Generation Service" as generation #pink
    rectangle "Score Classification Service" as classification #pink
    rectangle "Song Recommendation Service" as recommendation #pink
    rectangle "Music Processing Engine" as musicproc #pink
    note right of musicproc
        MIDI ↔ ABC Conversion
        Track Seed Extraction
        GPT-2 / LSTM Models
    end note
}

package "Scheduling & Messaging" {
    rectangle "Scheduler" as scheduler #violet
    rectangle "Message Queue\n(RabbitMQ 3.8.14)" as mq #violet
}

package "Data Storage" {
    rectangle "User Database" as userdb #lightgray
    rectangle "Score Database" as scoredb #lightgray
    rectangle "Model Database" as modeldb #lightgray
    rectangle "Hot Chart Database" as hotdb #lightgray
    rectangle "Task Database" as taskdb #lightgray
    rectangle "File Storage\n(MIDI, ABC, Seeds)" as filestore #lightgray
    rectangle "Distributed Storage\n(Hadoop 3.2.2)" as hadoop #lightgray
}

rectangle "Service Discovery\n(etcd 3.4.15)" as etcd #silver

' User interactions
user -> lb : HTTPS
lb -> ui : HTTP/HTTPS
ui -> gateway : API Calls (HTTPS)

' Frontend to Backend flows
gateway -> usersvc : Auth, User Mgmt
gateway -> scoresvc : Upload, Download, Search, Favorite
gateway -> modelsvc : Model Favorite, List
gateway -> recsvc : Get Recommendations
gateway -> hotchartsvc : Get Hot Charts
gateway -> tasksvc : Submit Generation Task

' Backend to Algorithm flows
tasksvc -> mq : Push Task Metadata
scheduler -> mq : Poll / Push Scheduled Tasks
mq -> generation : Consume Generation Task
mq -> training : Consume Training Task
mq -> classification : Consume Classification Task
mq -> recommendation : Consume Recommendation Task

' Algorithm internal flows
generation -> musicproc : MIDI→ABC, Seed Extract, Generate
training -> musicproc : MIDI→ABC, Model Fine-tune
classification -> musicproc : MIDI→ABC, Generate Representation
recommendation -> musicproc : MIDI→ABC, Similarity Calc

' Data access flows
usersvc -> userdb : User Accounts, Follows
scoresvc -> scoredb : Score Metadata, Favorites
scoresvc -> filestore : Score Files (MIDI/ABC)
modelsvc -> modeldb : Model Metadata, Favorites
recsvc -> scoredb : Score Data for Recs
recsvc -> userdb : User Data for Recs
hotchartsvc -> hotdb : Hot Chart Data
tasksvc -> taskdb : Task Metadata, Status
musicproc -> filestore : Read/Write Music Files
musicproc -> hadoop : Store Model Params, Representations
training -> modeldb : Update User Model Params
classification -> scoredb : Update Score Labels

' Service discovery
gateway ..> etcd : Discover Services
usersvc ..> etcd
scoresvc ..> etcd
modelsvc ..> etcd
recsvc ..> etcd
hotchartsvc ..> etcd
tasksvc ..> etcd

' Scheduled flows
scheduler -> tasksvc : Trigger Daily Tasks (02:00)
scheduler -> training : Trigger Training
scheduler -> classification : Trigger Classification
scheduler -> recommendation : Trigger Recommendation

' Non-functional elements
note top of lb
    **Load Balancing**
    Concurrent Access: 2000 QPS
    Transaction Throughput: 100 TPS
end note

note right of gateway
    **Security Boundary**
    Internal/External Isolation
end note

note left of filestore
    **Data Reliability**
    3-Replica Storage
end note

note bottom of mq
    **Reliable Messaging**
    Task Queue for Async Processing
end note

@enduml

samples.title: s000038_2c7731fc / metagpt-custom/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml

package "External Systems" {
  [Redis-based Applications] as redis_apps
  [Redis Pub/Sub-style Applications] as pubsub_apps
  database "Redis Storage\n(standalone/cluster)" as redis_storage
}

node "Redis Agent Network" {
  component "Redis Proxy Agent 1" as redis_proxy_1
  component "Redis Proxy Agent 2" as redis_proxy_2
  component "Redis Proxy Agent N" as redis_proxy_n
  
  redis_proxy_1 -[hidden]- redis_proxy_2
  redis_proxy_2 -[hidden]- redis_proxy_n
}

node "Pub/Sub Network" {
  component "PubSub Service Node 1" as pubsub_node_1
  component "PubSub Service Node 2" as pubsub_node_2
  component "PubSub Service Node N" as pubsub_node_n
  
  pubsub_node_1 -[hidden]- pubsub_node_2
  pubsub_node_2 -[hidden]- pubsub_node_n
}

component "Peer Discovery & Routing\n(Kademlia DHT / libp2p)" as peer_disco

' External connections
redis_apps --> redis_proxy_1 : "Redis protocol (RESP)\n<String|Set|List|Hash|SortedSet|Stream|Control>"
redis_apps <-- redis_proxy_1 : "Response data (RESP)"
pubsub_apps --> pubsub_node_1 : "Redis Pub/Sub protocol (RESP)"
pubsub_apps <-- pubsub_node_1 : "Pub/Sub messages (RESP)"

' Redis Agent Network connections
redis_proxy_1 --> redis_proxy_2 : "Instruction sync\n(peer-to-peer)"
redis_proxy_1 --> redis_proxy_n : "Instruction sync\n(peer-to-peer)"
redis_proxy_2 --> redis_proxy_n : "Instruction sync\n(peer-to-peer)"

' Pub/Sub Network connections
pubsub_node_1 --> pubsub_node_2 : "Cross-network Pub/Sub\n(NAT traversal)"
pubsub_node_1 --> pubsub_node_n : "Cross-network Pub/Sub\n(NAT traversal)"

}

}

samples.title: labhire / openhands/claude-sonnet-4-6
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title LabHire System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam dpi 150

package "Clients" {
  [Student App (Web/Mobile)] as StudentClient <<boundary>>
  [Enterprise-Certified Student App] as ECStudentClient <<boundary>>
  [Mentor App (Web/Mobile)] as MentorClient <<boundary>>
  [Admin Console (Web)] as AdminClient <<boundary>>
}

package "Backend Platform" {
  [API Gateway / BFF\n- Routing\n- AuthN/AuthZ\n- Rate Limiting] as APIGW

  package "Core Services" {
     [Auth Service\n- Registration/Login\n- Univ Email Verification\n- Enterprise Email Verification\n- Sessions] as AuthSvc
     [User Profile Service\n- Students & Mentors\n- Resume Integration] as ProfileSvc
     [Resume Service\n- File Upload (<=10MB)\n- Permissioned Access] as ResumeSvc
     [Project Service\n- Publish/Manage Projects\n- Details\n- Mutual Evaluation] as ProjectSvc
     [Search Service\n- Project/Mentor Search\n- Fuzzy Match] as SearchSvc
     [Recommendation Engine\n- CF + Tag Match\n- Cold-Start Rules] as RecSvc
     [Favorites Service\n- Projects/Mentors/Posts] as FavSvc
     [Application Service\n- Project Applications\n- Mentor Screening] as ApplySvc
     [Community Service\n- Posts/Comments\n- Popularity Sorting] as CommunitySvc
     [Review & Certification Service\n- Univ Identity Review (<=72h)\n- Enterprise Certification\n- State & Feedback] as ReviewSvc
     [Admin & Moderation Service\n- Admin Login\n- Post/Comment Review] as AdminSvc
     [Chat Service\n- Mentor↔Applicant Chat\n- Encrypted] as ChatSvc
     [Notification Service\n- In-site Messages\n- Email Push\n- Reminders] as NotifySvc
     [Risk Control & Audit Service\n- Abnormal Behavior Detection\n- Logs & Alerts] as RiskSvc
  }

  package "Data & Infra" {
     database "Relational DB\n(Users, Projects, Applications,\nPosts, Comments, Favorites,\nReviews, Mutual Evaluation)" as MainDB
     rectangle "Object Storage\n(Resume Files)" as ObjStore
     queue "Message Queue\n(Events/Notifications)" as MQ
     folder "Search Index\n(Projects/Mentors)" as SearchIndex
     folder "Audit Log Store" as AuditStore
  }

  package "Integrations" {
     [Email Provider] as EmailProvider
     [SMS Provider] as SMSProvider
     [Verification Code Generator] as VCode
  }
}

' Client access
StudentClient --> APIGW
ECStudentClient --> APIGW
MentorClient --> APIGW
AdminClient --> APIGW

' Gateway to services
APIGW --> AuthSvc
APIGW --> ProfileSvc
APIGW --> ResumeSvc
APIGW --> ProjectSvc
APIGW --> SearchSvc
APIGW --> RecSvc
APIGW --> FavSvc
APIGW --> ApplySvc
APIGW --> CommunitySvc
APIGW --> ReviewSvc
APIGW --> AdminSvc
APIGW --> ChatSvc
APIGW --> NotifySvc

' Service <-> Data
AuthSvc --> MainDB
ProfileSvc --> MainDB
ResumeSvc --> ObjStore
ResumeSvc --> MainDB

ProjectSvc --> MainDB
ProjectSvc --> SearchIndex : index updates
SearchSvc --> SearchIndex
SearchSvc --> MainDB

RecSvc --> MainDB
RecSvc --> SearchIndex

FavSvc --> MainDB
FavSvc --> NotifySvc : favorite updates

ApplySvc --> MainDB
ApplySvc --> NotifySvc : application events

CommunitySvc --> MainDB
CommunitySvc --> NotifySvc : comments/replies
CommunitySvc --> RiskSvc : content signals

ReviewSvc --> MainDB
ReviewSvc --> NotifySvc : review feedback

AdminSvc --> MainDB
AdminSvc --> RiskSvc : moderation logs

ChatSvc --> MainDB : chat metadata
ChatSvc --> RiskSvc : abuse signals
ChatSvc --> NotifySvc : message reminders

NotifySvc --> MQ
NotifySvc --> EmailProvider
NotifySvc --> MainDB : in-site messages

VCode --> EmailProvider
VCode --> SMSProvider
AuthSvc --> VCode : issue/verify codes

RiskSvc --> AuditStore
RiskSvc --> MQ

note right of APIGW
Access control & roles enforced (NFR-003):
- Student
- Enterprise-Certified Student
- Mentor
- Administrator
end note

note bottom of ChatSvc
Encryption required for login/registration/chat (NFR-004)
end note

note bottom of RiskSvc
Abuse prevention: rate limits, CAPTCHA/SMS, abnormal behavior detection (NFR-005)
end note

@enduml

It correctly handles the separation of university and enterprise emails, and honors specific constraints like the 10MB limit on resumes and 72-hour limit on reviews.

@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
left to right direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #DDDDDD
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5
skinparam package {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam queue {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}

package "Alert Source" as AlertSource {
    rectangle "deadmanssnitch" as Deadmanssnitch
    rectangle "app-sre\nalertmanager" as AppSreAlertmanager
    rectangle "cluster\nalertmanager" as ClusterAlertmanager
}

package "Alerts" as Alerts {
    queue "CHGM" as ChgmAlert
    queue "CPD" as CpdAlert
    queue "all cluster\nalerts" as AllClusterAlerts
}

package "PagerDuty Team" as PagerDutyTeam {
    rectangle "prod-deadmanssnitch" as ProdDeadmanssnitch
    rectangle "app-sre-alertmanager" as PagerDutyAppSre
    rectangle "<cluster>.openshiftapps.com-\nhive-cluster" as HiveClusterService
}

rectangle "Tekton\nEvent\nListener" as TektonEventListener
rectangle "Tekton Interceptor:\nAlert investigation\nimplemented in CAD?" as TektonInterceptor

package "cadctl" as Cadctl {
    rectangle "switch(alerttype)" as SwitchAlertType
    rectangle "CHGM investigation" as ChgmInvestigation
    rectangle "CPD investigation" as CpdInvestigation
    rectangle "Future investigations" as FutureInvestigations
}

rectangle "Update Incident\nNotes" as UpdateIncidentNotes
rectangle "Escalate alert to\non-call SRE" as EscalateOnCallSre

Deadmanssnitch --> ChgmAlert
AppSreAlertmanager --> CpdAlert
ClusterAlertmanager --> AllClusterAlerts
ChgmAlert --> ProdDeadmanssnitch
CpdAlert --> PagerDutyAppSre
AllClusterAlerts --> HiveClusterService
PagerDutyTeam --> TektonEventListener : webhook
TektonEventListener --> TektonInterceptor
TektonInterceptor --> Cadctl : yes\ntekton pipeline run\ncadctl investigate --payload
TektonInterceptor --> EscalateOnCallSre : no
Cadctl --> SwitchAlertType
SwitchAlertType --> ChgmInvestigation
SwitchAlertType --> CpdInvestigation
SwitchAlertType --> FutureInvestigations
Cadctl --> UpdateIncidentNotes
UpdateIncidentNotes --> EscalateOnCallSre
@enduml
