﻿@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle

actor Learner
actor Contributor
actor Administrator as Admin

package Presentation {
  [WebClient] as WebClient
}

package Application {
  [Backend] as Backend
  [AuthModule] as AuthModule
  [ModelService] as ModelSvc
  [UserService] as UserSvc
}

package Algorithm {
  [AnalysisEngine] as Algo
}

package Data {
  database MySQL
  database Neo4jDB
}

package External {
  [IdentityProvider] as IdP
  [PythonLibs] as PyLibs
  [TLS] as TLS
}

Learner --> WebClient
Contributor --> WebClient
Admin --> WebClient

WebClient --> Backend
Backend --> AuthModule
Backend --> ModelSvc
Backend --> UserSvc
Backend --> IdP
Backend --> MySQL
Backend --> Neo4jDB
ModelSvc --> Neo4jDB
ModelSvc --> MySQL
Backend --> Algo
Algo --> PyLibs
WebClient ..> TLS
Backend ..> TLS

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' Directional setting (Top to Down)
top to bottom direction

' Styling for different layers
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor<<Frontend>> #e1f5fe
    BorderColor<<Frontend>> #01579b
    
    BackgroundColor<<Presentation>> #f3e5f5
    BorderColor<<Presentation>> #4a148c
    
    BackgroundColor<<Backend>> #fff3e0
    BorderColor<<Backend>> #e65100
}

skinparam database {
    BackgroundColor<<Storage>> #e8f5e9
    BorderColor<<Storage>> #1b5e20
}

' Layers / Subgraphs
package "Frontend Layer" {
    rectangle "React Framework" as React <<Frontend>>
    rectangle "React-Router: Page Navigation" as Router <<Frontend>>
    rectangle "Netron: Node Drawing Features" as NetronFE <<Frontend>>
}

package "Data Presentation Layer" {
    rectangle "RESTful API Design" as RESTAPI <<Presentation>>
    rectangle "Netron: Graph Representation Language" as GraphLang <<Presentation>>
}

package "Backend Layer" {
    rectangle "Flask: Backend Framework" as Flask <<Backend>>
    rectangle "SQLAlchemy: ORM Framework" as SQLAlchemy <<Backend>>

samples.title: s000032_0a49a326 / metagpt-custom/qwen3-coder-480b-a35b-instruct
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
' Layered Component/Deployment Diagram for Activiti 7 Platform

' === Presentation Layer ===
package "Presentation Layer" {
    component "REST/API Requests"
    component "Developer Actions"
    component "Cluster Commands"
}

' === API Layer ===
package "API Layer" {
    component "ProcessRuntime API" as ProcessAPI
    component "TaskRuntime API" as TaskAPI
    component "Authentication Gateway"
    component "API Gateway"
}

' === Service Layer ===
package "Service Layer" {
    component "Activiti Runtime Bundle" as RuntimeBundle
    component "Audit Service" as AuditSvc
    component "Query Service" as QuerySvc
    component "Notification Service" as NotificationSvc
    component "Cloud Connectors" as CloudConnectors
}

' === Security Layer ===
package "Security Layer" {
    component "Keycloak" as AuthServer
    component "Spring Security" as SecFramework
}

' === Infrastructure Layer ===
package "Infrastructure Layer" {
    node "Kubernetes / GKE" {
        component "NGINX Ingress Controller" as IngressCtrl
        component "Deployment Descriptors" as DeployCfg
        component "Kubernetes Registry/Config Maps" as K8sRegistry
        database "Persistent Storage"
    }
}

' === External Systems ===
cloud "External Users & Systems"

' === Major Dependencies & Connections ===

' Presentation to API
"REST/API Requests" --> "API Gateway"
"Developer Actions" --> "API Gateway"
"Cluster Commands" --> "API Gateway"

' API Gateway routing
"API Gateway" --> "ProcessRuntime API"
"API Gateway" --> "TaskRuntime API"
"API Gateway" --> "Authentication Gateway"

' API to Security
"ProcessRuntime API" --> "Authentication Gateway"
"TaskRuntime API" --> "Authentication Gateway"
"Authentication Gateway" --> "Spring Security"
"Spring Security" --> "Keycloak"
"Authentication Gateway" --> "Keycloak"

' API to Services
"ProcessRuntime API" --> "Activiti Runtime Bundle"
"TaskRuntime API" --> "Activiti Runtime Bundle"
"Activiti Runtime Bundle" --> "Audit Service"
"Activiti Runtime Bundle" --> "Query Service"
"Activiti Runtime Bundle" --> "Notification Service"
"Activiti Runtime Bundle" --> "Cloud Connectors"

' Security Internal Flow (removed ROLE_ACTIVITI_USER Context component)
"Spring Security" --> "ProcessRuntime API" : [valid token]
"Spring Security" --> "TaskRuntime API" : [valid token]
"Spring Security" --> "Authentication Gateway" : [valid token]

' Rejection paths for invalid/expired tokens or unauthorized access
"Spring Security" -up-> "External Users & Systems" : reject [invalid/expired token]
"Spring Security" -up-> "External Users & Systems" : reject [unauthorized access]

' Infrastructure Routing
"NGINX Ingress Controller" --> "API Gateway"

' Deployment Configs with scalability configuration
"Deployment Descriptors" --> "Activiti Runtime Bundle" : configures replica count
"Deployment Descriptors" --> "Audit Service" : configures input rate
"Deployment Descriptors" --> "Query Service" : configures input rate
"Deployment Descriptors" --> "Notification Service" : configures input rate

' Kubernetes registry/config maps usage
"K8sRegistry" --> "DeployCfg" : provides configs

' External Access
"External Users & Systems" --> "NGINX Ingress Controller"

' Persistent Data
"Audit Service" --> "Persistent Storage"
"Query Service" --> "Persistent Storage"

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
left to right direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #5B8F35
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5
skinparam package {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #111111
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor #D8EAFB
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}

rectangle "Client" as Client
rectangle "SSO/IDM\n(Keycloak)" as Keycloak

package "Activiti Cloud Infrastructure" as CloudInfrastructure {
    rectangle "Gateway" as Gateway
    rectangle "Registry\n(Kubernetes)" as Registry
    rectangle "Config Maps\n(Kubernetes)" as ConfigMaps

    package "Activiti Cloud Application" as CloudApplication {
        rectangle "Query\nService" as QueryService
        rectangle "Audit\nService" as AuditService
        rectangle "Notification\nService" as NotificationService

        package "Cloud Connectors" as CloudConnectors {
            rectangle "Customer\nLogic" as CustomerLogic
            rectangle "Out of the\nBox Services" as OutOfBoxServices
        }

        package "Runtime Bundle" as RuntimeBundle {
            rectangle "Process\nRuntime" as ProcessRuntime
            rectangle "BPMN, Form\nand Rule Defs" as BpmnFormRuleDefs
        }
    }
}

Client --> Gateway : WebFlow
Keycloak --> Client : Direct Access Grant
Gateway --> Keycloak : WebFlow
Gateway --> CloudApplication : routed service access
Gateway --> Registry : service discovery
Registry --> ConfigMaps : configuration lookup
ConfigMaps --> CloudConnectors : Kubernetes configuration
QueryService --> RuntimeBundle : process queries
AuditService --> RuntimeBundle : audit events
NotificationService --> RuntimeBundle : notifications
CloudConnectors --> RuntimeBundle : business integration
ProcessRuntime --> BpmnFormRuleDefs : executes definitions
RuntimeBundle --> Keycloak : identity and token validation
@enduml

It also represents high-level requirements like scalability configuration (NFR-002) and ingress-based access (FR-007). However, it is incomplete because it fails to model the user-facing interaction with the Query Service (API-006) and does not clearly depict the initial token acquisition flow by a user (API-001).

faithfulness.reasoning: The diagram is fundamentally unfaithful in its representation of security-related control flows. It depicts API services (e.g., `ProcessRuntime API`) calling an `Authentication Gateway` after being invoked, and shows `Spring Security` (a framework) as an active caller of the APIs. This misrepresents the specified roles of token validation (FR-001), authorization (FR-005, C-002), and the Spring Security context (C-001), where security checks are preconditions for access, not subsequent actions.

@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class

RECTANGLE "Electron Desktop Application" as electron {
  RECTANGLE "User Settings Sanitization" as settingsSanitizer
  RECTANGLE "Tree CSV Export Controller" as treeCsvController
  RECTANGLE "RESIP Export Controller" as resipController
  RECTANGLE "CSV Export Controller" as csvController
  RECTANGLE "Excel Export Controller" as excelController
  RECTANGLE "Hash Computation Controller" as hashController
  RECTANGLE "Translation Module" as translationModule
}

RECTANGLE "Background Workers" as workers {
  RECTANGLE "Tree CSV Export Worker" as treeCsvWorker
  RECTANGLE "RESIP Export Worker" as resipWorker
  RECTANGLE "CSV Export Worker" as csvWorker
  RECTANGLE "Excel Export Worker" as excelWorker
  RECTANGLE "Hash Computation Worker" as hashWorker
}

RECTANGLE "File System" as fileSystem {
  RECTANGLE "Application User Data Directory" as userDataDir
}

settingsSanitizer --> translationModule : reads language
treeCsvController --> treeCsvWorker : invokes
treeCsvController --> translationModule : reads language
resipController --> resipWorker : invokes
csvController --> csvWorker : invokes
csvController --> translationModule : reads language
excelController --> excelWorker : invokes
excelController --> translationModule : reads language
hashController --> hashWorker : invokes
hashWorker --> userDataDir : writes debug files
hashWorker --> fileSystem : processes paths

treeCsvWorker ..> translationModule : receives language
resipWorker ..> translationModule : receives language
csvWorker ..> translationModule : receives language
excelWorker ..> translationModule : receives language

note right of settingsSanitizer
  FR-001, FR-002, NFR-003
end note

note right of treeCsvController
  FR-003, FR-004, NFR-001
end note

note right of resipController
  FR-005, NFR-001
end note

note right of csvController
  FR-006, NFR-001
end note

note right of excelController
  FR-007, NFR-001
end note

note right of hashController
  FR-008, FR-009, NFR-002, NFR-004
end note

note top of workers
  C-003: Implemented via background workers
end note

note bottom of fileSystem
  C-001: Uses Electron app.getPath("userData")
end note

@enduml

samples.title: easylatex / openhands/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title EasyLaTeX System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle

actor "User" as User

package "Client (Browser)" {
  component "Web UI\nUpload, Edit, Preview,\nProjects, Versions, Comments" as WebUI
  component "WebSocket Client\nRealtime Preview & Collaboration" as WSClient
}

package "Edge/Web Tier" {
  component "Web Server / API Gateway\n(Nginx/Apache + Node.js)" as Gateway
  component "Realtime Gateway\n(WebSocket Server)" as WS
}

package "Application Services (Backend)" {
  component "Auth & Identity\nRegistration, Login, Password Recovery,\nPermission Control" as Auth
  component "User Service" as UserSvc
  component "Project Service" as ProjectSvc
  component "Group & Collaboration Service" as GroupSvc
  component "Version Control Service\nVersion Tree, Branches, Restore" as VersionSvc
  component "Comment Service" as CommentSvc
  component "File Service\nUpload/Download, MIME Validation" as FileSvc
  component "Recognition Service\nOCR + DL Models" as RecognitionSvc
  component "LaTeX Generation Service\nNormalize & Synthesize LaTeX" as LatexGenSvc
  component "Render Service\nLaTeX Engine Wrapper" as RenderSvc
  component "Export Service\nPDF/LaTeX Source/PNG/JPEG" as ExportSvc
}

package "Data & Infrastructure" {
  database "Relational DB\n(MySQL/PostgreSQL)" as RDB
  cloud "Object Storage\n(Uploads & Artifacts)" as ObjStore
  component "Message Queue\nAsync Tasks" as MQ
  component "Model Assets\nOCR/Formula/Table Models" as ModelStore

}

User --> WebUI
WebUI --> Gateway : REST/HTTP
WebUI ..> WSClient
WSClient ..> WS : WebSocket

Gateway --> Auth
Gateway --> UserSvc
Gateway --> ProjectSvc
Gateway --> GroupSvc

Gateway --> FileSvc
Gateway --> RenderSvc : Preview API
Gateway --> ExportSvc

WS --> VersionSvc : Live updates
WS --> CommentSvc : Live comments
WS --> RenderSvc : Realtime preview stream

FileSvc --> ObjStore
ExportSvc --> ObjStore
RenderSvc --> LatexEngine
RecognitionSvc --> ModelStore

Auth --> RDB
UserSvc --> RDB
ProjectSvc --> RDB
GroupSvc --> RDB
VersionSvc --> RDB
CommentSvc --> RDB

FileSvc --> MQ : enqueue parse/recognition
MQ --> RecognitionSvc
RecognitionSvc --> LatexGenSvc
LatexGenSvc --> RenderSvc : LaTeX code
RenderSvc --> WebUI : Preview updates
ExportSvc --> WebUI : Download links

WebUI --> VersionSvc : Edit version files
WebUI --> CommentSvc : Add comments
WebUI --> ProjectSvc : Create/view projects
WebUI --> GroupSvc : Group operations

@enduml

@startuml
' LabHire Component/Deployment Diagram

' Presentation Layer
node "Presentation Layer" {
    component "Mobile App" as MobileApp
    component "Web Portal" as WebPortal
}

' Application Layer
package "Application Layer" {
    component "Project Management Service" as ProjectMgmtSvc
    component "Community Service" as CommunitySvc
    component "Personal Information Service" as PersonalInfoSvc
    component "Administration Service" as AdminSvc
    component "Resume Management Service" as ResumeMgmtSvc
    component "Search Service" as SearchSvc
    component "Favorite Management Service" as FavoriteMgmtSvc
    component "Application Management Service" as ApplicationMgmtSvc
    component "Mutual Evaluation Service" as MutualEvalSvc
}

' Service Layer
package "Service Layer" {
    component "User Authentication Service" as AuthSvc
    component "Notification Service" as NotifySvc
    component "Chat Service" as ChatSvc
    component "Recommendation Engine" as RecEngine
    component "Review/Risk-Control Module" as RiskControlMod
    component "Enterprise Certification Service" as EnterpriseCertSvc
}

' Data Layer
package "Data Layer" {
    component "Database Interface" as DBInterface
    database "System Database" as SysDB
}

' External Systems
cloud "External Systems" {
    component "Email Service Provider" as EmailProvider
    component "SMS Service Provider" as SMSProvider
    component "Enterprise Email Systems" as EntEmailSys
    component "University Email Systems" as UniEmailSys

CommunitySvc --> AuthSvc : authenticates

AdminSvc --> AuthSvc : authenticates
AdminSvc --> RiskControlMod : reviews
AdminSvc --> DBInterface : persists/retrieves

ResumeMgmtSvc --> AuthSvc : authenticates
ResumeMgmtSvc --> DBInterface : persists/retrieves

SearchSvc --> DBInterface : queries

FavoriteMgmtSvc --> AuthSvc : authenticates
FavoriteMgmtSvc --> DBInterface : persists/retrieves

ApplicationMgmtSvc --> AuthSvc : authenticates
ApplicationMgmtSvc --> NotifySvc : notifies
ApplicationMgmtSvc --> DBInterface : persists/retrieves

MutualEvalSvc --> AuthSvc : authenticates
MutualEvalSvc --> NotifySvc : notifies
MutualEvalSvc --> DBInterface : persists/retrieves

' Service to Service & External
AuthSvc --> EmailProvider : sends verification codes
AuthSvc --> SMSProvider : sends verification codes
AuthSvc --> DBInterface : persists/retrieves

RecEngine --> AuthSvc : reads user context
RecEngine --> DBInterface : retrieves data

NotifySvc --> EmailProvider : sends emails
NotifySvc --> DBInterface : persists/retrieves

ChatSvc --> DBInterface : persists/retrieves

RiskControlMod --> NotifySvc : sends alerts
RiskControlMod --> DBInterface : logs audits

EnterpriseCertSvc --> AuthSvc : verifies enterprises
EnterpriseCertSvc --> DBInterface : persists/retrieves

' All Services to DB
AuthSvc --> DBInterface
NotifySvc --> DBInterface
ChatSvc --> DBInterface
RecEngine --> DBInterface
RiskControlMod --> DBInterface
EnterpriseCertSvc --> DBInterface

' Database Interface to actual database
DBInterface --> SysDB

' External System Relationships
EmailProvider --> EntEmailSys : delivers to enterprises
EmailProvider --> UniEmailSys : delivers to universities

@enduml

samples.title: mytorch / direct/gpt-5
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title MyTorch System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor<<frontend>> #E8F1FF
  BackgroundColor<<backend>> #FFF4E6
  BackgroundColor<<framework>> #EEF8ED
  BackgroundColor<<db>> #F7F7F7
  BackgroundColor<<infra>> #F0F0FF
}
left to right direction

actor "Deep Learning Beginner" as Beginner
actor "Developer / Team Member" as Dev
actor "Project Participant / Stakeholder" as Stakeholder

node "User Device" as UserDevice {
  package "Visual Front End" <<frontend>> as FE {
    [Main Interface] as MainUI
    [Configuration Interface] as ConfigUI
    [Training Interface] as TrainUI
    [Inference Interface] as InferUI
    [Guidance & Help] as HelpUI
    [Real-time Visualization Panel] as VizUI
  }
}

node "Compute Host" as Compute {
  package "System Back End" <<backend>> as Backend {
    [API Layer] as APILayer
    [Security & Privacy Guard] as Security
    [Model Config Manager] as ModelConfig
    [Dataset Manager & Data Loader] as DataLoader
    [Training Orchestrator] as TrainSvc
    [Inference Orchestrator (Inferencer)] as InferSvc
    [Model Manager] as ModelMgr
    [Weight Initialization Service] as WeightInit
    [Classic Models Registry] as ModelsLib
    [GPU Acceleration Service] as GPUAccel
    [Resource Manager (GPU Auto-Detect)] as ResourceMgr
    [Monitoring & Logging Service] as MonitorLog
    [Fault Handler] as FaultHandler
    [Persistence Service] as Persist
    [Backup & Recovery Service] as BackupSvc
  }

  package "MyTorch / NNE Framework" <<framework>> as Framework {
    [Core NN Ops & Tensor Engine] as NNECore
    [Optimizers / Losses / LR Schedulers] as OptLoss
    [GPU Kernels Adapter] as GPUKernels
  }

  database "SQLite Local Database" <<db>> as SQLite
  folder "Backup Files" as BackupFiles

  node "GPU Device" <<infra>> as GPU {
    [GPU API / Driver] as GPUAPI
  }
}

cloud "Public Datasets" as PublicData

' Users to Front End
Beginner --> MainUI : uses
Dev --> MainUI : uses
Stakeholder --> MainUI : view progress/status

' Front End internal
MainUI --> ConfigUI
MainUI --> TrainUI
MainUI --> InferUI
MainUI --> HelpUI
TrainUI --> VizUI
InferUI --> VizUI

' Front End to Back End
ConfigUI --> APILayer : FR-001 Configure Model
TrainUI --> APILayer : FR-004 Start Training\nFR-006 Terminate Training
InferUI --> APILayer : FR-007 Init Inferencer\nFR-008 Load Model\nFR-009 Execute Inference
VizUI <-- MonitorLog : FR-022 Real-time feedback & visualization
HelpUI <-- APILayer : NFR-008 Guidance/Help

' API Layer routing and security
APILayer --> Security : NFR-016..018 Confidentiality/Integrity
APILayer --> ModelConfig : FR-001
APILayer --> DataLoader : FR-002, FR-003
APILayer --> TrainSvc : FR-004, FR-006
APILayer --> InferSvc : FR-007..FR-009
APILayer --> ModelMgr : FR-019 Model management
APILayer --> MonitorLog : NFR-011..NFR-012 metrics/logs
APILayer --> Persist : DR-001..DR-012 persistence commands

' Dataset management and public datasets
DataLoader --> PublicData : FR-018 Preset dataset links/download
DataLoader --> Persist : DR-002, DR-003 save configs/metadata

' Training flow
TrainSvc --> WeightInit : FR-016 Select methods
TrainSvc --> ModelsLib : FR-017 Preset models
TrainSvc --> DataLoader : Training data
TrainSvc --> NNECore : FR-004 Training execution
TrainSvc --> MonitorLog : NFR-011 Fault monitoring\nNFR-012 KPI metrics
TrainSvc --> FaultHandler : NFR-013 Fault handling
TrainSvc --> Persist : FR-005 Save trained model & eval\nDR-004 Training task records

' Inference flow
InferSvc --> ModelMgr : Load/switch models
InferSvc --> DataLoader : Inference data
InferSvc --> NNECore : FR-009 forward()
InferSvc --> MonitorLog : Inference logs/metrics
InferSvc --> FaultHandler : Error handling
InferSvc --> Persist : DR-005, DR-009 save results/logs

' Model management and persistence
ModelMgr --> Persist : FR-020 Persist models
Persist --> SQLite : DR-010 Local storage\nNFR-002 time precision
MonitorLog --> Persist : DR-009, DR-011 logs & errors
BackupSvc --> SQLite : FR-021 Backup/Recovery
BackupSvc --> BackupFiles : Store backup files

' Framework internals and GPU acceleration
NNECore --> OptLoss : Use training primitives
NNECore --> GPUKernels : Low-level ops
NNECore --> GPUAccel : FR-010..FR-014 GPU-accelerated ops
GPUAccel --> ResourceMgr : FR-012 Auto-detect/config resources
GPUAccel --> GPUAPI : FR-010..FR-011 GPU memory copy/compute
GPUKernels --> GPUAPI : Kernel execution
ResourceMgr --> GPUAPI : Device query/config
GPUAccel --> FaultHandler : FR-015 Acceleration errors

' Security boundaries
Security --> Persist : Data protection (NFR-016..NFR-018)
Security --> APILayer : Request validation & access control
Security --> MonitorLog : Error reporting & privacy controls

' Notes for key quality constraints
note right of SQLite
NFR-001 Floating-point >= numpy.float32
NFR-002 Time precision to seconds
FR-021 Auto backup & recovery
end note

note bottom of GPU
FR-010 GPU-accelerated matrix ops\nFR-011 Add/Mul/Scalar/Mean/Extremum/Elem-wise
FR-012 Auto resource configuration
FR-013 Simple GPU APIs
FR-014 Compatibility with original framework
FR-015 Defined error handling
end note

@enduml

samples.title: mytorch / metagpt-custom/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml

' Define layers using packages
package "Presentation Layer" {
    component "Front End" as frontend
    note right of frontend: Provides main, configuration,\ntraining, and inference interfaces\nwith real-time visualization (FR-022)
}

package "Application/Service Layer" {
    component "Back End" as backend
    component "Model Manager" as modelmanager
    component "Monitoring Service" as monitoringservice
    
    note right of backend: Orchestrates business logic,\nprovides service interfaces\nwith error handling (FR-015, NFR-013)
    note right of modelmanager: Manages model lifecycle,\nsaving trained models and results
    note right of monitoringservice: Monitors training/inference\nexceptions (NFR-011) and\nresource usage (NFR-012)
}

package "Framework Layer" {
    component "MyTorch/NNE Framework" as framework
    component "Training Engine" as trainingengine
    component "Inferencer" as inferencer
    component "Data Loader" as dataloader
    component "Weight Initializer" as weightinitializer
    component "Classic Models Library" as classicmodels
    
    note right of framework: Core deep learning framework\nextended with GPU acceleration\nand GPU compatibility (FR-014)
    note right of trainingengine: Executes model training,\nhandles evaluation and termination
    note right of inferencer: Loads models and executes\nforward() for inference
    note right of dataloader: Loads preset datasets,\napplies preprocessing/augmentation\nwith download capabilities (FR-002, FR-003)
    note right of weightinitializer: Provides weight initialization\nmethods (He, Lecun, Xavier) (FR-016)
    note right of classicmodels: Integrated classic models\n(ResNet, VGG, Transformer) (FR-017)
}

package "Data Access Layer" {
    database "SQLite Database" as sqldb
    component "Backup/Recovery" as backuprecovery
    
    note right of sqldb: Persists models, datasets,\ntraining/inference logs
    note right of backuprecovery: Automatic backup and\nrecovery mechanism (FR-021)
}

package "Infrastructure Layer" {
    component "GPU Accelerator" as gpuaccel
    node "GPU Hardware & Drivers" as gpuhardware
    
    note right of gpuaccel: Provides GPU-accelerated matrix ops,\nautomatic resource detection (FR-012)\nwith easy-to-use APIs (FR-013)
    note right of gpuhardware: Physical GPU and software drivers
}

' Key dependencies
frontend --> backend : "requests model operations\nreceives visual feedback"
backend --> framework : "executes core DL functions"
backend --> sqldb : "persists/retrieves results,\nmodels, logs, config"
backend --> modelmanager : "manages model operations"
backend --> dataloader : "requests data loading operations"
backend --> gpuaccel : "accesses GPU APIs"
backend --> monitoringservice : "reports status and errors"

modelmanager --> sqldb : "stores/retrieves models\nand evaluation results"
modelmanager --> classicmodels : "accesses pre-built models"

framework --> gpuaccel : "accesses low-level GPU APIs\nfor acceleration"
framework --> weightinitializer : "uses initialization methods"

trainingengine --> gpuaccel : "utilizes GPU resources\nfor matrix computations"
trainingengine --> framework : "uses framework capabilities"
trainingengine --> dataloader : "loads training datasets"
trainingengine --> weightinitializer : "initializes model weights"

inferencer --> dataloader : "loads datasets for inference"
inferencer --> framework : "uses framework capabilities"
inferencer --> modelmanager : "loads models for inference"

dataloader --> sqldb : "stores/retrieves datasets"

monitoringservice --> sqldb : "logs monitoring data"
monitoringservice --> gpuaccel : "monitors GPU resources"

backuprecovery --> sqldb : "performs backup and recovery"

gpuaccel --> gpuhardware : "requires GPU hardware\nand drivers"

@enduml

@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam linetype ortho

title Zhiyan Tongjie - Requirements Review Checklist System

actor Reviewer
actor RequirementsOwner as "Requirements Owner"
actor ProjectStakeholder as "Project Stakeholder"

package "Review Artifact Interface" {
    component [Checklist Viewer and Editor] as UI
}

package "Review Inspection Services" {
    component [Completeness Review Module] as CompReview
    component [Understandability Review Module] as UndReview
    component [Model Accuracy Review Module] as ModReview
    component [Extension Improvement Review Module] as ExtReview
}

package "Review Recording Services" {
    component [Problem Report Recorder] as ProbRecorder
    component [Scoring Engine] as ScoreEngine
    component [Review Metadata Recorder] as MetaRecorder
}

package "Data Storage" {
    database [Review Purpose Store] as PurposeDB
    database [Checklist Items Store] as ChecklistDB
    database [Problem Report Store] as ProbDB
    database [Score Record Store] as ScoreDB
    database [Review Metadata Store] as MetaDB
}

package "External Standards and References" {
    component [Industry Standards] as IndStd
    component [Product Specifications] as ProdSpec
    component [Business Specifications] as BizSpec
    component [Documentation Norms] as DocNorm
}

component [Source Requirements Document] as SRD

Reviewer --> UI : performs review
RequirementsOwner --> UI : reads findings
ProjectStakeholder --> UI : reads result summary

SRD --> UI : input to review

UI --> CompReview
UI --> UndReview
UI --> ModReview
UI --> ExtReview
UI --> ProbRecorder
UI --> ScoreEngine
UI --> MetaRecorder

CompReview --> ChecklistDB : completeness items
UndReview --> ChecklistDB : understandability items
ModReview --> ChecklistDB : model accuracy items
ExtReview --> ChecklistDB : extension items

CompReview ..> IndStd : references
UndReview ..> DocNorm : references
ModReview ..> ProdSpec : references
ExtReview ..> BizSpec : references

ProbRecorder --> ProbDB : stores problems and suggestions
ScoreEngine --> ScoreDB : stores dimension scores and total
MetaRecorder --> MetaDB : stores reviewer identity and date

UI --> PurposeDB : reads and stores review purpose

note bottom of ScoreEngine
  4 dimensions x 10 pts each
  Total: 40 pts max
end note

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' --- Configuration ---
top to bottom direction
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam componentStyle uml2

' --- Styling ---
skinparam rectangle<<ClientLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #f9f
    BorderColor #333
}
skinparam rectangle<<NetworkLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #b2ebf2
    BorderColor #00838f
}
skinparam rectangle<<ServiceLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #c8e6c9
    BorderColor #2e7d32
}
skinparam database<<StorageLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #fff9c4
    BorderColor #fbc02d
}

' --- Layer 1: Frontend / Client Layer ---
rectangle "Client Layer" <<ClientLayer>> {
    component [Client Terminal] as Client
    component [Cloud DNS] as DNS
}

' --- Layer 2: Network / Gateway Layer ---
rectangle "Network / Gateway Layer" <<NetworkLayer>> {
    rectangle "Machine 01" {
        component [LVS - Linux Virtual Server] as LVS01
        component [Nginx] as Nginx01
    }
    rectangle "Machine 02" {
        component [LVS - Linux Virtual Server] as LVS02
        component [Nginx] as Nginx02_A
        component [Nginx] as Nginx02_B
    }
    rectangle "Machine 03" {
        component [LVS - Linux Virtual Server] as LVS03
        component [Nginx] as Nginx03
    }
}

' --- Layer 3: Service / Backend Layer ---
rectangle "Service / Backend Layer" <<ServiceLayer>> {
    component [Django Service Clusters] as Django
    component [Socializing Service] as Social
    component [User Information Service] as UserInfo
    component [Literature Service] as Literature
    component [Back-office Management] as BackOffice
}

' --- Layer 4: Storage / Database Layer ---
rectangle "Storage / Database Layer" <<StorageLayer>> {
    database "Redis Cache" as Redis
    database "Elasticsearch" as ES
    database "MySQL Database" as MySQL
}

' --- Connection Relationships ---
Client --> DNS
Client --> LVS01
Client --> LVS02
Client --> LVS03

LVS01 --> Nginx01
LVS02 --> Nginx02_A
LVS02 --> Nginx02_B
LVS03 --> Nginx03

Nginx01 --> Django
Nginx02_A --> Django
Nginx02_B --> Django
Nginx03 --> Django

Django --> Social
Django --> UserInfo
Django --> Literature
Django --> BackOffice

Social --> Redis
Social --> ES
Social --> MySQL

UserInfo --> Redis
UserInfo --> ES
UserInfo --> MySQL

Literature --> Redis
Literature --> ES
Literature --> MySQL

BackOffice --> Redis
BackOffice --> ES
BackOffice --> MySQL

@enduml

samples.title: s000062_ee8cb840 / metagpt-custom/claude-sonnet-4-6
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA
skinparam package {
  BackgroundColor #EEF2FF
  BorderColor #5B6EAE
}
skinparam node {
  BackgroundColor #E8F5E9
  BorderColor #388E3C
}
skinparam component {
  BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BorderColor #455A64
}
skinparam cloud {
  BackgroundColor #E3F2FD
  BorderColor #1565C0
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' EXTERNAL SYSTEMS
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
cloud "External Systems" {
  component "Udacity Capstone\nProject Simulator" as UdacitySimulator
  component "Recorded Training\nBag Player" as TrainingBagPlayer
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' INFRASTRUCTURE / ENVIRONMENT LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
node "Infrastructure / Environment Layer\n(Docker Container)" as InfraLayer {

  component "ROSMaster\n(Topic Broker &\nComm Backbone)" as ROSMaster

}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' LAUNCH / CONFIGURATION LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
package "Launch / Configuration Layer" as LaunchLayer {

  component "StyxLaunchConfig\n(styx.launch —\nSimulator Mode)" as StyxLaunchConfig

  component "SiteLaunchConfig\n(site.launch —\nSite / Bag Mode)" as SiteLaunchConfig
}

note right of StyxLaunchConfig
  One-shot startup script;
  initializes all nodes
  (simulator mode)
end note

note right of SiteLaunchConfig
  One-shot startup script;
  initializes all nodes
  (site / bag mode)
end note

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' STYX BRIDGE
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
package "Styx WebSocket Bridge" as StyxBridgeLayer {
  component "StyxBridge\n(bridge.py / server.py)\nWebSocket ↔ ROS adapter" as StyxBridge
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' PERCEPTION LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
package "Perception Layer" as PerceptionLayer {

  component "TLDetectorClassifier\n(tl_detector node)\n- subscribes: /image_color,\n  base_waypoints, current_pose\n- detects & classifies\n  traffic light state\n- publishes: /traffic_waypoint\n  (stop waypoint index)" as TLDetectorClassifier

}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' PLANNING LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
package "Planning Layer" as PlanningLayer {

  component "WaypointLoader\n- loads waypoints from CSV\n- publishes: /base_waypoints\n  (incl. target speeds)" as WaypointLoader

  component "WaypointUpdater\n- subscribes: /base_waypoints,\n  /current_pose, /traffic_waypoint\n- publishes: /final_waypoints\n  (velocity-adjusted window)" as WaypointUpdater

}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' CONTROL LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
package "Control Layer" as ControlLayer {

  component "WaypointFollower\n- subscribes: /final_waypoints,\n  /current_pose\n- publishes: /twist_cmd\n  (linear & angular velocity)" as WaypointFollower

  component "DBWNode\n(Drive-By-Wire)\n- subscribes: /twist_cmd,\n  vehicle state\n- publishes: /vehicle_cmd\n  (throttle, steering, brake)" as DBWNode

}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' STYX BRIDGE ↔ SIMULATOR
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
UdacitySimulator <--> StyxBridge : "WebSocket\n(vehicle cmds /\nsensor & pose data)"

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' STYX BRIDGE → ROS TOPICS (simulator mode)
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
StyxBridge ..> ROSMaster : "publishes /image_color\n(simulated camera feed)"
StyxBridge ..> ROSMaster : "publishes /current_pose\n(simulated vehicle pose)"

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' BAG PLAYER → ROS TOPICS (site / bag mode)
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
TrainingBagPlayer ..> ROSMaster : "publishes /image_color\n(recorded real images)"
TrainingBagPlayer ..> ROSMaster : "publishes /current_pose\n(recorded pose data)"

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' base_waypoints — pub/sub via ROSMaster
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
WaypointLoader ..> ROSMaster : "publishes /base_waypoints"
ROSMaster ..> WaypointUpdater : "/base_waypoints"
ROSMaster ..> TLDetectorClassifier : "/base_waypoints"

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' current_pose — pub/sub via ROSMaster
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
ROSMaster ..> WaypointUpdater : "/current_pose"
ROSMaster ..> TLDetectorClassifier : "/current_pose"
ROSMaster ..> WaypointFollower : "/current_pose"

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' image_color — pub/sub via ROSMaster
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
ROSMaster ..> TLDetectorClassifier : "/image_color"

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' traffic_waypoint — pub/sub via ROSMaster
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
TLDetectorClassifier ..> ROSMaster : "publishes /traffic_waypoint\n(stop waypoint index)"
ROSMaster ..> WaypointUpdater : "/traffic_waypoint"

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' final_waypoints — pub/sub via ROSMaster
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
WaypointUpdater ..> ROSMaster : "publishes /final_waypoints"
ROSMaster ..> WaypointFollower : "/final_waypoints"

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' twist_cmd — pub/sub via ROSMaster
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
WaypointFollower ..> ROSMaster : "publishes /twist_cmd"
ROSMaster ..> DBWNode : "/twist_cmd"

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' vehicle_cmd — pub/sub via ROSMaster → bridge
' ─────────────────────────────────────────
DBWNode ..> ROSMaster : "publishes /vehicle_cmd\n(throttle / steering / brake)"
ROSMaster ..> StyxBridge : "/vehicle_cmd\n(forwarded to simulator\nvia WebSocket)"

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
left to right direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #2F3A45
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5
skinparam package {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor #D9ECFF
    BorderColor #34495E
    BorderThickness 1
}

package "Udacity Self-Driving Car Capstone\nROS Architecture" as CapstoneSystem {
    rectangle "Car / Simulator" as CarSimulator

    package "Perception" as Perception {
        rectangle "Obstacle Detection\nROS Node" as ObstacleDetection
        rectangle "Traffic Light\nDetection Node" as TrafficLightDetection
    }

    package "Planning" as Planning {
        rectangle "Waypoint Loader\nROS Node" as WaypointLoader
        rectangle "Waypoint Updater Node\nROS Node" as WaypointUpdater
    }

    package "Control" as Control {
        rectangle "DBW Node\nDrive-by-wire" as DbwNode
        rectangle "Waypoint Follower\nController" as WaypointFollower
    }
}

CarSimulator --> ObstacleDetection : /image_color
CarSimulator --> TrafficLightDetection : /image_color
CarSimulator --> ObstacleDetection : /current_pose
CarSimulator --> TrafficLightDetection : /current_pose
CarSimulator --> WaypointUpdater : /current_pose
CarSimulator --> DbwNode : /current_velocity
CarSimulator --> DbwNode : /vehicle/dbw_enabled

WaypointLoader --> ObstacleDetection : /base_waypoints
WaypointLoader --> TrafficLightDetection : /base_waypoints
WaypointLoader --> WaypointUpdater : /base_waypoints

ObstacleDetection --> WaypointUpdater : /obstacle_waypoint
TrafficLightDetection --> WaypointUpdater : /traffic_waypoint

WaypointUpdater --> WaypointFollower : /final_waypoints
WaypointFollower --> DbwNode : /twist_cmd
DbwNode --> CarSimulator : /vehicle/throttle_cmd
DbwNode --> CarSimulator : /vehicle/brake_cmd
DbwNode --> CarSimulator : /vehicle/steering_cmd
@enduml

    FontColor #000000
    roundCorner 10
}

title PlugIt System Architecture

rectangle "External Environment" {
  [External Users / Systems] as External
  [Inbound Email Source] as EmailSource
}

rectangle "PlugIt Proxy Environment" {
  component "PlugIt Proxy" as Proxy {
    component "Proxy API Endpoint" as APIEndpoint
    component "Proxy-Side Data Store" as ProxyDataStore
    component "Standalone Mail Workflow" as MailWorkflow {
      component "Mail Intake" as MailIntake
      component "Routing Validator" as RoutingValidator
      component "Auto-Response Filter" as AutoResponseFilter
      component "Text Payload Extractor" as PayloadExtractor
      component "Mail Handler" as MailHandler
    }
  }
}

database "Proxy Database" as ProxyDB

rectangle "PlugIt Service Environment" {
  component "PlugIt Service 1" as Service1 {
    component "Service Logic" as Logic1
    component "PlugIt API Client" as APIClient1
  }
  database "Service Database 1" as ServiceDB1

  component "PlugIt Service 2" as Service2 {
    component "Service Logic" as Logic2
    component "PlugIt API Client" as APIClient2
  }
  database "Service Database 2" as ServiceDB2

  component "PlugIt Service N" as ServiceN {
    component "Service Logic" as LogicN
    component "PlugIt API Client" as APIClientN
  }
  database "Service Database N" as ServiceDBN
}

rectangle "Configuration & Management" {
  component "Service Configuration" as ServiceConfig {
    file "Project Config" as ProjConfig
    file "Local/Private Config" as LocalConfig
  }
  component "Database Schema Manager" as SchemaManager {
    file "Versioned Upgrade Files" as UpgradeFiles
  }
}

' External to Proxy Communication
External --> APIEndpoint : "Access Services"
EmailSource --> MailIntake : "Inbound Email"

' Internal Proxy Communication
APIEndpoint --> ProxyDataStore
ProxyDataStore --> ProxyDB : "persists"
MailIntake --> RoutingValidator : "Email with Token"
RoutingValidator --> AutoResponseFilter : "Valid Token"
AutoResponseFilter --> PayloadExtractor : "Not Auto-Response"
PayloadExtractor --> MailHandler : "Routing Data + Text Payload"
MailHandler --> APIEndpoint : "Handler Result (Example)"

' Proxy to Service Communication (PlugIt Protocol)
APIEndpoint --> Service1 : "Proxy-to-Service"
APIEndpoint --> Service2 : "Proxy-to-Service"
APIEndpoint --> ServiceN : "Proxy-to-Service"

' Service Internal Communication
Logic1 --> APIClient1 : "Uses"
APIClient1 --> APIEndpoint : "API Requests"
Logic1 --> ServiceDB1 : "CRUD Operations"

Logic2 --> APIClient2 : "Uses"
APIClient2 --> APIEndpoint : "API Requests"
Logic2 --> ServiceDB2 : "CRUD Operations"

LogicN --> APIClientN : "Uses"
APIClientN --> APIEndpoint : "API Requests"
LogicN --> ServiceDBN : "CRUD Operations"

' Configuration Dependencies
Service1 ..> ServiceConfig : "Reads"
Service2 ..> ServiceConfig : "Reads"
ServiceN ..> ServiceConfig : "Reads"
ProjConfig ..> LocalConfig : "Extends/Overrides"
SchemaManager ..> UpgradeFiles : "Manages"
ServiceDB1 ..> SchemaManager : "Schema Upgrades"
ServiceDB2 ..> SchemaManager : "Schema Upgrades"
ServiceDBN ..> SchemaManager : "Schema Upgrades"

note right of External
  Accesses unified service
  experience through the Proxy.
end note

note right of EmailSource
  Example/Standalone Scope Only.
  Not a core framework requirement.
end note

note bottom of ServiceConfig
  Contains API_URL, SQLALCHEMY_URL,
  DEBUG, PI_BASE_URL, PI_ALLOWED_NETWORKS.
  Private settings in Local Config.
end note

note left of SchemaManager
  Uses version-managed upgrade files
  (e.g., Alembic) for schema evolution.
end note

@enduml

ConfigFiles --> LocalConfig

samples.title: AwesomeMusic / openhands/gpt-5
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title AwesomeMusic System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false

package "Client" {
  [Browser]
}

package "Gateway & Delivery" {
  [Nginx] <<gateway>>
  [Web Frontend (HTML/CSS/JS/Bootstrap)] <<frontend>>
}

package "Backend API (Golang/Gin)" {
  [Account Service] <<backend>>
  [Score Service] <<backend>>
  [Recommendation Service] <<backend>>
  [Model Management] <<backend>>
  [Task API] <<backend>>
}

package "Scheduler" {
  [Cron Scheduler] <<scheduler>>
}

package "Algorithm Service" {
  [Generation Module] <<algorithm>>
  [Training Module] <<algorithm>>
  [Classification Module] <<algorithm>>
  [Recommendation Engine] <<algorithm>>
}

package "Messaging" {
  [RabbitMQ] <<queue>>
}

package "Data & State" {
  [Data Storage] <<db>>
  [Hadoop HDFS] <<storage>>
  [etcd] <<coordination>>
}

' Client to gateway and frontend
[Browser] -down-> [Nginx] : HTTPS
[Nginx] --> [Web Frontend (HTML/CSS/JS/Bootstrap)] : Static assets

' Gateway to backend services
[Nginx] --> [Account Service] : HTTPS/REST
[Nginx] --> [Score Service] : HTTPS/REST
[Nginx] --> [Recommendation Service] : HTTPS/REST
[Nginx] --> [Model Management] : HTTPS/REST
[Nginx] --> [Task API] : HTTPS/REST

' Frontend to backend APIs
[Web Frontend (HTML/CSS/JS/Bootstrap)] --> [Account Service]
[Web Frontend (HTML/CSS/JS/Bootstrap)] --> [Score Service]
[Web Frontend (HTML/CSS/JS/Bootstrap)] --> [Recommendation Service]
[Web Frontend (HTML/CSS/JS/Bootstrap)] --> [Model Management]
[Web Frontend (HTML/CSS/JS/Bootstrap)] --> [Task API]

' Backend data access
[Account Service] --> [Data Storage]
[Score Service] --> [Data Storage]
[Recommendation Service] --> [Data Storage]
[Model Management] --> [Data Storage]

' Score/media files in distributed storage
[Score Service] --> [Hadoop HDFS] : Scores, midi, abc

' Coordination/configuration
[Task API] ..> [etcd] : Service discovery / config
[Generation Module] ..> [etcd]
[Training Module] ..> [etcd]
[Classification Module] ..> [etcd]
[Recommendation Engine] ..> [etcd]

' Scheduling and messaging
[Cron Scheduler] --> [RabbitMQ] : Daily tasks (train/classify/recommend)
[Task API] --> [RabbitMQ] : Enqueue generation tasks
[Training Module] <-- [RabbitMQ] : Training tasks
[Classification Module] <-- [RabbitMQ] : Classification tasks
[Recommendation Engine] <-- [RabbitMQ] : Recommendation tasks
[Generation Module] <-- [RabbitMQ] : Generation tasks

' Algorithm service interactions with data
[Training Module] --> [Hadoop HDFS] : Read playlists (midi/abc)
[Training Module] --> [Data Storage] : Update user model params
[Generation Module] --> [Hadoop HDFS] : Read seed / Write midi
[Generation Module] --> [Data Storage] : Read model params
[Classification Module] --> [Hadoop HDFS] : Read scores/abc
[Classification Module] --> [Data Storage] : Save labels
[Recommendation Engine] --> [Data Storage] : Read favorites/follows; Save recommendations

' Status polling by backend
[Task API] ..> [RabbitMQ] : Poll task status

note right of [Cron Scheduler]
Triggers 02:00 batch tasks:
- Training (FR-016)
- Classification (FR-014)
- Recommendation (FR-015)
end note

legend right
<<gateway>>       Gateway/Reverse Proxy (Nginx)
<<frontend>>      Web UI (HTML/CSS/JS/Bootstrap)
<<backend>>       Backend services (Golang/Gin)
<<scheduler>>     Scheduling component
<<algorithm>>     Algorithmic modules
<<queue>>         Message Queue (MQ)
<<storage>>       Distributed storage (Hadoop HDFS)
<<db>>            Application data store (unspecified)
<<coordination>>  Coordination / Key-Value (etcd)
end legend

@enduml

@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class

skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA
skinparam component {
  BackgroundColor #DDEEFF
  BorderColor #336699
  FontColor #000000
}
skinparam node {
  BackgroundColor #FFF8DC
  BorderColor #B8860B
}
skinparam database {
  BackgroundColor #E8F5E9
  BorderColor #2E7D32
}
skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor #F3E5F5
  BorderColor #6A1B9A
}
skinparam cloud {
  BackgroundColor #FCE4EC
  BorderColor #880E4F
}
skinparam arrow {
  Color #444444
}
skinparam defaultFontSize 12

title POCD – Persistent Object Consistency Detection\nSystem Architecture Diagram

'============================================================
' EXTERNAL ACTORS / INPUT SOURCES
'============================================================
actor "Technical User /\nClass Diagram Manager" as TechUser
actor "Unauthenticated User" as AnonUser
actor "New / Beginner User" as NewUser
actor "Third-Party Application" as ThirdParty

cloud "StarUML\n(.mdj files)" as StarUML
cloud "MySQL Database\n(Design File / Script /\nJDBC Connection)" as MySQLSrc

'============================================================
' FRONT-END LAYER (User Interface Layer)
'============================================================
node "User Interface Layer\n(Front-End – Browser SPA)" as UILayer {

  rectangle "Account & Auth UI\n(FR-001, FR-002)" as AuthUI
  rectangle "File Management UI\n(FR-003, FR-004,\nFR-005, FR-006)" as FileUI
  rectangle "Detection Config UI\n(FR-007, FR-008)" as ConfigUI
  rectangle "Detection Result UI\n(FR-017 ~ FR-023)" as DetectUI
  rectangle "Repair Suggestion &\nRepair Result UI\n(FR-024 ~ FR-027)" as RepairUI
  rectangle "Detection Record &\nReport Export UI\n(FR-009, FR-010)" as ReportUI
  rectangle "Help & Case UI\n(FR-011, FR-012)" as HelpUI
}

'============================================================
' BACK-END LAYER (Business Logic Layer)
'============================================================
node "Business Logic Layer\n(Back-End Application Server)" as BLLayer {

  rectangle "Account & Auth Service\n(Registration, Login,\nRole-Based Access Control)\n[NFR-008]" as AuthSvc

  rectangle "File Management Service\n(Upload, Download,\nModify, Delete)" as FileSvc

  rectangle "Detection Config Service\n(Detection Rules,\nException Config)" as ConfigSvc

  rectangle "Parsing Module" as ParseMod {
    rectangle "MDJ Class Diagram Parser\n(Classes, Interfaces,\nEnums, Attributes,\nRelationships)\n[FR-013, C-003]" as MDJParser
    rectangle "Database Parser\n(Tables, Fields, PKs,\nFKs, Triggers, Types)\n[FR-014, FR-015, C-004]" as DBParser
    rectangle "JSON Converter\n(Jackson / JSON)\n[C-006, C-007]" as JSONConv
  }

  rectangle "Matching Engine\n(Entity-Entity, Attribute-Attribute,\nRelationship-Relationship\nBipartite Graph + Similarity)\n[FR-016]" as MatchEngine

  rectangle "Inconsistency Detection Engine\n[FR-017 ~ FR-023]" as DetectEngine {
    rectangle "Field & Type Detector\n(FR-017, FR-018)" as FieldDet
    rectangle "Attribute/Column &\nClass/Table Detector\n(FR-019, FR-020)" as AttrDet
    rectangle "Relationship Detector\n(Multiplicity, Type,\nMissing/Extra)\n(FR-021, FR-022, FR-023)" as RelDet
  }

  rectangle "Repair Service\n[FR-024 ~ FR-027]" as RepairSvc {
    rectangle "Class Diagram\nRepair Suggestion &\nAuto-Repair\n(FR-024, FR-025)" as CDRepair
    rectangle "Database\nRepair Suggestion &\nAuto-Repair\n(FR-026, FR-027)" as DBRepair
  }

  rectangle "Report & History Service\n(Export, Historical Records)\n[FR-009, FR-010]" as ReportSvc

  rectangle "Help & Case Service\n(Manuals, FAQs,\nSample Files)\n[FR-011, FR-012]" as HelpSvc

  rectangle "Async Task Manager\n(Background Detection Jobs)\n[NFR-004]" as AsyncMgr

  rectangle "Operation Log Service\n[NFR-010, DR-013]" as LogSvc

  rectangle "Open API Gateway\n[NFR-012, FR-012]" as OpenAPI
}

'============================================================
' DATA ACCESS LAYER
'============================================================
node "Data Access Layer" as DALayer {

  database "User Account Store\n[DR-001]" as UserDB
  database "File Store\n(MDJ Files, DB Design Files)\n[DR-002, DR-003]" as FileDB
  database "Parsing Model Store\n(CD Model, DB Model)\n[DR-004, DR-005]" as ParseDB
  database "Detection Config Store\n(Rules, Exceptions)\n[DR-006, DR-007]" as ConfigDB
  database "Matching & Detection\nResults Store\n[DR-008, DR-009]" as ResultDB
  database "Repair Data Store\n(Suggestions, Results)\n[DR-010]" as RepairDB
  database "History & Logs Store\n(Detection Records,\nModification Records,\nOperation Logs)\n[DR-011, DR-013]" as HistoryDB
  database "Help & Case Store\n(Manuals, FAQs,\nSample Files)\n[DR-012]" as HelpDB
}

'============================================================
' EXTERNAL CONNECTORS
'============================================================
node "External Connectors" as ExtConn {
  rectangle "JDBC Database Connector\n[C-005]" as JDBCConn
}

'============================================================
' SSL / SECURITY BOUNDARY
'============================================================
rectangle "SSL/TLS Encryption Boundary\n[NFR-007, C-008]" as SSLBoundary

'============================================================
' CONNECTIONS – USERS TO UI
'============================================================
TechUser --> AuthUI
TechUser --> FileUI
TechUser --> ConfigUI
TechUser --> DetectUI
TechUser --> RepairUI
TechUser --> ReportUI

AnonUser --> AuthUI
AnonUser --> DetectUI
AnonUser --> HelpUI

NewUser --> HelpUI

ThirdParty --> OpenAPI

'============================================================
' CONNECTIONS – UI TO BACK-END (through SSL boundary)
'============================================================
UILayer --> SSLBoundary
SSLBoundary --> BLLayer

AuthUI --> AuthSvc
FileUI --> FileSvc
ConfigUI --> ConfigSvc
DetectUI --> DetectEngine
RepairUI --> RepairSvc
ReportUI --> ReportSvc
HelpUI --> HelpSvc

'============================================================
' CONNECTIONS – INTERNAL BACK-END SERVICES
'============================================================
FileSvc --> ParseMod : "Trigger parsing on upload"
MDJParser --> JSONConv
DBParser --> JSONConv
JSONConv --> MatchEngine : "Parsed JSON models"
MatchEngine --> DetectEngine : "Matching results"
DetectEngine --> RepairSvc : "Inconsistency report"
DetectEngine --> ReportSvc : "Detection results"
RepairSvc --> ReportSvc : "Repair results"
AsyncMgr --> DetectEngine : "Async job dispatch"
AsyncMgr --> RepairSvc : "Async job dispatch"
AuthSvc --> LogSvc
FileSvc --> LogSvc
DetectEngine --> LogSvc
RepairSvc --> LogSvc
OpenAPI --> AuthSvc
OpenAPI --> DetectEngine
OpenAPI --> ReportSvc

'============================================================
' CONNECTIONS – BACK-END TO DATA ACCESS LAYER
'============================================================
AuthSvc --> UserDB
FileSvc --> FileDB
ParseMod --> ParseDB
ConfigSvc --> ConfigDB
MatchEngine --> ResultDB
DetectEngine --> ResultDB
RepairSvc --> RepairDB
ReportSvc --> HistoryDB
LogSvc --> HistoryDB
HelpSvc --> HelpDB

'============================================================
' CONNECTIONS – EXTERNAL FILE INPUTS
'============================================================
StarUML --> FileSvc : ".mdj upload"
MySQLSrc --> FileSvc : "DB file / script upload"
MySQLSrc --> JDBCConn : "Direct DB connection"

'============================================================
' CONNECTIONS – JDBC CONNECTOR
'============================================================
JDBCConn --> DBParser : "Raw DB metadata"
DBParser --> JSONConv

'============================================================
' LEGEND
'============================================================
legend right
  |= Symbol |= Meaning |
  | node | Deployment node / Layer |
  | rectangle | Service or Module |
  | database | Persistent Data Store |
  | cloud | External System |
  | actor | Human User Role |
  | --> | Data / Control Flow |
endlegend

@enduml

samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title EIVAS – High-Level System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Epidemiological\nForm Filler" as Filler
actor "Epidemiological\nAnalyst" as Analyst

package "Web Frontend (Browser)" as FE {
  component "Reporting Form UI" as FE_Report
  component "Case Management UI" as FE_Case
  component "Itinerary & Map UI" as FE_Map
  component "Association & Graph UI" as FE_Graph
  component "Statistical Charts UI" as FE_Stats
  component "Map Visualization SDK" as FE_MapSDK
}

package "Backend APIs & Services" as BE {
  [API Gateway / Web Server] as APIGW
  component "Rate Limiter\n(IP Cooldown)" as RateLimiter
  component "Case Service" as CaseSvc
  component "Itinerary Service" as ItinSvc
  component "Association Service" as AssocSvc
  component "Analytics Service" as AnalyticSvc
  component "Data Quality Checker" as DQ
}

package "Algorithm Module" as ALG {
  component "Risk Calculation" as RiskCalc
  component "Clustering Engine" as ClusterEng
}

database "EIVAS Database" as DB
cloud "Map Service\n(Tiles/Geocoding)" as MapSvc

package "Reliability & Deployment" {
  node "Primary Backend Server" as Primary
  node "Backup Server" as Backup
  component "Failover Controller" as Failover
  note right of Failover
    System shall switch to backup within 20 minutes
    (NFR-003, C-005)
  end note
}

' User interactions
Filler --> FE_Report : Enter investigation data
Analyst --> FE_Case : Manage/query cases
Analyst --> FE_Map : View itineraries\nConfirm locations
Analyst --> FE_Graph : Case relationships
Analyst --> FE_Stats : Overall analysis

' Frontend to backend
FE_Report --> APIGW : Submit forms (REST)
FE_Case --> APIGW : Queries (REST)
FE_Map --> APIGW : Itinerary/Association queries
FE_Graph --> APIGW : Graph data request
FE_Stats --> APIGW : Analytics requests

' Security and resource protection
APIGW --> RateLimiter : enforce cooldown (NFR-005)
note right of APIGW
  Personal-information queries must be encrypted
  (NFR-004)
end note

' Routing to services
APIGW --> CaseSvc
APIGW --> ItinSvc
APIGW --> AssocSvc
APIGW --> AnalyticSvc

' Services and data
CaseSvc --> DB : Create/Update/Read case & itinerary
ItinSvc --> DB : Read formatted paths
AssocSvc --> DB : Read location/time data
AnalyticSvc --> DB : Read investigation data

' Data quality and analytics
AnalyticSvc --> DQ : pre-check completeness
DQ --> AnalyticSvc : ok / error prompt
AnalyticSvc --> RiskCalc : movement & risk calc
AnalyticSvc --> ClusterEng : case clustering

' Map capability
FE_Map --> FE_MapSDK
FE_MapSDK --> MapSvc : tiles / geocoding

' Outputs to UI
ItinSvc --> FE_Map : formatted path info
AssocSvc --> FE_Graph : confirmed-case relations
RiskCalc --> FE_Stats : regional flow map data
ClusterEng --> FE_Stats : clustering graph data

note bottom
  Web application; supports various OS and browsers (C-001, NFR-006).
  Interfaces target professional epidemiological workers; concise and clear (C-006, NFR-008, NFR-009).
end note

@enduml

samples.title: ModelSharePlatform / mini-swe-agent/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title Deep Learning Model Sharing Platform - Layered Architecture

package "Presentation Layer" {
  [Web Browser - Vue.js Frontend]
  note right of [Web Browser - Vue.js Frontend]
    TypeScript UI
    Modern browsers only
    No IE support
  end note
}

package "Application Layer" {
  [API Gateway - Spring Boot]
  [User Service]
  [Community Service]
  [Model Service]
  [Dataset Service]
  [Payment Service]
  [Admin Service]
}

package "Data Layer" {
  database "MySQL Database" {
    [User Accounts]
    [Q&A Data]
    [Blog Data]
    [Model Metadata]
    [Dataset Metadata]
    [Follow Relationships]
    [Transaction Records]
  }

  [File Storage]
}

package "External Systems" {
  [Email Service - SMTP]
  [Payment Gateway - Third-party]
}

[Web Browser - Vue.js Frontend] --> [API Gateway - Spring Boot] : HTTP/HTTPS
[API Gateway - Spring Boot] --> [User Service] : API calls
[API Gateway - Spring Boot] --> [Community Service] : API calls
[API Gateway - Spring Boot] --> [Model Service] : API calls
[API Gateway - Spring Boot] --> [Dataset Service] : API calls
[API Gateway - Spring Boot] --> [Payment Service] : API calls
[API Gateway - Spring Boot] --> [Admin Service] : API calls

[User Service] --> [MySQL Database] : CRUD operations
[Community Service] --> [MySQL Database] : CRUD operations
[Model Service] --> [MySQL Database] : CRUD operations
[Dataset Service] --> [MySQL Database] : CRUD operations
[Payment Service] --> [MySQL Database] : CRUD operations
[Admin Service] --> [MySQL Database] : CRUD operations

[Model Service] --> [File Storage] : File upload/download
[Dataset Service] --> [File Storage] : File upload/download

[User Service] --> [Email Service - SMTP] : Password reset emails
[Payment Service] --> [Payment Gateway - Third-party] : Payment processing

note top of [API Gateway - Spring Boot]
  Supports multilingual interface
  (Chinese/English switching)
end note

note right of [Model Service]
  Intelligent recommendation algorithms
  Online model invocation
end note

note left of [MySQL Database]
  Spring Boot backend
  MySQL persistence
  Supports 1,000 req/sec
  Stores data for 10,000+ users
end note

note right of [File Storage]
  30GB+ storage
  Model binaries
  Dataset files
end note

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' --- Configuration & Styles ---
skinparam topboxSelection true
skinparam Direction top to bottom
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false

' Define Styles based on original ClassDefs
<style>
    .client {
        BackgroundColor #e1f5fe
        LineColor #01579b
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .service {
        BackgroundColor #e8f5e9
        LineColor #2e7d32
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .db {
        BackgroundColor #fff9c4
        LineColor #fbc02d
        LineThickness 2
    }
</style>

' --- Client Layer ---
package "Browser / Client Layer" as Browser_Layer {
    rectangle "Frontend Interface\n(Bootstrap-Vue)" as FE_Interface <<client>>
}

' --- Server Layer ---
package "Server Layer\n(Spring Boot)" as Server_Layer {
    
    package "Core Modules" as Core_Modules {
        ' Layout is TB within the package
        rectangle "Account Management Module" as AccountMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Q&A Community Module" as QAMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Blog Sharing Module" as BlogMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Model Management Module" as ModelMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Dataset Management Module" as DatasetMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Following Management Module" as FollowMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Admin Module" as AdminMod <<service>>
    }
}

' --- Database Layer ---
package "Database Layer\n(MySQL)" as Database_Layer {
    database "User Data" as UserDB <<db>>
    database "Q&A Community Data" as QADB <<db>>
    database "Blog Data" as BlogDB <<db>>
    database "Model Data" as ModelDB <<db>>
    database "Dataset Data" as DatasetDB <<db>>
    database "Following Data" as FollowDB <<db>>
}

' --- Relationships ---
FE_Interface --> Core_Modules
Core_Modules --> Database_Layer

@enduml

left to right direction

cloud "CDN Distribution\n(CloudFront-style)" as CDN

node "Backend\nNode.js/Express + Socket.IO" as Backend {

  }
  package "Real-time Sockets" {

    component "Battle Namespace\n- Invite & accept (atomic)\n- Readiness & code sync\n- Compile/Judge\n- Outcome & leave" as BattleSock
  }
}

database "MySQL\n(Relational: users, projects,\nversions, battles, ...)" as MySQL
database "InfluxDB\n(Time-series: coding-process records)" as InfluxDB
node "Redis\n(Cache: workspace map,\ninvitation & battle state)" as Redis
node "Docker Sandbox\n(Compile/Execute Code)" as Sandbox
node "CI/CD & Automated Deployment" as CICD

Frontend --> CDN : GET static assets & archives

Nginx --> ProjectAPI
Nginx --> VersionAPI
Nginx --> ExecAPI
Nginx --> PlaybackAPI
Nginx --> UploadAPI

Nginx --> BattleSock

BattleSock --> Sandbox : Compile & judge

UploadAPI --> S3 : Upload code/user/battle files
S3 --> UploadAPI : Metadata & distributable URL

AuthAPI --> Frontend : JWT/user details or errors
ProjectAPI --> Frontend : Project results
VersionAPI --> Frontend : Version & initial files
ExecAPI --> Frontend : Execution result
PlaybackAPI --> Frontend : Playback data

WorkspaceSock --> Frontend : statusChecked & workspace events
BattleSock --> Frontend : Battle events

CICD --> Frontend : Deploy SPA build to S3/CDN

note right of Redis
- Verify readiness before cache ops (NFR-002)

All code execution runs in Docker\n(NFR-005, C-009)
end note

note bottom of AuthAPI
Reject empty/malformed JWT (FR-003)\nReturn user info on valid JWT (FR-002)
end note

note top of WorkspaceSock
Default readOnly=true & authorization=false\nwhen project/version missing (FR-008)\nPersist mapping only when authorized\nand Redis is ready (FR-009)
end note

Distribute static assets and archives (FR-018)
end note

samples.title: s000003_e847b2a1 / direct/claude-sonnet-4-6
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class

skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA
skinparam component {
  BackgroundColor #DDEEFF
  BorderColor #336699
  FontColor #222222
  ArrowColor #336699
}
skinparam node {
  BackgroundColor #EEF5EE
  BorderColor #447744
  FontColor #222222
}
skinparam database {
  BackgroundColor #FFF8DC
  BorderColor #AA8800
  FontColor #222222
}
skinparam cloud {
  BackgroundColor #F5F0FF
  BorderColor #7755AA
  FontColor #222222
}
skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor #F0F0F0
  BorderColor #888888
  FontColor #222222
}
skinparam ArrowColor #444444
skinparam defaultFontSize 12

title Prediction Cards — System Architecture

actor "Prediction Participant\n(Browser User)" as User

rectangle "Browser Frontend\n(React + Aeternity SDK)" {
  component "Wallet Provider\n/ Context" as WalletCtx
  component "Frontend Prediction\nAPI / Provider" as PredAPI
  component "Prediction Creation\nUI" as CreateUI
  component "Prediction Viewing\nUI" as ViewUI
  component "Outcome NFT Operations\nUI (Fund / Rent / Withdraw / Claim)" as NFTOpsUI
}

rectangle "Aeternity Wallet\n(Browser Extension / Client)" as AEWallet

node "Aeternity Blockchain" {
  component "AENS Name Resolution" as AENS
  component "PredictionCards\nSmart Contract\n(Sophia)" as SmartContract
  note right of SmartContract
    Maintains:
    - Prediction state
    - Outcome NFT state
    - Oracle query/response
    - Reward-claiming rules
  end note
}

rectangle "Oracle Service\n(Quarkus)" {
  component "Oracle Registration\n& Validity Manager" as OracleReg
  component "Pending Query\nChecker (Scheduled)" as QueryChecker
  component "Price Comparison\n& Response Submitter" as PriceComp
  component "Runtime Configuration\nLoader" as OracleCfg
}

rectangle "Prediction-Processing Service\n(Scheduled)" {
  component "Closed Prediction\nDetector" as ClosedDetector
  component "Oracle Query\nInitiator" as OracleInit
  component "Result Processor\n(Post-Oracle)" as ResultProc
}

cloud "External Price Provider\n(Market Data API)" as PriceProvider

database "Prediction Media Storage\n(IPFS-compatible)" as MediaStorage

rectangle "Local Contract\nIntegration-Test Environment" {
  component "Aeternity Node\n(Local)" as LocalNode
  component "Compiler Service\n(Local)" as LocalCompiler
  component "Index / Debug\nEndpoint" as LocalIndex
  component "Test Proxy\n(CORS: GET, POST, OPTIONS\nHeaders: Content-Type,\nCache-Control,\nContent-Range, Range)" as TestProxy
}

' ── User to Frontend ──────────────────────────────────────────
User --> WalletCtx : connects wallet
User --> CreateUI : enters asset, target price,\ntime range, NFT media
User --> ViewUI : views predictions
User --> NFTOpsUI : fund / rent / withdraw / claim

' ── Frontend internal ─────────────────────────────────────────
WalletCtx --> PredAPI : provides wallet context
PredAPI --> CreateUI : exposes prediction ops\n(via context)
PredAPI --> ViewUI : exposes prediction ops\n(via context)
PredAPI --> NFTOpsUI : exposes prediction ops\n(via context)

' ── Frontend to Wallet ────────────────────────────────────────
PredAPI --> AEWallet : wallet-backed contract calls\n(SDK integration)

' ── Wallet to Blockchain ──────────────────────────────────────
AEWallet --> AENS : resolve contract\nby AENS name
AENS --> SmartContract : locate deployed contract
AEWallet --> SmartContract : submit transactions\n(create prediction,\nfund, rent, withdraw,\nclaim reward)

' ── Frontend to Blockchain (read) ────────────────────────────
PredAPI --> SmartContract : read prediction state

' ── Frontend to Media Storage ────────────────────────────────
ViewUI --> MediaStorage : load outcome NFT\nmedia references
NFTOpsUI --> MediaStorage : load outcome NFT\nmedia references
CreateUI --> MediaStorage : reference NFT\nmedia on creation

' ── Oracle Service internal ───────────────────────────────────
OracleCfg --> OracleReg : provides keys, node,\ncompiler, fees, validity params
OracleCfg --> QueryChecker : provides scheduling,\nnode, network config
OracleCfg --> PriceComp : provides network\nand key config

' ── Oracle Service to Blockchain ─────────────────────────────
OracleReg --> SmartContract : register oracle /\nextend validity (Aeternity oracle)
QueryChecker --> SmartContract : check pending\noracle queries (scheduled)
PriceComp --> SmartContract : submit oracle\nresult response\n(higher / lower_or_equal)

' ── Oracle Service to External Price ─────────────────────────
PriceComp --> PriceProvider : obtain actual\nasset price

' ── Prediction-Processing Service ────────────────────────────
ClosedDetector --> SmartContract : discover closed predictions
ClosedDetector --> OracleInit : trigger oracle query\nfor closed prediction
OracleInit --> SmartContract : initiate oracle query\n(asset, target price, end time)
ResultProc --> SmartContract : drive on-chain result processing\nafter oracle response available
SmartContract --> ResultProc : oracle response available\n(winning outcome + reward path)

' ── Prediction-Processing to Oracle coordination (implicit) ──
QueryChecker ..> OracleInit : pending queries detected\n(oracle service processes)

' ── AENS for services ─────────────────────────────────────────
OracleInit --> AENS : resolve contract name
ResultProc --> AENS : resolve contract name

' ── Local Test Environment ───────────────────────────────────
TestProxy --> LocalNode : proxy blockchain calls\n(CORS-enabled)
TestProxy --> LocalCompiler : proxy compiler calls\n(CORS-enabled)
TestProxy --> LocalIndex : proxy index/debug\ncalls (CORS-enabled)
LocalNode --> SmartContract : local contract\ndeployment & calls
LocalCompiler --> SmartContract : compile Sophia\ncontract locally

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
top to bottom direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #111111
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5
skinparam rectangle {
    BorderColor #777777
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam package {
    BorderColor #D45D5D
    BorderThickness 1
}

rectangle "process-prediction-\nservice" as PredictionProcess #BDCCD9
rectangle "oracle-service" as OracleService #FFF1C9

package "aeternity blockchain" as Blockchain #F8CCCC {
    rectangle "PredictionCards\nSmart Contract" as PredictionContract #D8EFD5
}

rectangle "User" as User #FFFFFF
rectangle "Frontend" as Frontend #FFFFFF
rectangle "IPFS" as IPFS #D8E8FA

User --> Frontend

PredictionProcess --> PredictionContract : poll for predictions with state "CLOSED"\ncall function "ask_for_winning_option"\ncall function "process_oracle_response" if oracle has responded

OracleService --> PredictionContract : poll for oracle queries\nget price from coingecko API\ndetermine outcome\nrespond to query with outcome (higher/lower)

Frontend --> PredictionContract : create prediction\ndeposit / rent NFT\nwithdraw / claim rewards
PredictionContract --> Frontend : get data\nvia dry-runs

Frontend --> IPFS : load GIFs of NFTs
@enduml

@startuml
!define RECTANGLE rectangle
!define DATABASE database
!define COMPONENT component
!define INTERFACE interface

title EasyLaTex System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle

' Browser Client
RECTANGLE "Browser Client" as BrowserClient {
    [User Interface] as UI
}

' Frontend Layer
RECTANGLE "Frontend Layer" as Frontend {
    [Web Application] as WebApp
}

' Backend Layer
RECTANGLE "Backend Layer" as Backend {
    [API Gateway] as APIGateway
    [Authentication Service] as AuthService
    [User Management] as UserManager
    [Project Management] as ProjectManager
    [File Processing Service] as FileProcessor
    [AI Recognition Engine] as AIEngine
    [Rendering Engine] as Renderer
    [Collaboration Service] as Collaboration
    [Version Control] as VersionControl
    [Export Service] as ExportService
}

' Data Layer
RECTANGLE "Data Layer" as DataLayer {
    DATABASE "Relational Database" as DB
    [File Storage] as FileStorage
}

' External Systems
RECTANGLE "External Systems" as External {
    [LaTeX Engine] as LaTeXEngine
    [OCR/AI Models] as AIModels
}

' Connections
BrowserClient --> Frontend : HTTP/WebSocket
Frontend --> Backend : REST API
APIGateway --> AuthService
APIGateway --> UserManager
APIGateway --> ProjectManager
APIGateway --> FileProcessor
APIGateway --> AIEngine
APIGateway --> Renderer
APIGateway --> Collaboration
APIGateway --> VersionControl
APIGateway --> ExportService

AuthService --> DB
UserManager --> DB
ProjectManager --> DB
FileProcessor --> FileStorage
FileProcessor --> AIEngine
AIEngine --> AIModels
Renderer --> LaTeXEngine
Collaboration --> DB
VersionControl --> DB
ExportService --> FileStorage

DB --> DataLayer
FileStorage --> DataLayer

LaTeXEngine --> External
AIModels --> External

note right of Backend
    Microservices Architecture
    Separation of Concerns
end note

note bottom of DataLayer
    Persistent Storage
    Encrypted Data
end note

note top of External
    Third-party Dependencies
    AI & LaTeX Processing
end note

@enduml

@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class
!define DATABASE rectangle
!define COMPONENT rectangle

skinparam componentStyle rectangle

title POCD System Architecture

' Layers
package "Frontend Layer" {
  [Web Browser] as frontend
}

package "Backend Layer" {
  package "API Gateway" {
    [REST API] as api
  }

  package "Business Logic Layer" {
    [Account Management] as account
    [File Management] as filemgr
    [Detection Engine] as detection
    [Matching Engine] as matching
    [Repair Engine] as repair
    [Configuration Service] as config
    [Report Generator] as report
    [History Service] as history
    [Help Service] as help
  }

  package "Data Access Layer" {
    [User Repository] as userrepo
    [File Repository] as filerepo
    [Detection Repository] as detectrepo
    [Configuration Repository] as configrepo
    [Report Repository] as reportrepo
    [History Repository] as historyrepo
    [Help Repository] as helprepo
  }

  package "External Systems" {
    [StarUML Parser] as mdjparser
    [MySQL Connector] as mysqlconn
    [JDBC Driver] as jdbc
  }
}

package "Data Storage" {
  DATABASE "User Database" as userdb
  DATABASE "File Storage" as filestore
  DATABASE "Configuration Storage" as configstore
  DATABASE "Detection Results" as detectstore
  DATABASE "Reports Storage" as reportstore
  DATABASE "History Storage" as historystore
  DATABASE "Help Documents" as helpstore
  DATABASE "MySQL Database" as mysqldb
}

' Connections
frontend --> api : HTTP/HTTPS

api --> account
api --> filemgr
api --> detection
api --> matching
api --> repair
api --> config
api --> report
api --> history
api --> help

account --> userrepo
filemgr --> filerepo
detection --> detectrepo
matching --> detectrepo
repair --> detectrepo
config --> configrepo
report --> reportrepo
history --> historyrepo
help --> helprepo

userrepo --> userdb
filerepo --> filestore
detectrepo --> detectstore
configrepo --> configstore
reportrepo --> reportstore
historyrepo --> historystore
helprepo --> helpstore

' External system connections
filemgr --> mdjparser : Parse .mdj files
detection --> mysqlconn : Database analysis
mysqlconn --> jdbc
jdbc --> mysqldb

' Data flows
mdjparser --> filerepo : JSON Model
mysqlconn --> detectrepo : DB Schema

detectrepo --> matching : Models
matching --> detection : Matches
detection --> repair : Inconsistencies
repair --> report : Repair Results

samples.title: mytorch / direct/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam component {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #333333
    FontColor #000000
    ArrowColor #333333
}
title MyTorch System Architecture

package "User Layer" {
    [Deep Learning Beginner] as User
    [Developer / Team Member] as Developer
    [Project Stakeholder] as Stakeholder
}

package "Presentation Layer" {
    component "Frontend UI" as Frontend {
        [Main Interface]
        [Configuration Interface]
        [Training Interface]
        [Inference Interface]
        [Guidance & Help]
    }
}

package "Application Layer" {
    component "Backend Service" as Backend {
        [Model Initialization API]
        [Model Training API]
        [Task Inference API]
        [Model Management API]
    }
}

package "Framework Layer" {
    component "MyTorch/NNE Framework" as MyTorch {
        [Framework Core]
        [GPU Acceleration Module]
        [Weight Initialization Module]
        [Classic Models Module]
        [Preset Datasets Module]
    }
}

package "Data Layer" {
    component "SQLite Database" as Database {
        [Models Storage]
        [Datasets Metadata]
        [Training Logs]
        [Inference Logs]
        [Backup & Recovery]
    }
    component "Local File System" as Filesystem {
        [Model Files]
        [Dataset Files]
        [Backup Files]
    }
}

' User interactions
User --> Frontend : Uses visual interfaces
Developer --> MyTorch : Extends framework
Stakeholder --> Backend : Monitors progress

' Frontend to Backend communication
Frontend --> Backend : HTTP/REST API Calls
Frontend <--> Backend : Real-time feedback & visualization

' Backend to Framework integration
Backend --> MyTorch : Calls deep learning functions
Backend --> MyTorch : GPU acceleration requests
Backend --> MyTorch : Model training/inference

' Framework internal components
[GPU Acceleration Module] --> [Framework Core] : Enhanced operations
[Weight Initialization Module] --> [Framework Core] : Initialization methods
[Classic Models Module] --> [Framework Core] : Model definitions
[Preset Datasets Module] --> [Framework Core] : Data loading

' Data persistence
Backend --> Database : CRUD operations
Backend --> Filesystem : File I/O operations
Database --> Filesystem : Backup storage
Filesystem --> Database : Recovery operations

' Framework data flow
MyTorch --> Filesystem : Loads/Saves models
MyTorch --> Filesystem : Loads datasets
[GPU Acceleration Module] --> [GPU Hardware] : Computation offload

note right of MyTorch
    Framework Extensions:
    - GPU acceleration APIs
    - Weight initialization (He, Xavier, etc.)
    - Classic models (ResNet, VGG, Transformer)
    - Preset datasets (CIFAR, ImageNet, etc.)
end note

note right of Database
    Persistence Scope:
    - Model configurations
    - Training tasks & results
    - Inference logs
    - Performance metrics
    - Error records
end note

note right of Backend
    Service Interfaces:
    - Model initialization
    - Training execution
    - Inference processing
    - Model management
    - Resource monitoring
end note

@enduml

samples.title: s000050_275af3e0 / metagpt-custom/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml

package "Host Control Layer" {
    component "hAFL2 Controller" as hAFL2_Controller
    component "Launch Scripts" as LaunchScripts
    component "pytest Integration" as pytest_Integration
    component "Linux Host System" as LinuxHost
    component "initrd Builder" as initrd_Builder
}

package "Guest Execution Layer" {
    node "Linux Guest VM" {
        component "Embedded Forkserver" as EmbeddedForkserver
        component "initrd" as initrd
    }
    
    node "Child Partition VM" {
        component "Child Partition Harness" as ChildHarness
        component "harness-driver" as harness_driver
        component "packet_sender.exe" as PacketSender
        component "loader.exe" as Loader
        component "Windows Offset Config" as WindowsOffsetConfig
    }
    
    node "Root Partition VM" {
        component "Crash-Monitoring Workflow" as CrashMonitor
    }
}

package "Communication Layer" {
    component "Hypercall/IOCTL Translation" as HypercallIOCTL
    component "VMBus/netvsc Channel" as VMBus_Channel
    database "Hyper-V Virtual Switch" as VMSwitch
}

' Key Dependencies
LinuxHost --> initrd_Builder : "provides shared libraries"
initrd_Builder --> initrd : "packages into"
LaunchScripts --> initrd_Builder : "orchestrates"
pytest_Integration --> hAFL2_Controller : "executes tests via"

' Communication Paths
hAFL2_Controller --> HypercallIOCTL : "orchestrates"
HypercallIOCTL --> EmbeddedForkserver : "translates for Linux"
HypercallIOCTL --> ChildHarness : "translates for Windows"
ChildHarness --> harness_driver : "controls"
harness_driver --> PacketSender : "triggers IOCTL"
PacketSender --> VMBus_Channel : "sends payloads via"
VMBus_Channel --> VMSwitch : "communicates through"
VMSwitch --> CrashMonitor : "triggers monitoring"
CrashMonitor --> hAFL2_Controller : "reports crash results"

' Internal Dependencies
Loader --> PacketSender : "creates snapshot & executes"
WindowsOffsetConfig --> ChildHarness : "configures"
WindowsOffsetConfig --> PacketSender : "configures"
WindowsOffsetConfig --> Loader : "configures"

@enduml
