samples.title: asp / openhands/claude-sonnet-4-6
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title Requirements Review Checklist Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam defaultFontName Arial

package "External Inputs & Consumers" {
  [Reviewer] as reviewer <<User>>
  [Requirements Owner] as owner <<Stakeholder>>
  [Project Stakeholder] as stakeholder <<Stakeholder>>
  [Requirements Document\n(under review)] as reqdoc <<Artifact>>
  [Standards & Specifications\n(industry/product/business/documentation)] as standards <<Reference>>
}

package "Review Checklist Artifact (Markdown)" as artifact {
  [Review Goals & Basis] as goals
  [Completeness Check] as completeness
  [Exceptions & Auxiliary Functions Check] as exceptions
  [Understandability Check] as understandability
  [Model Quality Check] as modelquality
  [Extension & Improvement Check] as improvement
  [Problem Report] as problemreport
  [Scoring (4x10 + Total 40)] as scoring
  [Reviewer & Date Metadata] as metadata
}

database "Markdown Storage\n(review checklist file)" as storage

' Inputs to the review artifact
reqdoc --> artifact : "Content for inspection"
standards --> goals : "Review basis (FR-001, FR-002)"
standards --> modelquality : "Conformance basis"
standards --> understandability : "Documentation norms"

' Reviewer interactions with checklist dimensions
reviewer --> goals : "Define objective & method\nFR-001"
reviewer --> completeness : "Check core/basic functions & user needs\nFR-003"
reviewer --> exceptions : "Check special cases & auxiliary functions\nFR-004"
reviewer --> understandability : "Clarity, specificity, detail, refinement\nFR-005"
reviewer --> modelquality : "Conformance, reasonableness, rigor, accuracy\nFR-006"
reviewer --> improvement : "Extension & improvement goals\nFR-007"
reviewer --> problemreport : "Record problems & suggestions\nFR-008"
reviewer --> scoring : "Enter 4x10 and total\nFR-009"
reviewer --> metadata : "Reviewer identity & review date\nFR-010"

' Persist the artifact
artifact --> storage : "Persist checklist, scores, metadata, problem report"

' Outputs to consumers
problemreport --> owner : "Findings & improvement suggestions"
problemreport --> stakeholder : "Overall evaluation"
scoring --> stakeholder : "Quantitative review summary"

' Constraints and NFR notes
note right of artifact
C-001: Use review/verification methods
C-004: Business requirements are out of scope
end note

note right of scoring

@startuml
' --- Configuration ---
top to bottom direction
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam componentStyle uml2

' --- Styling ---
skinparam rectangle<<ClientLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #f9f
    BorderColor #333
}
skinparam rectangle<<NetworkLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #b2ebf2
    BorderColor #00838f
}
skinparam rectangle<<ServiceLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #c8e6c9
    BorderColor #2e7d32
}
skinparam database<<StorageLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #fff9c4
    BorderColor #fbc02d
}

' --- Layer 1: Frontend / Client Layer ---
rectangle "Client Layer" <<ClientLayer>> {
    component [Client Terminal] as Client
    component [Cloud DNS] as DNS
}

' --- Layer 2: Network / Gateway Layer ---
rectangle "Network / Gateway Layer" <<NetworkLayer>> {
    rectangle "Machine 01" {
        component [LVS - Linux Virtual Server] as LVS01
        component [Nginx] as Nginx01
    }
    rectangle "Machine 02" {
        component [LVS - Linux Virtual Server] as LVS02
        component [Nginx] as Nginx02_A
        component [Nginx] as Nginx02_B
    }
    rectangle "Machine 03" {
        component [LVS - Linux Virtual Server] as LVS03
        component [Nginx] as Nginx03
    }
}

' --- Layer 3: Service / Backend Layer ---
rectangle "Service / Backend Layer" <<ServiceLayer>> {
    component [Django Service Clusters] as Django
    component [Socializing Service] as Social
    component [User Information Service] as UserInfo
    component [Literature Service] as Literature
    component [Back-office Management] as BackOffice
}

' --- Layer 4: Storage / Database Layer ---
rectangle "Storage / Database Layer" <<StorageLayer>> {
    database "Redis Cache" as Redis
    database "Elasticsearch" as ES
    database "MySQL Database" as MySQL
}

' --- Connection Relationships ---
Client --> DNS
Client --> LVS01
Client --> LVS02
Client --> LVS03

LVS01 --> Nginx01
LVS02 --> Nginx02_A
LVS02 --> Nginx02_B
LVS03 --> Nginx03

Nginx01 --> Django
Nginx02_A --> Django
Nginx02_B --> Django
Nginx03 --> Django

Django --> Social
Django --> UserInfo
Django --> Literature
Django --> BackOffice

Social --> Redis
Social --> ES
Social --> MySQL

UserInfo --> Redis
UserInfo --> ES
UserInfo --> MySQL

Literature --> Redis
Literature --> ES
Literature --> MySQL

BackOffice --> Redis
BackOffice --> ES
BackOffice --> MySQL

@enduml

@startuml
title Song Mood Storage and Retrieval System - Architecture Diagram

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor<<container>> LightBlue
  BackgroundColor<<external>> LightYellow
  BackgroundColor<<datastore>> LightGreen
  BackgroundColor<<ui>> LightCyan
}

actor "End User" as User
actor "Data Inspector / Operator" as Inspector

rectangle "Web Browser" as Browser {
  component "React Frontend\n(Container: frontend)" <<container>> as Frontend
}

rectangle "Docker Application Stack" {
  component "FastAPI Backend\n(Container: backend)" <<container>> as Backend

  database "Elasticsearch\n(Container: elasticsearch)" <<datastore>> as Elasticsearch

  component "Kibana\n(Container: kibana)" <<container>> as Kibana
}

rectangle "External Services" {
  component "Genius API" <<external>> as GeniusAPI
}

User --> Browser : HTTP / Browser
Inspector --> Kibana : Data Inspection UI

Frontend --> Backend : REST API\n(Song Lookup Requests)

Backend --> Elasticsearch : Song Lookup &\nMood Retrieval (known songs)
Backend --> Elasticsearch : Store Song-Mood\nAssociations
Backend --> GeniusAPI : Search Missing Songs\n(not in Elasticsearch)

Kibana --> Elasticsearch : Data Inspection\n(Read Elasticsearch Data)

note right of Backend
  - Accepts song lookup requests
  - Checks Elasticsearch for known songs
  - Calls Genius API for missing songs
  - Stores song-mood associations
end note

note right of Elasticsearch
  Stores:
  - Song records (name, SLink, lyrics, language)
  - Artist metadata (name, genres, song count)
  - Mood associations
end note

note bottom of GeniusAPI
  External dependency.
  Not an internal container service.
end note

samples.title: s000062_ee8cb840 / metagpt-custom/qwen3-coder-480b-a35b-instruct
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title Self-Driving Car System Architecture - Component/Deployment Diagram

' === Deployment Nodes ===
node "Udacity Capstone Simulator" as simulator
node "Docker Container Environment" as docker {
    node "ROS Environment" as ros {
        package "Perception Layer" as perception {
            component "TrafficLightDetector" as tld
        }

        package "Planning Layer" as planning {
            component "WaypointLoader" as wpl
            component "WaypointUpdater" as wpu
        }

        package "Control Layer" as control {
            component "WaypointFollower" as wpf
            component "DBWController" as dbw
        }

        component "StyxLaunch" as styx_launch
        component "SiteLaunch" as site_launch
    }
}

database "RecordedTrainingBagPlayback" as bagplayback

' === ROS Core ===
folder "ROS Core" {
    [roscore] as roscore
}

' === Topics ===
artifact "/current_pose" as current_pose_topic
artifact "/vehicle/commands" as vehicle_commands_topic
artifact "/base_waypoints" as base_waypoints_topic
artifact "/final_waypoints" as final_waypoints_topic
artifact "/traffic_waypoint" as traffic_waypoint_topic
artifact "/image_color" as image_color_topic
artifact "/vehicle/dbw_enabled" as dbw_enabled_topic
artifact "/twist_cmd" as twist_cmd_topic

' === Connections ===
' Launch files
styx_launch --> tld : launch config
styx_launch --> wpl : launch config
styx_launch --> wpu : launch config
styx_launch --> wpf : launch config
styx_launch --> dbw : launch config

site_launch --> tld : launch config
site_launch --> wpl : launch config
site_launch --> wpu : launch config
site_launch --> wpf : launch config
site_launch --> dbw : launch config

' Perception to Planning
tld --> traffic_waypoint_topic : publish
traffic_waypoint_topic --> wpu : subscribe

' Planning internal connections
wpl --> base_waypoints_topic : publish
base_waypoints_topic --> wpu : subscribe
base_waypoints_topic --> wpf : subscribe

wpu --> final_waypoints_topic : publish
final_waypoints_topic --> wpf : subscribe

' Control layer connections
wpf --> twist_cmd_topic : publish
twist_cmd_topic --> dbw : subscribe

dbw --> vehicle_commands_topic : publish
vehicle_commands_topic --> wpf : subscribe

' Pose feedback
wpf --> current_pose_topic : publish
current_pose_topic --> wpu : subscribe
current_pose_topic --> wpf : subscribe

' Simulator connections via topics
simulator --> image_color_topic : publish
image_color_topic --> tld : subscribe

simulator --> dbw_enabled_topic : publish
dbw_enabled_topic --> dbw : subscribe

' ROS core connections
ros --> roscore : uses

' Data playback
bagplayback --> image_color_topic : publish

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
left to right direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #2F3A45
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5
skinparam package {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor #D9ECFF
    BorderColor #34495E
    BorderThickness 1
}

package "Udacity Self-Driving Car Capstone\nROS Architecture" as CapstoneSystem {
    rectangle "Car / Simulator" as CarSimulator

    package "Perception" as Perception {
        rectangle "Obstacle Detection\nROS Node" as ObstacleDetection
        rectangle "Traffic Light\nDetection Node" as TrafficLightDetection
    }

    package "Planning" as Planning {
        rectangle "Waypoint Loader\nROS Node" as WaypointLoader
        rectangle "Waypoint Updater Node\nROS Node" as WaypointUpdater
    }

    package "Control" as Control {
        rectangle "DBW Node\nDrive-by-wire" as DbwNode
        rectangle "Waypoint Follower\nController" as WaypointFollower
    }
}

CarSimulator --> ObstacleDetection : /image_color
CarSimulator --> TrafficLightDetection : /image_color
CarSimulator --> ObstacleDetection : /current_pose
CarSimulator --> TrafficLightDetection : /current_pose
CarSimulator --> WaypointUpdater : /current_pose
CarSimulator --> DbwNode : /current_velocity
CarSimulator --> DbwNode : /vehicle/dbw_enabled

WaypointLoader --> ObstacleDetection : /base_waypoints
WaypointLoader --> TrafficLightDetection : /base_waypoints
WaypointLoader --> WaypointUpdater : /base_waypoints

ObstacleDetection --> WaypointUpdater : /obstacle_waypoint
TrafficLightDetection --> WaypointUpdater : /traffic_waypoint

WaypointUpdater --> WaypointFollower : /final_waypoints
WaypointFollower --> DbwNode : /twist_cmd
DbwNode --> CarSimulator : /vehicle/throttle_cmd
DbwNode --> CarSimulator : /vehicle/brake_cmd
DbwNode --> CarSimulator : /vehicle/steering_cmd
@enduml

samples.title: asp / openhands/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title Requirements Review Checklist Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle

actor "Reviewer" as Reviewer
actor "Requirements Owner" as ReqOwner
actor "Project Stakeholder" as Stakeholder

package "Input Evidence" {
  file "Requirements Document (under review)" as SRS
  folder "Standards & Specifications\n(Industry/Product/Business/Documentation)" as Standards
}

package "Review Artifact (Markdown Checklist)" as ChecklistPkg {
  component "Review Purpose & Basis" as Purpose
  component "Completeness Check\n(Core/Basic Functions, User Needs)" as Completeness
  component "Exception & Auxiliary\nCoverage Check" as ExceptionCoverage
  component "Understandability Check\n(Clarity, Specificity, Detail, Refinement)" as Understandability
  component "Model Accuracy Check\n(Conformance, Reasonableness, Rigor, Accuracy)" as ModelAccuracy
  component "Extension/Improvement Check\n(Goals, Feasibility, Concreteness, Demonstrability)" as ExtImprove
  component "Problem Report" as ProblemReport
  component "Scoring\n(4x10 + Total=40)" as Scoring
  component "Reviewer & Date Metadata" as Metadata
}

storage "Review Archive" as Archive

' Relationships
Reviewer --> Purpose : define objectives,\nreview & verification method
Reviewer --> Completeness : inspect
Reviewer --> ExceptionCoverage : inspect
Reviewer --> Understandability : inspect
Reviewer --> ModelAccuracy : inspect
Reviewer --> ExtImprove : inspect
Reviewer --> ProblemReport : record issues,\nevaluation, suggestions
Reviewer --> Scoring : enter scores
Reviewer --> Metadata : sign-off

Purpose ..> Standards : references
Completeness ..> SRS : inspects
ExceptionCoverage ..> SRS : inspects
Understandability ..> SRS : inspects
ModelAccuracy ..> SRS : inspects
ExtImprove ..> SRS : inspects

ChecklistPkg --> ProblemReport
ChecklistPkg --> Scoring
ChecklistPkg --> Metadata

ProblemReport --> ReqOwner : deliver findings
ProblemReport --> Stakeholder : communicate status
Scoring --> Stakeholder : communicate summary

ProblemReport --> Archive : store
Scoring --> Archive : store
Metadata --> Archive : store

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' --- Configuration ---
top to bottom direction
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam componentStyle uml2

' --- Styling ---
skinparam rectangle<<ClientLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #f9f
    BorderColor #333
}
skinparam rectangle<<NetworkLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #b2ebf2
    BorderColor #00838f
}
skinparam rectangle<<ServiceLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #c8e6c9
    BorderColor #2e7d32
}
skinparam database<<StorageLayer>> {
    BackgroundColor #fff9c4
    BorderColor #fbc02d
}

' --- Layer 1: Frontend / Client Layer ---
rectangle "Client Layer" <<ClientLayer>> {
    component [Client Terminal] as Client
    component [Cloud DNS] as DNS
}

' --- Layer 2: Network / Gateway Layer ---
rectangle "Network / Gateway Layer" <<NetworkLayer>> {
    rectangle "Machine 01" {
        component [LVS - Linux Virtual Server] as LVS01
        component [Nginx] as Nginx01
    }
    rectangle "Machine 02" {
        component [LVS - Linux Virtual Server] as LVS02
        component [Nginx] as Nginx02_A
        component [Nginx] as Nginx02_B
    }
    rectangle "Machine 03" {
        component [LVS - Linux Virtual Server] as LVS03
        component [Nginx] as Nginx03
    }
}

' --- Layer 3: Service / Backend Layer ---
rectangle "Service / Backend Layer" <<ServiceLayer>> {
    component [Django Service Clusters] as Django
    component [Socializing Service] as Social
    component [User Information Service] as UserInfo
    component [Literature Service] as Literature
    component [Back-office Management] as BackOffice
}

' --- Layer 4: Storage / Database Layer ---
rectangle "Storage / Database Layer" <<StorageLayer>> {
    database "Redis Cache" as Redis
    database "Elasticsearch" as ES
    database "MySQL Database" as MySQL
}

' --- Connection Relationships ---
Client --> DNS
Client --> LVS01
Client --> LVS02
Client --> LVS03

LVS01 --> Nginx01
LVS02 --> Nginx02_A
LVS02 --> Nginx02_B
LVS03 --> Nginx03

Nginx01 --> Django
Nginx02_A --> Django
Nginx02_B --> Django
Nginx03 --> Django

Django --> Social
Django --> UserInfo
Django --> Literature
Django --> BackOffice

Social --> Redis
Social --> ES
Social --> MySQL

UserInfo --> Redis
UserInfo --> ES
UserInfo --> MySQL

Literature --> Redis
Literature --> ES
Literature --> MySQL

BackOffice --> Redis
BackOffice --> ES
BackOffice --> MySQL

@enduml

samples.title: eivas / direct/gpt-5
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title EIVAS System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor<<boundary>> #F9F9F9
  BorderColor<<boundary>> #999999
}
left to right direction

actor "Epidemiological Form Filler" as Filler
actor "Epidemiological Analyst" as Analyst

node "User Device (Browser)" as Browser {
  component "EIVAS Web UI" as WebUI <<boundary>> {
    component "Reporting Form UI\n(FR-001, FR-004)" as UIReport
    component "Case List UI\n(FR-005..FR-008)" as UICaseList
    component "Map Viewer & Path UI\n(FR-003, FR-009, FR-014)" as UIMap
    component "Association Graph UI\n(FR-010, FR-011)" as UIGraph
    component "Dashboard & Charts UI\n(FR-012..FR-018)" as UIDash
  }
}

node "Edge" as Edge {
  component "Web Server / CDN\n(Static assets delivery)" as CDN
  component "API Gateway\n- HTTPS/TLS enforced (NFR-004)\n- IP Cooldown / Rate Limiting (NFR-005)" as APIGW
}

node "Primary App Server" as AppPrimary {
  component "EIVAS Application" as App {
    component "Reporting Service\n(FR-001, FR-004)" as Reporting
    component "Case Management Service\n(FR-005..FR-008)" as CaseMgmt
    component "Itinerary & Association Service\n(FR-009..FR-011)" as Assoc
    component "Overall Analysis Service\n(FR-012..FR-018)" as Analysis
    component "Data Quality Checker\n(DR-008)" as DQ
  }
}

node "Backup App Server (Standby)" as AppBackup {
  component "EIVAS Application (Standby)\n(Failover target, NFR-003)" as AppStandby
}

database "Back-end Database\n(Cases, Itineraries, Associations,\nAnalytical Data)" as DB
cloud "Algorithm Module\n- Risk calculation\n- Clustering\n(FR-012, FR-013)" as Algo
cloud "Map/Geocoding Service\n(AD-003; FR-003, FR-009, FR-014)" as MapSvc
cloud "Climate/Env Data Source (TBD)\n(Temperature/Humidity for FR-015)" as Climate
cloud "Identity Provider (TBD)\n(AD-004)" as IdP

' Users to Web UI
Filler --> UIReport : Enter/submit investigation info\n(FR-001)
Filler --> UIMap : Address confirmation\n(FR-003)
Analyst --> UICaseList : Query/manage cases\n(FR-005..FR-008)
Analyst --> UIMap : View itineraries / heat maps\n(FR-009, FR-014)
Analyst --> UIGraph : Associations / relationships\n(FR-010, FR-011)
Analyst --> UIDash : Overall analysis & charts\n(FR-012..FR-018)

' Static assets path
CDN -down- WebUI : Deliver UI static assets

' API calls (encrypted)
UIReport --> APIGW : HTTPS API calls\n(PII queries encrypted, NFR-004)
UICaseList --> APIGW : HTTPS API calls
UIMap --> APIGW : HTTPS API calls
UIGraph --> APIGW : HTTPS API calls
UIDash --> APIGW : HTTPS API calls

' Gateway to application
APIGW --> App : Route API requests

' Failover path
APIGW ..> AppStandby : Failover within 20 minutes\n(NFR-003)

' Front-end direct map integration
UIMap --> MapSvc : Map tiles / visualization\n(AD-003, FR-003, FR-009, FR-014)

' Optional identity (TBD)
WebUI .. IdP : Authentication (unspecified)\n(AD-004)

' Application internal responsibilities
Reporting --> DB : Store / update case investigation data\n(FR-001, FR-004; DR-001..DR-004)
CaseMgmt --> DB : Read list & details\n(FR-005..FR-008; DR-005)
Assoc --> DB : Query itineraries & associations\n(FR-009..FR-011; DR-003, DR-006)
Analysis --> DB : Retrieve investigation data\n(FR-012..FR-018; DR-007, DR-008)
DQ --> DB : Check data completeness/quality\n(DR-008)

' Application to external services
Assoc --> MapSvc : Geocoding / candidate addresses\n(FR-003)
Analysis --> Algo : Risk calc, clustering\n(FR-012, FR-013)
Analysis --> MapSvc : Base maps / overlays\n(FR-012, FR-014)
Analysis --> Climate : Temp/Humidity series (TBD)\n(FR-015)

' Non-functional annotations
note right of APIGW
- Enforce HTTPS/TLS for all API calls
- Encrypt personal information queries (NFR-004)
- IP cooldown / rate limiting (NFR-005)
end note

note bottom of AppPrimary
Performance (NFR-002):
- Support >=100 concurrent submissions
- Page response < 1s under load
end note

note right of AppBackup
High Availability (NFR-003):
- Standby instance
- Switch within 20 minutes on failure
end note

note right of DB
Data Objects (Section 6):
- Basic case information (DR-001)
- Disease-related information (DR-002)
- Itinerary trajectory (DR-003)
- Imported-case information (DR-004)
- Case management record (DR-005)
- Associated case entry (DR-006)
- Analytical chart data (DR-007)
- Data quality state (DR-008)
end note

@enduml

@startuml
!include <C4/C4_Container>

LAYOUT_WITH_LEGEND()

title EasyLaTeX System - Container Diagram

System_Boundary(easy, "EasyLaTeX System") {

    Container(web_app, "Web Application", "React/Angular", "Provides the user interface and handles client-side logic")
    
    Container(api_gateway, "API Gateway", "Node.js/Java", "Routes HTTP requests, manages API endpoints")
    
    Container(user_service, "User Service", "Node.js/Java", "Handles user registration, authentication, and profile management")
    
    Container(project_service, "Project Service", "Node.js/Java", "Manages projects, groups, and user permissions")
    
    Container(version_service, "Version Service", "Node.js/Java", "Manages document versioning, branching, and restoration")
    
    Container(comment_service, "Comment Service", "Node.js/Java", "Manages annotations and comments on document versions")
    
    Container(collaboration_service, "Collaboration Service", "Node.js/Java", "Handles real-time editing and synchronization via WebSockets")
    
    Container(file_service, "File Service", "Node.js/Java", "Manages uploads, storage, and retrieval of files and artifacts")
    
    Container(ai_recognition_service, "AI Recognition Service", "Python/TensorFlow", "Performs OCR and deep learning for formula/table extraction")
    
    Container(latex_service, "LaTeX Service", "Node.js/Java", "Generates LaTeX code and manages compilation")
    
    Container(preview_service, "Preview Service", "Node.js/Java", "Generates real-time previews of LaTeX documents")
    
    Container(export_service, "Export Service", "Node.js/Java", "Handles export to PDF, LaTeX source, PNG, and JPEG formats")
    
    Container(validation_service, "Validation Service", "Node.js/Java", "Performs input validation and security checks")
    
    ContainerDb(database, "Database", "MySQL/PostgreSQL", "Stores user data, projects, versions, comments, and metadata")
    
    Container(file_storage, "File Storage", "Object Storage", "Stores uploaded files and generated artifacts (PDFs, images)")
}

System_Ext(user_browser, "Web Browser", "Chrome/Firefox/Safari/Edge", "The user's web browser")
System_Ext(latex_engine, "LaTeX Engine", "TeX Live/MiKTeX", "External LaTeX compilation engine")

Rel(user_browser, web_app, "Uses", "HTTPS, WebSocket")
Rel(web_app, api_gateway, "Makes API calls to", "HTTPS")

Rel(api_gateway, user_service, "Routes requests to", "HTTP")
Rel(api_gateway, project_service, "Routes requests to", "HTTP")
Rel(api_gateway, version_service, "Routes requests to", "HTTP")
Rel(api_gateway, comment_service, "Routes requests to", "HTTP")
Rel(api_gateway, collaboration_service, "Routes requests to", "HTTP, WebSocket")
Rel(api_gateway, file_service, "Routes requests to", "HTTP")
Rel(api_gateway, validation_service, "Routes requests to", "HTTP")

Rel(user_service, database, "Reads/writes user data", "SQL")
Rel(project_service, database, "Reads/writes project data", "SQL")
Rel(version_service, database, "Reads/writes version data", "SQL")
Rel(comment_service, database, "Reads/writes comment data", "SQL")
Rel(collaboration_service, database, "Reads/writes collaboration state", "SQL")

Rel(file_service, file_storage, "Stores/retrieves files", "API")
Rel(file_service, database, "Reads/writes file metadata", "SQL")

Rel(file_service, ai_recognition_service, "Sends files for recognition", "HTTP")
Rel(ai_recognition_service, database, "Stores recognition results", "SQL")

Rel(file_service, latex_service, "Sends content for LaTeX generation", "HTTP")
Rel(latex_service, latex_engine, "Compiles LaTeX", "Subprocess/API")
Rel(latex_service, database, "Stores generated LaTeX code", "SQL")
Rel(latex_service, file_storage, "Stores compilation outputs", "API")

Rel(latex_service, preview_service, "Provides LaTeX for preview", "HTTP")
Rel(preview_service, web_app, "Sends real-time preview updates", "WebSocket")

Rel(latex_service, export_service, "Provides content for export", "HTTP")
Rel(export_service, file_storage, "Stores exported files", "API")
Rel(export_service, web_app, "Provides export download links", "HTTP")

Rel(validation_service, user_service, "Validates auth requests", "HTTP")
Rel(validation_service, project_service, "Validates project requests", "HTTP")
Rel(validation_service, version_service, "Validates version requests", "HTTP")
Rel(validation_service, file_service, "Validates file requests", "HTTP")

Rel(project_service, version_service, "Coordinates version operations", "HTTP")
Rel(project_service, collaboration_service, "Manages collaborative sessions", "HTTP")
Rel(version_service, comment_service, "Manages version comments", "HTTP")

@enduml

@startuml
title LabHire - Research Internship Platform Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle

actor StudentUser as SU
actor MentorUser as MU
actor EnterpriseCertStudent as ES
actor Administrator as AD

package Presentation {
  [Web Browser Client] as WebClient
  [Mobile Client] as MobileClient
}

package GatewayLayer {
  [API Gateway] as GW
  [Auth and Encryption Module] as AUTH
  [Rate Limiter and Risk Control] as RC
}

package AppServicesLayer {
  [User Identity Service] as UIS
  [Project Service] as PS
  [Application and Evaluation Service] as AES
  [Community Service] as CS
  [Notification Service] as NS
  [Admin Review Service] as ARS
  [Resume and Profile Service] as RPS
  [Recommendation Engine] as RE
  [Audit and Logging Service] as ALS
}

package DataLayer {
  database MainDatabase as DB
  database FileStorage as FS
  database AuditLogStore as LS
  database CacheStore as CACHE
}

package ExternalServices {
  [Campus Email Service] as CEMAIL
  [Enterprise Email Service] as EEMAIL
  [Verification Code Provider] as VCP
  [Push Notification Service] as PUSH
}

SU --> WebClient
SU --> MobileClient
MU --> WebClient
MU --> MobileClient
ES --> WebClient
ES --> MobileClient
AD --> WebClient

WebClient --> GW
MobileClient --> GW

GW --> AUTH
GW --> RC
GW --> UIS
GW --> PS
GW --> AES
GW --> CS
GW --> NS
GW --> ARS
GW --> RPS

AUTH --> UIS
RC --> ALS

UIS --> DB
UIS --> CEMAIL
UIS --> EEMAIL
UIS --> VCP

PS --> DB
PS --> RE
RE --> DB
RE --> CACHE

AES --> DB
AES --> NS

CS --> DB
CS --> ARS

NS --> DB
NS --> CEMAIL
NS --> PUSH

ARS --> DB

RPS --> DB
RPS --> FS

ALS --> LS

@enduml

samples.title: s000071_902634c0 / metagpt-custom/claude-sonnet-4-6
samples.pred_source:
@startuml ClearML_Agent_Architecture

skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam defaultFontSize 12

skinparam package {
  BorderColor #555555
  BackgroundColor #F0F4FF
  FontStyle bold
}

skinparam component {
  BorderColor #336699
  BackgroundColor #DDEEFF
  FontColor #003366
}

skinparam node {
  BorderColor #336699
  BackgroundColor #EEF6EE
  FontColor #003366
}

skinparam database {
  BorderColor #996633
  BackgroundColor #FFF5E0
}

skinparam cloud {
  BorderColor #996699
  BackgroundColor #F5EEF8
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' External Systems
' ─────────────────────────────────────────

cloud "ClearML Server / Backend" as ClearMLServer {
  component "Experiment Management\n& Entity Storage" as ExperimentMgmt
  component "ClearML Execution Queue" as ExecQueue
  component "Telemetry & Event\nEndpoints" as TelemetryEndpoints
}

node "Kubernetes Cluster" as K8sCluster {
  component "Kubernetes Jobs\n& Pods" as K8sJobs
}

node "Docker Daemon\n(via mapped socket)" as DockerDaemon {
  component "Sibling Docker\nContainers" as SiblingContainers
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' YAML Template Artifact (M-001)
' ─────────────────────────────────────────

artifact "K8s Job YAML\nTemplate" as YAMLTemplate

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' ClearML Agent Runtime
' ─────────────────────────────────────────

node "ClearML Agent Runtime" as AgentRuntime {

  ' ── Orchestration / Integration Layer ──
  package "Orchestration / Integration Layer" as OrchLayer {
    component "KubernetesGlue\n[Pulls jobs from queue;\nprepares K8s job manifests\nfrom YAML template]" as KubernetesGlue

    component "ServicePodManager\n[Long-lasting service pod;\nmanages sibling Docker\ncontainers via Docker socket]" as ServicePodManager
  }

  ' ── Execution Layer ──
  package "Execution Layer" as ExecLayer {
    component "ExperimentExecutor\n[Installs experiment env\ninside pod; starts and\nmonitors experiment process]" as ExperimentExecutor
  }

  ' ── Worker Telemetry Layer ──
  package "Worker Telemetry Layer" as TelemetryLayer {
    component "WorkerTelemetryReporter\n[Periodic worker status\nreports; default 2s interval]" as TelemetryReporter

    component "ConnectivityPinger\n[Periodic connectivity\npings; default 30s interval]" as ConnectivityPinger

    component "LoggingManager\n[stdout/stderr logging;\nlog_stdout default=true]" as LoggingManager

    component "MemoryReporter\n[Process/subprocess scope\n(default) OR entire-machine\nscope when report_global_mem_used\nis enabled]" as MemoryReporter
  }

  ' ── Backend Client Layer ──
  package "Backend Client Layer" as BackendLayer {
    component "BackendServiceClient\n[Session-based service actions:\ncreate, get, get_by_id,\nget_all / get_all_ex -> TableResponse;\nmaps to structured entities]" as BackendServiceClient

    component "EventsServiceInterface\n[v2.5 versioned request/response;\nmulti-task scalar metrics\nhistogram queries;\niter / iso_time / timestamp axes]" as EventsServiceInterface

    component "ModelsServiceInterface\n[v2.4 versioned request/response;\nmodel deletion (model, force);\nnullable model metadata objects]" as ModelsServiceInterface
  }

  ' ── Configuration Layer ──
  package "Configuration Layer" as ConfigLayer {
    component "WorkerConfiguration\n[report_period_sec,\nping_period_sec,\nlog_stdout,\nreport_global_mem_used]" as WorkerConfiguration
  }

}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' Notes
' ─────────────────────────────────────────

note bottom of ServicePodManager
  C-005: Docker-socket mapping is
  planned to be replaced by Podman
  in a future release.
end note

note right of MemoryReporter
  NFR-002: Scope switches between
  process/subprocess (default) and
  entire-machine when
  report_global_mem_used = true
end note

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' Internal Dependencies
' ─────────────────────────────────────────

' YAML Template -> KubernetesGlue (M-001)
YAMLTemplate        -down->  KubernetesGlue          : "provides K8s job\nmanifest template"

' Execution -> Telemetry
ExperimentExecutor  -right-> LoggingManager          : "routes stdout/stderr\nfrom experiment process"
ExperimentExecutor  -down->  MemoryReporter          : "reports process/subprocess\nmemory usage"

' Telemetry -> Backend (all routed via BackendServiceClient per D-004)
TelemetryReporter   -down->  BackendServiceClient    : "transmits periodic\nworker status reports"
ConnectivityPinger  -down->  BackendServiceClient    : "issues periodic\nconnectivity pings"
MemoryReporter      -down->  BackendServiceClient    : "transmits memory\nusage metrics"

' Telemetry -> Config
TelemetryReporter   -right-> WorkerConfiguration     : "reads report_period_sec\nand report_global_mem_used"
ConnectivityPinger  -right-> WorkerConfiguration     : "reads ping_period_sec"
LoggingManager      -right-> WorkerConfiguration     : "reads log_stdout"
MemoryReporter      -right-> WorkerConfiguration     : "reads report_global_mem_used\nto select reporting scope"

' Backend Client -> Service Interfaces
BackendServiceClient -down-> EventsServiceInterface  : "delegates events-domain\nhistogram queries"
BackendServiceClient -down-> ModelsServiceInterface  : "delegates models-domain\ndelete and metadata requests"

' ─────────────────────────────────────────
' External System Dependencies
' ─────────────────────────────────────────

' Queue consumption: ExecQueue feeds KubernetesGlue (D-003 fix)
ExecQueue           -down->  KubernetesGlue          : "delivers pending\nexperiment jobs"

' BackendServiceClient -> ClearML Server (single path for all backend comms, D-004 fix)
BackendServiceClient -up->  TelemetryEndpoints       : "all session-based\nservice API requests\n(telemetry, pings, status)"
BackendServiceClient -up->  ExperimentMgmt           : "entity CRUD\noperations"

' KubernetesGlue -> Kubernetes (D-001 fix: removed duplicate queue arrow; D-002 fix: removed direct Glue->Executor arrow)
KubernetesGlue      -right-> K8sJobs                : "creates K8s job\nmanifests from template"

' ServicePod -> Docker Daemon
ServicePodManager   -right-> SiblingContainers       : "manages sibling containers\nvia mapped Docker socket"

@enduml

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
left to right direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #34495E
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5
skinparam package {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam cloud {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam queue {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}

package "Data Scientist Environment" as DataScientistEnvironment {
    rectangle "Python ML / DL Code" as PythonCode
    rectangle "ClearML Snippet" as ClearmlSnippet
}

package "GPU / Kubernetes Workers\nOn Prem or Cloud" as GpuMachines {
    rectangle "ClearML Agent\nService Pod" as ClearmlAgent
    rectangle "Kubernetes Glue" as KubernetesGlue
    rectangle "YAML Job Template" as YamlTemplate
    rectangle "Kubernetes Job" as KubernetesJob
    rectangle "Pod Execution Environment\nand Docker User Code" as DockerExecution
    rectangle "Mapped Docker Socket\nSibling Containers" as DockerSocket
}

package "ClearML Server" as ClearmlServer {
    package "Experiment Manager" as ExperimentManager {
        rectangle "Versioning" as Versioning
        rectangle "Visualization" as Visualization
        rectangle "Collaboration" as Collaboration
        rectangle "Data Tracking" as DataTracking
    }

    package "ML Ops" as MlOps {
        queue "Execution Queue" as ExecutionQueue
        rectangle "Monitoring" as Monitoring
        rectangle "Orchestration" as Orchestration
    }

    rectangle "Backend Service API" as BackendApi
}

PythonCode --> ClearmlSnippet : instrument code
ClearmlSnippet --> BackendApi : HTTPS experiment metadata
BackendApi --> Versioning : store code and artifacts
BackendApi --> Visualization : metrics and plots
BackendApi --> Collaboration : shared experiment state
BackendApi --> DataTracking : data and model tracking

Orchestration --> ExecutionQueue : schedule jobs
ClearmlAgent --> ExecutionQueue : pull queued jobs
KubernetesGlue --> ExecutionQueue : pull queued jobs
KubernetesGlue --> YamlTemplate : apply template
KubernetesGlue --> KubernetesJob : prepare K8s job
KubernetesJob --> DockerExecution : start pod execution
ClearmlAgent --> DockerExecution : install env\nrun / monitor user code
ClearmlAgent --> DockerSocket : manage sibling containers
DockerSocket --> DockerExecution : Docker execution access
DockerExecution --> ClearmlAgent : stdout / stderr / status
ClearmlAgent --> BackendApi : status reports,\npings, telemetry
BackendApi --> Monitoring : worker telemetry
Monitoring --> Orchestration : runtime health
BackendApi --> Orchestration : job / control requests
@enduml

samples.pred_source:
@startuml
left to right direction

package "User Environment" {
  actor "Developer/Tester" as User
  actor "Integrator" as Integrator
  actor "Maintainer" as Maintainer
}

package "Build & Test Interface" {
  component "run-embedded-tests.sh" as RunScript
  component "autogen.sh" as Autogen
  component "configure" as Configure
  component "make" as Make
  database "hwloc Tarball" as Tarball
  folder "hwloc-tree/" as HwlocTree
}

package "Communication Subsystem" {
  component "Initialization/Termination" as InitTerm
  component "Progress Engine" as Progress
  component "Connection Manager" as ConnMgr
  component "One-to-Many Transfer" as ScatterTransfer
  component "Send State Machine" as SendSM
  component "Flow Control" as FlowCtrl
  component "Network Device" as NetDevice
  database "Network Send Descriptors" as SendDescs
}

package "Data Handling" {
  component "Direct Access Handler" as DirectAccess
  component "Packet Buffer Packer" as Packer
  database "Packet Buffer" as PktBuffer
  database "Pinned User Data" as UserData
  database "Data Descriptor (DD)" as DD
  database "Control Descriptor (OD)" as OD
}

package "Embedded Libfabric Verbs Provider" {
  component "Verbs Transport" as VerbsTransport
  interface "Linux Verbs API" as VerbsAPI
  component "librdmacm" as RdmaCm
  component "libibverbs" as IbVerbs
}

package "External Network Modules" {
  component "OFI/libfabric" as OFI
  component "UCX" as UCX
}

' User interactions
User --> RunScript : "invokes"
User --> Autogen : "executes"
Integrator --> VerbsTransport : "enables/builds"
Maintainer --> SendSM : "reviews"

' Build and test workflow
RunScript --> Tarball : "uses"
Tarball --> HwlocTree : "extracted & renamed"
HwlocTree --> Autogen
Autogen --> Configure
Configure --> Make

' Communication subsystem internal flow
InitTerm --> Progress
Progress --> ConnMgr
ConnMgr --> ScatterTransfer
SendSM --> FlowCtrl : "checks"
FlowCtrl --> SendSM : "flow status"
SendSM --> NetDevice : "posts sends"
SendSM --> SendDescs : "prepares"

' Send path data flow
SendSM --> DirectAccess : "if enabled"
DirectAccess --> UserData : "references"
SendSM --> Packer : "if no direct access"
Packer --> DD : "reads from"
Packer --> PktBuffer : "writes to"
Packer --> OD : "uses for control"
PktBuffer --> SendSM : "contains payload/control"
SendSM --> PktBuffer : "populates with\nenvelope, LIBA(OD), etc."

' External dependencies
VerbsTransport --> VerbsAPI : "uses"
VerbsAPI --> RdmaCm : "depends on"
VerbsAPI --> IbVerbs : "depends on"
VerbsTransport ..> OFI : "optional integration"
VerbsTransport ..> UCX : "optional integration"

' Constraints and notes
note top of RunScript
  Preferred entry point
  (Constraint C-002)
end note

note right of HwlocTree
  Manual workflow
  (Constraint C-001, C-003)
end note

note right of VerbsTransport
  Requires libibverbs >= 1.1.8
  Requires librdmacm >= 1.0.16
  (Constraint C-004, C-005)
end note

note left of SendSM
  Implements FR-005, FR-006,
  FR-007, FR-008
end note

note left of PktBuffer
  Carries control and
  packed payload (DR-001)
end note

@enduml

@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
top to bottom direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #34495E
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5
skinparam package {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}

rectangle "Applications\nHPC, AI, ML, Big Data" as Applications

package "Programming Models and Frameworks" as Frameworks {
    rectangle "MPI\nMPICH, Open-MPI" as MpiApps
    rectangle "PGAS / SHMEM\nOpenSHMEM, UPC, CAF, X10, Chapel" as PgasApps
    rectangle "Task Runtimes\nParsec, OCR, Legion" as TaskApps
    rectangle "AI / ML Frameworks\nTensorFlow, Burst Buffer" as MlApps
}

package "UCX" as Ucx {
    package "UCP Protocols\nHigh Level API" as Ucp {
        rectangle "Transport Selection" as TransportSelection
        rectangle "Cross-Transport Multi-Rail" as MultiRail
        rectangle "Fragmentation" as Fragmentation
        rectangle "Software Protocols" as SoftwareProtocols
        rectangle "Message Passing API\nTag Matching, Rendezvous" as MessagePassingDomain
        rectangle "PGAS API\nRMAs, Atomics" as PgasDomain
        rectangle "Task Based API\nActive Messages" as TaskDomain
        rectangle "I/O API\nStream" as IoDomain
    }

    package "UCT Hardware Transports\nLow Level API" as Uct {
        rectangle "RDMA Verbs Transport\nInfiniBand, ROCE, OPA" as RdmaTransport
        rectangle "RC" as Rc
        rectangle "UD" as Ud
        rectangle "DCT" as Dct
        rectangle "Gemini / Aries Transport\nGNI" as GniTransport
        rectangle "Intra-node Host Memory\nSYSV, POSIX, KNEM, CMA, XPMEM" as HostMemoryTransport
        rectangle "GPU Transport\nNVIDIA CUDA, AMD ROCm" as GpuTransport
        rectangle "Ethernet Transport\nTCP/IP Sockets" as EthernetTransport
    }

    package "UCS Services\nCommon Utilities" as Ucs {
        rectangle "Utilities" as Utilities
        rectangle "Data Structures" as DataStructures
        rectangle "Memory Management" as MemoryManagement
    }

    package "UCM Memory Services" as Ucm {
        rectangle "Memory Hooks" as MemoryHooks
    }
}

package "Drivers and Kernels" as DriverLayer {
    rectangle "RDMA Verbs Driver" as RdmaDriver
    rectangle "Cray Driver" as CrayDriver
    rectangle "OS Kernel\nHost Memory" as HostKernel
    rectangle "ROCm / CUDA" as GpuRuntime
    rectangle "OS Kernel\nEthernet" as EthernetKernel
    rectangle "OS Kernel\nMemory Hooks" as MemoryKernel
}

rectangle "Hardware" as Hardware

Applications --> MpiApps
Applications --> PgasApps
Applications --> TaskApps
Applications --> MlApps

MpiApps --> MessagePassingDomain
PgasApps --> PgasDomain
TaskApps --> TaskDomain
MlApps --> IoDomain

MessagePassingDomain --> TransportSelection
PgasDomain --> TransportSelection
TaskDomain --> TransportSelection
IoDomain --> TransportSelection
TransportSelection --> MultiRail
MultiRail --> Fragmentation
Fragmentation --> SoftwareProtocols

SoftwareProtocols --> RdmaTransport
SoftwareProtocols --> GniTransport
SoftwareProtocols --> HostMemoryTransport
SoftwareProtocols --> GpuTransport
SoftwareProtocols --> EthernetTransport

RdmaTransport --> Rc
RdmaTransport --> Ud
RdmaTransport --> Dct

RdmaTransport --> RdmaDriver
GniTransport --> CrayDriver
HostMemoryTransport --> HostKernel
GpuTransport --> GpuRuntime
EthernetTransport --> EthernetKernel
MemoryHooks --> MemoryKernel

Ucp --> Ucs : common utilities
Uct --> Ucs : utility services
Uct --> Ucm : memory hooks

RdmaDriver --> Hardware
CrayDriver --> Hardware
HostKernel --> Hardware
GpuRuntime --> Hardware
EthernetKernel --> Hardware
MemoryKernel --> Hardware
@enduml

samples.pred_source:
@startuml

cloud "kAFL Hypervisor/Fuzzer Framework" as KAFL
interface "kAFL hypercalls" as KAFL_IF
KAFL_IF --> KAFL

cloud "hAFL2 Controller/Orchestrator" as HAFL2

cloud "Windows VMSwitch" as VMSWITCH
cloud "VMBus/netvsc channels" as VMBUS

cloud "Visual Studio Toolchain" as VSTOOL
cloud "bash environment" as BASH
cloud "Python 3 runtime" as PY3
cloud "pytest" as PYTEST
cloud "Host Filesystem/Shared Libraries" as HOST_LIBS

package "Orchestration & Test" {
  component "Standalone Test Runner" as TEST_RUNNER
  component "kAFL-Fuzzer Test Suites" as TEST_SUITES

  TEST_RUNNER --> TEST_SUITES
  TEST_RUNNER --> PY3
  TEST_RUNNER --> PYTEST
  PYTEST --> TEST_SUITES
}

package "Linux Userspace Fuzzing" {
  component "Linux Launch Scripts" as LINUX_LAUNCH
  component "Initrd Packager" as INITRD_PACK
  component "Shared Library Resolver" as SHLIB_RES

  LINUX_LAUNCH --> INITRD_PACK
  INITRD_PACK --> SHLIB_RES
  SHLIB_RES --> HOST_LIBS
  LINUX_LAUNCH --> BASH
}

package "Guest I/O & Forkserver" {
  component "Embedded Forkserver" as FORKSERVER
  FORKSERVER --> KAFL_IF
}

LINUX_LAUNCH --> FORKSERVER
LINUX_LAUNCH --> KAFL

node "Hyper-V Child Partition VM" {
  package "Windows Hyper-V Fuzzing" {
    component "loader.exe" as LOADER
    component "packet_sender.exe" as PACKET_SENDER
    component "Child Partition Harness" as CHILD_HARNESS
    component "Harness Driver(s)" as HARNESS_DRIVERS

    CHILD_HARNESS --> LOADER
    LOADER --> PACKET_SENDER
    PACKET_SENDER --> HARNESS_DRIVERS

    CHILD_HARNESS --> VMBUS
  }
}

node "Hyper-V Root Partition VM" {
  package "Crash Monitoring & Feedback" {
    component "Root Partition Crash Monitor" as ROOT_MON
  }
}

VMBUS --> VMSWITCH

ROOT_MON --> HAFL2

package "Build & Configuration Tooling" {
  component "Windows Build Script" as WIN_BUILD_SCRIPT
  component "Offset Configuration Source" as OFFSET_CFG
  component "Windows Build Artifacts" as WIN_BUILD_ARTIFACTS

  WIN_BUILD_SCRIPT --> VSTOOL
  OFFSET_CFG --> WIN_BUILD_SCRIPT
  WIN_BUILD_SCRIPT --> WIN_BUILD_ARTIFACTS
}

WIN_BUILD_ARTIFACTS --> LOADER
WIN_BUILD_ARTIFACTS --> PACKET_SENDER
WIN_BUILD_ARTIFACTS --> HARNESS_DRIVERS
WIN_BUILD_ARTIFACTS --> ROOT_MON

HARNESS_DRIVERS --> VSTOOL
ROOT_MON --> VSTOOL

@enduml

samples.title: Indoor_Fitness_App / openhands/gpt-5
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
title Indoor Fitness App - System Architecture

actor "User" as User

node "Mobile Device" as Mobile {
  component "Mobile App" as App
  component "Auth & Permission" as Auth
  component "Camera Capture" as Cam
  component "Pose Estimation\n& Skeleton Extraction" as Pose
  component "Real-time Evaluation UI" as EvalUI
  component "Training Session Manager" as Session
  component "Plan Recommendation Client" as RecClient
  component "Poster/Report Client" as PRClient
  component "Personal Profile & Preferences" as Profile
  component "History & Overview" as History
  component "Casting Controller\n(Device Discovery & Connection)" as CastClient
  App --> Auth
  App --> Cam
  App --> Pose
  App --> EvalUI
  App --> Session
  App --> RecClient
  App --> PRClient
  App --> Profile
  App --> History
  App --> CastClient
  Cam --> Pose : video frames
  Pose --> EvalUI : skeleton + score
}

cloud "Same-LAN" as LAN

node "Android Target Device" as Target {
  component "Casting Server" as CastServer
  component "Display Surface" as Display
}

package "Server Side" as Server {
  component "API Gateway" as APIGW
  component "Plan Recommendation Engine" as RecEngine
  component "Material Collector/\nProcessor" as MaterialProc
  component "Report Generator" as ReportGen
  database "User & Training\nData Store" as DB
  database "Standard Movement\nLibrary" as StdLib
  component "Input Validation &\nSQLi Prevention" as Sec
  APIGW --> RecEngine
  APIGW --> MaterialProc
  APIGW --> ReportGen
  RecEngine --> DB
  MaterialProc --> DB
  ReportGen --> DB
  RecEngine --> StdLib
  Sec --> APIGW
}

User --> App : interactions
App --> APIGW : HTTPS API
PRClient --> MaterialProc : poster materials request
PRClient --> ReportGen : report request
RecClient --> RecEngine : recommendation request
Session --> RecClient : training state/results
Session --> PRClient : training summary

CastClient .. LAN
CastServer .. LAN
CastClient --> CastServer : video stream + commands
CastServer --> Display : render in real time

note top of Pose
NFR: >=20 fps runtime; >=95% accuracy (normal)
end note

note top of CastClient
NFR: video latency <=100ms;\ncommand response <=50ms
end note

note top of Sec
Enforces input checking,\nspecial symbol filtering,\nvariable binding,\nprepared statements
end note

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' --- Configuration & Styles ---
skinparam ranksep 50
skinparam nodesep 40
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
left to right direction

' Styling for different layers
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor<<client>> #e1f5fe
    BorderColor<<client>> #01579b
    
    BackgroundColor<<native>> #bbdefb
    BorderColor<<native>> #0d47a1
    
    BackgroundColor<<react>> #c8e6c9
    BorderColor<<react>> #1b5e20
    
    BackgroundColor<<bridge>> #00acc1
    BorderColor<<bridge>> #006064
    FontColor<<bridge>> white
    
    BackgroundColor<<infra>> #f5f5f5
    BorderColor<<infra>> #212121
    BorderStyle<<infra>> dashed
}

' --- Diagram Definitions ---

' Layer 1: Client Layer
package "Client / Platforms" as ClientLayer <<client>> {
    rectangle "Mobile Device" as Mobile <<client>>
    rectangle "Desktop PC" as Desktop <<client>>
    rectangle "Web Browser" as Web <<client>>
    rectangle "Android OS" as Android <<client>>
    rectangle "iOS / Apple" as iOS <<client>>
    rectangle "Smart Watch / Wearables" as IoT <<client>>
}

' Layer 2: Native Module Layer
package "Native Modules" as NativeLayer <<native>> {
    rectangle "Camera Call" as Camera <<native>>
    rectangle "Model Loading / TensorFlow" as ModelLoad <<native>>
    rectangle "Linear Algebra Library" as LinearAlgebra <<native>>
    rectangle "Voice Library Call" as Voice <<native>>
    rectangle "GPU Computing" as GPU <<native>>
    rectangle "Screen Recording" as ScreenRec <<native>>
    rectangle "Socket Communication" as Socket <<native>>
    rectangle "Data Processing" as DataProc <<native>>
    rectangle "Permission Requests" as Permissions <<native>>
}

' Layer 3: Cross-Platform Framework Layer
package "React Native Framework" as RNLayer <<react>> {
    rectangle "Native Module Bridge" as NativeBridge <<bridge>>
    rectangle "Data Caching" as DataCaching <<react>>
    rectangle "Server Access" as ServerAccess <<react>>
    rectangle "Redux State Management" as Redux <<react>>
    rectangle "Interface Packaging" as APIPkg <<react>>
    rectangle "Data Interception" as DataIntercept <<react>>
    rectangle "End-to-End Communication" as P2P <<react>>
}

' Sidebar: Infrastructure
package "Infrastructure & Support" as InfraLayer <<infra>> {
    rectangle "Data Exchange" as DataExchange <<infra>>
    rectangle "Performance Optimization" as Performance <<infra>>
    rectangle "Stability Construction" as Stability <<infra>>
}

' --- Relationships ---

ClientLayer --> NativeLayer
NativeLayer <--> NativeBridge

' Directing bridge to RN components
NativeBridge --- DataCaching
NativeBridge --- ServerAccess
NativeBridge --- Redux
NativeBridge --- APIPkg
NativeBridge --- DataIntercept
NativeBridge --- P2P

' Infrastructure interaction (dashed as per original)
NativeLayer ..> InfraLayer
RNLayer ..> InfraLayer

@enduml

samples.title: AwesomeMusic / direct/claude-sonnet-4-6
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
!theme plain
skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA
skinparam node {
  BackgroundColor #DDEEFF
  BorderColor #336699
  FontSize 13
}
skinparam component {
  BackgroundColor #FFFDE7
  BorderColor #F9A825
  FontSize 12
}
skinparam database {
  BackgroundColor #E8F5E9
  BorderColor #388E3C
  FontSize 12
}
skinparam queue {
  BackgroundColor #FCE4EC
  BorderColor #C62828
  FontSize 12
}
skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor #F3E5F5
  BorderColor #6A1B9A
  FontSize 12
}
skinparam cloud {
  BackgroundColor #E3F2FD
  BorderColor #1565C0
}
skinparam arrow {
  Color #444444
  FontSize 11
}
skinparam defaultFontName Arial

title AwesomeMusic — System Architecture Diagram

actor "Music Enthusiast\n(General User)" as User
actor "Composer" as Composer
actor "Music Appreciator" as Appreciator

cloud "External Network (HTTPS / TCP/IP)" as Internet {
}

node "VM-1: Gateway & Frontend" {
  component "[Nginx 1.19.8\nReverse Proxy / Load Balancer\nExternal-Internal Isolation]" as Nginx
  component "[Web Frontend\nHTML + CSS + JavaScript\n+ Bootstrap Framework]" as Frontend

  note right of Nginx
    NFR-020: isolates internal/external
    NFR-025: load balancing (2000 QPS)
  end note
}

node "VM-2: Web Backend" {
  component "[Backend API Server\nGolang + Gin Framework]" as BackendAPI

  rectangle "Core Backend Services" {
    component "[Account Service\nRegister / Login\nFR-001, FR-002]" as AccountSvc
    component "[Score Content Service\nUpload / Download / Search\nFavorite / Hot Chart\nFR-003, FR-006, FR-009\nFR-010, FR-011]" as ScoreSvc
    component "[User Relationship Service\nFollow / Unfollow\nFR-004]" as RelationSvc
    component "[Model Service\nFavorite Model\nFR-007]" as ModelSvc
    component "[Recommendation Service\nHomepage Playlist\nHot Chart Update\nFR-008, FR-018]" as RecoSvc
    component "[Score Generation Coordinator\nSubmit & Poll Generation Task\nFR-005, FR-017]" as GenCoordSvc
    component "[Scheduling Module\nDaily 02:00 Trigger\nFR-016, FR-017]" as Scheduler
  }
}

node "VM-3: Algorithm Service" {
  rectangle "Online Service" {
    component "[Score Generation Service\nGPT-2 per-user model\nMidi→Abc→Seeds→Score→Midi\nFR-013]" as AlgoGen
  }
  rectangle "Offline / Batch Service" {
    component "[Model Training Service\nFine-tune GPT-2 per user\nFR-012]" as AlgoTrain
    component "[Score Classification Service\nLSTM representations + labels\nFR-014]" as AlgoClassify
    component "[Song Recommendation Service\nCosine similarity / user sim\nFR-015]" as AlgoReco
  }
}

node "VM-4: Data & Middleware" {
  database "Primary Database\n(3-replica, NFR-021)\n[User Accounts DR-001]\n[Score Data DR-004]\n[Favorite Records DR-002,DR-005]\n[Follow Relationships DR-003]\n[Score Labels DR-013]\n[Hot-Chart Data DR-016]\n[Task Metadata DR-014]" as DB

  database "Model Parameter Store\n(Hadoop 3.2.2)\n[GPT-2 per-user params DR-011]\n[LSTM representations DR-012]\n[Midi / Abc files DR-008,DR-009]\n[Track Seeds DR-010]" as Hadoop

  queue "Message Queue\nRabbitMQ 3.8.14\n[Training Tasks]\n[Classification Tasks]\n[Recommendation Tasks]\n[Generation Tasks]\nFR-016, FR-017" as MQ

  component "[etcd 3.4.15\nDistributed Config &\nService Registry\nNFR-022]" as Etcd
}

' ── External access ──────────────────────────────────────────────
User --> Internet
Composer --> Internet
Appreciator --> Internet
Internet --> Nginx : HTTPS

' ── Gateway to Frontend & Backend ────────────────────────────────
Nginx --> Frontend : serve static assets
Nginx --> BackendAPI : reverse proxy API calls\n(HTTPS / TCP/IP)

' ── Frontend to Backend ──────────────────────────────────────────
Frontend --> BackendAPI : REST API calls (HTTPS)

' ── Backend API to internal services ─────────────────────────────
BackendAPI --> AccountSvc
BackendAPI --> ScoreSvc
BackendAPI --> RelationSvc
BackendAPI --> ModelSvc
BackendAPI --> RecoSvc
BackendAPI --> GenCoordSvc

' ── Scheduler triggers ───────────────────────────────────────────
Scheduler --> MQ : push Training / Classification\n/ Recommendation tasks\n(daily 02:00, FR-016)
GenCoordSvc --> MQ : push Generation task\n(on user submit, FR-017)

' ── MQ to Algorithm Service ──────────────────────────────────────
MQ --> AlgoTrain : consume training task
MQ --> AlgoClassify : consume classification task
MQ --> AlgoReco : consume recommendation task
MQ --> AlgoGen : consume generation task

' ── Algorithm Service callbacks ──────────────────────────────────
AlgoGen --> BackendAPI : task status / result callback\n(FR-013, FR-017)
AlgoTrain --> BackendAPI : task status / exception callback\n(FR-012, FR-016)
AlgoClassify --> BackendAPI : score labels / exception\n(FR-014)
AlgoReco --> BackendAPI : recommendation lists\n(FR-015)

' ── Backend to Data Layer ────────────────────────────────────────
BackendAPI --> DB : CRUD user/score/favorite\n/follow/model/hot-chart data
Scheduler --> DB : read task metadata\nwrite task status & logs (DR-014,DR-015)
GenCoordSvc --> DB : poll task status (DR-015)

' ── Algorithm to Data Layer ──────────────────────────────────────
AlgoTrain --> Hadoop : read/write GPT-2 model params\nread midi playlists
AlgoGen --> Hadoop : read GPT-2 model params\nread/write midi/abc/seeds
AlgoClassify --> Hadoop : read/write LSTM representations\nread midi/abc files
AlgoReco --> Hadoop : read LSTM representations
AlgoTrain --> DB : write updated model params ref\nwrite score labels
AlgoClassify --> DB : write score labels (DR-013)
AlgoReco --> DB : write recommendation results

' ── Service discovery & config ───────────────────────────────────
BackendAPI ..> Etcd : service registry / config
AlgoGen ..> Etcd : service registry
AlgoTrain ..> Etcd : service registry
Scheduler ..> Etcd : distributed coordination

@enduml

samples.title: ModelSharePlatform / openhands/qwen3-coder-480b-a35b-instruct
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title Deep Learning Model Sharing Platform - System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam wrapWidth 180

package "Client (Browser)" {
  component "Web UI\n(Vue + TypeScript)" as WebUI
  component "Admin Console\n(Web UI)" as AdminUI
}

package "Backend (Spring Boot)" {
  component "API Gateway / Router" as APIGW
  component "Authentication & Authorization" as Auth
  component "User Service" as UserSvc
  component "Q&A Service" as QASvc
  component "Blog Service" as BlogSvc
  component "Model Service" as ModelSvc
  component "Dataset Service" as DataSvc
  component "Recommendation Service" as RecSvc
  component "Follow Service" as FollowSvc
  component "Administration Service" as AdminSvc
  component "Online Invocation Orchestrator" as Invoke
}

package "Data Stores" {
  database "MySQL" as MySQL
  cloud "Object Storage\n(Models & Datasets)" as ObjStore
}

package "External Services" {
  cloud "Payment Gateway\n(TBD)" as PayGW
  cloud "Email Service\n(Password Reset)" as EmailSvc
}

package "Execution" {
  node "Model Runtime\n(Execution Engine)" as Runtime
}

' Client to Backend
WebUI --> APIGW
AdminUI --> APIGW

' API to Services
APIGW --> Auth
APIGW --> UserSvc
APIGW --> QASvc
APIGW --> BlogSvc
APIGW --> ModelSvc
APIGW --> DataSvc
APIGW --> RecSvc
APIGW --> FollowSvc
APIGW --> AdminSvc
APIGW --> Invoke

' Services to Database
Auth --> MySQL : users, roles
UserSvc --> MySQL
QASvc --> MySQL
BlogSvc --> MySQL
ModelSvc --> MySQL
DataSvc --> MySQL
RecSvc --> MySQL
FollowSvc --> MySQL
AdminSvc --> MySQL

' Storage access
ModelSvc --> ObjStore
DataSvc --> ObjStore

' Online invocation path
Invoke --> ModelSvc : select model
Invoke --> DataSvc : select dataset
Invoke --> Runtime : run model
Runtime --> ObjStore : load model/data

' Purchases
ModelSvc --> PayGW : purchase request
PayGW --> ModelSvc : payment result

' Account recovery
Auth --> EmailSvc : reset emails

note right of RecSvc
Uses browsing history and registration information
for model recommendation (per SRS AD-003, FR-023).
end note

note bottom of AdminSvc
Supports account cancellation and illegal content deletion
(per FR-031, FR-032).
end note

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' --- Configuration & Styles ---
skinparam topboxSelection true
skinparam Direction top to bottom
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false

' Define Styles based on original ClassDefs
<style>
    .client {
        BackgroundColor #e1f5fe
        LineColor #01579b
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .service {
        BackgroundColor #e8f5e9
        LineColor #2e7d32
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .db {
        BackgroundColor #fff9c4
        LineColor #fbc02d
        LineThickness 2
    }
</style>

' --- Client Layer ---
package "Browser / Client Layer" as Browser_Layer {
    rectangle "Frontend Interface\n(Bootstrap-Vue)" as FE_Interface <<client>>
}

' --- Server Layer ---
package "Server Layer\n(Spring Boot)" as Server_Layer {
    
    package "Core Modules" as Core_Modules {
        ' Layout is TB within the package
        rectangle "Account Management Module" as AccountMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Q&A Community Module" as QAMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Blog Sharing Module" as BlogMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Model Management Module" as ModelMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Dataset Management Module" as DatasetMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Following Management Module" as FollowMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Admin Module" as AdminMod <<service>>
    }
}

' --- Database Layer ---
package "Database Layer\n(MySQL)" as Database_Layer {
    database "User Data" as UserDB <<db>>
    database "Q&A Community Data" as QADB <<db>>

samples.title: labhire / mini-swe-agent/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title LabHire - Research Internship Platform Architecture

'' === Presentation Layer ===
rectangle "Presentation Layer" {
  component "Web Browser" as Browser
  component "Mobile App" as MobileApp
}

'' === Application Services Layer ===
rectangle "Application Services" {
  component "Authentication Service" as AuthService
  component "Project Management Service" as ProjectService
  component "User Profile Service" as ProfileService
  component "Community Service" as CommunityService
  component "Notification Service" as NotifyService
  component "Recommendation Service" as RecService
  component "Review & Moderation Service" as ReviewService
  component "Chat Service" as ChatService
}

'' === Business Logic Layer ===
rectangle "Business Logic" {
  component "User Management" as UserMgmt
  component "Project Management" as ProjectMgmt
  component "Certification Logic" as CertLogic
  component "Recommendation Engine" as RecEngine
  component "Content Moderation" as ContentMod
  component "Risk Control & Audit" as RiskControl
}

'' === Data Storage Layer ===
rectangle "Data Storage" {
  database "User Database" as UserDB
  database "Project Database" as ProjectDB
  database "Community Database" as CommunityDB
  database "System Database" as SystemDB
}

'' === External Services ===
rectangle "External Services" {
  component "Email Service" as EmailService
  component "File Storage" as FileStorage
}

'' === User Types ===
actor "Student User" as Student
actor "Mentor User" as Mentor
actor "Administrator" as Admin
actor "Enterprise Student" as EnterpriseStudent

'' === User Connections ===
Student --> Browser : "Access via Web"
Student --> MobileApp : "Access via Mobile"
Mentor --> Browser : "Access via Web"
Mentor --> MobileApp : "Access via Mobile"
Admin --> Browser : "Admin Portal"
EnterpriseStudent --> Browser : "Enterprise Features"

Browser --> AuthService : "Login/Register"
MobileApp --> AuthService : "Mobile Login"

'' === Core Service Connections ===
AuthService --> UserMgmt : "Manage Users"
ProjectService --> ProjectMgmt : "Manage Projects"
CommunityService --> ContentMod : "Validate Content"
ProfileService --> UserMgmt : "Update Profiles"
NotifyService --> EmailService : "Send Notifications"
RecService --> RecEngine : "Get Recommendations"
ReviewService --> CertLogic : "Process Certifications"
ReviewService --> ContentMod : "Moderate Content"
ChatService --> UserMgmt : "User Lookup"

'' === Business Logic to Data Layer ===
UserMgmt --> UserDB : "CRUD Operations"
ProjectMgmt --> ProjectDB : "CRUD Operations"
CertLogic --> UserDB : "Update Cert Status"
RecEngine --> ProjectDB : "Analyze Projects"
RecEngine --> CommunityDB : "Analyze Engagement"
ContentMod --> CommunityDB : "Moderate Content"
RiskControl --> SystemDB : "Log Activities"

'' === External Service Connections ===
AuthService --> EmailService : "Send Verification Codes"
ProfileService --> FileStorage : "Store Resume Files"
NotifyService --> EmailService : "Email Notifications"

'' === User to Service Direct Connections ===
Student --> ProjectService : "Browse/Apply Projects"
Mentor --> ProjectService : "Publish/Manage Projects"
Student --> CommunityService : "Community Posts"
EnterpriseStudent --> CommunityService : "Referral Posts"
Admin --> ReviewService : "Review Content"
Mentor --> ChatService : "Chat with Applicants"
Student --> ChatService : "Chat with Mentors"

'' === Data Flow for Key Features ===
ProjectService --> RecService : "Get Recommendations"
CommunityService --> RecService : "Popularity Data"
UserMgmt --> ReviewService : "Certification Requests"
ContentMod --> ReviewService : "Content Flags"

note right of AuthService
  University email verification
  Enterprise email certification
  No admin registration
end note

note right of RecService
  Collaborative filtering
  Tag matching
  Cold-start rules
  Based on interests/skills
end note

note right of ReviewService
  Manual review within 72h
  Content moderation
  Risk control logs
  Audit capabilities
end note

@enduml

samples.title: s000053_ec192d86 / direct/gpt-5
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam wrapWidth 200
skinparam maxMessageSize 200

title Configuration Anomaly Detection (CAD) - System Architecture

left to right direction

package "Users" {
  component "SRE / Operations User" as UserSRE <<User>>
  component "Deployment Engineer" as UserDE <<User>>
  component "Developer / Contributor" as UserDev <<User>>
}

package "Repository Assets" {
  component "Integration Library (pkg)" as Lib
  component "PagerDuty Integration" as LibPD
  component "AWS Integration" as LibAWS
  component "OCM Integration" as LibOCM
  artifact "Deployment Templates (YAML)" as Templates
  component "Template Update Utility" as TmplUtil
}

package "CAD Runtime" {
  node "Container Image: CAD CLI (UBI minimal)" as Image {
    artifact "/bin/cadctl" as Cadctl
  }
}

package "Build Environment" {
  node "Go 1.17 Builder Image" as GoBuilder
}

package "Tekton Execution (Cluster)" {
  node "Namespace: configuration-anomaly-detection" as Ns {
    interface "Alert Webhook" as Webhook
    component "Tekton EventListener" as EL
    component "Tekton Trigger" as Trig
    component "Pipeline: cad-checks-pipeline" as Pipe
    component "PipelineRun (v1beta1)" as PR
  }
}

package "External Systems" {
  cloud "PagerDuty" as PD
  cloud "AWS" as AWS
  cloud "OCM" as OCM
  component "External Alert Source" as AlertSource
}

artifact "JSON payload (event.data.id)" as Payload

' Relationships: Repository organization
Lib --> LibPD
Lib --> LibAWS
Lib --> LibOCM

' Users and utilities
UserDev --> TmplUtil : runs template update workflow\n(FR-010)
TmplUtil --> Templates : updates deployment template artifacts\n(DR-004)

' Build and runtime constraints
GoBuilder -down-> Image : builds CAD CLI container image\n(NFR-002, C-002)
note bottom of Image
- Contains /bin/cadctl (FR-001, NFR-001, C-001)
- Base: UBI minimal (NFR-001, C-003)
- Standard image labels (NFR-003)
end note

' CLI and integrations
UserSRE --> Cadctl : runs CAD workflows\n(CHGM, anomaly handling)\n(FR-002, FR-003, FR-004)
Cadctl ..> Lib : uses integration library\n(FR-009, NFR-004)
LibPD --> PD : incident/alert actions
LibAWS --> AWS : infra/state queries
LibOCM --> OCM : support-status, owner comms

' Deployment assets provision Tekton resources
Templates ..> EL : deploy/render\nEventListener (FR-005, DR-005)
Templates ..> Trig : deploy/render\nTrigger (FR-005)
Templates ..> Pipe : deploy/render\nPipeline (FR-005)
Templates ..> PR : direct-exec manifest\n(v1beta1) (C-004)

' Standard event-driven path
AlertSource --> Webhook : sends alert
Webhook --> EL : receive alert webhook\n(FR-005)
EL --> Trig : filter/map event\n(FR-005)
Trig --> PR : creates PipelineRun\n(FR-005)
PR --> Pipe : references cad-checks-pipeline\nin configuration-anomaly-detection\n(FR-007, C-005)

' Direct skip-webhook path
UserDE --> PR : creates PipelineRun directly\n(skip-webhook) (FR-006, C-006)
Cadctl --> PR : optional direct creation\n(skip-webhook) (FR-006, C-006)

' Payload and data requirements
Payload -down-> PR : parameter 'payload' (JSON)\nincludes event.data.id\n(FR-008, DR-001, DR-002)
note right of PR
- Tekton PipelineRun v1beta1 (C-004)
- References 'cad-checks-pipeline' in
  'configuration-anomaly-detection' (FR-007, C-005)
- Accepts JSON 'payload' with 'event.data.id' (FR-008)
end note

' Pipeline executes CAD CLI
PR ..> Image : runs CAD checks using cadctl\n(FR-003, FR-004)

legend right
  Paths:
  - Standard: Alert Source -> Webhook -> EventListener -> Trigger -> PipelineRun -> Pipeline
  - Skip-webhook: User/CLI -> PipelineRun (direct), bypassing EventListener (C-006)

  Key Functions:
  - cadctl provides CHGM and anomaly workflows (FR-001, FR-002, FR-003)
  - Mitigation/disposition via integrations (FR-004, FR-009)

  Deploy/Artifacts:
  - Tekton assets and direct-exec manifests are YAML (DR-003)
  - Template Update Utility maintains templates (FR-010)
endlegend
@enduml

left to right direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial

    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}

    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam queue {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}

package "Alert Source" as AlertSource {
    rectangle "deadmanssnitch" as Deadmanssnitch
    rectangle "app-sre\nalertmanager" as AppSreAlertmanager
    rectangle "cluster\nalertmanager" as ClusterAlertmanager
}

package "Alerts" as Alerts {
    queue "CHGM" as ChgmAlert
    queue "CPD" as CpdAlert
    queue "all cluster\nalerts" as AllClusterAlerts
}

package "PagerDuty Team" as PagerDutyTeam {
    rectangle "prod-deadmanssnitch" as ProdDeadmanssnitch
    rectangle "app-sre-alertmanager" as PagerDutyAppSre
    rectangle "<cluster>.openshiftapps.com-\nhive-cluster" as HiveClusterService
}

rectangle "Tekton\nEvent\nListener" as TektonEventListener
rectangle "Tekton Interceptor:\nAlert investigation\nimplemented in CAD?" as TektonInterceptor

package "cadctl" as Cadctl {
    rectangle "switch(alerttype)" as SwitchAlertType
    rectangle "CHGM investigation" as ChgmInvestigation
    rectangle "CPD investigation" as CpdInvestigation
    rectangle "Future investigations" as FutureInvestigations
}

rectangle "Update Incident\nNotes" as UpdateIncidentNotes
rectangle "Escalate alert to\non-call SRE" as EscalateOnCallSre

Deadmanssnitch --> ChgmAlert
AppSreAlertmanager --> CpdAlert
ClusterAlertmanager --> AllClusterAlerts
ChgmAlert --> ProdDeadmanssnitch
CpdAlert --> PagerDutyAppSre
AllClusterAlerts --> HiveClusterService
PagerDutyTeam --> TektonEventListener : webhook
TektonEventListener --> TektonInterceptor
TektonInterceptor --> Cadctl : yes\ntekton pipeline run\ncadctl investigate --payload
TektonInterceptor --> EscalateOnCallSre : no
Cadctl --> SwitchAlertType
SwitchAlertType --> ChgmInvestigation
SwitchAlertType --> CpdInvestigation
SwitchAlertType --> FutureInvestigations
Cadctl --> UpdateIncidentNotes
UpdateIncidentNotes --> EscalateOnCallSre
@enduml

samples.title: s000038_2c7731fc / direct/claude-sonnet-4-6
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class

skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA
skinparam node {
  BackgroundColor #E8F4FD
  BorderColor #2E86AB
  FontColor #1A1A2E
}
skinparam component {
  BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BorderColor #2E86AB
  FontColor #1A1A2E
}
skinparam database {
  BackgroundColor #FFF3E0
  BorderColor #E65100
  FontColor #1A1A2E
}
skinparam cloud {
  BackgroundColor #F3E5F5
  BorderColor #7B1FA2
  FontColor #1A1A2E
}
skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor #E8F5E9
  BorderColor #2E7D32
  FontColor #1A1A2E
}
skinparam arrow {
  Color #37474F
  FontColor #37474F
}

title IceFireDB Decentralized Database Infrastructure\nSystem Architecture

actor "Redis Application\nIntegrator" as RedisApp
actor "Pub/Sub Application\nDeveloper" as PubSubApp
actor "SQL Protocol\nDeveloper" as SQLDev

rectangle "IceFireDB Infrastructure" {

  rectangle "IceFireDB-Redis-Proxy\nSubsystem" as RedisProxySubsystem #E3F2FD {

    component "Redis Proxy\nAgent Node" as RedisProxyNode {
      component "Redis Command\nReceiver" as CmdReceiver
      component "Redis Command\nProcessor\n(String, Set, List,\nHash, Sorted Set,\nStream, Control)" as CmdProcessor
      component "Instruction\nSynchronizer" as InstructionSync
      component "Redis Storage\nForwarder" as StorageForwarder
      component "Cluster-Aware\nRouter" as ClusterRouter
    }

    component "Redis Proxy\nAgent Node (Peer)" as RedisProxyPeer {
      component "Peer Instruction\nReceiver" as PeerReceiver
      component "Peer Storage\nForwarder" as PeerForwarder
    }
  }

  rectangle "IceFireDB-PubSub\nSubsystem" as PubSubSubsystem #FCE4EC {

    component "PubSub Node A" as PubSubNodeA {
      component "Redis Pub/Sub\nInterface" as PubSubInterfaceA
      component "Message\nPublisher/Subscriber" as MsgPubSubA
      component "Kademlia DHT\nPeer Discovery\n(libp2p/IPFS-style)" as DHTA
      component "NAT Traversal\nHandler" as NATA
    }

    component "PubSub Node B\n(Same/Different Network)" as PubSubNodeB {
      component "Redis Pub/Sub\nInterface" as PubSubInterfaceB
      component "Message\nPublisher/Subscriber" as MsgPubSubB
      component "Kademlia DHT\nPeer Discovery\n(libp2p/IPFS-style)" as DHTB
      component "NAT Traversal\nHandler" as NATB
    }
  }

  rectangle "IceFireDB-SQLite\nInternal Data Handling\n(Internal / Limited Scope)" as SQLiteSubsystem #F9FBE7 {

    component "MySQL Protocol\nResult Handler" as MySQLResultHandler {
      component "Result Field\nMetadata Parser" as FieldParser
      component "Result Row\nReader" as RowReader
      component "Warning & Status\nExtractor" as WarnStatusExtractor
    }
  }

}

database "Redis Standalone\nStorage" as RedisStandalone
database "Redis Cluster\nStorage" as RedisCluster

cloud "Decentralized\nP2P Network\n(Kademlia DHT /\nlibp2p / IPFS-style)" as P2PNetwork

node "NAT / Private\nNetwork Boundary" as NATBoundary

RedisApp --> CmdReceiver : Redis Commands\n(Redis Protocol)
PubSubApp --> PubSubInterfaceA : Redis Pub/Sub\nSemantics
PubSubApp --> PubSubInterfaceB : Redis Pub/Sub\nSemantics
SQLDev --> MySQLResultHandler : Packetized\nMySQL Result Data

CmdReceiver --> CmdProcessor : Parse & Classify\nRedis Command
CmdProcessor --> InstructionSync : Synchronize\nInstruction
CmdProcessor --> StorageForwarder : Forward Write\nto Storage
CmdProcessor --> ClusterRouter : Route to\nCluster Node

InstructionSync --> PeerReceiver : Synchronized\nRedis Instruction\n(Agent Network)
PeerReceiver --> PeerForwarder : Forward to\nPeer Storage
PeerForwarder --> RedisStandalone : Write Data
PeerForwarder --> RedisCluster : Write Data

StorageForwarder --> RedisStandalone : Write Data\n(Standalone Mode)
ClusterRouter --> RedisCluster : Write Data\n(Cluster Mode)

PubSubInterfaceA --> MsgPubSubA : Publish/Subscribe\nOps
PubSubInterfaceB --> MsgPubSubB : Publish/Subscribe\nOps

MsgPubSubA --> DHTA : Peer Lookup &\nRouting Data
MsgPubSubB --> DHTB : Peer Lookup &\nRouting Data

DHTA <--> P2PNetwork : Peer Discovery,\nRouting Metadata,\nKademlia DHT
DHTB <--> P2PNetwork : Peer Discovery,\nRouting Metadata,\nKademlia DHT

MsgPubSubA <--> MsgPubSubB : Pub/Sub Message\nDelivery (P2P)

NATA --> NATBoundary : NAT Traversal
NATB --> NATBoundary : NAT Traversal
NATBoundary --> P2PNetwork : Cross-Network\nCommunication

FieldParser --> RowReader : Field Metadata\nMappings
RowReader --> WarnStatusExtractor : Row Data
WarnStatusExtractor ..> SQLDev : Parsed Fields,\nRows, Warnings,\nStatus Values

note bottom of RedisProxySubsystem
  FR-001 to FR-004, FR-010, FR-011
  NFR-001, NFR-003
  Supports Standalone & Clustered Redis
  Synchronizes instructions between agents
  Command categories: String, Set, List,
  Hash, Sorted Set, Stream, Control
end note

note bottom of PubSubSubsystem
  FR-005 to FR-009
  NFR-002, NFR-004
  Redis Pub/Sub compatible semantics
  Multi-node, cross-network, NAT/private
  Kademlia DHT / libp2p / IPFS-style
  peer discovery and routing
end note

note bottom of SQLiteSubsystem
  DR-006, DR-007, DR-008
  Internal scope only (C-005, C-006)
  MySQL-protocol-style result parsing
end note

@enduml

@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
left to right direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #333333
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5
skinparam package {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #444444
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #444444
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam database {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #444444
    BorderThickness 1
}

package "Web2 application stack" as Web2Stack {
    rectangle "Applications" as Web2Applications
    rectangle "Platform" as Web2Platform
    rectangle "Processing\nBusiness Logic" as Web2Processing
    rectangle "File System\nLarge Files and Media" as Web2FileSystem
    database "BlockChain Database\nTransactions, Contracts,\nCertificates and Receipts" as Web2BlockchainDatabase
    rectangle "IceFireDB" as Web2IceFireDB
}

package "Web3 application stack" as Web3Stack {
    rectangle "Applications" as Web3Applications
    rectangle "Platform" as Web3Platform
    rectangle "Decentralized Processing\nBusiness Logic" as Web3Processing
    rectangle "Decentralized File System\nLarge Files and Media" as Web3FileSystem
    database "BlockChain Database\nTransactions, Contracts,\nCertificates and Receipts" as Web3BlockchainDatabase
    rectangle "IceFireDB" as Web3IceFireDB
}

Web2Applications --> Web2Platform
Web2Platform --> Web2Processing
Web2Processing --> Web2FileSystem
Web2Processing --> Web2BlockchainDatabase
Web2BlockchainDatabase --> Web2IceFireDB

Web3Applications --> Web3Platform
Web3Platform --> Web3Processing
Web3Processing --> Web3FileSystem
Web3Processing --> Web3BlockchainDatabase
Web3BlockchainDatabase --> Web3IceFireDB

Web2IceFireDB ..> Web3IceFireDB : decentralized database support
@enduml

}

@startuml
title Campus Helper Platform - Four-Layer Architecture

left to right direction
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

cloud "WeChat Mini Program Platform" as WeChatPlatform

package "Presentation Layer" {
  component "WeChat Mini Program Client\n(Home/Popular, Category,\nProduct Detail, Order,\nPersonal Center)" as ClientApp
  component "Admin Web Console\n(Product/Order/User Management)" as AdminConsole
}

package "Business Layer" {
  component "Auth & Permission Service" as AuthService
  component "User Service" as UserService
  component "Product Service" as ProductService
  component "Search & Browsing Service" as SearchService
  component "Order Service" as OrderService
  component "Favorites Service" as FavoritesService
  component "Admin Product Management Service" as AdminProductService
  component "Admin Order Management Service" as AdminOrderService
  component "Admin User Management Service" as AdminUserService
  component "Input Validation & Security" as SecurityValidation
  component "Logging & Monitoring Collector" as Observability
}

package "Data Layer" {
  component "User Repository" as UserRepo
  component "Product Repository" as ProductRepo
  component "Order Repository" as OrderRepo
  component "Favorites Repository" as FavoritesRepo
  component "Tag/Category Repository" as TagRepo
  component "Admin Log Repository" as AdminLogRepo
}

package "Data Entity Layer (Database)" {
  database "Main Relational DB" as MainDB
}

WeChatPlatform -[#gray,dashed]-> ClientApp

ClientApp --> AuthService
ClientApp --> SearchService
ClientApp --> ProductService
