@startuml
' --- Configuration & Styles ---
skinparam topboxSelection true
skinparam Direction top to bottom
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false

' Define Styles based on original ClassDefs
<style>
    .ui {
        BackgroundColor #ccff90
        LineColor #33691e
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .display {
        BackgroundColor #fff3e0
        LineColor #e65100
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .business {
        BackgroundColor #b2dfdb
        LineColor #004d40
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .dataLogic {
        BackgroundColor #e1bee7
        LineColor #4a148c
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .storage {
        BackgroundColor #bbdefb
        LineColor #0d47a1
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .env {
        BackgroundColor #cfd8dc
        LineColor #37474f
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .crosscut {
        BackgroundColor #ffcdd2
        LineColor #b71c1c
        LineThickness 2
    }
</style>

' --- Layer 1: UI Layer ---
package "Mini-program UI" as UI_Layer <<ui>> {
    rectangle "Wxml" as WXML <<ui>>
    rectangle "Wxss" as WXSS <<ui>>
    rectangle "JavaScript" as JS <<ui>>
}

' --- Layer 2: Display Layer ---
package "Display Layer" as Display_Layer <<display>> {
    rectangle "Template Engine Rendering\n(pages)" as Render <<display>>
    rectangle "wx.request Interaction" as Interact <<display>>
    rectangle "POST Request" as ReqPost <<display>>
    rectangle "GET Request" as ReqGet <<display>>
}

' --- Layer 3: Business Layer ---
package "Business Layer" as Business_Layer <<business>> {
    package "Core Services" as Main_Services {
        rectangle "Help Goods Service" as Svc_Goods <<business>>
        rectangle "Order Mgmt Service" as Svc_Order <<business>>
        rectangle "Personal Center Service" as Svc_User <<business>>
        rectangle "Admin Mgmt Service" as Svc_Admin <<business>>
    }

    package "Functional Modules" as Modules {
        rectangle "Hot Items Module" as Mod_Hot <<business>>
        rectangle "Create Order Module" as Mod_CreateOrder <<business>>
        rectangle "Favorites Module" as Mod_Fav <<business>>
        rectangle "Modify User Info Module" as Mod_UserInfo <<business>>
        rectangle "Goods Category Module" as Mod_Cat <<business>>
        rectangle "Order Record Module" as Mod_OrderRec <<business>>
        rectangle "Platform Mgmt Module" as Mod_Platform <<business>>
        rectangle "......" as Mod_More <<business>>
    }
}

' --- Cross-Cutting Concerns ---
rectangle "Log Recording" as Logs <<crosscut>>
rectangle "Permission Control" as Auth <<crosscut>>

' --- Layer 4: Data Layer ---
package "Data Layer" as Data_Logic_Layer <<dataLogic>> {
    rectangle "Stored Procedures" as StoredProc <<dataLogic>>
    rectangle "Custom Functions" as CustomFunc <<dataLogic>>
    rectangle "Data Cache" as DataCache <<dataLogic>>
    rectangle "Data Backup" as Backup <<dataLogic>>
    rectangle "Data Recovery" as Recovery <<dataLogic>>
    rectangle "Read/Write Database" as RW_DB <<dataLogic>>
}

' --- Layer 5: Database ---
package "Database" as Database_Storage <<storage>> {
    database "MySQL" as MySQL_Main <<storage>>
}

' --- Layer 6: Runtime Environment ---
package "Runtime Environment" as Runtime_Env <<env>> {
    node "Tencent Cloud\nLightweight App Server" as Server <<env>>
    node "MySQL 106.55.224.139\n2 Cores 4GB" as ServerSpec <<env>>
}

' --- Relationships ---
UI_Layer --> Display_Layer
Display_Layer --> Business_Layer
Interact -- ReqPost
Interact -- ReqGet

Business_Layer --> Data_Logic_Layer
Data_Logic_Layer --> Database_Storage
Runtime_Env --> Database_Storage

' Cross Cutting Links (Dotted)
Business_Layer .. Logs
Business_Layer .. Auth
Data_Logic_Layer .. Logs
Data_Logic_Layer .. Auth
Display_Layer .. Logs

@enduml

samples.title: s000007_6883c7be / mini-swe-agent/claude-sonnet-4-6
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam rectangleBackgroundColor #FAFAFA
skinparam rectangleBorderColor #888888
skinparam arrowColor #444444

title HTTP Proxy System - Architecture Diagram

actor "HTTP Client" as client

package "HTTP Proxy Layer" {
    component "HTTP Proxy\n(Netty-based)" as proxy
    component "Request Forwarding Handler\n(FullHttpRequest Forwarding)" as forwardingHandler
}

package "Test Utilities Layer" {
    component "Test Server\n(Grizzly/Jersey)" as testServer
    component "Test Client\n(Async HTTP Client)" as testClient
    component "File Download Endpoint\nGET /download" as downloadEndpoint
    component "File Upload Handler\n(/upload, map payload)" as uploadHandler
    component "Response Object\n(code, msg, data)" as responseObj
    component "Async Workload Generator\n(50 threads, 1000 req/thread)" as workloadGen
}

package "Upstream / External Systems" {
    component "Upstream Server\n(Server-side Channel)" as upstream
}

database "Local Filesystem" as fs {
    artifact "Target File\n(for download)" as targetFile
}

package "Build & Runtime Environment" {
    component "Maven Multi-Module Build\n(Java 1.8 / Java 1.7 targets)" as build
    component "Debug Logger" as logger
}

client --> proxy : HTTP Request
proxy --> forwardingHandler : retained FullHttpRequest
forwardingHandler --> upstream : forward request\n(after channel activation)
upstream --> client : HTTP Response

testClient --> testServer : async GET requests (HTTP)
testServer --> downloadEndpoint : GET /download
testServer --> uploadHandler : file upload
downloadEndpoint --> targetFile : read file\n(if exists)
downloadEndpoint --> testClient : binary file response\n(Content-Disposition)
uploadHandler --> testClient : map payload\n({filepath: filename})

workloadGen --> testClient : spawn 50 threads\n1000 async GET requests each
testClient --> workloadGen : count HTTP 200 responses

responseObj --> testServer : structured response\n(code, msg, data)

forwardingHandler --> logger : debug log\n(URI, headers, body)

testServer --> build : Grizzly/Jersey dependency
proxy --> build : Maven module (Java 1.7)
testServer --> build : Maven module (Java 1.8)

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
top to bottom direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #111111
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5
skinparam package {
    BorderColor #111111
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #111111
    BorderThickness 1
}

package "Clients" as Clients {
    rectangle "Web Client" as WebClient
    rectangle "APP Client" as AppClient
    rectangle "Business Server" as BusinessClient
    rectangle "Developer" as Developer
}

package "Access Layer\nKeepalived(VIP)" as AccessLayer {
    rectangle "Openresty" as OpenrestyA
    rectangle "Openresty" as OpenrestyB
}

package "Proxy Layer" as ProxyLayer {
    rectangle "cgi_proxy 2" as CgiProxy2

    package "cgi_proxy 1" as CgiProxy1 {
        rectangle "Logging" as Logging
        rectangle "Appkey\nValidate" as AppkeyValidate
        rectangle "Global Limit" as GlobalLimit
        rectangle "Login &\nPermission" as LoginPermission
        rectangle "Proxy Core" as ProxyCore
        rectangle "Formatter" as Formatter

        package "Plugin" as Plugin {
            rectangle "Attach Check" as AttachCheck
            rectangle "Download" as Download
            rectangle "Upload" as Upload
            rectangle "Mock" as Mock
            rectangle "Check\nParameter" as CheckParameter
            rectangle "Agent" as Agent
        }
    }
}

package "Support Platform" as SupportPlatform {
    rectangle "Redis Cache" as RedisCache
    database "Mysql" as Mysql
    queue "Msg Center\nKafka" as MsgCenter
    database "Data Bank\nHDFS/Hbase/Druid" as DataBank
    rectangle "User Center" as UserCenter
    rectangle "Permission\nCenter" as PermissionCenter
}

package "CGI Portal" as CgiPortal {
    rectangle "CGI Manager" as CgiManager
    rectangle "Metrics &\nReport" as MetricsReport
    rectangle "Case Manager" as CaseManager
    rectangle "Log & Tree\ninquire" as LogTreeInquire
    rectangle "Appkey\nManager" as AppkeyManager
    rectangle "Http Test\nClient" as HttpTestClient
    rectangle "Service\nManager" as ServiceManager
    rectangle "Document\nGenerate" as DocumentGenerate
}

rectangle "Log consumer" as LogConsumer

package "Task Scheduler" as TaskScheduler {
    rectangle "Log Analysis" as LogAnalysis
    rectangle "CGI Case\nExecutor" as CgiCaseExecutor
    rectangle "Monitor/Alarm" as MonitorAlarm
    rectangle "CGI Health\nCheck" as CgiHealthCheck
    rectangle "Daily Report" as DailyReport
}

package "Business Servers" as BusinessServers {
    rectangle "Business Server A" as BusinessServerA
    rectangle "Business Server B" as BusinessServerB
    rectangle "Business Server C" as BusinessServerC
    rectangle "......" as OtherBusinessServers
}

WebClient --> AccessLayer : Request / Response
AppClient --> AccessLayer : Request / Response
BusinessClient --> AccessLayer : Request / Response
AccessLayer --> CgiProxy1 : route
AccessLayer --> CgiProxy2 : route

Formatter --> ProxyCore
AppkeyValidate --> RedisCache : appkey cache
AppkeyValidate --> Mysql : appkey metadata
GlobalLimit --> RedisCache : rate limit
LoginPermission --> UserCenter : authenticate
LoginPermission --> PermissionCenter : authorize
Logging --> MsgCenter : logs
ProxyCore ..> Plugin : plugin hooks
Upload --> DataBank : upload data
Download --> DataBank : download data
Agent --> BusinessServers : invoke backend

Developer --> CgiPortal
CgiPortal --> Mysql : manage config/cases
CgiPortal --> DataBank : query logs/metrics/docs
HttpTestClient --> AccessLayer : test request

MsgCenter --> LogConsumer : log stream
LogConsumer --> LogAnalysis
LogConsumer --> DailyReport
LogAnalysis --> DataBank : analytics data
DailyReport --> DataBank : report data
CgiCaseExecutor --> BusinessServers : execute cases
CgiHealthCheck --> BusinessServers : health check
@enduml

@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle

title Campus Helper Platform - Layered Architecture

actor EndUser
actor Admin

node WeChat
component MiniApp

EndUser --> MiniApp
Admin --> MiniApp
MiniApp ..> WeChat : Runs within

package ServerSide {
  package PresentationLayer {
    [REST API (Controllers)] as API
  }
  package BusinessLayer {
    [Product Service] as ProdSvc
    [Order Service] as OrdSvc
    [User & Auth Service] as UserSvc
    [Management Service] as MgmtSvc
  }
  package DataLayer {
    [User Repository] as UserRepo
    [Product Repository] as ProdRepo
    [Order Repository] as OrdRepo
    [Favorite Repository] as FavRepo
    [Tag/Category Repository] as TagRepo
    [Admin Log Repository] as LogRepo
  }
  package DataEntityLayer {
    database DB
  }
}

MiniApp --> API : HTTPS/JSON

API --> ProdSvc
API --> OrdSvc
API --> UserSvc
API --> MgmtSvc

ProdSvc --> ProdRepo
ProdSvc --> TagRepo
OrdSvc --> OrdRepo
UserSvc --> UserRepo
UserSvc --> FavRepo
MgmtSvc --> LogRepo
MgmtSvc --> UserRepo
MgmtSvc --> ProdRepo
MgmtSvc --> OrdRepo

UserRepo --> DB
ProdRepo --> DB
OrdRepo --> DB
FavRepo --> DB
TagRepo --> DB
LogRepo --> DB

component Mon
ProdSvc --> Mon
OrdSvc --> Mon
UserSvc --> Mon
MgmtSvc --> Mon

@enduml

}

Algorithm --> DataJson : laureate data

Handlers --> XmlHttpRequest : html/css/js response

@startuml
title Indoor Fitness App - System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

package "Mobile App (Android/iOS)" {
  component "Exercise Interface UI" as UI
  component "Camera Capture" as Camera
  component "Pose Estimation Engine" as Pose
  component "Posture Evaluation & Scoring" as Eval
  component "Training State Monitor\n(start/end, completion degree)" as Monitor
  component "Plan Manager\n(custom plan creation)" as PlanMgr
  component "Exercise History & Overview" as History
  component "Personal Profile & Preferences" as Personal
  component "Authentication & Authorization\n(Admin vs Ordinary)" as Auth
  component "Data Leakage Protection Controls" as DLP
  component "Device Discovery & Connection" as Discovery
  component "Casting Server (Source Android)" as CastServer
}

package "Server-side Processing" {
  component "API Gateway / HTTP Interface" as API
  component "Recommendation Service" as Reco
  component "Poster & Report Service" as ReportSvc
  component "User Profile Service" as ProfileSvc
  database "Relational Database\n(SQL, product unspecified)" as DB
  cloud "Object/Media Storage" as MediaStore
  component "Standard Movement Repository" as StdRepo
}

package "Casting Target Device (Android)" {
  component "Casting Client" as CastClient
  component "Real-time Display" as Display
}

cloud "Same LAN" as LAN

Camera --> Pose
Pose --> Eval
Eval --> UI
Monitor --> UI
PlanMgr --> UI
History --> UI
Personal --> UI
Auth --> UI

StdRepo --> Eval : standard skeleton movements
StdRepo --> Reco : training templates/constraints

UI --> API : training/evaluation data, requests
Auth --> API : login/registration
PlanMgr --> API : goals, condition, restrictions
History --> API : history queries
Personal --> API : profile updates

API --> Reco : recommendation requests
API --> ReportSvc : poster/report generation
API --> ProfileSvc : user/account operations

Reco --> DB
ReportSvc --> DB
ProfileSvc --> DB
ReportSvc --> MediaStore : images/charts/poster assets

Reco --> API : recommended/adjusted plans
ReportSvc --> API : report data
ProfileSvc --> API : user info

API --> UI : responses

Discovery --> CastServer : connect target device
CastServer .. LAN
CastClient .. LAN
CastServer --> CastClient : video stream (<=100 ms)
CastServer --> CastClient : control commands (<=50 ms)
CastClient --> Display

note right of Pose
- Runtime >= 20 fps
- Normal scenario accuracy >= 95%
- Occlusion robustness: visible parts >= 90%
end note

note bottom of Auth
- Identity verification
- Permission control (Admin vs Ordinary User)
end note

note right of DB
SQL Injection Protection:
- Input validation & type checks
- Special symbol filtering
- Bound variables
- Prepared statements
end note

note bottom of DLP
User data leakage protection:
- Clipboard, drag/drop controls
- Screen copy/screenshot controls
- Memory theft controls
end note

note bottom of Discovery
Precondition:
- Source and target Android devices
- Same LAN discovery & connection
end note

note top of API
Protocol, tokens, and message format unspecified
Modules exchange data via interfaces
end note

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' --- Configuration & Styles ---
skinparam ranksep 50
skinparam nodesep 40
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
left to right direction

' Styling for different layers
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor<<client>> #e1f5fe
    BorderColor<<client>> #01579b
    
    BackgroundColor<<native>> #bbdefb
    BorderColor<<native>> #0d47a1
    
    BackgroundColor<<react>> #c8e6c9
    BorderColor<<react>> #1b5e20
    
    BackgroundColor<<bridge>> #00acc1
    BorderColor<<bridge>> #006064
    FontColor<<bridge>> white
    
    BackgroundColor<<infra>> #f5f5f5
    BorderColor<<infra>> #212121
    BorderStyle<<infra>> dashed
}

' --- Diagram Definitions ---

' Layer 1: Client Layer
package "Client / Platforms" as ClientLayer <<client>> {
    rectangle "Mobile Device" as Mobile <<client>>
    rectangle "Desktop PC" as Desktop <<client>>
    rectangle "Web Browser" as Web <<client>>
    rectangle "Android OS" as Android <<client>>
    rectangle "iOS / Apple" as iOS <<client>>
    rectangle "Smart Watch / Wearables" as IoT <<client>>
}

' Layer 2: Native Module Layer
package "Native Modules" as NativeLayer <<native>> {
    rectangle "Camera Call" as Camera <<native>>
    rectangle "Model Loading / TensorFlow" as ModelLoad <<native>>
    rectangle "Linear Algebra Library" as LinearAlgebra <<native>>
    rectangle "Voice Library Call" as Voice <<native>>
    rectangle "GPU Computing" as GPU <<native>>
    rectangle "Screen Recording" as ScreenRec <<native>>
    rectangle "Socket Communication" as Socket <<native>>
    rectangle "Data Processing" as DataProc <<native>>
    rectangle "Permission Requests" as Permissions <<native>>
}

' Layer 3: Cross-Platform Framework Layer
package "React Native Framework" as RNLayer <<react>> {
    rectangle "Native Module Bridge" as NativeBridge <<bridge>>
    rectangle "Data Caching" as DataCaching <<react>>
    rectangle "Server Access" as ServerAccess <<react>>
    rectangle "Redux State Management" as Redux <<react>>
    rectangle "Interface Packaging" as APIPkg <<react>>
    rectangle "Data Interception" as DataIntercept <<react>>
    rectangle "End-to-End Communication" as P2P <<react>>
}

' Sidebar: Infrastructure
package "Infrastructure & Support" as InfraLayer <<infra>> {
    rectangle "Data Exchange" as DataExchange <<infra>>
    rectangle "Performance Optimization" as Performance <<infra>>
    rectangle "Stability Construction" as Stability <<infra>>
}

' --- Relationships ---

ClientLayer --> NativeLayer
NativeLayer <--> NativeBridge

' Directing bridge to RN components
NativeBridge --- DataCaching
NativeBridge --- ServerAccess
NativeBridge --- Redux
NativeBridge --- APIPkg
NativeBridge --- DataIntercept
NativeBridge --- P2P

' Infrastructure interaction (dashed as per original)
NativeLayer ..> InfraLayer
RNLayer ..> InfraLayer

@enduml

' Deployment and Component Diagram for Deep Learning Model Sharing Platform

' Infrastructure Layer
node "Infrastructure Layer" {
    node "Cloud Environment" {
        node "x86-64/ARM Server" {
        }
    }
}

' Data Access Layer
package "Data Access Layer" {
    database "MySQL Database" as mysql
    component "UserRepository" as userRepo
    component "QuestionRepository" as questionRepo
    component "AnswerRepository" as answerRepo
    component "BlogPostRepository" as blogPostRepo
    component "BlogCommentRepository" as blogCommentRepo
    component "ModelRepository" as modelRepo
    component "DatasetRepository" as datasetRepo
    component "TransactionRepository" as transactionRepo
}

' Application Layer
package "Application Layer" {
    component "AccountService" as accountSvc
    component "QnAService" as qnaSvc
    component "BlogService" as blogSvc
    component "BlogCommentService" as blogCommentSvc
    component "ModelService" as modelSvc
    component "DatasetService" as datasetSvc
    component "FollowService" as followSvc
    component "AdminService" as adminSvc
    component "RecommendationEngine" as recEngine
    component "ModelExecutionService" as modelExecSvc
    component "PurchaseService" as purchaseSvc
    component "DatasetDownloadService" as datasetDownloadSvc
}

' Presentation Layer
package "Presentation Layer" {
    component "Web UI (Vue + TypeScript)" as webUI
}

' External Systems
cloud "External Systems" {
    component "Email Service" as emailSvc
    component "Payment Gateway" as paymentGw
}

' Dependencies - Service to Repository
accountSvc --> userRepo : uses
qnaSvc --> questionRepo : uses
qnaSvc --> answerRepo : uses
blogSvc --> blogPostRepo : uses
blogCommentSvc --> blogCommentRepo : uses
modelSvc --> modelRepo : uses
datasetSvc --> datasetRepo : uses
followSvc --> userRepo : uses
recEngine --> modelRepo : uses
recEngine --> userRepo : uses
purchaseSvc --> transactionRepo : uses
purchaseSvc --> modelRepo : uses
purchaseSvc --> datasetRepo : uses
modelExecSvc --> modelRepo : uses

' Authentication dependencies
webUI --> accountSvc : authenticates via
qnaSvc --> accountSvc : authenticates via

@startuml
' --- Configuration & Styles ---
skinparam topboxSelection true
skinparam Direction top to bottom
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false

' Define Styles based on original ClassDefs
<style>
    .client {
        BackgroundColor #e1f5fe
        LineColor #01579b
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .service {
        BackgroundColor #e8f5e9
        LineColor #2e7d32
        LineThickness 2
    }
    .db {
        BackgroundColor #fff9c4
        LineColor #fbc02d
        LineThickness 2
    }
</style>

' --- Client Layer ---
package "Browser / Client Layer" as Browser_Layer {
    rectangle "Frontend Interface\n(Bootstrap-Vue)" as FE_Interface <<client>>
}

' --- Server Layer ---
package "Server Layer\n(Spring Boot)" as Server_Layer {
    
    package "Core Modules" as Core_Modules {
        ' Layout is TB within the package
        rectangle "Account Management Module" as AccountMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Q&A Community Module" as QAMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Blog Sharing Module" as BlogMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Model Management Module" as ModelMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Dataset Management Module" as DatasetMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Following Management Module" as FollowMod <<service>>
        rectangle "Admin Module" as AdminMod <<service>>
    }
}

' --- Database Layer ---
package "Database Layer\n(MySQL)" as Database_Layer {
    database "User Data" as UserDB <<db>>
    database "Q&A Community Data" as QADB <<db>>
    database "Blog Data" as BlogDB <<db>>
    database "Model Data" as ModelDB <<db>>
    database "Dataset Data" as DatasetDB <<db>>
    database "Following Data" as FollowDB <<db>>
}

' --- Relationships ---
FE_Interface --> Core_Modules
Core_Modules --> Database_Layer

@enduml

samples.title: TextAnnotationSystem / direct/gpt-5
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
title ITAS - System Architecture

actor "System Annotation Administrator" as Admin
actor "Data Annotator" as Annotator
actor "Researcher" as Researcher

boundary "ITAS Web UI\n(Vue 3 + Ant Design + Axios)" as WebUI

Admin --> WebUI
Annotator --> WebUI
Researcher --> WebUI

node "Tencent Cloud / Docker" as Cloud {
  node "Edge / Proxy" {
    component "Nginx\nReverse Proxy & Static Assets" as Nginx
  }

  package "Backend (Spring Boot / Spring Cloud Microservices)" as Backend {
    component "API Gateway\n(Spring Cloud Gateway + Spring Security)" as Gateway
    component "Service Discovery & Config\n(Spring Cloud)" as Registry

    package "Annotation Subsystem" {
      component "User & Auth Service\n(Registration, Login, Profile, Roles)" as UserSvc
      component "Project Service" as ProjectSvc
      component "Document Service" as DocSvc
      component "Tag Service" as TagSvc
      component "Task Service" as TaskSvc
      component "Annotation Mark & Result Service" as MarkSvc
      component "Export Service" as ExportSvc
    }

    package "Mining Subsystem" {
      component "Mining Orchestrator Service\n(Upload, Model Selection, Extraction)" as MiningSvc
      component "Model / Preset Catalog Service" as ModelCatalog
      component "File Conversion Worker\n(Async consumer)" as ConvertWorker
    }
  }

  package "Data & Messaging" {
    database "MySQL\n(Relational Records)" as MySQL
    component "Redis\n(Cache)" as Redis
    component "RabbitMQ\n(Message Queue)" as MQ
    cloud "Minio\n(Object Storage)" as Minio
  }

  package "ML Runtime" {
    component "BERT Paragraph Model" as BERT
  }

  note right of Cloud
  Deployment: Tencent Cloud (C-010) + Docker (C-009)
  end note
}

cloud "Third-party GPT API\n(ChatGPT-like Interface)" as GPT

' UI / Proxy / Gateway
WebUI -[#blue]-> Nginx : HTTP(S)\nStatic assets + API calls
Nginx -[#blue]-> Gateway : Reverse proxy\nREST/JSON

' Gateway to services
Gateway -[#green]-> UserSvc
Gateway -[#green]-> ProjectSvc
Gateway -[#green]-> DocSvc
Gateway -[#green]-> TagSvc
Gateway -[#green]-> TaskSvc
Gateway -[#green]-> MarkSvc
Gateway -[#green]-> ExportSvc
Gateway -[#green]-> MiningSvc
Gateway -[#green]-> ModelCatalog

' Service discovery and config
UserSvc -[#gray]-> Registry : Register / Discover
ProjectSvc -[#gray]-> Registry
DocSvc -[#gray]-> Registry
TagSvc -[#gray]-> Registry
TaskSvc -[#gray]-> Registry
MarkSvc -[#gray]-> Registry
ExportSvc -[#gray]-> Registry
MiningSvc -[#gray]-> Registry
ModelCatalog -[#gray]-> Registry
ConvertWorker -[#gray]-> Registry

' Data stores usage
UserSvc -[#brown]-> MySQL
UserSvc -[#brown]-> Redis : Session / Token / Cache
ProjectSvc -[#brown]-> MySQL
ProjectSvc -[#brown]-> Redis
DocSvc -[#brown]-> MySQL : Metadata, indexes\n(PDF/HTML/TXT refs)
DocSvc -[#brown]-> Minio : Uploads / Downloads
DocSvc -[#brown]-> MQ : enqueue file.convert
TagSvc -[#brown]-> MySQL
TaskSvc -[#brown]-> MySQL
TaskSvc -[#brown]-> Redis : Task lists cache
MarkSvc -[#brown]-> MySQL : Annotation results
ExportSvc -[#brown]-> MySQL
MiningSvc -[#brown]-> MySQL : Mining jobs, results
MiningSvc -[#brown]-> Minio : Read converted docs
MiningSvc -[#brown]-> Redis : Intermediate cache
ConvertWorker -[#brown]-> MQ : consume file.convert
ConvertWorker -[#brown]-> Minio : Store PDF/HTML/TXT
ConvertWorker -[#brown]-> MySQL : Update refs / status

' ML integrations
MiningSvc -[#purple]-> ModelCatalog : List / select models & presets
MiningSvc -[#purple]-> BERT : Paragraph localization (C-007)
MiningSvc -[#purple]-> GPT : Entity extraction / few-shot (AD-002)

' Cross-subsystem data sharing
MiningSvc ..[#darkgreen].> MarkSvc : Retrieve annotated examples\n(DIO-003) few-shot support

' Download support
ExportSvc -[#brown]-> Minio : Export files / bundles
ExportSvc -[#brown]-> MySQL : Query result sets

' External communications and quality notes
note right of WebUI
UI-001/002/003/004/005/023
COM-001: Axios async REST
end note

note right of Nginx
COM-002: Reverse proxy, LB
Serves SPA assets
end note

note right of Gateway
Security: Spring Security (NFR-005)
Routing, AuthN/AuthZ
end note

note right of Registry
COM-003: Service discovery & config
NFR-004: Scalability / Extensibility
end note

note right of MQ
COM-004 / NFR-009:
Async processing (e.g., file conversion)
end note

note right of Minio
DSR-002: Object storage for
documents and conversions
Stores PDF/HTML/TXT objects
end note

note right of MySQL
DSR-001: Structured records
Users, projects, tags, tasks,
annotation results, indexes
end note

note right of GPT
AD-002: Requires third-party API
end note

' Actor workflows
Admin --> WebUI : Manage presets, users,\nprojects, documents, export
Annotator --> WebUI : Execute tasks,\ncreate marks and results
Researcher --> WebUI : Upload, select model,\nrun extraction, view results

' File download flow from UI
WebUI -[#blue]-> Nginx : Download request
Nginx -[#blue]-> Gateway
Gateway -[#green]-> ExportSvc
ExportSvc ..[#brown].> Minio : Signed URL / object ref

@enduml

samples.title: Indoor_Fitness_App / metagpt-custom/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml

' ===== LAYER DEFINITIONS =====
package "Presentation Layer" {
  component "Mobile App UI" as mobile_ui
  component "Real-Time Exercise Interface" as exercise_ui
}

package "Business Logic Layer" {
  component "Training Plan Engine" as plan_engine
  component "Plan Recommendation Engine" as rec_engine
  component "Custom Plan Builder" as plan_builder
  component "Report/Poster Generator" as report_gen
  component "User & Permission Manager" as user_mgr
  component "Authentication Service" as auth_svc
  component "Exercise History Manager" as history_mgr
  component "Exercise State Monitor" as state_monitor
}

package "Data Access Layer" {
  component "Data Access Layer" as data_access
}

package "Device/Network Layer" {
  component "Camera Capture Manager" as camera_mgr
  component "Real-Time Pose Estimator" as pose_estimator
  component "Posture Evaluation Scorer" as posture_scorer
  component "Casting Service" as casting_svc
}

' ===== EXTERNAL SYSTEMS =====
cloud "Mobile Phone Camera" as camera_hw
cloud "Server-Side Processing" as server_side
node "Casting Target Device" as cast_target

' ===== DEPENDENCIES =====
' Presentation Layer internal
mobile_ui --> exercise_ui : "displays"

' Device/Network Layer internal
pose_estimator --> camera_mgr : "video stream"
posture_scorer --> pose_estimator : "skeleton data"

' Business Logic Layer internal
rec_engine --> plan_engine : "enhances"
plan_builder --> plan_engine : "extends"
state_monitor --> pose_estimator : "monitors"
state_monitor --> posture_scorer : "monitors"
auth_svc --> user_mgr : "verifies for"

' Presentation to Business Layer
mobile_ui --> user_mgr : "user management"
mobile_ui --> auth_svc : "login requests"
mobile_ui --> plan_engine : "plan requests"
mobile_ui --> plan_builder : "custom plan creation"
mobile_ui --> report_gen : "generation requests"
mobile_ui --> history_mgr : "history requests"
mobile_ui --> camera_mgr : "camera control"
mobile_ui --> casting_svc : "initiates casting"

' Business to Presentation Layer
exercise_ui --> posture_scorer : "displays score"
exercise_ui --> state_monitor : "displays progress"
exercise_ui --> casting_svc : "video stream"

' Business Logic to Data Access
plan_engine --> data_access
rec_engine --> data_access
report_gen --> data_access
user_mgr --> data_access
history_mgr --> data_access
plan_builder --> data_access

' Data Access to External
data_access --> server_side : "API calls"

' Device/Network to External
camera_mgr --> camera_hw : "captures from"
casting_svc --> cast_target : "casts to"

' Business Logic to Device/Network
plan_engine --> posture_scorer : "evaluation requests"
report_gen --> posture_scorer : "score data"
report_gen --> history_mgr : "historical data"

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' --- Configuration & Styles ---
skinparam ranksep 50
skinparam nodesep 40
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
left to right direction

' Styling for different layers
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor<<client>> #e1f5fe
    BorderColor<<client>> #01579b
    
    BackgroundColor<<native>> #bbdefb
    BorderColor<<native>> #0d47a1
    
    BackgroundColor<<react>> #c8e6c9
    BorderColor<<react>> #1b5e20
    
    BackgroundColor<<bridge>> #00acc1
    BorderColor<<bridge>> #006064
    FontColor<<bridge>> white
    
    BackgroundColor<<infra>> #f5f5f5
    BorderColor<<infra>> #212121
    BorderStyle<<infra>> dashed
}

' --- Diagram Definitions ---

' Layer 1: Client Layer
package "Client / Platforms" as ClientLayer <<client>> {
    rectangle "Mobile Device" as Mobile <<client>>
    rectangle "Desktop PC" as Desktop <<client>>
    rectangle "Web Browser" as Web <<client>>
    rectangle "Android OS" as Android <<client>>
    rectangle "iOS / Apple" as iOS <<client>>
    rectangle "Smart Watch / Wearables" as IoT <<client>>
}

' Layer 2: Native Module Layer
package "Native Modules" as NativeLayer <<native>> {
    rectangle "Camera Call" as Camera <<native>>
    rectangle "Model Loading / TensorFlow" as ModelLoad <<native>>
    rectangle "Linear Algebra Library" as LinearAlgebra <<native>>
    rectangle "Voice Library Call" as Voice <<native>>
    rectangle "GPU Computing" as GPU <<native>>
    rectangle "Screen Recording" as ScreenRec <<native>>
    rectangle "Socket Communication" as Socket <<native>>
    rectangle "Data Processing" as DataProc <<native>>
    rectangle "Permission Requests" as Permissions <<native>>
}

' Layer 3: Cross-Platform Framework Layer
package "React Native Framework" as RNLayer <<react>> {
    rectangle "Native Module Bridge" as NativeBridge <<bridge>>
    rectangle "Data Caching" as DataCaching <<react>>
    rectangle "Server Access" as ServerAccess <<react>>
    rectangle "Redux State Management" as Redux <<react>>
    rectangle "Interface Packaging" as APIPkg <<react>>
    rectangle "Data Interception" as DataIntercept <<react>>
    rectangle "End-to-End Communication" as P2P <<react>>
}

' Sidebar: Infrastructure
package "Infrastructure & Support" as InfraLayer <<infra>> {
    rectangle "Data Exchange" as DataExchange <<infra>>
    rectangle "Performance Optimization" as Performance <<infra>>
    rectangle "Stability Construction" as Stability <<infra>>
}

' --- Relationships ---

ClientLayer --> NativeLayer
NativeLayer <--> NativeBridge

' Directing bridge to RN components
NativeBridge --- DataCaching
NativeBridge --- ServerAccess
NativeBridge --- Redux
NativeBridge --- APIPkg
NativeBridge --- DataIntercept
NativeBridge --- P2P

' Infrastructure interaction (dashed as per original)
NativeLayer ..> InfraLayer
RNLayer ..> InfraLayer

@enduml

However, it lacks architectural mechanisms for specific non-functional requirements like data leakage protection (NFR-012) and SQL injection prevention (NFR-013).

faithfulness.reasoning: The diagram is largely faithful to the SRS. It relies heavily on the capabilities mentioned in the text. However, treating 'Server-Side Processing' as an external cloud entity accessed entirely through a generic Data Access layer slightly contradicts the SRS statement that plan recommendation and report generation involve server-side participation, as it places those engines in a shared Business Logic Layer without explicit deployment boundaries.

architectural_rationality.reasoning: The layered architecture provides good separation of concerns (Presentation, Business, Data, Device). However, the lack of distinction between client-side and server-side deployment nodes creates ambiguity. Since the app interacts with a server and local hardware (camera, casting target), a C4 Container diagram or explicit client/server boundary would have been more rational than a monolithic logical layering.

@startuml
title Model Evolution Version Management Visualization Tool - System Architecture

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA

left to right direction

actor Learner
actor "Model Contributor" as Contributor
actor Administrator

node "Client Layer" {
  component "Web Browser (Chrome, Firefox, 360)" as Browser
}

node "Front-End Layer" {
  component "Account Management UI" as AccountUI
  component "Model Search and View UI" as ModelViewUI
  component "Model Contribution UI" as ModelEditUI
  component "Evolution Relationship UI" as EvoUI
  component "User Management UI" as UserMgmtUI
  component "Navigation and Layout" as NavUI
}

node "Back-End Layer" {
  component "Account Service" as AccountSvc
  component "Model Service" as ModelSvc
  component "Evolution Service" as EvoSvc
  component "User Management Service" as UserMgmtSvc
  component "Security and Encryption Module" as SecurityMod
  component "Performance and Concurrency Manager" as PerfMod
}

node "Algorithm Support Layer" {
  component "Python Libraries" as PythonLib
  component "Model Analysis Engine" as AnalysisEngine
  component "ONNX Processor" as OnnxProc
  component "PyTorch Code Handler" as PyTorchHandler
}

node "Data Layer" {
  database "MySQL" as MySQL
  database "Neo4j" as Neo4j
}

Learner --> Browser
Contributor --> Browser
Administrator --> Browser

Browser --> AccountUI
Browser --> ModelViewUI
Browser --> ModelEditUI
Browser --> EvoUI
Browser --> UserMgmtUI
Browser --> NavUI

AccountUI --> AccountSvc
ModelViewUI --> ModelSvc
ModelViewUI --> EvoSvc
ModelEditUI --> ModelSvc
EvoUI --> EvoSvc
UserMgmtUI --> UserMgmtSvc

AccountSvc --> SecurityMod
ModelSvc --> SecurityMod
EvoSvc --> SecurityMod
UserMgmtSvc --> SecurityMod

AccountSvc --> PerfMod
ModelSvc --> PerfMod
EvoSvc --> PerfMod

ModelSvc --> AnalysisEngine
ModelSvc --> OnnxProc
ModelSvc --> PyTorchHandler
EvoSvc --> AnalysisEngine

AnalysisEngine --> PythonLib
OnnxProc --> PythonLib
PyTorchHandler --> PythonLib

AccountSvc --> MySQL
ModelSvc --> MySQL
UserMgmtSvc --> MySQL
EvoSvc --> MySQL
EvoSvc --> Neo4j
ModelSvc --> Neo4j

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
' Directional setting (Top to Down)
top to bottom direction

' Styling for different layers
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor<<Frontend>> #e1f5fe
    BorderColor<<Frontend>> #01579b
    
    BackgroundColor<<Presentation>> #f3e5f5
    BorderColor<<Presentation>> #4a148c
    
    BackgroundColor<<Backend>> #fff3e0
    BorderColor<<Backend>> #e65100
}

skinparam database {
    BackgroundColor<<Storage>> #e8f5e9
    BorderColor<<Storage>> #1b5e20
}

' Layers / Subgraphs
package "Frontend Layer" {
    rectangle "React Framework" as React <<Frontend>>
    rectangle "React-Router: Page Navigation" as Router <<Frontend>>
    rectangle "Netron: Node Drawing Features" as NetronFE <<Frontend>>
}

package "Data Presentation Layer" {
    rectangle "RESTful API Design" as RESTAPI <<Presentation>>
    rectangle "Netron: Graph Representation Language" as GraphLang <<Presentation>>
}

package "Backend Layer" {
    rectangle "Flask: Backend Framework" as Flask <<Backend>>
    rectangle "SQLAlchemy: ORM Framework" as SQLAlchemy <<Backend>>
    rectangle "Netron: Model Conversion & Parsing" as NetronBE <<Backend>>
}

package "Storage / Database Layer" {
    database "MySQL: Relational Database" as MySQL <<Storage>>
    database "Neo4j: Graph Database" as Neo4j <<Storage>>
}

' Relationships
React --> Router
React --> NetronFE
React --> RESTAPI
NetronFE --> GraphLang
RESTAPI --> Flask
GraphLang --> Flask
Flask --> SQLAlchemy
Flask --> NetronBE
SQLAlchemy --> MySQL
Flask --> Neo4j

@enduml

samples.title: s000064_6a496ab6 / metagpt-custom/claude-sonnet-4-6
samples.pred_source:
@startuml Gran-Book Backend Platform

skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam componentStyle uml2
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam defaultFontSize 12

skinparam package {
  BorderColor #555555
  FontColor #222222
  FontStyle bold
}

skinparam component {
  BorderColor #336699
  BackgroundColor #DDEEFF
  FontColor #111111
}

skinparam node {
  BorderColor #446644
  BackgroundColor #DDEEDD
  FontColor #111111
}

skinparam database {
  BorderColor #996633
  BackgroundColor #FFF3CC
  FontColor #111111
}

skinparam cloud {
  BorderColor #886699
  BackgroundColor #EEE0FF
  FontColor #111111
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' CLIENT LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Client Layer" as ClientLayer #EEF4FF {
  component [Native Mobile Apps] as MobileApps
  component [Administrative Web App] as AdminWebApp
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' INFRASTRUCTURE LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Infrastructure Layer (GCP)" as InfraLayer #E8F5E9 {
  node "GCP Load Balancer" as LoadBalancer
  node "GKE Cluster" as GKECluster
  node "GCE Virtual Machine (Operational Tooling / TLS)" as GCEVirtualMachine
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' GATEWAY / BFF LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Gateway / BFF Layer" as GatewayLayer #FFF8DC {
  component [GatewayBFF] as GatewayBFF
  note right of GatewayBFF
    Request Routing
    Protocol Adaptation
    Response Aggregation
    Serves mobile and admin clients
  end note
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' INTERNAL SERVICES LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Internal Services Layer" as ServicesLayer #E3F2FD {
  package "GKE Deployed Containers" as GKEDeploy #D0E8FB {
    component [AuthAPI] as AuthAPI
    note right of AuthAPI : Authentication Domain
    component [UserAPI] as UserAPI
    note right of UserAPI : User Management (Golang)
    component [BookAPI] as BookAPI
    note right of BookAPI : Book Management
    component [ECSiteAPI] as ECSiteAPI
    note right of ECSiteAPI : EC Site Operations
    component [SupportAPI] as SupportAPI
    note right of SupportAPI : Support and Information (Isolated)
    component [MessageService] as MessageService
    note right of MessageService : Message and Notification Management
  }
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' DATA LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "Data Layer" as DataLayer #FFF3E0 {
  database "MySQLStore\n(Users, Books, EC Site)" as MySQLStore
  database "NoSQLStore\n(Message Data)" as NoSQLStore
  database "ObjectStorage\n(Thumbnails / Binary Objects, GCS)" as ObjectStorage
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' EXTERNAL INTEGRATION LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
package "External Integration Layer" as ExternalLayer #F3E5F5 {
  cloud "Firebase Authentication" as FirebaseAuth
  cloud "Book-Search API (External Book Lookup)" as BookSearchAPI
  cloud "Stripe (Payment Processing)" as Stripe
  cloud "Push Notification Provider" as PushNotif
  cloud "Email Notification Provider" as EmailNotif
  cloud "Let's Encrypt (TLS / DNS-01)" as LetsEncrypt
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' ROUTING WAYPOINTS
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
component [HTTPS / REST Entry] as ClientEntryPoint
component [Internal API (gRPC / HTTP)] as InternalGW

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' DEPENDENCIES — CLIENT → INFRA
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
MobileApps  --> ClientEntryPoint : HTTPS
AdminWebApp --> ClientEntryPoint : HTTPS (admin access path)
ClientEntryPoint --> LoadBalancer : inbound TLS traffic

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' DEPENDENCIES — INFRA → GATEWAY
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
LoadBalancer --> GatewayBFF : route to BFF entry point

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' DEPENDENCIES — GATEWAY → INTERNAL SERVICES
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
GatewayBFF --> InternalGW
InternalGW --> AuthAPI        : auth requests
InternalGW --> UserAPI        : user management requests
InternalGW --> BookAPI        : book management requests
InternalGW --> ECSiteAPI      : EC site requests
InternalGW --> SupportAPI     : support requests
InternalGW --> MessageService : message and notification requests

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' DEPENDENCIES — SERVICES → DATA LAYER
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
UserAPI        --> MySQLStore    : user data persistence
BookAPI        --> MySQLStore    : book data persistence
ECSiteAPI      --> MySQLStore    : EC site data persistence
SupportAPI     --> MySQLStore    : support data persistence
MessageService --> NoSQLStore    : message data persistence
UserAPI        --> ObjectStorage : profile thumbnail objects (DR-006)

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' DEPENDENCIES — SERVICES → EXTERNAL SYSTEMS
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
AuthAPI        --> FirebaseAuth  : delegate credential validation
BookAPI        --> BookSearchAPI : external book lookup integration
ECSiteAPI      --> Stripe        : payment processing delegation
MessageService --> PushNotif     : push notification dispatch
MessageService --> EmailNotif    : email notification dispatch

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' DEPENDENCIES — GKE ORCHESTRATION
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
GKECluster --> GKEDeploy : orchestrates containers

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' DEPENDENCIES — GCE VM → TLS CHAIN
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
GCEVirtualMachine --> LetsEncrypt   : TLS cert provisioning (DNS-01 challenge)
GCEVirtualMachine --> LoadBalancer  : applies provisioned TLS certificates

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
left to right direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5
skinparam package {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam database {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam cloud {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}

rectangle "Native App" as NativeApp
rectangle "Web Admin App" as WebApp

package "Backend" as Backend {
    rectangle "L7 Load Balancer" as LoadBalancer

    package "BFF / API Gateway" as BffGateway {
        rectangle "Native App Gateway" as NativeGateway
        rectangle "Admin Console Gateway" as AdminGateway
    }

    package "Microservices" as Microservices {
        rectangle "Store Service" as StoreService
        rectangle "Book Service" as BookService
        rectangle "Auth API" as AuthService
        rectangle "Admin Service" as AdminService
        rectangle "User Service" as UserService
        rectangle "Support Service" as SupportService
        rectangle "Notification Service" as NotificationService
    }

    package "Database" as Databases {
        database "RDB\n(MySQL)" as Mysql
        database "NoSQL\n(Firestore)" as Firestore
    }

    package "File Storage" as FileStorage {
        cloud "NAS\n(Cloud Storage)" as CloudStorage
    }

    package "External APIs" as ExternalApis {
        cloud "Firebase\nAuthentication" as FirebaseAuth
        cloud "Google Books API" as BooksApi
        cloud "Stripe" as Stripe
        cloud "Push Notification\n(FCM)" as Fcm
        cloud "Email Sending\n(SendGrid)" as SendGrid
    }
}

NativeApp <--> LoadBalancer : HTTP(s)
WebApp <--> LoadBalancer : HTTP(s)
LoadBalancer --> NativeGateway : route native API
LoadBalancer --> AdminGateway : route admin API

NativeGateway --> AuthService : gRPC
NativeGateway --> UserService : gRPC
NativeGateway --> BookService : gRPC
NativeGateway --> StoreService : gRPC
NativeGateway --> SupportService : gRPC
AdminGateway --> AdminService : gRPC
AdminGateway --> UserService : gRPC
AdminGateway --> BookService : gRPC
AdminGateway --> SupportService : gRPC

BookService --> StoreService : service call
AuthService --> FirebaseAuth : authentication
StoreService --> Mysql : store/order data
BookService --> Mysql : book data
UserService --> Mysql : user data
SupportService --> Firestore : message data
BookService --> CloudStorage : thumbnails

BookService --> BooksApi : book search
StoreService --> Stripe : payment
UserService --> NotificationService : notification request
SupportService --> NotificationService : support notice
NotificationService --> Fcm : push notification
NotificationService --> SendGrid : email
@enduml

samples.title: s000067_4d85c913 / direct/deepseek-v3.2
samples.pred_source:
@startuml
!define RECTANGLE class
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #FEFEFE
skinparam defaultFontName Helvetica
skinparam defaultFontSize 12
skinparam roundCorner 10
skinparam shadowing false

title TraceLeft System Architecture

package "Userspace" {
  [CLI Entry Point] as CLI
  [Trace Command] as TraceCmd
  [Userspace Tracer] as Tracer
  [Event Configuration Metadata] as Config
  [Handler Generator] as Generator
  [Generated eBPF Handler Source] as HandlerSource
}

package "Kernel Space" {
  [Linux Kernel] as Kernel
  [eBPF Subsystem] as eBPF
  [kprobe/kretprobe] as Probes
  [Perf Event Channel] as PerfChannel
}

package "eBPF Programs" {
  [Main eBPF Program] as MainBPF
  [Handler eBPF Programs] as HandlerBPF
  [Handler Maps] as HandlerMaps
}

CLI --> TraceCmd : "dispatches\ntrace command"
TraceCmd --> Tracer : "initiates\ntracing session"
TraceCmd --> Config : "reads event\nconfiguration"
Config --> Generator : "provides metadata\n(Proto/JSON)"
Generator --> HandlerSource : "generates\nsource code"
HandlerSource --> eBPF : "loaded as\neBPF programs"

Tracer --> eBPF : "loads eBPF programs\nvia gobpf"
eBPF --> MainBPF : "loads main program"
eBPF --> HandlerBPF : "loads handler programs"
eBPF --> HandlerMaps : "creates/updates maps"

MainBPF --> Probes : "attaches to\nkprobe/kretprobe hooks"
Probes --> HandlerMaps : "keys by\nprocess context"
HandlerMaps --> HandlerBPF : "selects handler\nprograms"
HandlerBPF --> PerfChannel : "emits events\nwith common header"
PerfChannel --> Tracer : "delivers events\nfor dispatch"

note right of HandlerMaps
  Naming scheme:
  handle_NAME_progs
  handle_NAME_progs_ret
end note

note right of HandlerBPF
  Naming scheme:
  kprobe/handle_NAME
  kretprobe/handle_NAME
end note

note right of PerfChannel
  Events contain common
  leading section for
  userspace dispatch
end note

@enduml
samples.gt_source:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
left to right direction

skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #34495E
skinparam ArrowThickness 1.5
skinparam package {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}
skinparam database {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    BorderColor #555555
    BorderThickness 1
}

package "Linux Kernel Functions" as KernelFunctions {
    rectangle "sys_write()" as SysWrite
    rectangle "sys_open()" as SysOpen
    rectangle "inet_csk_accept()" as InetAccept
}

package "Main eBPF Program" as MainEbpf {
    rectangle "Kprobe\nentry probe" as Kprobe
    rectangle "Kretprobe\nreturn probe" as Kretprobe
    rectangle "Kprobe / Kretprobe\nother traced calls" as OtherProbe
    database "Prog Map\npid to fd" as ProgMap
    database "Ret Prog Map\npid to fd" as RetProgMap
    database "Prog Maps\nhandler mappings" as OtherProgMaps
}

database "Prog ID Map\npid to id" as ProgIdMap

package "Event Handler eBPF Programs" as HandlerPrograms {
    rectangle "Handler Probe\nhandle_syscall_write" as WriteHandler
    rectangle "Default Handler Probes" as DefaultHandlers
    rectangle "Process Specific\nHandler Probes" as ProcessHandlers
}

database "Perf Event Map\nshared event map" as PerfEventMap

rectangle "TraceLeft\nCLI and library tracer" as TraceLeft

SysWrite --> Kprobe : triggers entry probe
SysWrite --> Kretprobe : triggers return probe
SysOpen --> OtherProbe : triggers trace probe
InetAccept --> OtherProbe : triggers network trace

Kprobe --> ProgMap : lookup handler fd
Kretprobe --> RetProgMap : lookup return handler fd
OtherProbe --> OtherProgMaps : lookup handler mapping

TraceLeft --> ProgMap : update default handlers
TraceLeft --> RetProgMap : update return handlers
TraceLeft --> OtherProgMaps : update process handlers
TraceLeft --> ProgIdMap : update pid to program id

ProgMap --> WriteHandler : tail call
RetProgMap --> WriteHandler : tail call return handler
OtherProgMaps --> DefaultHandlers : tail call
OtherProgMaps --> ProcessHandlers : tail call
WriteHandler --> ProgIdMap : lookup program id

WriteHandler --> PerfEventMap : perf_event_output\ncommon section first
DefaultHandlers --> PerfEventMap : emit events\ncommon section first
ProcessHandlers --> PerfEventMap : emit events\ncommon section first
PerfEventMap --> TraceLeft : events
@enduml

samples.title: s000067_4d85c913 / metagpt-custom/gpt-5
samples.pred_source:
@startuml

package "CLI Layer" {
  component "CLI Entry Point"
  component "Trace Command"
  component "Event Registration Parser"
  artifact "Event Registration Structure\n(ProgramID, Pids, ELFPath)" as ERS
}

package "Userspace Library/Tracer Layer" {
  component "TraceLeft Library"
  component "Probe Loader/Installer"
  component "Userspace Tracer"
  component "Common Event Header"
  component "Handler Naming Scheme"
}

node "Linux OS Environment" {
  node "Linux kernel eBPF subsystem" as eBPFSub

  package "Kernel eBPF Runtime Layer" {
    component "Main eBPF Program"
    component "Handler eBPF Programs"
    database "Handler Maps and Return-Program Maps"
    interface "Linux perf event channel"
    interface "kprobe/kretprobe"
  }
}

package "Code Generation Layer" {
  component "Code Generator"
}

cloud "gobpf"
cloud "Proto/JSON Event Configuration Source"

' Key dependencies and flows
"CLI Entry Point" -> "Trace Command"
"Trace Command" -> "Event Registration Parser"
"Event Registration Parser" -> ERS

"Trace Command" -> "TraceLeft Library"
"TraceLeft Library" -> ERS
"TraceLeft Library" -> "Probe Loader/Installer"
"TraceLeft Library" -> "Userspace Tracer"

"TraceLeft Library" -> "gobpf"
"gobpf" -> eBPFSub

"Probe Loader/Installer" -> "kprobe/kretprobe"
"Probe Loader/Installer" -> "Handler Naming Scheme"
"Probe Loader/Installer" -> "Handler eBPF Programs"
"Probe Loader/Installer" -> "Handler Maps and Return-Program Maps"

"Main eBPF Program" -> "Handler Maps and Return-Program Maps"
"Main eBPF Program" -> "kprobe/kretprobe"
"Main eBPF Program" -> "Handler eBPF Programs" : via tail calls

"Handler eBPF Programs" -> "Linux perf event channel"
"Handler eBPF Programs" -> "Common Event Header"

"Linux perf event channel" -> "Userspace Tracer"
"Userspace Tracer" -> "Common Event Header"

"Code Generator" -> "Proto/JSON Event Configuration Source"
"Code Generator" -> "Handler eBPF Programs"

@enduml
